Name: Triveni Terrace Cafe
Address: 205, Tansen Marg, Opp. FICCI Auditorium, Todermal Road Area, Mandi House, New Delhi
Author: Pradeep Bhatia
Review:
This is a small cafe which is part outdoors and part indoors.
It is a nice place to go to when combined with a visit to an event happening in the Triveni Kala Sangam. Such places have a charm of their own as they are quite different from a regular restaurant.
We had a good experience. The service was polite, quick. whatever we ordered was excellent value for money.

Name: Triveni Terrace Cafe
Address: 205, Tansen Marg, Opp. FICCI Auditorium, Todermal Road Area, Mandi House, New Delhi
Author: Wandering Akriti
Review:
One the very few places that made me rate them 1 star. I don’t usually rate any restaurant so low. But the service here is pathetic and rude. Food is notoriously tasteless. Sitting is absolutely uncomfortable. I could have passed it saying rustic interior but I’m not gonna lie to you. It’s just not good.

They won’t let you eat in peace and throw the menu at your face for next round of order. The ragi idli was way too salty and the lassi was way too sweet.

Not gonna recommend.

The only good part was the green Open air theatre outside where I sat to write this review.

Also the name is misleading. It’s not a terrace cafe. It’s on ground floor with some open air sitting space.

Name: Triveni Terrace Cafe
Address: 205, Tansen Marg, Opp. FICCI Auditorium, Todermal Road Area, Mandi House, New Delhi
Author: Rajeev Verma
Review:
It's one of the best cafe in the central Delhi area, good food, good ambience, great vibes, art , theater, music, etc,

The food is just amazing, the menu is very simple and the prices are very reasonable , their drinks are also simple but tasty..

Parking is not a problem, the place is simply outstanding... worth going again and again...

Name: Triveni Terrace Cafe
Address: 205, Tansen Marg, Opp. FICCI Auditorium, Todermal Road Area, Mandi House, New Delhi
Author: shivani dubey
Review: This place is such a soothing, cozy place to relax & enjoy food. They also organized some kind of dance performances & other cultural related fests. Basically it is an art gallery where you can enjoy some different kinds of pictures photographed by some famous persons.

Name: Triveni Terrace Cafe
Address: 205, Tansen Marg, Opp. FICCI Auditorium, Todermal Road Area, Mandi House, New Delhi
Author: Srishti Jha
Review:
*Ambience (4.5/5) :- The ambience was too cool and cozy. Ideal place to visit during monsoon. It is situated inside Triveni Kala Sangam so you can both enjoy food and Art

* Service (5/5):- The service was very fast unexpectedly. The staff were very cooperative and friendly.

*Food (5/5):- Ordered their Palak Patta Chaat ; Masal chai and Veg thali
Palak patta chaat was damn tasty . Couldn't wait more to take pictures 😀 Also chai and veg thali were good too. Must try their palak patta chaat if you visit.

OVERALL VERDICT:- 5/5

Name: Another Fine Day Cafe & Reading Room
Address: Ground Floor, MPD Tower, Golf Course Rd, DLF Phase 5, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Siddhant Chopra
Review:
I really had a good breakfast experience at this place. A good part is that they serve all day breakfast which means u can have it at anytime

My favourite were the pancake with banana on the side of Nutella and maple syrup and tomato mozzarella sandwich
The cold coffee was nice too

You can definitely plan a breakfast outing with friends/family 😉 #mydeliciousjourney

Name: Another Fine Day Cafe & Reading Room
Address: Ground Floor, MPD Tower, Golf Course Rd, DLF Phase 5, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Ram narayan Vanneri
Review: Was here for lunch on a weekday. The place was not busy and we found the table without waiting. The place is located inside a corporate building on the ground floor. They have few books and indoor games available for use. The food was great, specially the sandwich. Digital payment are accepted. The place was quite and has tables suitable for couples and groups. They also have high chairs.

Name: Another Fine Day Cafe & Reading Room
Address: Ground Floor, MPD Tower, Golf Course Rd, DLF Phase 5, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Ashish Mishra
Review:
Excellent cafe with a great selection for brunch.This cafe is cozy and beautifully designed, i loved the area of books and games available in this place..They have a lot on their menu ranging from burgers to pasta to mezze platters and mains along with beverages and desserts.The food is also good and the coffee is decent.A great place to hangout with friends or family.

I definitely recommend ...

Name: Another Fine Day Cafe & Reading Room
Address: Ground Floor, MPD Tower, Golf Course Rd, DLF Phase 5, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Sidharth Shukla
Review:
Been here a few times since one started working on golf course road.

Nice place with a decent menu. Can be quite full on weekdays during lunch owing to being located near so many offices.

Small parking space which can be a pain but do ask the guard for help.

Prices are OK depending on what you eat. In some cases I think it's over priced.. A simple ham (chicken not pork) and cheese sandwich is almost 400... Good sandwich but shoukd be closer to 250 for quantity given.

Worth a visit.

Name: Another Fine Day Cafe & Reading Room
Address: Ground Floor, MPD Tower, Golf Course Rd, DLF Phase 5, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Sahil Mittal
Review: This cafe is cozy and beautifully designed, exuding a delightful ambiance and vibe. I especially loved the array of books and games available to enjoy alongside your meal. Moreover, the food was delicious, adding to the overall experience. It's a charming spot for a relaxing meal.

Name: Diggin Cafe
Address: Santushti Shopping Complex Shop No-10 Opp Samrat Hotel, New Delhi
Author: Akshank Sharma
Review: I went there for lunch with my friends. There was about 30 min waiting time. There were indoor and outdoor dinning options. Ambience was good and staff is friendly, and the service is quick. If you're looking for a chill place with good food, Diggin cafe is definitely worth a visit!

Name: Diggin Cafe
Address: Santushti Shopping Complex Shop No-10 Opp Samrat Hotel, New Delhi
Author: Mohit Daya
Review:
Everything is about best is cafe ,
Food cost average will be around 1500 for two and up for more .
The cafe is very very nice ,
And food is ultimately tasty literally,
I tried pasta fretuccini al fungi , it was so delicious, I can't even describe in words .
Try it ,you will love it for sure .

Name: Diggin Cafe
Address: Santushti Shopping Complex Shop No-10 Opp Samrat Hotel, New Delhi
Author: Khyati Rao
Review:
It's a lovely spot to go out with friends or on a date. The pizza was Ah-mazing here!
Would highly recommend to everyone.
Overall 4/5 for everything.
Also the place looks so beautiful during the monsoon season🥹🤌🏻

Name: Diggin Cafe
Address: Santushti Shopping Complex Shop No-10 Opp Samrat Hotel, New Delhi
Author: Debashish Mukherjee
Review: Excellent joint within the military camp. Exceptional menu of continental , chinese and breakfast . All dishes are worthy of trying. The taste is original and the sauces used are great. The quantity very sumptuous. The price very friendly. The they have time up with Zomato . So sir back at home in this oppressive heat and enjoy your order. A highly recommended option for all ages.

Name: Diggin Cafe
Address: Santushti Shopping Complex Shop No-10 Opp Samrat Hotel, New Delhi
Author: dharvi singh
Review: Very aesthetic and good vibes place.... I just love their aura and food.... Everything is so awesome... Must try their guava mocktail it was a good tangy guava type.... The penne arrabiata pasta was too good.... The cappuccino was also good.... Vibes and surroundings are very calming and soothing..

Name: London Street Cafe
Address: Aditya Mega Mall, Maharaja Surajmal Marg, Vishwas Nagar Extension, Vishwas Nagar, Shahdara, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Satyam Sharma
Review: One of the best cafe in East Delhi for pure veg food. The variety and taste of their dishes are outstanding. We celebrated our anniversary here, and it was an unforgettable experience. The ambiance is perfect, and they also serve alcohol, which was a great addition. Best place to create parties like birthday parties, anniversary parties, and kitty parties

Name: London Street Cafe
Address: Aditya Mega Mall, Maharaja Surajmal Marg, Vishwas Nagar Extension, Vishwas Nagar, Shahdara, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Life of Paetoo
Review: If you’re searching for a vegetarian cafe with a bar, London street cafe is the place to be! This best vegetarian restaurant in East Delhi offers a delightful range of pure veg dishes alongside a well-curated selection of alcoholic beverages. The atmosphere is perfect for hosting parties, making it the best place to create parties like birthday celebrations, anniversaries, and kitty parties. Truly a gem in East Delhi!

Name: London Street Cafe
Address: Aditya Mega Mall, Maharaja Surajmal Marg, Vishwas Nagar Extension, Vishwas Nagar, Shahdara, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: The Travel Being
Review:
Celebrated mother’s birthday here. Group of 14 guest.
Food was the highlight. Everybody loved it
Ambience was good
Outside seating n decoration good for evening seating n photography.
Over all experience was great.

Name: London Street Cafe
Address: Aditya Mega Mall, Maharaja Surajmal Marg, Vishwas Nagar Extension, Vishwas Nagar, Shahdara, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Muskan Gupta
Review:
One of the best cafe in East Delhi for pure veg food. The variety and taste of their dishes are outstanding. We celebrated birthday here, and it was an unforgettable experience. The ambiance is perfect, and they also serve alcohol, which was a great addition. The food is very tasty
Must visit.

Name: London Street Cafe
Address: Aditya Mega Mall, Maharaja Surajmal Marg, Vishwas Nagar Extension, Vishwas Nagar, Shahdara, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Crazycute_ Scooby
Review: Cafe is good. Service and food both were good. They  take care of my kid. They gave free fries for the baby and even the teddy so that he gets  busy.

Name: Cafe By Soul | Best Outdoor Coffee Cafe
Address: B-11/1, Ashoka Cresent Marg, DLF Phase 1, Sector 26A, Gurugram
Author: Rad Rider
Review: A small cafe opened in a bungalow covering the garden and a small enclosed space, good for a nice quiet coffee, smoothie or shake with your loved ones. Food is overpriced however decent though nothing exceptional keeping in mind their high menu pricing. They have limited kitchen staff hence takes quite some time to prepare food and Serve. It seemed more like a local coffee spot with majority coming from the society itself.

Name: Cafe By Soul | Best Outdoor Coffee Cafe
Address: B-11/1, Ashoka Cresent Marg, DLF Phase 1, Sector 26A, Gurugram
Author: Richard Hughe
Review:
Small café with both indoor and outdoor seating. While we initially sat outside for breakfast there were so many mosquitoes in the seating area we had to move indoors. The air conditioning was superb and nicely chilled. The coffees (both hot and cold) and their smoothies were excellent. The portion size of their chicken club sandwich and veg baguette was big but lacked taste. Even their masala omelette was average, nothing justifying the premium rates of the dishes. The service for food items took very long, so long that we had to re confirm with the staff if they remember our pending dish.
Overall nice cute little setup, has room for improvement in the food department wrt. Taste and quicker service.
Has a good big parking on the opposite vacant plot and they open early. Wished the dining experience was better.

Name: Cafe By Soul | Best Outdoor Coffee Cafe
Address: B-11/1, Ashoka Cresent Marg, DLF Phase 1, Sector 26A, Gurugram
Author: Varun Sahgal
Review:
A small cafe with sitting space of 14 people inside and almost 15 people in the open. It’s on the ground floor and uses the open space of the plot which has a Multi story building.

The menu is big and has a good variety for both vegetarian and non vegetarians.  Operating hours is 8.30 am - 11.00 pm.

They have few books for one to read in case they want.

The legs of the table makes sitting a little uncomfortable.

We ordered Garlic Baguette Sandwich, Flat white and a caramel classic cold coffee.

They had a little confusion with the sandwich and made another sandwich than what we ordered but it was changed so we got what we ordered finally.

Flat white - 7/10
Cold coffee- 7/10
Sandwich - 7/10

Name: Cafe By Soul | Best Outdoor Coffee Cafe
Address: B-11/1, Ashoka Cresent Marg, DLF Phase 1, Sector 26A, Gurugram
Author: sid pahuja
Review:
June 2024 : Located in dlf phase 1 it is a nice little cafe. Parking is ample outside in open plots.

Both seating options outside and inside, limited space though.

We tried chic peas burger and mushroom soup which were good.
Nothing out of the world and a little pricey.

But the cafe ambience was nice.

Name: Cafe By Soul | Best Outdoor Coffee Cafe
Address: B-11/1, Ashoka Cresent Marg, DLF Phase 1, Sector 26A, Gurugram
Author: Khushbu Gupta
Review: A cute little cafe with beautiful lighting, greenery and delicious food choices. I ordered virgin Sangria with Classic Red Sauce Pasta, which was yummilicious. I also relished Salmon dish and Grilled Chicken dish, both were served in classic European style with lots of veggies. Good place to hangout with friends and family.

Name: Rose Cafe
Address: Ground Floor, Eldeco Centre, Metro station, G6R and G7R1, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Pooja Rahi
Review:
A cosy joint amidst nowhere. As you step foot into it you are transported into an era different from the present but definitely blissful.
It seems like time has come to a standstill.
Mornings are the best time to visit to enjoy the peace and tranquility. Although any other time would be as good.
Seating arrangement is offered both indoors and outdoors. The outdoors too offer quite some privacy.
Even though the menu is quite regular akin to any other cafe - the freshness of food beholds you. It’s the ingredients that make all the difference.
Salads, pasta all quite flavourful. But what is really palette enhancing is the drinks accompanying.
One of the best strawberry shakes ever tasted.
Lemon ginger tea with oodles of honey add to the leisurely ambience.
Must visit on a lazy Sunday afternoon.

Name: Rose Cafe
Address: Ground Floor, Eldeco Centre, Metro station, G6R and G7R1, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Lucy Ringu
Review: Beautiful ambience with good food and great service. Located inside Eldeco centre building on the ground floor. Must visit when you are in Delhi.

Name: Rose Cafe
Address: Ground Floor, Eldeco Centre, Metro station, G6R and G7R1, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Visheshta Pandit
Review: It was my first time visiting a cafe and that first experience was so bad because the food was too expensive and the taste was very average also the cafe from outside was looking very normal that we couldn't identify it and the interior was okay and aesthetic but still I would avoid going back here again

Name: Rose Cafe
Address: Ground Floor, Eldeco Centre, Metro station, G6R and G7R1, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Aanchal Seth
Review:
Visited this cafe and found the ambiance to be quite aesthetic but just okay, not really impressive. The decor has a vintage vibe. The location of the cafe is in a somewhat shady area, which made me a bit uncomfortable.

When it came to the food, I ordered red sauce pasta and pizza. Both dishes were honestly just okay. The pasta lacked the rich flavor I was hoping for and the pizza was pretty average. One of the biggest drawbacks was the price. The cost of the food and drinks was quite high compared to the taste and quality. I felt that the value for money was not justified.

Overall, my experience was disappointing. I found the cafe to be overrated.

Name: Rose Cafe
Address: Ground Floor, Eldeco Centre, Metro station, G6R and G7R1, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Kriti Sharma
Review: The Mediterranean food and coolers here were amazing, perfect for summer and rainy weather. Nice place to hang out with friends.

Name: BACKUP CAFE (GURUGRAM)
Address: Shop no.5, BACK•UP CAFE, Chhoti, Mata wali Gali, Sukhrali, Sector 17, Gurugram
Author: Shubham Jain
Review: Backup cafe boasts an impressive array of pizza options, catering to all taste buds and dietary preferences. From classic Margherita to inventive gourmet combinations, there was something for everyone.

Name: BACKUP CAFE (GURUGRAM)
Address: Shop no.5, BACK•UP CAFE, Chhoti, Mata wali Gali, Sukhrali, Sector 17, Gurugram
Author: Shafhad Khan
Review: The staff at The BackUP Cafe provides outstanding service. They are attentive, friendly, and knowledgeable about the menu. They go the extra mile to ensure that guests feel welcomed and well taken care of. From the moment you walk in until you leave, the service is top-notch.

Name: BACKUP CAFE (GURUGRAM)
Address: Shop no.5, BACK•UP CAFE, Chhoti, Mata wali Gali, Sukhrali, Sector 17, Gurugram
Author: Kanchan Kumari
Review: Here's staff behaviour is too bad ,, they are like (this generation is not for cash in rude way).   I don't know why like that, even they are here for service not for rude or behaving like nonsence,,,   don't visit their guys it's totally bad experience..

Name: BACKUP CAFE (GURUGRAM)
Address: Shop no.5, BACK•UP CAFE, Chhoti, Mata wali Gali, Sukhrali, Sector 17, Gurugram
Author: theijeshwar s
Review:
If you find yourself in Sector 17, Gurugram, and craving a delicious pizza, look no further than Back Up Cafe. Nestled in the heart of the city, this charming café offers a delightful culinary experience with its impressive pizza selection.

The pizzas at Back Up Cafe are nothing short of delightful. From the first bite, you can taste the freshness of the ingredients and the expertise of the chefs. The crust is perfectly crisp on the outside yet wonderfully soft on the inside, providing the ideal foundation for the flavorful toppings.

What sets Back Up Cafe's pizza apart is the quality of its ingredients. Each slice is generously adorned with premium toppings, from savory meats to fresh vegetables, all complemented by rich, melted cheese and tangy tomato sauce. Whether you prefer classic combinations or adventurous flavors, there is a pizza to suit every palate.

Moreover, the ambiance of Back Up Cafe adds to the overall dining experience. The cozy atmosphere and friendly service make it the ideal spot to enjoy a leisurely meal with friends or family.

In conclusion, if you're in Gurugram and craving a slice of heaven, head to Back Up Cafe in Sector 17. With its delectable pizzas and inviting ambiance, it's sure to become your go-to spot for a satisfying culinary escape.

Name: BACKUP CAFE (GURUGRAM)
Address: Shop no.5, BACK•UP CAFE, Chhoti, Mata wali Gali, Sukhrali, Sector 17, Gurugram
Author: Himanshu Mann
Review: Backup Cafe at Sector 17 in Gurugram is a culinary gem, offering a delightful fusion of flavors that tantalize the taste buds. The diverse menu boasts an impressive array of dishes, each prepared with precision and care. From the first bite to the last, the food exudes freshness and quality ingredients, creating a memorable dining experience. The ambiance is inviting, complemented by attentive staff who enhance the overall warmth of the place. Whether you're a local resident or just passing through, Backup Cafe is a must-visit destination for food enthusiasts seeking a perfect blend of taste and ambiance.

Name: Coffee Cafe 9
Address: 143, Khirki Extension, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi
Author: PSR
Review:
This small cafe is in a prime location and you can stop anytime to grab anything from the menu
We had strawberry iced cooler,and blue cooler and it was totally not worth it. The taste is really bad specially the blue cooler.
The only saving grace was the white sauce pasta which was very tasty and full of veggies, nicely made and worth the price,the quantity is enough to share it with two people.
The service is good too.
The cafe is maintained well,could be better but still looks clean and good.
Will probably visit again to try something else.

Name: Coffee Cafe 9
Address: 143, Khirki Extension, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Gaganmahayan
Review: A small cafe located in khirkee extension ( Malviya Nagar). I really like the atmosphere and amazing interior. Food was very tasty. Prices are quite affordable with quality maintained at the same time. Must try their Hakka Noodles & Chilli Paneer Gravy , Fried -Paneer Momos , and Oreo Choco Chip Waffle. Also the staff was very friendly and polite. 💫🙌

Name: Coffee Cafe 9
Address: 143, Khirki Extension, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi
Author: aroswapnil Shinde
Review:
Worth a visit.
Worth paying.
Worth spending time here.

Beautiful ambiance and nice fragrance.
Beautiful people.
Food is good with such a beautiful peaceful music...

All the best guys.. doing great Job

Name: Coffee Cafe 9
Address: 143, Khirki Extension, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Meenakshi Gandotra
Review:
One of the most affordable and chilled cafe. It's right at the start of Khirki Extension so you don't get stuck in traffic and is near to main road so you can easily travel.

Their veg Maggie, cold coffee frappe and spinach corn sandwich is great.

Name: Coffee Cafe 9
Address: 143, Khirki Extension, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Akshay Kumar
Review: One of the best cafes I've ever been to, food and drinks are just amazing, the staff is also amazing, allover a good place if you're looking for a good coffee and a place to relax

Name: The Reader's Cafe
Address: B-208-212, First Floor, Indirapuram Habitat Centre, Plot No 16, Ahinsa Khand 1, Indirapuram, Ghaziabad
Author: Dheeraj Pandey
Review:
Located at Indirapuram Habitat Centre.
It’s a European cuisine cum book cafe to enjoy delectable cuisines. European
Extensive menu for coffee lovers alongside iced and hot teas, fresh juices & smoothies.

The thing is if you have an outlet having books and naming it readers cafe then there should be less noise and kitchen should be inside.So much noise for reading a book.
Either keep it as cafe with books or just remove books and change the outlet name to normal restaurant.Pricy as compared to the portion they offer.
Overall if you are a foody then it’s ok but if you like to read books and enjoy snack this place is not for book lovers.

Name: The Reader's Cafe
Address: B-208-212, First Floor, Indirapuram Habitat Centre, Plot No 16, Ahinsa Khand 1, Indirapuram, Ghaziabad
Author: Ayushi Soni
Review: It was truly a magnificent place to hangout with friends. The food was delicious specially the drinks in we had green apple mojito and coffee. The pasta was perfectly made and so was the mushroom burchetta.

Name: The Reader's Cafe
Address: B-208-212, First Floor, Indirapuram Habitat Centre, Plot No 16, Ahinsa Khand 1, Indirapuram, Ghaziabad
Author: Priyanka Yadav
Review:
Located at Indirapuram Habitat Centre.
Its a European cuisine cum book cafe to enjoy delectable cuisines with friends and family. Inspired by English and East European cuisines, which is reflected in the menu and ambiance.

There is an extensive menu for coffee lovers alongside iced and hot teas, fresh juices & smoothies.

A Blissful Haven For The Bookworms! It’s a cozy cafe with wooden interiors and tons of books adorning one of the walls.

They've got a massive collection of books ranging from fiction to non-fiction, Decked with vibrant-hued chairs, this airy cafe is ideal for all those of you who love to read while you binge eat.

food is amazing.

Name: The Reader's Cafe
Address: B-208-212, First Floor, Indirapuram Habitat Centre, Plot No 16, Ahinsa Khand 1, Indirapuram, Ghaziabad
Author: Gautam Singh
Review: First of all - the Readers and Cafe are separate — upon arrival we came to know that you can’t order while reading and vice versa. Secondly they given green tea for any variety of herbal tea requested - do not expect authentic Darjeeling or Assam tea- those would be coming from a tea bag. The food taste wasn’t that great - pizza crust was crispy for a thick crust pizza. The coffee was good but not up to the value of the price. I won’t be coming back here again.

Name: The Reader's Cafe
Address: B-208-212, First Floor, Indirapuram Habitat Centre, Plot No 16, Ahinsa Khand 1, Indirapuram, Ghaziabad
Author: Vaibhav Dangwal
Review:
What I didn't like was the price. 5 drinks, 3 food items - bill was 3400. Not value for money. We wanted to have tea, but didn't wanted to pay 300 rupees for a tea bag and hot water.
Food was okay, pastas sauce was wayyy too tangy.

Name: The Good Food Cafe
Address: UG -1, BIG V Vardhman Times Plaza, New Delhi
Author: Paras Garg
Review:
Only The Name is The Good Food. IRONY is ,it wasn't Good at all. I ordered Chicken Veggie Pizza Surprise and i literally got surprised like someone can actually Ruin pizza this much. Very Dry pizza Cheese wasnt good at all. And Cold Coffee was 6/10 it was more like Milk Shake with Coffee Flavour. Never visiting again.
Hot Coffee Prices are as same as StarBucks🙃

Name: The Good Food Cafe
Address: UG -1, BIG V Vardhman Times Plaza, New Delhi
Author: EG Plus Security Systems
Review:
One of the oldest cafe in rohini pitampura area

With
Superb food
Fast service

We tried
Watermelon slush
Mezze platter
Bento box chili bao
Famous pizza

Name: The Good Food Cafe
Address: UG -1, BIG V Vardhman Times Plaza, New Delhi
Author: Neha Mahajan
Review:
This place is cosy and beautifully constructed...Loved the lamp detailing and artificial flowers on the roof..We ordered their mix sauce pasta which was quite decent unlike other places full of spices n other condiments..It was good👍
Then ordered their farm house pizza 🍕 which was again loaded with veggies and was nice..Plain fries and fresh lime mojito was good
Overall, nice experience 💯
One can visit this place with family and friends 😀

Name: The Good Food Cafe
Address: UG -1, BIG V Vardhman Times Plaza, New Delhi
Author: jhankar saharan
Review:
i ordered a bbq chicken wrap from swiggy and there were insects crawling in the entire wrap.
disgusting and  unhygienic.
i will never order from here and neither will i ever recommend anyone.

Name: The Good Food Cafe
Address: UG -1, BIG V Vardhman Times Plaza, New Delhi
Author: RK.GAMING
Review: I’m in love with the natural look of Good Food Café. The wooden furniture and greenery make it feel cozy and inviting. The live kitchen adds an exciting element—you can see the chefs working their magic. It’s a great place to relax and enjoy a meal with friends."

Name: Ququ Cafe
Address: Golf Course Rd, Horizon Colony, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Shankar Rawlley
Review:
The place is wonderful and we've been here a couple of times. Love the cream puff.
The only missing item here is the food. If only the food menu was active, we would be able to sit here for longer and order much more!

Name: Ququ Cafe
Address: Golf Course Rd, Horizon Colony, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Wandering Akriti
Review:
Here's honest rating of the bobas I've tried.

Cheaper than other restaurants

cocoa lover - 5 stars - can never go wrong with this flavour. If this is your first time trying boba, then go with this option.

Orange/matcha/passion fruit tea - 3.5 stars - the tea is good. The after taste is a bit bitter.

Sitting space is cosy. Good place to try out bobas.

Name: Ququ Cafe
Address: Golf Course Rd, Horizon Colony, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Armie Kusela Abdul
Review: The variety of bubble tea flavors at Ququ Cafe is impressive. It's a paradise for tea enthusiasts! I will definitely go back!

Name: Ququ Cafe
Address: Golf Course Rd, Horizon Colony, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Priya Sareen
Review: With this drink i got addicted  when i used to travel abroad a lot. Never found this great taste. If u want to try u can try any one i can bet everything will be very tasty. My personal favourite is Okinawa here roasted brown sugar. The staff are just amazing Priyanka  and Sonia made me introduce this drink and ever since this my go to drink. Staff here is really polite. Cheers to all girl staff here. Kudos.

Name: Ququ Cafe
Address: Golf Course Rd, Horizon Colony, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Twinkle Ghangas
Review: Priyanka & Vijay have been dedicated towards their service and hospitality. They make every trip to QuQu worth going back to!

Name: HayDay Cafe
Address: Plot, P-2, Golf Crse Rd, Sector 27, Gurugram
Author: Raj Kumar
Review:
Nice Cafe, has a good atmosphere and decoration...
Have a number of food options. Also, you can get both indoor and outdoor seating options. The music selection is great. When we entered we felt a bit awkward as no one was there to address us, but after that all seems fine.

Tea and coffee is something not up to mark as per the place and price. Overall the food is nice.

Name: HayDay Cafe
Address: Plot, P-2, Golf Crse Rd, Sector 27, Gurugram
Author: Nidhi Tyagi
Review: Food quality and taste is very good. staaf nature is very soft and good service.cafe decoration is too good 👍.

Name: HayDay Cafe
Address: Plot, P-2, Golf Crse Rd, Sector 27, Gurugram
Author: Vandana Pandey
Review: Fantastic service and loved the ambience.  Planned my husband's birthday here and it was awesome. Great experience at Hayday. A must visit!

Name: HayDay Cafe
Address: Plot, P-2, Golf Crse Rd, Sector 27, Gurugram
Author: itishree gupta
Review: Awesum ambience with a beautiful music and seating. Had an amazing time at this place. Highly recommend.

Name: HayDay Cafe
Address: Plot, P-2, Golf Crse Rd, Sector 27, Gurugram
Author: Bhaskar Jha
Review:
Great place for hangout! Perfect ambience to share moments with loved ones and enjoy the evening.. terrace is just wow!
Do come and would recommend to friends

Name: Woodbox Cafe
Address: F15A, Ground Floor, opposite NDPL Office, Vijay Nagar, Delhi
Author: Shreedhar Rathi
Review: The place was good the food was good everything was good the location is great the ambience out there the people who come just the service needs to be more good I mean they really had anyone to check out on a table it was really irresponsible of them. When ask to serve the photo all of us the just declined by saying that they are lesson number and just couldn't serve us food. We have to call them for each and everything from the bus go sauce which they were not having that very moment and not served glasses on time we had to call them again and again for everything regarding service. So definitely service was something I won't recommend is good. Other than that we had noodles whose portion was really good and pizza and honey chilli potato we are also nice

Name: Woodbox Cafe
Address: F15A, Ground Floor, opposite NDPL Office, Vijay Nagar, Delhi
Author: snappy foody delhi
Review: Beautiful place for hanging out with friends and family. Ambience is also very beautiful. Loved their veg love bowl, heartthrob pizza New York croissants and strawberry milkshake. The Valentine's decor is pretty amazing

Name: Woodbox Cafe
Address: F15A, Ground Floor, opposite NDPL Office, Vijay Nagar, Delhi
Author: Kunal Sehgal
Review: This Little cafe will totally amaze you with good food and vibes. had there carnivorous platter Wooo this was value for money truly. Way good enough for 2 people at the cost of just 690 cheers with there coffee and shakers

Name: Woodbox Cafe
Address: F15A, Ground Floor, opposite NDPL Office, Vijay Nagar, Delhi
Author: Ashlesha Manta
Review: I would definitely recommend their carnivorous platter. It has everything from garlic bread, dumplings to wings. It's more than enough for 2-3 people. I aslo tried one of their pizzas, it was great. Lots of cheese and the chicken was cooked perfectly. I haven't tried their pizza jar but i heard it's quite popular. Would love to try it the next time I visit.

Name: Woodbox Cafe
Address: F15A, Ground Floor, opposite NDPL Office, Vijay Nagar, Delhi
Author: Garima Aggarwal
Review: Recently visited this outlet and tried so many delicious dishes😍do try their masahari platter if you are a chicken lover 🤩 for pasta lovers they have jar bazar which is a must try dish😋 everything was full of flavours and nicely cooked😅they have new concept of monk meal where you can choose food options🤩 i am in love with their concepts and food presentation 🤩 highly recommended 👍

Name: Cafe 99 | Best Cafe in Hauz khas
Address: Shop no -2, SFS, near by nift college, next to gate no 3, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Jyoti Meena
Review: Guys this cafe is so cute in inside & outside❤️🥰go ! And enjoy their delicious food and coffee , shakes i enjoyed allot today and their ambience is so pretty 🎀

Name: Cafe 99 | Best Cafe in Hauz khas
Address: Shop no -2, SFS, near by nift college, next to gate no 3, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Seenu Rohilla
Review: I love the vibes and their food. I tried their cold coffee, waffles, and fries, and they all have a top-notch taste. I’d tries their COLD CAFFE MOCHA it was so much good and their waffles are also much better than any other place AND their TRAFFIC JAM FRIES 🚦I’ll recommend please give it a try once Proce is comparatively lessthan inn other shops.

Name: Cafe 99 | Best Cafe in Hauz khas
Address: Shop no -2, SFS, near by nift college, next to gate no 3, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Varun Prakash Dhanda
Review:
Must Haves: Double Patty Schezwan Burgers, Crispy Veg/Chicken Wraps, Dark Chocolate/Blueberry Waffles and Iced Mocha Cold Coffee.

Full Marks for Taste and Pricing but pretty average when it comes to Hygiene and Cleanliness.

The Cafe has a very small sitting area (can accommodate a group of 3) but there is no washroom facility. It is mostly like a takeaway restaurant.

Name: Cafe 99 | Best Cafe in Hauz khas
Address: Shop no -2, SFS, near by nift college, next to gate no 3, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Tabish Ali
Review: The taste was awesome. Everything was fresh and piping hot. Totally recommended 5/5

Name: Cafe 99 | Best Cafe in Hauz khas
Address: Shop no -2, SFS, near by nift college, next to gate no 3, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Archisha •
Review: Cute cozy little space, good food

Name: Dribble Cafe
Address: Plot 1, Near Metro Pillar 142, Moulsari Ave, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram
Author: SHUBHAM SETHI
Review:
Really great place and open even at late hours like 2am. Ambience is decent and food is alright.

Theme of the cafe is based on football (as is the name) and the owner might be a Barcelona fan(just my observation).

Must visit if you are looking for a snack at those late hours. 😋

Name: Dribble Cafe
Address: Plot 1, Near Metro Pillar 142, Moulsari Ave, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram
Author: Raj Kumar
Review:
Great environment, they have the option to sit outside in an open garden and in the cafe as well. The taste is good, service is also good. They have a lot of healthy options, multigrain bread or whole wheat bread used for burgers, garlic breads, etc. The decorations and lighting makes it a good place for a date.
The cafe is a bit expensive but I think it is worth the visit and food proportion is also good.

Name: Dribble Cafe
Address: Plot 1, Near Metro Pillar 142, Moulsari Ave, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram
Author: Gourav Arora
Review:
I recently visited Dribble cafe and had a mixed experience. Here's a quick rundown:

What I Loved:

Quality & Quantity: I ordered fries, and they were delicious! The portion size was generous, and the price was reasonable. Definitely great value for money.
What Could Be Improved:

Air Conditioning: Unfortunately, the ACs were not working during my visit. It was so hot that I was sweating while eating, which made the experience quite uncomfortable. Because of this, I only ordered fries and decided to leave after finishing them.

Overall, the food quality and quantity are commendable, but the lack of proper cooling was a major downside. I hope they fix the AC issue soon, as I would love to come back and try more items from their menu in a more comfortable environment.

Name: Dribble Cafe
Address: Plot 1, Near Metro Pillar 142, Moulsari Ave, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram
Author: Sahil Joshi
Review:
Best part: they are open 24*7

They offer a wide range of food and beverage options that cater to various tastes and preferences. Whether you're in the mood for a hearty breakfast, a light lunch, or a delectable dessert, this place has you covered.

The menu features a fusion of international and local dishes, creatively prepared and beautifully presented

Name: Dribble Cafe
Address: Plot 1, Near Metro Pillar 142, Moulsari Ave, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram
Author: Aanchal Sachdeva
Review:
I don't know why I went to try this place because the food was horrible. I'm wondering how they have such good reviews or either my taste is bad.
As per the sitting and ambience the  place is nice. They have games like chess, scrabble etc to play till your food is ready.
We ordered Chicken lasagna, classic fries and cold coffee.

Classic fries  are supposed to be salty but they mixed a little bit of potatoes with a lot of salt.
Cold coffee didn't have a sign of coffee in it. We specifically asked them to make it less sweet. Which they didn't.

Chicken lasagna, I would not recommend you to try it at all.
Overall experience was ok but I'd suggest you to visit the place and give an honest review.

Name: PEACE OF MIND CAFE
Address: 3308, Gali Hari Mandir, Ratan Lal Market, Kaseru Walan, Paharganj, New Delhi
Author: pram s
Review:
Best veg momos. Nice small cafe.
Tried
Special pizza for 220- good for the price.
Chilly fried momos- veg momos are best
Veg cheese burger - ok
Chowmeen- good
Spring rolls - good.

Cons ; they don’t have place to wash hands, and also sitting area have just 5 chairs where wall was not cleaned properly.

Name: PEACE OF MIND CAFE
Address: 3308, Gali Hari Mandir, Ratan Lal Market, Kaseru Walan, Paharganj, New Delhi
Author: Parnika Halder
Review: The food was amazing at the cafe...we had chicken roll and chicken steam momo. The roll was very nice, there were lots of chicken pieces in the roll, and the momo was also good. It was a good experience altogether.

Name: PEACE OF MIND CAFE
Address: 3308, Gali Hari Mandir, Ratan Lal Market, Kaseru Walan, Paharganj, New Delhi
Author: Adv Harisanth AP
Review:
For the time in Delhi .
I jst had a wonderful experience.
With peace of mind cafe..
There momes ,chowmein, was soo delicious
Leamon tea was so perfect.
The blend of lime and tea dust was jst too good
Service was soo great .

Name: PEACE OF MIND CAFE
Address: 3308, Gali Hari Mandir, Ratan Lal Market, Kaseru Walan, Paharganj, New Delhi
Author: Avtar Kaur
Review: Very Very Delicious And Tasty every Items Like Momos, Burger, sandwich, noodles,soup etc 3days morning to night still food taste every Items.Mainly Cafe Need Nd Clean Nd Every Items Ready Branded Product Not Local Product so Mainly Every Items pure nd Fresh I like It Peace Of Mind Cafe♥️♥️♥️♥️♥️

Name: PEACE OF MIND CAFE
Address: 3308, Gali Hari Mandir, Ratan Lal Market, Kaseru Walan, Paharganj, New Delhi
Author: Shanto Ahmed
Review:
Their food is outstanding and so testy I love there food specially there cheeses chicken pizza and chicken fried rich laajabab
And their service is even better and I’m in love with this place ❤️❤️💯 Dada I got my Visa Thank you for your prayers ✊ I really appreciate that 😇

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: S-34, Market, Block S, Green Park, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Mukesh Sharma
Review:
CCD is my favorite and its been a while i have visited here.

Coffee’s were amazing as always. We ordered Latte’s and they were made perfectly.
Spinach and corn has lost its reputation now and was not as good it use to be.

Staff was really friend and they recommended us some nice options.

There is plenty of sittings, ground floor , first floor and little patio as well for smokers :)

Overall i felt really nice here and will love to go again and try something else.
Recommened for everyone.

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: S-34, Market, Block S, Green Park, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Garima K
Review:
Good food , tastes amazing.
Cold coffee is nice .
didn’t really have time to explore anything.
* sandwich - good ( veg)
(Panner sandwich is little hard to chew)
*mango shots is good
I liked the service. The staff was helpful and polite. We didn’t have to wait for the order.
Overall, good experience. menu is quite good with a lot of options for everyone .A great place for hanging out with friends.

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: S-34, Market, Block S, Green Park, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Berlin Babu
Review:
Situated in a prompt place.

Good place to have a cup of coffee, and spend time for meetings, both personal and professional.

They have two floors, one ground and one first floor, first floor is comparatively better to sit, as it has more privacy.

Staffs are good.

Self service.

Parking area is also good.

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: S-34, Market, Block S, Green Park, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Mehak Sharma
Review: Paneer burger was really good and the paneer patty was actually different. Cafe frappe is an all time favourite for the “classic cold coffee” lovers. Must try.

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: S-34, Market, Block S, Green Park, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: damini sharma
Review:
Nice and warming place .
While fairly limited in terms of food choices.( veg options)
*Belgium chocolate cold coffee becomes my favorite and it was super delicious.
*Corn sandwich and panner sandwich is most amaizng and sizzling hot
*cafe frapee is the best with wipped cream.
their selection of exotic frapee and coffees are a delight savour.  Very clean, neat and tidy space to grab a quick bite. My overall experience is great

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: Building No 13, 57, Block J, Rajouri Garden Extension, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: DroolOverFood# ShutUp&Eat
Review:
Cafe Coffee Day - Go With The Name

Among Few Outlets In West Delhi Region, This Cafe Coffee Day Outlet Is Located In Rajouri Garden, Cambridge Fountain Road.
Good Place To Sit and Relax And Have A Cup Of Coffee ☕️.

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: Building No 13, 57, Block J, Rajouri Garden Extension, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Khushi Aggarwal
Review: The place is has a beautiful ambience. Also, it was not too crowded when I visited.They gave good sitting area. Its a perfect place to have coffee and chit chat with your friends. The staff is very cooperative. Parking is sometimes a problem there because of its location in residential area. Loved the experience there ❤️

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: Building No 13, 57, Block J, Rajouri Garden Extension, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Manav Dhariwal
Review: They keep on asking, Sir order kar lijye, Sir order kar lijye, although I have informed after the meeting I will do that but inbetween my meeting only 3 different people came and say sir order kar lijye, imagine how embarrassing it was, and here I want to mention that that meeting was of only 1hr an imagine three people came in just one hour and asking again and again for the order.

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: Building No 13, 57, Block J, Rajouri Garden Extension, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: tech in
Review: Best cafe coffee day outlet in rajouri garden area... Perfect for meetings.... Best for dates..... Suitable for working too.... Menu is really good.,.. food preparations are hygienic.....coffee is always at its best here past so many years now.... Must visit when in or around rajouri......

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: Building No 13, 57, Block J, Rajouri Garden Extension, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: RITUL TIWARY
Review: Do not eat anything aaanythinggg it's horrible no taste no nothing... and coffee is also okish rather m gonna suggest u  Starbucks

Name: Alma Bakery & Cafe Noida, Sector 142
Address: Advant Navis Business Park, Sector 142, Noida
Author: priyanka nagpal
Review:
We went for breakfast at this place… they have food available only after 11. They serve only drinks before that. We took a barbecue chicken sandwich and Caesar salad. I have been to this place multiple times. The food is quite nice here. The coffee is always perfect… and the ambiance of this place on a rainy morning was just perfect to enjoy a slow but yummy start of the day.
Definitely recommended!

Name: Alma Bakery & Cafe Noida, Sector 142
Address: Advant Navis Business Park, Sector 142, Noida
Author: Rupanshi Mehra
Review:
Loved everything about the place. The food was excellent, coffee was extremely good & service top notch!
Thanks to Pankaj for serving us & making our dining experience comfortable.
We had Vietnamese Coffee, which is on strong side(double espresso).
Overall, highly recommended :)

Name: Alma Bakery & Cafe Noida, Sector 142
Address: Advant Navis Business Park, Sector 142, Noida
Author: Harshika Aniya
Review: Everything about this cafe is so aesthetic. Pleasant atmosphere, cafe contributing to an environmental atmosphere, greens everywhere, you feel relaxed over there, Ambience was so good. You have multiple options in bakery items, drinks and food, Their menu is vast in Italian and bakery cuisine, you get both veg and non veg over there. I really enjoyed the taste but the portion they served according to price is not satisfying. Overall great experience must visit cafe in noida.

Name: Alma Bakery & Cafe Noida, Sector 142
Address: Advant Navis Business Park, Sector 142, Noida
Author: Nancy Punjani
Review:
Alma is a pleasant surprise at our office location. The cafe is very beautifully designed with plants and the food is in the same manner , amazing too. We have been to this place 6-7 times now and it doesn’t fail to impress us with the food quality, hygiene and the service.
Vikas was serving at our table today and he did an amazing job by serving speedily and so very politely. Thanks a ton, Vikas!

Name: Alma Bakery & Cafe Noida, Sector 142
Address: Advant Navis Business Park, Sector 142, Noida
Author: Sri Barani
Review:
Very good experience, has always been our fav cafe to have desserts at any time. Our personal favourites are bruschetta, pan seared chicken breast, potato wedges, Alfredo pasta..

Kamal has given us a good service over here when we last visited.

Good for family, friends to have a good time and meal. 🙂🙃

Name: Sparsa Cafe and Co Works
Address: 119, DLF STAR TOWER, Block A, Sector 30, Gurugram
Author: Priyanshi Gupta
Review:
Although the ambience of the place is nice but you will be seriously compromising on hygiene and the quality of food. Washrooms are disgusting. There is water leakage from the roof and the smell is unbearable. The quality of food is also questionable. There are burnt bits in my veggie wrap that clearly shows that the food is prepared in uncleaned vessels. The quality of oil is also bad. There is a weird smell and aftertaste.

Overall I wouldn’t recommend this place to anyone.

Name: Sparsa Cafe and Co Works
Address: 119, DLF STAR TOWER, Block A, Sector 30, Gurugram
Author: nidhi wadhera
Review: Went in for coffee & quick bite with my girls… & what a lovely experience. Good food & quick service. The cafe itself has a warm & cozy mood to chill in quiet. I've been there few times and each time it’s been a great experience.

Name: Sparsa Cafe and Co Works
Address: 119, DLF STAR TOWER, Block A, Sector 30, Gurugram
Author: Ambuj Mukheeja
Review: I recently visited Sparsa Cafe and had a fantastic experience! The atmosphere was warm and inviting, making it the perfect spot to relax. Hitesh from the staff stood out with his exceptional service—he was attentive, friendly, and genuinely passionate about the menu. He recommended the house special, which was delicious and perfectly prepared. Overall, Sparsa Cafe is a gem, and Hitesh truly enhances the experience. I am a Regular here for Board Games and Social Deduction Evenings with Misfits...

Name: Sparsa Cafe and Co Works
Address: 119, DLF STAR TOWER, Block A, Sector 30, Gurugram
Author: Sahil
Review:
Yesterday went to this new cafe that i just heard off from a friend. Had a really nice experience with the food. We started off with their coffee which actually was quite good.
In food, we had their pizza, burger and wraps. The portion size is really nice and also the the pizza had a generous amount of toppings.
In short, it’s a pretty nice place to hangout with your friends. I would recommend everyone to try this place out.

Name: Sparsa Cafe and Co Works
Address: 119, DLF STAR TOWER, Block A, Sector 30, Gurugram
Author: Shubham Bhati
Review: I love this cafe! The staff members are all wonderful, providing excellent service. The food is really tasty also healthy, making it a perfect spot for a delightful meal. Highly recommended!

Name: Nukkad Cafe And Bar
Address: shop number c23, SDA Market, C 23,24, c24, opposite IIT GATE, Block C 5, Safdarjung Development Area, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Musafir
Review: Food was good especially pizza. However they put newspaper below my pizza that I didn't like. Please use tissues or some fresh paper. Newspaper are travelling from here to there and can't be safe to have food over.

Name: Nukkad Cafe And Bar
Address: shop number c23, SDA Market, C 23,24, c24, opposite IIT GATE, Block C 5, Safdarjung Development Area, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Foodie_ delhite
Review: Nukkad Cafe offers a cozy and inviting atmosphere with vibrant decor and comfortable seating. The menu features a variety of delicious dishes ranging from Indian street food classics to fusion snacks. Service is friendly and efficient, making it a pleasant spot for casual dining or catching up with friends. Prices are reasonable, making it accessible for students and young professionals alike. Overall, Nukkad Cafe provides a delightful experience with good food and a welcoming ambiance.

Name: Nukkad Cafe And Bar
Address: shop number c23, SDA Market, C 23,24, c24, opposite IIT GATE, Block C 5, Safdarjung Development Area, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Garima Batra
Review: I think this is one of the few places where I gave a 5 star on all parameters without giving a second thought! The ambience is amazing. It's dim but has a relaxing vibe, perfect for chilling after a hectic day at work. The live singing adds charm to your experience. The food is delicious. Anything you order and you won't be disappointed. The staff is courteous and amicable.

Name: Nukkad Cafe And Bar
Address: shop number c23, SDA Market, C 23,24, c24, opposite IIT GATE, Block C 5, Safdarjung Development Area, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Kankshaeats
Review:
Nukkad’s evening vibe is super chill and SO aesthetic, their music selection was banging (in case you follow bollywood music closely- they also let you scan the QR code of their playlist)
Personally Id recommend the dahi kebabs, stuffed mushrooms & Spring rolls! The food was well prepared and the menu is a no-brainer if you like north indian food!
We had happy hour drinks (which were served pretty aesthetically in interesting Kulhads, and decorated to suit the indian culture)

If you love chill drinks and want an extremely beautiful evening to spend- this is the place!
(shisha available too ✨)

Name: Nukkad Cafe And Bar
Address: shop number c23, SDA Market, C 23,24, c24, opposite IIT GATE, Block C 5, Safdarjung Development Area, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Dr Aviraj ks
Review:
Great ambience. 🏅
They offer the best ambience with live music band consisting of sufi and bollywood songs.
Its large seating area of ground floor and outdoor and indoor area and also upper floors.
Cafe Menu has both continental, Chinese and Indian varieties.
Also to mention the main course is also available consisting of Indian delicacies.
The staff is quite supportive and helpful.
The waiting period for food is bit lengthy but totally worth it.
The taste and quality is great.
Cocktails and mocktails are also available.
The waiting time to get table can be lengthy so arrive accordingly.
Definitely worth trying. ✔️

Name: Wood Box Cafe, Indirapuram
Address: GC Grand Tower, Shop 22, Middle Cir, Vaibhav Khand, Indirapuram, Ghaziabad
Author: Akanksha krishnan
Review: Cute little cafe, great place to hangout with your friends & family. They offer a variety of dishes & drinks. We opted for the Carnivorous platter (which consisted the chicken slider, chicken loaded fries, chilli chicken, chicken rolls, fried chicken, garlic bread, & chicken momos) for Rs 590 & green apple mojito for Rs 190. The staff is courteous & welcoming, good ambience, & the food tasted great.

Name: Wood Box Cafe, Indirapuram
Address: GC Grand Tower, Shop 22, Middle Cir, Vaibhav Khand, Indirapuram, Ghaziabad
Author: Garima
Review:
This was my first time at this cafe. Ambience is lively. Staff is polite and respectful. Food is good. Tasted amazing. We had ordered a 50-50 pasta, vegetarian dimsums, hot coffee and vegetarian sandwich. Out of all this I liked the sandwich the most. Soft bread and great stuffing. Will visit again soon and update on the rest. But as for my first I had a good experience 😍

Update:

So I visited the restaurant again and tried their veg platter which had sweet potato fries, french fries with dip, dimsums with schezwan sauce, spring roll and a mini veg burger loaded with cheese. Out of the whole platter I loved the burger a lot. I didn't enjoy the sweet potato fries. Other than that we had ordered Chicken cheesy sandwich since we had good experience with the veg cheese sandwich we experimented but this time there was something a miss. The boiled corn given along with the sandwich was horrible. It was rotten it felt and had a soul smell. So that wasn't something I liked.  The Veg platter seemed over priced for the taste. This visit didn't leave me with very  good experience and hence removed the star.

Name: Wood Box Cafe, Indirapuram
Address: GC Grand Tower, Shop 22, Middle Cir, Vaibhav Khand, Indirapuram, Ghaziabad
Author: Prerit Jain
Review:
Food was okay. We ordered veg herbivorous platter dish and it consist of many good options to eat like burger, fries, chilli potato, momos, garlic bread, spring roll and grilled vegetables. Combination was good but  instead of peri peri fries we were served normal fries, pitcher of green apple lomonade had mosquitoes in it. We asked to replace it.
Inside ambience was also okay okay types. Space was limited because it is a small restaurant, AC was not effective and it was too hot inside. After a while we requested them to arrange our plates outside with cooler on because it was suffocating inside.
After multiple request they served the plates which should be the first thing to be kept on the table.
Kokum on the rocks drink was good and tasty.
Food was also good to eat.
Overall average experience. They need to work on the interior to avoid competition around.

Name: Wood Box Cafe, Indirapuram
Address: GC Grand Tower, Shop 22, Middle Cir, Vaibhav Khand, Indirapuram, Ghaziabad
Author: Anvi Bindal
Review: I only liked this outlet for its outdoor seating which looks very beautiful during the evening. With all the lights and cool breeze it becomes very romantic outside. Food is not that great. I tried the jar bazar platter which was so bad I had to leave all the pizza because it was only base and cheese in the name of pizza. Pastas were average in taste. Cold coffee tasted like chilled milk nothing else. Interiors are okay. Service is good though. Polite staff.

Name: Wood Box Cafe, Indirapuram
Address: GC Grand Tower, Shop 22, Middle Cir, Vaibhav Khand, Indirapuram, Ghaziabad
Author: Nandita Taylor
Review:
It's a small cafe with a dining space both in  interior and outside. The vibe of the place is good and food is also decent

We ordered classic cold coffee, ice tea, and peri peri fries. The cold coffee was really good.
Fries were crisp and spicy.

For the main course we order peri peri pasta and American Burger. The quantity of the food is wholesome and sufficient for three.

Peri peri pasta is recommended for the one having higher spice tolerance. Burger was okayish. Did not taste as good as tempting it appeared.

Overall it's good place to dine in.

Name: GUUNAAJ By Cafe Olgaa
Address: G4, Block G, Pushkar Enclave, Paschim Vihar, Delhi
Author: Nikita Arora
Review: Just a cute little place to spend some quality time with great ambiance and excellent food. The menu was great, food quality and portions were food too and not to miss the location is reachable! Do try out there volcano pizza. Kudos to team for great effort!

Name: GUUNAAJ By Cafe Olgaa
Address: G4, Block G, Pushkar Enclave, Paschim Vihar, Delhi
Author: Shruti Sharma
Review: We ordered volcano cheese pizza and it was awesome 10/10 and crystal dimsums in hot garlic sauce and it was delicious definitely 10/10. The quality and quantity of food was upto the mark but drinks were quite average.we had brownie shake and rose sparkle and they were 7/10 so drinks can be better. Overall the cafe was aesthetically pleasing and the vibe was nice.

Name: GUUNAAJ By Cafe Olgaa
Address: G4, Block G, Pushkar Enclave, Paschim Vihar, Delhi
Author: Nameirakpam Jaya
Review: The food was not that amazing, sushi please avoid eating here. The sushi which they served was the worst I have ever had. The cigar roll was good and noodles was also fine. The disappointment was the drinks, they were not even food. The burger was too big to bite so asked if they can cut it half but they denied that will be not possible. The space is also quite conjusted. The service was slow and staff were not that interested to help the customers. Overall it was an average experience and they could have made it more customer friendly place with food food and drinks.

Name: GUUNAAJ By Cafe Olgaa
Address: G4, Block G, Pushkar Enclave, Paschim Vihar, Delhi
Author: Shaloo Verma
Review:
My first visit to Cafe Olgaa, came out as a suprise since It had everything above expectations.
We ordered dishes, cream of chicken soup, chicken quesadilla, chicken burger, Bbq chicken pizza, and every dish was nicely prepared and presented.
The overall ambience is great with nice background music and friendly staff.
Also, they have a cosy corner for book lovers. The walls are beautifully painted which adds to the perfect ambience they have.
Would definitely recommend it to "Cafe lovers" who love good food and peaceful environment.
Finally a good cafe in West Delhi! 👍👌

Name: GUUNAAJ By Cafe Olgaa
Address: G4, Block G, Pushkar Enclave, Paschim Vihar, Delhi
Author: Kushal Gambhir
Review:
Despite I loved this place and visited it often for its veg crystal dimsum, this time I am quite disappointed with the Veg volcano pizza, Chicken breast and the drinks- Cranberry Rose sparkle, Vanilla frappe.
Although Veg Spicy Avocado Carrot sushi and Orange berry drink was okish.
I would also request the staff to be a little courteous if the customer is complaining about the food rather than playing blame game amongst the staff in front of the customer. I would like to add my request to rectify the drink was heard and I am thankful for that.

Name: Cafe Knosh
Address: Yamuna Sports Complex, Near, The Leela Ambience Convention Hotel 1, CBD, Maharaja Surajmal Marg, New Delhi
Author: Mahima Srivastava
Review: Excellent restaurant inside Leela. Variety of breakfast choices and other meals. Ashish Dhaundiyal and Hushmeet have been outstanding and very helpful when I went for breakfast. Made my stay here at Leela even better.

Name: Cafe Knosh
Address: Yamuna Sports Complex, Near, The Leela Ambience Convention Hotel 1, CBD, Maharaja Surajmal Marg, New Delhi
Author: Rachita Kapoor
Review: Have been a regular visitor at cafe Knosh for their Sunday brunch and dinners. The atmosphere is very lively with live & soothing music. The staff is very welcoming and makes sure you are seated comfortably.  Corner window side tables have a beautiful view overlooking the swimming pool outside. The buffet had variety of veg. & non veg. food along with chaat and Live counters. Starting from soups, salads to main course & desserts each & every dish was flavourful and appetising. Service was prompt. Special thanks to Mr. Hritik Gupta & team for amazing experience. Worth visiting.

Name: Cafe Knosh
Address: Yamuna Sports Complex, Near, The Leela Ambience Convention Hotel 1, CBD, Maharaja Surajmal Marg, New Delhi
Author: Delhi Food Nest
Review: Brunch date at Cafe Knosh in Leela Hotel was a culinary delight! From delectable sushi to flavorful kebabs and biryani, the diverse dessert selection impressed. The guava slush won over Mehak's heart. An overall amazing experience with delicious offerings.

Name: Cafe Knosh
Address: Yamuna Sports Complex, Near, The Leela Ambience Convention Hotel 1, CBD, Maharaja Surajmal Marg, New Delhi
Author: sachin singh
Review: I had visited for lunch. The hotel ambience is good, especially the fragrance used in the lobby, which was amazing. I tried their white sauce pasta from the live counter made by Chef Yash, which was delicious. Overall, the variety and taste of the food served were better than what we tried in other 5-star hotels in this part of the NCR. Although it's not as fancy in terms of decor, lighting, and plush seating as its fellow hotels, it's worth the price and definitely an underrated gem.

Name: Cafe Knosh
Address: Yamuna Sports Complex, Near, The Leela Ambience Convention Hotel 1, CBD, Maharaja Surajmal Marg, New Delhi
Author: waran dv
Review:
The restaurant is located on the third floor of Leela ambience. Their buffet is the most preferred menu by most people since al a carte would probably end up costing you more.

Excellent multicuisine spread. The starters were okay, but all their main course dishes were delicious. I particularly enjoyed the saag chicken and fish curry. I believe their menu changes periodically. But i believe they follow a similar format. They also had a lot of western desserts like cakes, mousse, pastries.

The ambience is great and the waiters were excellent with their service. Most importantly everyone spoke English. Tough to find in the service industry in Delhi these days

Name: Cafe Green
Address: 145, Market no.2, Block H, Chittaranjan Park, New Delhi
Author: Nadia Hussain
Review: It's a good place to have snacks and simple food at the busy C R Park Market. The Chinese food used to be a hit, but since their chef left, things have changed. Though the new chef is good in authentic flavors. The mutton thali is filling and tasty. The daab chingri and fish fingers are also good.

Name: Cafe Green
Address: 145, Market no.2, Block H, Chittaranjan Park, New Delhi
Author: Sachin Saxena
Review: Space is very small but atmosphere is nice. value for money meal but don't buy aloo tikki burger because that was tasteless. Cold coffe and cafe frappe are nice. nice place to hangouts with friends.

Name: Cafe Green
Address: 145, Market no.2, Block H, Chittaranjan Park, New Delhi
Author: Tanmoy Dutta
Review: Great ambiance and delicious food. Must try momos with soup.

Name: Cafe Green
Address: 145, Market no.2, Block H, Chittaranjan Park, New Delhi
Author: Soma Chanda
Review: Cozy restaurant...nice decoration...food is very tasty..we tried sizzler..must try fruit beer....

Name: Cafe Green
Address: 145, Market no.2, Block H, Chittaranjan Park, New Delhi
Author: Moumita H
Review: This is our one of the favourite place for having yummy foods.. We enjoy here Bongo meals and specially the signature dish of this restaurant. The environment is lovely. Food is very fresh and tasty.. The owner (Bengali uncle ji) is very good in nature, very friendly and its shows his passion towards his customers. Hospitality is very good. Must go. Highly recommended.

Name: G2 cafe
Address: Cafe G2, CBD Ground, opposite Leela Hotel, Surajmal Vihar, New Delhi
Author: dhaarna gandhi
Review:
A very nice place to dine out with friends . I really enjoyed the vibe. Hookah is also available here .
I ordered taco , fries and garlic bread all tasted good.
The menu also shows the amount of calories .
Staff is polite. Ambience was great . Visited there at the time of Christmas so. Very beautifully decorated .
The washrooms were clean too .
I really enjoyed the food. Would like to visit again

Name: G2 cafe
Address: Cafe G2, CBD Ground, opposite Leela Hotel, Surajmal Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Shubham Soni
Review:
This is my go to place, I love their pizza's and each and every food items there.
Ambience is good, both outdoor and indoor sitting is there.
Best cafe in East delhi 🙌

Name: G2 cafe
Address: Cafe G2, CBD Ground, opposite Leela Hotel, Surajmal Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Minni Jain
Review: Nice place to have dinner with friends or family, they have both the options of outside sitting and inside sitting as well .

Name: G2 cafe
Address: Cafe G2, CBD Ground, opposite Leela Hotel, Surajmal Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Ashok Arya
Review:
It’s my second visit to cafe , but it’s very disappointing to say the service is very slow , staff is non Coorporate , called cafe manager but he never come up. Although ordered food have decent flavours and my fav is Jalepno poppers. I would rate

1) Taste - 3.5/5
2) Service -1/5
3) Ambience -4/5
5) Must have - Jalepeno poppers and pizza (wood fired)

Name: G2 cafe
Address: Cafe G2, CBD Ground, opposite Leela Hotel, Surajmal Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Abhimanyu27
Review:
Visited G2 Cafe and indulged in their Alfredo and pizza offerings – both were exceptionally delicious.
The open-air atmosphere added to the overall experience, and the staff was commendably good and polite. A delightful culinary stop!

Name: Student's Cafe
Address: Sitaram Bazar Rd, Bazar Sirkiwalan, Hauz Qazi, Old Delhi, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Tekla/ Cad/ Microstation designer
Review: How much they are using Artificial Color and flavour like Iron rust. Unhealthy things to eat such type of Food. Please avoid.

Name: Student's Cafe
Address: Sitaram Bazar Rd, Bazar Sirkiwalan, Hauz Qazi, Old Delhi, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Bhawna Kashyap
Review:
Awesome cafe for students!!!😍😍😍😍😍
Student's cafe server up delicious shakes and momos,Burger,Pizza,Pasta,Noodles and more Chinese food.

Name: Student's Cafe
Address: Sitaram Bazar Rd, Bazar Sirkiwalan, Hauz Qazi, Old Delhi, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Diksha Sharma
Review: There is no taste in there food and very costly I ordered paneer pizza and it's price is 120rs and they put 4 paneer piece on pizza and some cheese and that's it no taste no cheesseness nothing and there behaviour is also not good

Name: Student's Cafe
Address: Sitaram Bazar Rd, Bazar Sirkiwalan, Hauz Qazi, Old Delhi, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Fabiha Khan (Fabby)
Review:
The Food we had enjoyed at the time of lunch. It was really delicious taste with great quality, everything had unique taste...
Good restaurant for lunch and snacks. We visited twice. Got good taste both the times. Perfect place for tasty food...

Service: Dine in
Meal type: Snacks
Price per person: ₹1–200
Food: 4
Service: 4
Atmosphere: 4
Recommended dishes: Chinese platter and momos..

Name: Student's Cafe
Address: Sitaram Bazar Rd, Bazar Sirkiwalan, Hauz Qazi, Old Delhi, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Tushar Vashisht
Review:
Students Cafe - My Go-To Place!

Students Cafe is hands down the best spot in the neighborhood for amazing food! Their menu offers a wide variety of delicious options, and my personal favorites are the onion corn and cheese pizza with extra cheese, hot chilli garlic noodles, spl tandoori burger, cheesy white sauce pasta, and the cafe spl tandoori spicy paneer pizza. Every dish I've tried has been full of flavor and cooked to perfection!

The owner is incredibly polite, and the staff is always cooperative and friendly. I’ve consistently had great experiences here, making it my only go-to place when I crave something tasty. Highly recommend this hidden gem!
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Name: The Daily Dose Cafe
Address: SHOP AT PLOT A1/1, BLK A1, AMAR SINGH GAHLOT CHOWK, Dwarka Mor, Block B, Sewak Park, Dwarka, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: SWETAA SNIGDHHA
Review: I have been here several times and always the service and the food have been just amazing! The food prices are very student friendly. Amazing place to give treats too!

Name: The Daily Dose Cafe
Address: SHOP AT PLOT A1/1, BLK A1, AMAR SINGH GAHLOT CHOWK, Dwarka Mor, Block B, Sewak Park, Dwarka, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Shivesh Jha
Review: Best cafe in Dwarka Mor area, The Lady at the counter is also good. Must try is Peppy Paneer Pizza and Mocha

Name: The Daily Dose Cafe
Address: SHOP AT PLOT A1/1, BLK A1, AMAR SINGH GAHLOT CHOWK, Dwarka Mor, Block B, Sewak Park, Dwarka, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Keshav Jha
Review: This is one of the most visited cafes on this lane, of the best thing about this cafe is it has AC . The crisis of food are also not that high. Actually most of the time I visit this place for tea with my friends. The greatest thing about this cafe is the behaviour by the owner of the cafe. They are very polite and gentle towards customers. The cafe also serves nonveg so it is another advantage. Here the burgers are too good.

Name: The Daily Dose Cafe
Address: SHOP AT PLOT A1/1, BLK A1, AMAR SINGH GAHLOT CHOWK, Dwarka Mor, Block B, Sewak Park, Dwarka, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Sunakshi Singh
Review: First of all, the owner of the cafe here has no manners at all to talk, how do she force her customers to get good ratings if you don't give good rating then they will start fighting with you there and behave very wrongly. I don't recommend you at all that you go to this place and the food here is very bad and the lady who owns it has no manners at all. my experience here was personally very bad.

Name: The Daily Dose Cafe
Address: SHOP AT PLOT A1/1, BLK A1, AMAR SINGH GAHLOT CHOWK, Dwarka Mor, Block B, Sewak Park, Dwarka, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: kritika tripathi
Review: Amazing place...the food and ambience is osm ..and the shake is must try thing ..I often visit here with my friends

Name: Mysore Cafe
Address: Thyagraj Marg Area, Teen Murti Marg Area, New Delhi
Author: Prateek Agarwal
Review:
Awesome place for South Indian food.

Cosy, authentic and a complete south Indian touch. Loved the breakfast here at mysore cafe. It starts early and i found it through social media.

Its located at a secluded VVIP area and no worries for the parking.

Mysore masala dosa is out of this world. MUST TRY !!

Awesome place for South Indian food.

Cosy, authentic and a complete south Indian touch. Loved the breakfast here at mysore cafe. It starts early and i found it through social media.

Its located at a secluded VVIP area and no worries for the parking.

Mysore masala dosa is out of this world. MUST TRY !!

Name: Mysore Cafe
Address: Thyagraj Marg Area, Teen Murti Marg Area, New Delhi
Author: Patricia
Review: The Mysore Cafe is a small place located at Teen Murti Marg. Its located in a small bylane amidst many government buildings. They have limited seating so you may have to wait a bit for a table. The interiors are clean and the staff is quick. They have a limited menu which is only a page long but everything on the menu is delicious and reasonably priced. We had the upma which was good and the filter coffee. They have dosa, idli and vada as well as rice meals for lunch and dinner. Great place to try a good hearty south indian meal.

Name: Mysore Cafe
Address: Thyagraj Marg Area, Teen Murti Marg Area, New Delhi
Author: Rohit Mendiratta
Review: A very old Cafe, very popular and crowded place indicates good food which is liked by many. To be honest mine was a mixed experience, maybe I went with high expectations reading the reviews. The Mysore Masala Dosa, though crisp was a bit of a let down, I didn't like the taste of the red chutney which differentiates this dosa from the regular Masala Dosa. The potato filling was tasty, so was the coconut chutney. The Sambhar was flavourful and tasty though it was watery and the vegetables should have been a bit more cooked and squishy. The filter coffee was very good. Value for money food.

Name: Mysore Cafe
Address: Thyagraj Marg Area, Teen Murti Marg Area, New Delhi
Author: Utkarsh Katiyar
Review:
Small shop at peaceful & silent area.
Service is fine.
Food is of good taste.
Tried Bombay dosa, your tummy will get burst but taste is good.
Tried Vada, that is also crunchy & gets soluble in sambhar.
Filter coffee & lemon tea is at its best.

Name: Mysore Cafe
Address: Thyagraj Marg Area, Teen Murti Marg Area, New Delhi
Author: Amrish Singh
Review:
Small little cafe cum restaurant
food was Super tasty dnd Authentic
mix Uttapam was great so was onion masala dosA...
service is ok but staff was lacking courtesy 😞.

Name: Cafe DeliBombay
Address: 1, Community Center, Maulana Mohammad Ali Jauhar Marg, Block A, Friends Colony East, New Friends Colony, New Delhi
Author: Bobby Roy
Review:
A nice, little cafe situated at the NFC market that serves some pretty unique dishes. I had heard about this from a friend, and I wasn't disappointed once I got to visit this cafe.

We tried the chicken samosa, the open cheese chicken sandwich, and both the items were really nice. The food was good, the staff was friendly and well-behaved, and the fact that this cafe has provision for outside seating (during winters, it'd be awesome!), made it feel really good.

Name: Cafe DeliBombay
Address: 1, Community Center, Maulana Mohammad Ali Jauhar Marg, Block A, Friends Colony East, New Friends Colony, New Delhi
Author: Sameer Ali
Review: Had a wonderful time over here! The place is small and neat. Rates are normal for Delhi standards. We had a frisk coffee (very strong flavour), a cappuccino, fish and chips (tad overpriced) and the shawarma platter (very filling). Will definitely visit again!

Name: Cafe DeliBombay
Address: 1, Community Center, Maulana Mohammad Ali Jauhar Marg, Block A, Friends Colony East, New Friends Colony, New Delhi
Author: Nuzaar Fatima
Review: lovely interior! Very aesthetically pleasing. The food is also very good with friendly staff. There's an outdoor sitting facility too but I didn't get to see that because there was some work going on but overall good and cozy, may be not THAT budget friendly for young students but it's fine because the food is worth it

Name: Cafe DeliBombay
Address: 1, Community Center, Maulana Mohammad Ali Jauhar Marg, Block A, Friends Colony East, New Friends Colony, New Delhi
Author: Ravinder Singh Rawat
Review:
It's a great place with great Ambience to hang out with your friends or partner.
I personally didn't liked the food much but it was nice.
Rooftop area was also nice there but unfortunately there was no vacant space for my squad.

Name: Cafe DeliBombay
Address: 1, Community Center, Maulana Mohammad Ali Jauhar Marg, Block A, Friends Colony East, New Friends Colony, New Delhi
Author: Ahad Zafar
Review:
Cafe DeliBombay in NFC, offers a cozy and minimalistic ambiance, providing a soothing retreat in the heart of the city. Perfect for those seeking a delightful culinary experience in a warm setting.
Food here is HALAL.

Name: Cafe Nipaso
Address: 3rd Floor, Building No. 1 RMS Tower, Golf Crse Rd, DLF Phase 1, Gurugram
Author: RIYA Kashyap
Review:
We have attended birthday party yesterday, It have a great experience with cafe nipaso!!

#delicious food, #wow experience #nice ambience

Name: Cafe Nipaso
Address: 3rd Floor, Building No. 1 RMS Tower, Golf Crse Rd, DLF Phase 1, Gurugram
Author: varun katyal
Review:
Looking for a place with some great rooftop seating and a good vibe, this place is for you.

*I tried it on a sunny afternoon and loved it. The food is nice with some good picks. We loved the Pasta with garlic bread  and sandwitches.

* I tried shakes there the shakes are rich and creamy too. Overall I would love to visit the place again more for the vibes.

*owner and staff are polite with customers.

Name: Cafe Nipaso
Address: 3rd Floor, Building No. 1 RMS Tower, Golf Crse Rd, DLF Phase 1, Gurugram
Author: Chanchal Kashyap
Review: Yesterday night.. I had visited a Cafe Nipaso.. for the chill-out with my friends... Really it's a very nice place for the family get-together, friend group & b'day party. Any special occasion.. There are provided a good offers for the groups and partys. Amezing food quality.. Delicious Food.... Yummy yummy 😋 Dahi Kabab .There are  beverages with a exotic mocktails Attractive Ambience... Pocket Friendly Menu ... No issue for parking... Also available parking facility ....mr. Rajesh and all sarvice staff very friendly behaviour good attentive staff.....  I would like to tell everyone that you must experiences Cafe Nipaso once.... Because my experience is the super amazing have a special day too... TQ so much for the special night...

Name: Cafe Nipaso
Address: 3rd Floor, Building No. 1 RMS Tower, Golf Crse Rd, DLF Phase 1, Gurugram
Author: Yashaswani Bhan
Review: If you're looking for a cafe that can transport you to another world, look no further than this hidden gem. As soon as you step inside, you'll be struck by the warm, welcoming atmosphere. The decor is tasteful and cozy, with comfortable seating and soft lighting that makes you feel right at home. Whether you're here for a quick coffee break or a long brunch with friends, you won't want to leave.

Name: Cafe Nipaso
Address: 3rd Floor, Building No. 1 RMS Tower, Golf Crse Rd, DLF Phase 1, Gurugram
Author: Rohit chaudhary
Review: this cafe is a must-visit. Great ambience, amazing food, relaxing music, and a great vibe make it the perfect spot for any occasion. So come on in, grab a seat, and let yourself be transported to a world of comfort and joy.

Name: ShellBeacon Cafe
Address: ShellBeacon Cafe, 8, Hauz Khas Village, Deer Park, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Uff June
Review: Wow, what a hidden gem! I stumbled upon this cozy cafe and was blown away by the warm atmosphere, friendly staff, and delicious food and drinks. From the moment I walked in, I felt like I was in a cozy oasis. The coffee was rich and flavorful, and the pastries were freshly baked and divine. The staff went above and beyond to make me feel welcome and comfortable. I can't wait to come back and try more of their menu offerings. I highly recommend this cafe to anyone looking for a relaxing and delicious experience!

Name: ShellBeacon Cafe
Address: ShellBeacon Cafe, 8, Hauz Khas Village, Deer Park, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: m m
Review: The cafe looks unassuming from the outside, but this was a great find. The waiter was really friendly and helpful, and food was amazing! Full of flavour and not too spicy. A lovely cosy little cafe.

Name: ShellBeacon Cafe
Address: ShellBeacon Cafe, 8, Hauz Khas Village, Deer Park, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Shruti Rao
Review:
Went to this little hole in the wall.place after reading ok reviews. I ordered a mocha and a "Buenos Dias Spain". Both were horrid. The "potato rosti" was still a bit uncooked and when I mentioned it to the server they went back to the cook and came back with a "but we just served it to someone else and they said it was good". Also the tomatoes on the plate looked like they were kept out for a long time, the skin of the tomato was wrinkling and it had a stale smell to it as well.

Not going back here

Name: ShellBeacon Cafe
Address: ShellBeacon Cafe, 8, Hauz Khas Village, Deer Park, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Ashima Robinson
Review: I visited this cafe recently, the cafe was situated at prime location in hauz khas village which is very easy to reach. I and my friend ordered this food and enjoyed the ambience. The aura was so soothing, the staff was polite and respectful. Must visit this cafe and please reach out to Mr. Romi he is really helpful. And do share your reviews with other people so that everyone could experience this amazing environment.

Name: ShellBeacon Cafe
Address: ShellBeacon Cafe, 8, Hauz Khas Village, Deer Park, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Megha Rajput
