Name: TEA YOUNG BOBA CAFE
Address: shop no.k-5, Godavari complex, Arun Vihar, Sector 37, Noida
Author: Amit Kumar
Review: Tea Young Boba Cafe is a delightful haven for boba enthusiasts. From the moment you step in, you're greeted by a cozy ambiance and the tantalizing aroma of freshly brewed tea. The menu boasts an impressive selection of boba flavors, each crafted with care and precision. Whether you're craving a classic milk tea or feeling adventurous with a fruity concoction, there's something for everyone here. The boba pearls are always perfectly cooked, with just the right amount of chewiness. The staff is friendly and knowledgeable, always ready to help you find your new favorite drink. With its inviting atmosphere and delicious beverages, Tea Young Boba Cafe is a must-visit for any boba lover. Highly recommended!

Name: TEA YOUNG BOBA CAFE
Address: shop no.k-5, Godavari complex, Arun Vihar, Sector 37, Noida
Author: Riya Bhalla
Review: The drinks are so incredibly refreshing along with the food being super authentic and delicious!

Name: TEA YOUNG BOBA CAFE
Address: shop no.k-5, Godavari complex, Arun Vihar, Sector 37, Noida
Author: Amey Kulkarni
Review: Absolutely fantastic experience! The boba tea selection is unparalleled, with flavors that burst with authenticity and creativity. The Korean food options, especially the teriyaki chicken and rice cake, are mouthwatering and leave you craving more. The ambiance is cozy and inviting, making it the perfect spot to relax with friends or enjoy a quiet meal alone. Friendly staff and impeccable service top off the experience. Five stars without a doubt!

Name: TEA YOUNG BOBA CAFE
Address: shop no.k-5, Godavari complex, Arun Vihar, Sector 37, Noida
Author: Bhumika Itkan
Review: Tried boba tea for the first time ever and I have to say, it was amazing! We tried a variety of flavours and all of them were equally refreshing. Overall a great experience with pocket friendly prices and the cafe music enhancing the ambience. The owner was friendly as well.

Name: Kailash Tea Shop
Address: 32/9, Indira Vikas Colony, Mukharjee Nagar, Dhirpur Village, Nirankari Colony, Model Town, New Delhi
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Nomi Tea
Address: Lower ground floor, Ambience Mall, Main Entrance, Nelson Mandela Marg, Ambience Island, Vasant Kunj II, Vasant Kunj
Author: Preetilata
Review:
Loved the boba teas so very much. We tried wild berry and raspberry tea. Raspberry with strawberry popping bubbles was too good. Wild berry one was decent but the blueberry flavoured popping bubbles didn’t go with it because the taste of both were merging. We asked the put tapioca (free) and popping bubbles (45₹) both but they only put in the paid ones. Quantity was pretty huge. May be smaller glasses along with taste samplers can be introduced .
Outlet was small and way too noisy. On top of that loud music was playing. Service was quick and will be going back for trying out more flavours .

A bigger and broader straw needs to be provided. With the current size the bubbles need to be targeted for them to pass through the straw

Name: Nomi Tea
Address: Lower ground floor, Ambience Mall, Main Entrance, Nelson Mandela Marg, Ambience Island, Vasant Kunj II, Vasant Kunj
Author: Royallika Ahuja
Review:
I'm absolutely loving Nomi Tea ! Not only do they serve some of the best bubble teas I've ever had, but their popping boba is top-notch - bursting with flavor and perfectly textured. But what really sets them apart is their delicious food menu! Dim sums, and other Asian-fusion dishes are mouth-watering and expertly prepared. The combination of great drinks and tasty eats makes Nomi Tea my new go-to spot. Highly recommend trying their signature Bubble Teas with popping boba .
The ambience is amazing too
Looking forward to visit again soon

Name: Nomi Tea
Address: Lower ground floor, Ambience Mall, Main Entrance, Nelson Mandela Marg, Ambience Island, Vasant Kunj II, Vasant Kunj
Author: Nitya Singh
Review:
A cozy corner for your Boba needs. I loved the variety provided by them:

be it for Milk Teas, Fruit Juices and Tapioca Pearls.

Loved how we can also lower the sugar level and make it a healthy drink.

They got fast service as well.

Name: Nomi Tea
Address: Lower ground floor, Ambience Mall, Main Entrance, Nelson Mandela Marg, Ambience Island, Vasant Kunj II, Vasant Kunj
Author: zara II
Review:
Loved the bubble teas and the food.. Amazing ramen and dimsums 🩷🩷🩷
Mr. Sanjeev was so hospitable and professional.. He made the experience 10 times better.

Name: Nomi Tea
Address: Lower ground floor, Ambience Mall, Main Entrance, Nelson Mandela Marg, Ambience Island, Vasant Kunj II, Vasant Kunj
Author: Subhan Ansari
Review: Had a great time here thanks to Mr.Sanjeev he’s the manager he helped us a lot in choosing the right drinks/ dishes etc. He has a keen eye! I appreciate his efforts a lot

Name: Burma Burma Restaurant & Tea Room
Address: Tower C, DLF Cyber Hub, Shop No - 6 Ground Floor, DLF Cyber City, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram
Author: Marci Fradkin
Review: Strongly recommend making a reservation. I have gone to them all over India and I’m still is one of my favorite restaurants. The flavors are so incredible so fresh and surprise me every time the drinks are creative and yummy and very refreshing. I love this place so much I wish they would open one in the United States, my friend was with me and as we were leaving I said pretty good for a vegetarian place. She goes oh my God I didn’t even think about it. It was so delicious.

Name: Burma Burma Restaurant & Tea Room
Address: Tower C, DLF Cyber Hub, Shop No - 6 Ground Floor, DLF Cyber City, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram
Author: Amit B
Review: Great place to try Burmese food. Better to read about the dishes in reviews before going as for first timers it could be very confusing when looking at the menu. Our server explained each dish n it's history with extensive detail.  Samosa soup was awesome. Other dishes were also great n different in taste. All ingredients, veggies, spices etc tasted very well n fresh. Though it was jam packed being Sat night the service was very quick. Great pure veg  place. They don't reserve over phone in advance. On weekends one can see wait time of 20-30 mins.

Name: Burma Burma Restaurant & Tea Room
Address: Tower C, DLF Cyber Hub, Shop No - 6 Ground Floor, DLF Cyber City, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram
Author: Prakkash Manohar
Review: Great food. Great ambience. There was a waiting time of 1 hour when we went at 8 pm on Sunday. They don't take reservations on weekends. I definitely recommend trying the Crunchy Tofu steamed bun or the bao. It was delicious. Noodles were good and had a refreshing flavour with the different sauces and condiments. Desserts were great as well. Staff was helpful and polite.

Name: Burma Burma Restaurant & Tea Room
Address: Tower C, DLF Cyber Hub, Shop No - 6 Ground Floor, DLF Cyber City, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram
Author: Shashwat Gupta
Review: This establishment is an essential destination for aficionados of Southeast Asian cuisine. The appetizers, soups, and main courses were all exceptional, but the desserts – they shone like gold in a sea of sand. Highly recommended!

Name: Burma Burma Restaurant & Tea Room
Address: Tower C, DLF Cyber Hub, Shop No - 6 Ground Floor, DLF Cyber City, DLF Phase 3, Gurugram
Author: Food Date
Review:
It’s a nice restaurant in DLF cyber hub. Delish good food and good service. Expensive dishes and less quantity though. No discounts or offers. We had a smoked spicy guava drink. Nice presentation and nice refreshing drink but less quantity. Then tried rice pancakes served with peanut chutney. 6 small pieces in rs 350. Tasty though. The bao buns are 140 a piece vegetarian but were soft and nice. Filling could have been better. Tried veg noodles which were again good but they could add more vegetables.
They give some condiments platter with peanuts, garlic, spring onions, Batista onions, dried chilli flakes, lemons. Then another platter with sauces like hibiscus sauce, tomato onion peanut sauce etc.
good presentation overall .

Name: Indian Tea House
Address: D22, New Vijay Nagar, Mirzapur, Pratap Vihar, Ghaziabad
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Tiwari Tea Stall
Address: Gate, Street Number 5, Block H, Sector 55, Noida
Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Gupta Tea, Coffee & Snacks
Address: 117/3A, Sudarshan Cinema Rd, Gautam Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Mrinal Sharma
Review: Exceptional experience! I highly recommend this place. It exceeded my expectations and I am thoroughly impressed. Thank you for the amazing quality of food and service!

Name: Gupta Tea, Coffee & Snacks
Address: 117/3A, Sudarshan Cinema Rd, Gautam Nagar, New Delhi
Author: pratyush rathore
Review: they cook the food in the morning, and serve the same curries in the dinner also. they served me spoiled potato curry in the dinner which was prepared during lunch, and they were justifying that everyone eats the same food, the potato in the curry literally had the spoiled taste.

Name: Gupta Tea, Coffee & Snacks
Address: 117/3A, Sudarshan Cinema Rd, Gautam Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Dr. Bhanu Pratap
Review:
It's a tea stall
Talkin'about my review
1. They offer variety of products like poha, samosa, tea, dairy products, bread pakora, etc
2. The rates are easily affordable
3. The location of this shop is near to coaching centre. So it is popular among coaching students
4. One can get good tea here
Cons
1. The shop is completely looting us.
No taste of samosa, poha is so cheap quality. I had to throw whole poha just after one bite
2. They try to sell even the expired products. Once they were selling expired curd.
3. The shop is having good buisness due to its location. Don't repent by wasting your money here .

Name: Gupta Tea, Coffee & Snacks
Address: 117/3A, Sudarshan Cinema Rd, Gautam Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Abhishek Ravindra
Review: Reasonable snacks and tea etc. Available for extremely reasonable cost. Poha for breakfast is a popular choice and costs just Rs.10. A local favourite with the coaching student crowd.

Name: Gupta Tea, Coffee & Snacks
Address: 117/3A, Sudarshan Cinema Rd, Gautam Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Aditya PVS
Review: It's a focal point of the street where u find a place to hang out ,chill and have food n snacks . A little crowded place but filled with ambitious people on the street.

Name: Chai Point - Connaught Place
Address: Pratap Building, N44, Connaught Cir, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Literally Same
Review: The worst cafe or chai place one can visit. The WORSTTT I REPEAT!!! Service is TERRIBLE. EMPLOYEES SHOULD BE FIRED IMMEDIATELY. SLOWEST FOR NO REASON. Waste of time and energy. Such idiots. Just go to Chayoos. Pathetic brand

Name: Chai Point - Connaught Place
Address: Pratap Building, N44, Connaught Cir, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Farhan Khan
Review:
One of the finest tea shop you’ll encounter. I’ve been munching their delicacies for many years either by dining in or via delivery.
You won’t be disappointed by the food here. Talking about the store, it has ample seating area and you won’t find it crowded which is a big plus. The staff was very kind and restaurant was very clean as well.

Do check out this place either for your breakfast munching or if you are transiting via Delhi as it is just a few kilometres away from New Delhi Railway station.

Name: Chai Point - Connaught Place
Address: Pratap Building, N44, Connaught Cir, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Brij Mohan (Brij)
Review: Last weekend, I visited this place to have a cup of tea with an old friend. We ordered to gold tea along with Samosa bun. This place looks nice yet small. The menu is limited and I don’t think the food quality and quantity that I got served was appropriate and justified to its price. I would rather go to a thela serving tea and just have it from there on the roadside with Samosa bun in my hand. Bun Samosa was completely dry with no taste to it.

Name: Chai Point - Connaught Place
Address: Pratap Building, N44, Connaught Cir, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Bobby Roy
Review:
I like the ambience and the friendly staff greet you with smiling faces as soon as you enter the place. I tried their variety of iced chai - peach, ginger lemon, lemon, jaljeera, etc. and pretty much liked all of it.

Also, they serve these iced-chai in cute bottles that have "Chai Point" brand stuck on it. I am not a tea giy, so, I cannot comment on their selection of hot tea. They've got decent variety of snacks as well, ranging from samosas, patties to Bombay vada-paav.

One little irritating thing that I noticed on my recent visit is the fact that the staff keeps coming upto you to request you to write reviews of Chai Point on Zomato and do a check-in on Facebook. I understand if they did it randomly once but during our time at Chai-Point, it so happened that they came upto to us for the same thing twice. That gets a tad irritating. It did made me feel that I am being force-fed to do something which I do not wish to do right then and there.

Reason enough to give them a 3 star rating, overall. 🙏

Name: Chai Point - Connaught Place
Address: Pratap Building, N44, Connaught Cir, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Ajit Kumar Sah
Review: This outlet is great. The lighting, the attitude of staff towards their customers, the service provided. Your order won't take much time. The happiness is delivered real soon. But the only issue I have is that it is much cheaper online than it is at offline stores. A piece of banana cake which is available at 52(with discount) is priced 96 at the outlet. So if u looking for a date to spend some quality time you should definitely visit this place. Keep in mind the pricey side and so place your order accordingly. Hope this review helps. Give thumps up if yes.

Name: Got Tea | Galleria Market
Address: Shop No. SF-50, First Floor, Galleria Commercial Complex, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Dia Jainn
Review: Cube croissant was good enough to make Parisian pastry chefs proud. The Korean banana milk was nice, but I personally think the grapefruit iced tea was basically soda. Cute Polaroid machine and soothing ambience.

Name: Got Tea | Galleria Market
Address: Shop No. SF-50, First Floor, Galleria Commercial Complex, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Karan Vashishat
Review:
Good options of bubble tea, we tried a couple of mango flavoured seasonal drinks but liked basic mango and milk based drink with Pearl Topica the best.

They were happy to make us taste a few before we order one. Nice sitting with charger points.

Name: Got Tea | Galleria Market
Address: Shop No. SF-50, First Floor, Galleria Commercial Complex, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Yakshi Arora
Review: The vibe, interiors, packaging of the tea can/bottles all is top notch. They even have a small picture taking ‘memory box’ inside the store, which honestly adds to the experience. The chocolate delight bubble tea was tasty too. So yes definitely recommend this place.

Name: Got Tea | Galleria Market
Address: Shop No. SF-50, First Floor, Galleria Commercial Complex, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Lakshya Thakur
Review: Went here with a friend on recommendation. You can get tasters first before purchase. We tried the refreshers - Mango, Hibiscus and Grapefruit out of which Grapefruit suited our taste. Ordered that one with coconut jelly. Even with regular sugar, it was on the sweeter side so would advise ordering with less for this flavour. Overall a refreshing drink.

Name: Got Tea | Galleria Market
Address: Shop No. SF-50, First Floor, Galleria Commercial Complex, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Ranjana Kalshan
Review: Kudos to the amazing flavours of bubble tea they have. Definitely a must try and to cherish the authentic experience which you will not get anywhere else. Totally 💯  worth and authenticity at its best. Enjoy 😊

Name: Tea Bear - Aerocity
Address: Kiosk No. 2, Lower Ground Floor, Worldmark 1, Aerocity, South West, New Delhi
Author: Royallika Ahuja
Review: I'm absolutely hooked on Tea bear ! Their bubble teas are refreshing and flavorful, with the perfect balance of sweetness and tanginess. The showstopper is their cheesecakes - creamy, rich, and indulgent. The combination of textures and tastes is pure magic. I also tried their Ramen noodles and found them delicious.  The staff is friendly and welcoming, and the cozy atmosphere makes it the perfect spot to get some amazing refreshments .

Name: Tea Bear - Aerocity
Address: Kiosk No. 2, Lower Ground Floor, Worldmark 1, Aerocity, South West, New Delhi
Author: Abhay Bajaj
Review: I was beyond delighted to try out Tea Bear’s selection of boba teas and korean snacks. The quality of each and every thing was excellent. If you are having trouble deciding, go for the purple taro 🧋

Name: Tea Bear - Aerocity
Address: Kiosk No. 2, Lower Ground Floor, Worldmark 1, Aerocity, South West, New Delhi
Author: Soumya Gulati
Review:
A must try place! They have the yummiest boba teas! My personal favourite is the green tea with blueberry boba.

They also have a nice food selection of Korean snacks that are irresistible! The staff is incredibly  attentive and helps you choose from the vast variety they offer. Highly highly recommend!

Name: Tea Bear - Aerocity
Address: Kiosk No. 2, Lower Ground Floor, Worldmark 1, Aerocity, South West, New Delhi
Author: Tejaswi Seth
Review:
They serve absolutely delicious Boba tea! I tried it for the first time in my life and thoroughly enjoyed it.
I would recommend the mango Boba tea with passion fruit bubbles. It was neither too sugary nor too watery. The perfect consistency and flavour.

Will definitely return!

Name: Tea Bear - Aerocity
Address: Kiosk No. 2, Lower Ground Floor, Worldmark 1, Aerocity, South West, New Delhi
Author: Hardik Joshi
Review: Absolutely love the boba teas at Tea Bear. Such a vast menu and such diverse flavors. The staff was kind enough to make me try my drink and really tweaked it according to my needs. 5/5

Name: Silly Duck ! (Bubble Tea)
Address: 49-UB, Block UB, Jawahar Nagar, Kamla Nagar, Delhi
Author: Nishant Kumar
Review:
Silly Duck: A Cozy Bubble Tea Spot Near University of Delhi.

Silly Duck, located near Kamla Market close to the University of Delhi, is a go-to place for bubble tea fans.

While it might cost a bit more compared to other nearby spots, the flavors are just right – not too sweet but still tasty.

The chewy tapioca bubbles they add make the drinks even better.

The best thing about Silly Duck? The place itself. The seating area is really comfy and inviting. It's a great spot to chill out with friends or enjoy a drink alone.

Even though it's a bit pricier than some other places around, if you're near the University of Delhi and want a relaxed place to grab some good bubble tea, Silly Duck is worth checking out.
It's a cozy hangout for bubble tea lovers!

Name: Silly Duck ! (Bubble Tea)
Address: 49-UB, Block UB, Jawahar Nagar, Kamla Nagar, Delhi
Author: Hirdiya Chawla
Review:
I visited this cafe today and had a delightful experience! The atmosphere is wonderfully quiet and perfect for relaxing or catching up with friends. The fries were absolutely amazing—crispy and perfectly seasoned. The highlight, however, was the bubble tea; it was the best I’ve had in a long time!

The service was nice and attentive, adding to the overall pleasant experience. While the prices were quite reasonable, I did find the portion sizes to be a bit on the smaller side. Nevertheless, the quality of the food and the serene ambiance make this cafe a gem worth visiting. I'll definitely be back! 🌟🍟🧋

Name: Silly Duck ! (Bubble Tea)
Address: 49-UB, Block UB, Jawahar Nagar, Kamla Nagar, Delhi
Author: Devansh Sahni
Review: I just loved this place perfect drinks perfect service and perfect hang out place surely a place for weekends meeting with friends

Name: Silly Duck ! (Bubble Tea)
Address: 49-UB, Block UB, Jawahar Nagar, Kamla Nagar, Delhi
Author: Sirzechs Gremmory
Review: This is an amazing place to hangout at or you can just go alone and sit quietly and do your stuff while you take the flavour of their fries, amazing fries . I can without a doubt say that this is the best place in North campus , kamla nagar. The drinks are also very good. I've personally tried the hazelnut boba coffee and that tells the standard and quality of their food and drinks. Amazing place , you should try it especially if you live nearby.

Name: Silly Duck ! (Bubble Tea)
Address: 49-UB, Block UB, Jawahar Nagar, Kamla Nagar, Delhi
Author: Twinkle A
Review:
Best Bubble Tea I've ever had!!
Their pearls and coconut jellies are freshly prepared. The texture of the drink is elite and creamy. And the staff is super sweet and genuine. Much love to Silly Duck 🫶🏻

Name: Tea Lounge
Address: Clarks Inn Gurgaon, Ground Floor, Old Judicial Complex, Sector 15, Civil Lines, New Delhi
Author: khatrnaak khiladi
Review: Nice place for spending some quality time peaceful place nd nice service

Name: Tea Lounge
Address: Clarks Inn Gurgaon, Ground Floor, Old Judicial Complex, Sector 15, Civil Lines, New Delhi
Author: pooja rathaur
Review:
Good food
Tasty and yummy
Nice for tea break

Name: Tea Lounge
Address: Clarks Inn Gurgaon, Ground Floor, Old Judicial Complex, Sector 15, Civil Lines, New Delhi
Author: jitendra kumar
Review:
Location is good
Food in good quality

Name: Tea Lounge
Address: Clarks Inn Gurgaon, Ground Floor, Old Judicial Complex, Sector 15, Civil Lines, New Delhi
Author: ashna roy
Review: Very good

Name: Tea Lounge
Address: Clarks Inn Gurgaon, Ground Floor, Old Judicial Complex, Sector 15, Civil Lines, New Delhi
Author: Narasimharao Rao
Review: Very nice

Name: Got Tea | Greater Kailash 2
Address: Floor, M, Hand Side Ground, Right, 75, Part 2 Market, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Baldev lal
Review:
I recently visit in Got Tea in Gk-2 M Block Market.I'm absolutely obsessed with this coffee shop! The atmosphere is cozy and inviting, perfect for studying, working, or catching up with friends. The staff are friendly, knowledgeable, and always make sure my drink is made to perfection.

The coffee is top-notch, with a wide selection of specialty drinks and expertly brewed pour-overs. The pastries and snacks are also delicious and freshly baked.

What sets this coffee shop apart is the attention to detail and commitment to quality. From the elegant decor to the consistent flavor profiles, every aspect of this shop is well-thought-out and expertly executed.

Keep up the fantastic work!

*Highlights:*

- Excellent coffee quality
- Friendly and knowledgeable staff
- Cozy atmosphere
- Delicious pastries and snacks

*Suggestions:*
- Add some more snacks and food section.

*Tips for visitors:*

- Try the seasonal specialty drinks
- Ask the baristas for recommendations
- Take advantage of the comfortable seating area"

Overall everything was okey and I loved the cozy atmosphere and friendly service too! Whether you're a coffee connoisseur or just looking for a quick pick-me-up, this place is sure to impress. Highly recommended for anyone seeking a top-notch cup of joe!"

Name: Got Tea | Greater Kailash 2
Address: Floor, M, Hand Side Ground, Right, 75, Part 2 Market, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Mahika sharma
Review: Got tea has to be one of the best matcha places in delhi with the most warm and kind staff and the perfect ambience. It’s absolutely welcoming and the photo booth there just makes it that more memorable. It’s a place to visit EVERYDAY and a must must visit for matcha, coffee , refreshing boba, sandwiches THEY DO IT ALL

Name: Got Tea | Greater Kailash 2
Address: Floor, M, Hand Side Ground, Right, 75, Part 2 Market, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Rahul Sharma
Review: I'm absolutely enchanted by Got Tea—a place that truly feels like a sanctuary for anyone craving a distinct cafe experience. The service here isn't just good; it's exceptional. The staff go out of their way to be not only polite but genuinely engaging, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere for everyone. The Strawberry Blossom they serve is a revelation, soothing from the first sip to the last, and perfectly capturing the essence of relaxation. One of my favorite features has to be their instant printing camera—a delightful, quirky touch that allows guests to capture and take home their moments of fun and friendship.

Name: Got Tea | Greater Kailash 2
Address: Floor, M, Hand Side Ground, Right, 75, Part 2 Market, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: gargi banerjee
Review: Loved the ambience and service too. Situated in the mid of GK market, the place gives hill station cafe' vibes. Great place to sit, chit chat and relax. Even if u are alone, a great cup of tea or may be their different drink options provide u a cool pass time. Good for workaholics too where u can sit in a quiet environment and complete your work with a bottle of their preparations. The place includes a tidy washroom hence good for shoppers roaming around in the market. Liked the place. Will visit again.

Name: Got Tea | Greater Kailash 2
Address: Floor, M, Hand Side Ground, Right, 75, Part 2 Market, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Pallabi
Review: We had a wonderful experience. The staff was very warm and welcoming. We tried a few of their teas and desserts, all which were delicious and wonderful! Must recommend their egg tart and egg custard! Must visit!

Name: Chaayos Cafe - Connaught Place, M Block
Address: Plot no 3, 1st Floor, M - 66, Block M, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Aasfa Khatoon
Review:
Chaayos CP is a feast for the eyes! The cafe's aesthetic is totally Instagram-worthy, creating a vibrant and visually pleasing atmosphere. While I didn't get to try the food this time, the service seemed attentive and friendly. I'm definitely looking forward to returning for a full Chaayos experience – delicious chai and aesthetically pleasing food in a trendy ambiance.

Highlights:

Stunning and Instagrammable decor
Friendly and attentive service (based on observation)
Looking forward to:

Trying the menu – can't wait to see how the food looks and tastes!
Overall:

A great spot for a visually inspiring visit with promising service. I'll be back to delve into the food and update my review!

Name: Chaayos Cafe - Connaught Place, M Block
Address: Plot no 3, 1st Floor, M - 66, Block M, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Inderjeet Singh
Review: Found layer of black oily substance on reverse of Modi nagar Shikanji cover. Told this to staff there but they were more for defending the oily blackish substance as part of one it's ingredients. Staff needs training on how to deal with customer and speak with them in such complaints. Ravinder and Mohit were cooperative and well meaning, but Akash needs correction. He shouldn't be here in the branch. Customer experience team should take note of it and respond.

Name: Chaayos Cafe - Connaught Place, M Block
Address: Plot no 3, 1st Floor, M - 66, Block M, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Amit Ranjan
Review:
The place is comfy with light music in the background. There are 4 sitting area - one in the outer near the cash counter, left area with high ceiling, center area with large sofa suitable for large groups and the right area ideal for 2-5 people sized groups. The service is good. For people who like to work in a cafe, this is a good option.

You can order at the counter or through the app (select M block while ordering)

Name: Chaayos Cafe - Connaught Place, M Block
Address: Plot no 3, 1st Floor, M - 66, Block M, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Rahul Abhishek
Review:
Rude staff. Was there to meet a friend and kept saying to order more and more. Kept selling. Saying manager is not allowing and all that.

Always been to chaayos in Noida. Never faced such a stupid issue there. Pathetic behaviour.

Then I saw their employees looking at me and discussing and gossiping. That's their standard. Disappointed.

Name: Chaayos Cafe - Connaught Place, M Block
Address: Plot no 3, 1st Floor, M - 66, Block M, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Meena Jain
Review: I generally enjoy eating at chaayos. Specially their customised tea n variety of vegetarian snacks. I didn’t enjoy all sandwich n they immediately changed n got me garden fresh. That was a better option. Palak crisps n bun Maska n bun bhujia are my favourite.  Rt now lots of offers are also there so enjoy winters with chaayos

Name: Mittal Tea House
Address: Shop No 8, Main Market, Block 8, Lodi Colony, New Delhi
Author: Nita B Choudhury
Review: I love this place! Since we are a family of tea lovers it's a virtual treasure trove for us. They have a large variety of teas. From white tea to Darjeeling, Assam, masala tea, Kashmiri Kahwa and so many more. There are diffusers and tea pots, timers and strainers as well as a different kinds of gift packs for all pockets. A must visit store for anyone who loves tea. The staff is very polite and helpful and they also have this service of sampling a particular tea if you are still uncertain of whether to buy it. I've been introduced to a number of exotic blends due to this.s

Name: Mittal Tea House
Address: Shop No 8, Main Market, Block 8, Lodi Colony, New Delhi
Author: Tulika Sinha
Review:
While I really enjoyed going through their collection and selecting the tea that I wanted to buy, the experience was unfortunately ruined towards the end by implicit derogatory remarks by the lady who probably owned the shop. Do not be misled by the tasting counter as if you ask for a tea tasting, you’ll receive judgemental looks and not so courteous response. The tea is put on display but we didn’t get to taste as their water was over was initial reason we were given.
The experience would have been normal had the female not said the following - “Hum ek hi cup taste karwaenge. Aisa nahi ki aap 10 cup taste kar lo. “ when I asked her the time till they provide tasting in the morning. My friend casually just mentioned that - “Anyways if you taste so many it becomes difficult to choose and you generally try 1-2”. But she then went on again with her mean remarks “no, no. Foreigners toh pi lete hain..and Wo aise bhi 20-25k ka khareed k le jaate hain na” - probably trying to highlight that they still judge customers by how much they would pay and not what they need. Not sure if this is an over reaction, but it was clearly a very rude statement to hear as a customer.

Name: Mittal Tea House
Address: Shop No 8, Main Market, Block 8, Lodi Colony, New Delhi
Author: Robin Snow
Review: Convenient for foreigners, they have new crops, Darjeeling Asam, Kashmiri and lots of fragrant infused tea. International cards accepted which is a plus. Refer to their website for the types, closed on Monday

Name: Mittal Tea House
Address: Shop No 8, Main Market, Block 8, Lodi Colony, New Delhi
Author: Sanjeev Mehta
Review: Been getting my tea here for the past 15 years. Awesome variety

Name: Mittal Tea House
Address: Shop No 8, Main Market, Block 8, Lodi Colony, New Delhi
Author: Christian Jauslin
Review: Fantastic expierence with really good quality tea. We enjoyed the best and most friendly assistance with much knowlede about Indian tea. The whole staff was wonderful helping us. We could try some of the tea. The shop is nice, clean and perfect in size. Loved the visit, would definitely go to this hidden gem again. For tea my favorit!

Name: Baba Tea
Address: Shop No.8, Munirka Vihat DDA Market, Nelson Mandela Road, New Delhi
Author: Sarfaraz Siddiqui
Review: Baba Tea offers a rich collection of Indian and exotic teas and a wide range of organic cosmetics! The business owner Sanjit Ji is a delightful fellow to talk to. Want to make a gift of Darjeeling Pekoe, wulong tea or Chikmagalur Coffee? Baba Tea is the place to be.

Name: Baba Tea
Address: Shop No.8, Munirka Vihat DDA Market, Nelson Mandela Road, New Delhi
Author: Sushant Mani
Review: It’s a tea house with a good variety of good quality tea leaves. You must try/buy their white tea and gold tea. They have their own brand of cosmetics too and their creams and oils are totally organic and of high quality like Forest essentials and Kama.

Name: Baba Tea
Address: Shop No.8, Munirka Vihat DDA Market, Nelson Mandela Road, New Delhi
Author: Amrendra Anupam
Review: Baba Tea is famous Tea exporters. They export tea outside India and they have Genuine products and Tea quality is great.

Name: Baba Tea
Address: Shop No.8, Munirka Vihat DDA Market, Nelson Mandela Road, New Delhi
Author: avnish kumar
Review: A one stop sho0 for finest Indian teas ,essential oils and gift items.

Name: Baba Tea
Address: Shop No.8, Munirka Vihat DDA Market, Nelson Mandela Road, New Delhi
Author: vangteh guite
Review:
Roadside place that you can drink t
Special warm tea with a few bucks

Name: SANCHA Tea Boutique
Address: 209, DLF Cross Point Market, DLF City, Hamilton Ct Rd, Sector 28, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Ashish Jha
Review: Best place to place orders for corporate gifts. They personalise the boxes with your company logo & handle the process very professionally.  They delivered on time to our office at cyber city and the packaging was just stunning ! Definitely going back to these guys for our Diwali gifting

Name: SANCHA Tea Boutique
Address: 209, DLF Cross Point Market, DLF City, Hamilton Ct Rd, Sector 28, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Akshita
Review:
It’s a great place to visit if you love tea. They provide you with samples of different tea to taste before you buy.

They have a huge variety of different and unique teas.

I got the rose white tea which was really really and the butterfly pea green tea which is minty in flavour.

Name: SANCHA Tea Boutique
Address: 209, DLF Cross Point Market, DLF City, Hamilton Ct Rd, Sector 28, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Vishal Singh
Review: Sancha Tea selections are a great choice for corporate gifts because they are well priced, beautifully packaged and acceptable to everyone (male or female). We got these personalised sleeves placed on the box and gifted them to our global chiefs on their recent visit to India.

Name: SANCHA Tea Boutique
Address: 209, DLF Cross Point Market, DLF City, Hamilton Ct Rd, Sector 28, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: keaton cardoza
Review: A must go spot for tea lovers. We went there to pick up gift boxes for our friends abroad who wanted a taste of good Indian teas. We were not disappointed as they had a huge assortment of gift boxes which were very great in terms of different types of teas and the packaging was lovely. Service was excellent as the staff helped us get exactly what we needed and also gave us to sample most of the teas we purchased. Will be coming back here for sure

Name: SANCHA Tea Boutique
Address: 209, DLF Cross Point Market, DLF City, Hamilton Ct Rd, Sector 28, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Lydia Haokip
Review: It was really nice, varities of tea available and they offer us tea. Nice location and not too crowded, saffron white tea is really good and intersting tea names like sleeping beauty or snow white existed. Fun place.

Name: Got Tea | Deer Park
Address: Ground Floor, B-6/2, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Stephy Thomas
Review:
Order :
Mango coconut boba 5/5
Mocha latte boba 4/5
Blueberry cube croissant 3/5
Creamy mushroom sandwich 5/5

The best part is you can customize the sweetness, amount of ice, toppings (boba or jellies) and the choice of milk.
I would really love to see some options in popping boba and a few more additions to the soda base flavours.

Name: Got Tea | Deer Park
Address: Ground Floor, B-6/2, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: isha gupta
Review:
Their bubble tea is absolutely delicious, with a perfect balance of sweetness and flavor. I especially loved the mocha latte . The croissants are flaky and buttery, and they pair perfectly with the tea.
The unique thing about this café is that they have photo kiosk and we can instantly get our pic printed.

Name: Got Tea | Deer Park
Address: Ground Floor, B-6/2, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Ishpreet Thapar
Review: When I had my first bubble tea, it was at this place, and it was a delightful experience. The tea was refreshing, and the staff were incredibly friendly and helpful. It's definitely worth a visit if you're looking for a tasty treat and excellent service.

Name: Got Tea | Deer Park
Address: Ground Floor, B-6/2, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Rose Plays
Review:
Ambience is very cute. Didn't like the bubble tea too much, but the strawberry croffle was great.

Took photos from the photo booth, quite good, and it is free so.

Name: Got Tea | Deer Park
Address: Ground Floor, B-6/2, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Suchi
Review:
Loved my recent visit to GotTea
We ordered a taro bubble tea and a grapefruit one, both were absolutely delicious.
Taro flavour usually gets messed up, but they did it so well, especially the sweetness it was well balanced.
Also ordered the strawberry croffle, and oh man I'm still dreaming about it. It was heavenly. Especially the strawberry cream cheese frosting with glazed strawberries, it was just perfect.
Also they've installed a photo printer, and tho me and my friends ove-used it but we created so many beautiful memories.

Name: Jolly Tea Stall
Address: shop no 5, Krishna, 66a, Mandir Rd, Main Market, Block Wa, Shakarpur, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: nitish gupta
Review: Good taste of aloo sandwich and chai , small place for sitting but it's ok .

Name: Jolly Tea Stall
Address: shop no 5, Krishna, 66a, Mandir Rd, Main Market, Block Wa, Shakarpur, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Paras Dahiya
Review: One of the best quality tea stall in Laxminagar, The Owner Jolly bhaiya treats everyone like a younger brother! Have been in Laxminagar for 3 years, It was my Daily breakfast point.

Name: Jolly Tea Stall
Address: shop no 5, Krishna, 66a, Mandir Rd, Main Market, Block Wa, Shakarpur, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Jatin Singh (Jay)
Review:
Must visit !
kind owner and tasty food .

Name: Jolly Tea Stall
Address: shop no 5, Krishna, 66a, Mandir Rd, Main Market, Block Wa, Shakarpur, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Suryansh Maheshwari
Review:
Small shop with limited seating.
Good tasting tea though.
They offer a variety of snacks with the tea as well.
This tea shop is usually packed so it might take you a little while to get your order.
Overall, decent place to have a nice cup of tea.

Name: Jolly Tea Stall
Address: shop no 5, Krishna, 66a, Mandir Rd, Main Market, Block Wa, Shakarpur, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Manju Thakur
Review: Very great food quality i loved it ♥️

Name: NARAIN TEA CAFE
Address: F 99, F Block, Lajpat Nagar II, Lajpat Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Faraz Khan
Review: It's been 12 years now since I've started visiting and the best part is the taste which is still intact followed by cleanliness and hygiene. Honey chilli potato, fried rice, grilled sandwich, coffee and bread omelette are some of the must try items

Name: NARAIN TEA CAFE
Address: F 99, F Block, Lajpat Nagar II, Lajpat Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Tushar Rawal
Review:
I just love the way owner follow his ethics, he maintain cleanliness.
The food is yummy. One must try.
Peach Apricot milkshake is a must try.
Chili chap if you are vegetarian and want to try a new variety of chap.
He do not take order after 7pm so you must come accordingly.
Sunday is closed (surprisingly)
Enjoy your food.

Name: NARAIN TEA CAFE
Address: F 99, F Block, Lajpat Nagar II, Lajpat Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Kamakshi Sabharwal
Review: I have always loved the burgers that are served at narain tea cafe they're one of my favourites and are way better than mc Donald's and any other food chains they also have amazing chilli potatoes, noodles with alot of vegetables and i also love the cold coffee the food served is also very hygienic and narains is one of my go to places whenever I want to go and grab a burger and coffee.

Name: NARAIN TEA CAFE
Address: F 99, F Block, Lajpat Nagar II, Lajpat Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Nimit Nigam
Review: Great place for food, Davidoff coffee, chowmein, honey chilly potatoes and sandwiches.

Name: NARAIN TEA CAFE
Address: F 99, F Block, Lajpat Nagar II, Lajpat Nagar, New Delhi
Author: D M
Review:
Best place to have coffee. Their coffee is simply out of the world.

Burger 🍔, sandwich 🥪, veg chowmein is a must try

Name: Mittal Teas
Address: GF-6 New Delhi House, 27, Barakhamba Road, New Delhi
Author: Natacha Correa
Review:
In this lovely store you can find all the teas you would like. They have beautifully packaged boxes, and you can also customize them. They offer a huge selection of teas and some spices. The service was outstanding. They are super friendly and not pushing you to buy like in other stores we have been. We were able to taste some delicious teas and they prepared our gift boxes with a lot of care and love. We definitely recommend this place to purchase teas and spices. Moreover they speak perfect English.
The shop is a bit hidden, but you can see a sign outside on the main road, and the entrance to the building is from the side street. The shop is located next to the parking area.

Name: Mittal Teas
Address: GF-6 New Delhi House, 27, Barakhamba Road, New Delhi
Author: Andreas Baumann
Review:
Very friendly & nice.
I'm not the tee expert - bit i felt good & bought some tea as presents 😅

Oh - the entrance is at the front of the building - shop on the ground flour. I tried the back first 😅

Name: Mittal Teas
Address: GF-6 New Delhi House, 27, Barakhamba Road, New Delhi
Author: Maxim T
Review: Fantastic selection of Darjeeling and South Indian (Nilgiri) teas! Hosts were incredibly helpful, and helped us with our preferences. We did several tastings of the teas. Highly recommend to visit this tea shop.

Name: Mittal Teas
Address: GF-6 New Delhi House, 27, Barakhamba Road, New Delhi
Author: Pranav Dadhich
Review: Great collection of teas! The team at Mittal teas explained all questions very patiently and gave a really good tasting session. Highly recommended!

Name: Mittal Teas
Address: GF-6 New Delhi House, 27, Barakhamba Road, New Delhi
Author: 竹内k
Review: Visited again for my second visit to Delhi.  The most delicious tea specialty store in Delhi.  I was able to sample many products and was very satisfied with my purchase.  I would like to visit you again when I come to Delhi.  The store staff were kind and I felt comfortable shopping.

Name: Naveen Tea House
Address: 91, Bangla Sahib Rd, New Khanna Market, Sector 4, Gole Market, New Delhi
Author: Pranay Pai
Review: A small minimal tea shop, with humble owner and serves the best tea and bun maska in the area. The bun is heated first, and then a generous amount of butter is applied which makes it delicious. Special Tea and Bun Maska is the recommendation.

Name: Naveen Tea House
Address: 91, Bangla Sahib Rd, New Khanna Market, Sector 4, Gole Market, New Delhi
Author: Devendra Pai
Review:
Do visit this near about 80 years old tea house in Gol Market to enjoy some amazing tea and bun maska.

The rates are so nominal

☕Tea - ₹10
☕Spl tea - ₹15
🍞Bun maska - ₹25

⭐Enjoy not just the tea, but an old world charm as time seems to have stopped decades ago at this place.

🌟A big shoutout to the owner who is such a humble god-fearing honest man

📍Location: Gol Market, besides Bangla Sweets

Name: Naveen Tea House
Address: 91, Bangla Sahib Rd, New Khanna Market, Sector 4, Gole Market, New Delhi
Author: Binin Kallumkal Sukumaran
Review: The simplicity of taste. Try out the bun muska and tea at this minimal old fashioned shop. Much better than any glorified coffee chains.

Name: Naveen Tea House
Address: 91, Bangla Sahib Rd, New Khanna Market, Sector 4, Gole Market, New Delhi
Author: Racha King
Review:
Found this place accidentally. If you love espresso coffee then they make pretty good espresso coffee just how you get in Indian weddings.

Not a good place to sit so take aways would be a better option.

They also make butter bread.

Name: Naveen Tea House
Address: 91, Bangla Sahib Rd, New Khanna Market, Sector 4, Gole Market, New Delhi
Author: Narender Singh
Review:
Nice place to sit, n have tea,
Old music, debate on government issues, usually oldies are come here, but one must visit and have tea.

Name: TEA MOMENTS DELHI
Address: 1/33G, Shop No 6, Moti bagh village, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Esther Stuti
Review: Tea Moments is such a cute cafe and I come here often. The staff is very nice and friendly. I have conversations with them sometimes and it's so nice. This is my comfort place. As a college student, I know I'll be well fed here for very less prices.

Name: TEA MOMENTS DELHI
Address: 1/33G, Shop No 6, Moti bagh village, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Harsh Rai
Review:
I'm a daily visitor there it's a good place to have tea in the afternoon They have a wide variety of tea which one should try.
Very cooperative staff. I would recommend tandoori tea to everyone it's a must try.

Name: TEA MOMENTS DELHI
Address: 1/33G, Shop No 6, Moti bagh village, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Bhaskar V
Review:
V went there for a quick chai
Its a nice place for students to hang out with frenz.
Parking is a bit trouble there

Name: TEA MOMENTS DELHI
Address: 1/33G, Shop No 6, Moti bagh village, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: akshay Kaushik
Review: Place and quality of food is good. I ordered tea and Maggie there. both the items were delicious.

Name: TEA MOMENTS DELHI
Address: 1/33G, Shop No 6, Moti bagh village, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Animesh Gupta
Review:
The behaviour of the owner is superb and outstanding.He is very cooperative and genuine person.

The food is delicious.

Name: SANCHA Tea Boutique, Chanakyapuri (India's Best Tea Shop)
Address: Store No- 03, Santushti Shopping Complex, Tejas camp, Lok Kalyan Marg, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Ayna K
Review:
a tea-lover’s paradise 🥀🫖
One of the best tea stores in India, with the best quality teas and superior grade matcha which is quite difficult to find in India 🍵
The store is aesthetically pleasing and the staff members are very friendly. They also provide tea samples to help you better choose the best tea that fits your taste.

Moreover they have the biggest tea collection - floral, matcha, oolong, herbal, zero-caffeine and even iced teas. Shopping here is such a luxurious experience that i would absolutely recommend to everyone else.
I have always been a tea girlie but ever since i started shopping at SANCHA, I’ve been hooked and now have the biggest tea collection. I have even brought some of my friends here and they loved it too.
So if you are someone who is looking to start a tea collection or love tea, their outlets are a MUST-VISIT!

ps: do check out their collector’s edition. they have boxes that resemble books and other cute and aesthetic collections ❤️

Name: SANCHA Tea Boutique, Chanakyapuri (India's Best Tea Shop)
Address: Store No- 03, Santushti Shopping Complex, Tejas camp, Lok Kalyan Marg, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Avviee Aneja
Review:
Buying tea here is a 5 Star experience !
1. Huge variety of tea
2. Amazing packing
3. Very high quality products
4. Beautiful store
5. Love the location
6. Amazing service: they deliver what they commit
7. Amazing service: You go to the store they offer you to taste all kinds of tea that they have. Makes the experience very good.
8. Overall it's a 5 star experience buying tea here. Their staff is super well trained and helps you out in the best of ways possible.
9. They have all payment options.

10. Their stuff is really good for gifting.
You will fall in love with their packing. They use beautiful materials.
11. They give tea in the most beautiful containers.

Buying team from here is an experience of its own. I'm a fan of organic tea in different variants and flavors like rose, saffron, lavender, vanilla and so much more.

This place is a must visit for tea lovers. I'll state again - Their products are super high quality.

Name: SANCHA Tea Boutique, Chanakyapuri (India's Best Tea Shop)
Address: Store No- 03, Santushti Shopping Complex, Tejas camp, Lok Kalyan Marg, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: swapnil verma
Review: A cute little place in a super amazing complex, absolutely loved their tea’s, superb products, superb location, always a great experience with Sancha, a frequent visitor and a customer to this brand! Simply love this brand and this place as well! Must try their testers!

Name: SANCHA Tea Boutique, Chanakyapuri (India's Best Tea Shop)
Address: Store No- 03, Santushti Shopping Complex, Tejas camp, Lok Kalyan Marg, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: shivi bharadwaj
Review: Its a cute place with superb service and staff.. they have unlimited variety of tea with A1 quality. The place where u get 5 star experience and u can taste before buying !! 😍 A must visit for tea-lovers !!

Name: SANCHA Tea Boutique, Chanakyapuri (India's Best Tea Shop)
Address: Store No- 03, Santushti Shopping Complex, Tejas camp, Lok Kalyan Marg, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Jun Jii
Review: Amazing tea & service. You can experience the famous Indian hospitality.

Name: Bharat Tea Stall
Address: Huda Market, SCF 77, DLF Colony, Sector 14, Gurugram
Author: Rakesh Rohilla
Review: Authentic Taste of Tea. If you live in or around sector 14 in gurgaon, then it's must visit tea stall. Once come and taste the tea here. You will bound to come here again and again. Bharat bhai is really sweet and makes awesome tea.

Name: Bharat Tea Stall
Address: Huda Market, SCF 77, DLF Colony, Sector 14, Gurugram
Author: Joshua Joel
Review:
Best desi chai around Sector 14.
Tea is custom made as per preferences.
Available in various quantities. Super affordable!
The vendor is very well mannered.
Must try in  Sector 14, Gurgaon

Name: Bharat Tea Stall
Address: Huda Market, SCF 77, DLF Colony, Sector 14, Gurugram
Author: viplav kumar
Review: The worst place to have tea... bahut bada dhokebaaz hai wo. Totally mannerless guy. My team used to have tea there everyday. He used to charge atleast 50 to 60 ruppes extra per day untill the day we noticed that he was charging extra.whrn we confronted he started talking very rudely. I'd recommend not to have tea there. Instead go to the Saty tea stall near khatana store.

Name: Bharat Tea Stall
Address: Huda Market, SCF 77, DLF Colony, Sector 14, Gurugram
Author: nimarta kaur
Review:
Perfect adrak wali chai ka adda. Expect little delay but it's worth it coz garama-garam adrak wali chai in kullad is every chai-lover's joy.
Opposite Gulab's restaurant, right under the tree.

Name: Bharat Tea Stall
Address: Huda Market, SCF 77, DLF Colony, Sector 14, Gurugram
Author: Sohan Suthar
Review: Nice tea ... Great person .... Use nice quality milk for tea... Lalit Turan , Sohan Suthar, Pardeep Malik, Mohit khetarpal, Sanjay budania and all are near & dear available hare

Name: Tea Point
Address: J957+H55, Unnamed Road, B Block, Sector 59, Noida
Author: Aditya Bansal
Review:
Great place to bust the work stress here,
From Tea , Cigarettes, Juice, Main course , Snacks, Chinese food, you just think and it should be here,

Love to go here and pass 15-20 minutes during evening to get off the workload stress off the shoulders.

Name: Tea Point
Address: J957+H55, Unnamed Road, B Block, Sector 59, Noida
Author: Hemant Gupta
Review: The road side tea stall in front of rsystem office. Most of the office staff takes tea and cigarette here. It offers good tea and egg options.

Name: Tea Point

Author: Abhijat
Review: It's not a cafe just a tea stall

Name: Tea Point
Address: J957+H55, Unnamed Road, B Block, Sector 59, Noida
Author: Pradeep Gupta
Review: Not Recommended, Quality is not as per price you pay.

Name: Tea Point
Address: J957+H55, Unnamed Road, B Block, Sector 59, Noida
Author: Fit india with amit
Review: Good place and enjoy everything

Name: Pawan tea stall
Address: 15, Gautam Nagar Rd, Hardev Puri, Gautam Nagar, Yusuf Sarai, New Delhi
Author: Cyril Joseph
Review: It's a go to place for most of the AIIMS doctors including myself for more than 30years. Right from Delicious Chai, Hot Poha to Yummy noodles and much more, they have a variety of snacks and breakfast. Free door delivery, available from 6am to 11pm. It's a must visit place for whole of AIIMS, Gautam nagar. Just call and order Bun Masala, thank me later.

Name: Pawan tea stall
Address: 15, Gautam Nagar Rd, Hardev Puri, Gautam Nagar, Yusuf Sarai, New Delhi

Review: Best in gautam nagar ..for tea and samosa bread pokora

Name: Pawan tea stall
Address: 15, Gautam Nagar Rd, Hardev Puri, Gautam Nagar, Yusuf Sarai, New Delhi
Author: Ansar Basha
Review: Rates are high.  For example,  a bread omelette of same quality /quantity which is available for Rs. 40 in Railway platform stalls or anywhere outside is being sold at Rs. 50 here. The attitude of the owner is commendable as he transacts very pleasantly with the customers. The quality is also good.

Name: Pawan tea stall
Address: 15, Gautam Nagar Rd, Hardev Puri, Gautam Nagar, Yusuf Sarai, New Delhi
Author: Bharat Das
Review: AT Gautam Nagar, this is the place where crowd is everytime. Best snacks at Gautam Nagar. Favorite place for resident doctors also. Chai and Samosa are must try here. Poha at morning time is also tasty. All the foods are at very reasonable price

Name: Pawan tea stall
Address: 15, Gautam Nagar Rd, Hardev Puri, Gautam Nagar, Yusuf Sarai, New Delhi

Review: Pawan Tea is famous in the area as the quality of the tea is very best but i m giving four star as there is no space to sit over there u have to take tea to go or u have to take it standing in front of shop

Name: OM TEA STALL OTS

Name: Mishra Tea Shop

Iconic! Both his tea and coffee are 10/10! Especially the coffee.

Name: Mishra Tea Shop

Review: Used to stay across the road as a student. I've had countless masala chais from this tea stall. Makes really nice chai. Miss those days.

Name: Mishra Tea Shop
Address: H88R+64R, RWA Marg, Cycle Path, Arun Vihar, Sector 37, Noida

Review: All variety of tea are great and very economic, you can have coffee too with some political and non political chit chat with the owner

Name: Mishra Tea Shop

Tea mate burger is same as all big brand’s, and other items also.

My suggestion is try once the tea mate items.

Name: Tea Mate

Review: One of the best place in area to have tea, coffee and mojitos.

Name: Tea Mate
Address: near Aranya society, Aranya, Sector 119, Noida

Review: It's a nice place to have good tea, coffee, muskabun and sandwich. You will really like the taste of the items available here. There is enough space outside to walk and have a good talk. Not very crowded and a good place to introspect. A must visit cafe.

Name: Tea Mate

Recently, I tried their paneer sandwich and that was great and pretty heavy for a single person. This is a must visit place for coffee lovers.

Author: Vikas Babu

Review: Good boba tea in different flavours. Personally speaking little less sugar could bring more taste. Good quantity, great presentation, tempting look of the bottle and customer oriented staff indeed add to the rating.

Name: TEA YOUNG BOBA CAFE
Address: shop no.k-5, Godavari complex, Arun Vihar, Sector 37, Noida
Author: Amit Kumar
Review: Tea Young Boba Cafe is a delightful haven for boba enthusiasts. From the moment you step in, you're greeted by a cozy ambiance and the tantalizing aroma of freshly brewed tea. The menu boasts an impressive selection of boba flavors, each crafted with care and precision. Whether you're craving a classic milk tea or feeling adventurous with a fruity concoction, there's something for everyone here. The boba pearls are always perfectly cooked, with just the right amount of chewiness. The staff is friendly and knowledgeable, always ready to help you find your new favorite drink. With its inviting atmosphere and delicious beverages, Tea Young Boba Cafe is a must-visit for any boba lover. Highly recommended!

Author: Amey Kulkarni
Review: Absolutely fantastic experience! The boba tea selection is unparalleled, with flavors that burst with authenticity and creativity. The Korean food options, especially the teriyaki chicken and rice cake, are mouthwatering and leave you craving more. The ambiance is cozy and inviting, making it the perfect spot to relax with friends or enjoy a quiet meal alone. Friendly staff and impeccable service top off the experience. Five stars without a doubt!

Review: Tried boba tea for the first time ever and I have to say, it was amazing! We tried a variety of flavours and all of them were equally refreshing. Overall a great experience with pocket friendly prices and the cafe music enhancing the ambience. The owner was friendly as well.

Service takes inordinate amount of time and gives very little details. Which we didn't know the tea comes with more cookies...
We often just sit here and keep on a waiting game to see who's available to assist us...

Looked at the food/ pastries - all looked tired and unappetising. For instance the red velvet cake had the strangest colour. Unfortunately, we left as having waited for 30 minutes no one bothered to show up with even a menu. Very sad state of affairs

Author: puneet kohli
Review:
As I order online only I have never met the person running Baton cafe. But I can say There team or the owner of this cafe must be very energetic, young and thoughtful. I have ordered two times today  omelette, Americano etc and every time the food was worthy more than it's price.

Taste - buds satisfying, Wonderful packaging, apt quantity, maintained temperature of hot beverage and hygiene throughout with sanitizer packet in packaging. I rarely find listings worth reviewing, Baton cafe is one of the them.

Baked nachos and cheesy fries were well- cooked and well- served. If you are planning to visit this place, try their nachos. The ambience was also very well maintained and peaceful. The staff was very polite and well- behaved. It was indeed a good experience.

The location will be ideal for after-work gatherings and banter.

Name: Got Tea | Galleria Market
Address: Shop No. SF-50, First Floor, Galleria Commercial Complex, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Lakshya Thakur
Review: Went here with a friend on recommendation. You can get tasters first before purchase. We tried the refreshers - Mango, Hibiscus and Grapefruit out of which Grapefruit suited our taste. Also, their chai is yummy and I would suggest to try that during your visit. A highly recommended place.

And thanks to Mr. Ranjeet for keeping and returning my bag safety that i have forgotten in your retaurant..

Name: Nomi Tea
Address: Lower ground floor, Ambience Mall, Main Entrance, Nelson Mandela Marg, Ambience Island, Vasant Kunj II, Vasant Kunj
Author: Preetilata
Review:
Loved the boba teas so very much. We tried wild berry and raspberry tea. Raspberry with strawberry popping bubbles was too good. Wild berry one was decent but the blueberry flavoured popping bubbles didn’t go with it because the taste of both were merging. We asked the put tapioca (free) and popping bubbles (45₹) both but they only put in the paid ones. Quantity was pretty huge. May be smaller glasses along with taste samplers can be introduced .
Outlet was small and way too noisy. On top of that loud music was playing. Service was quick and will be going back for trying out more flavours .

A bigger and broader straw needs to be provided. With the current size the bubbles need to be targeted for them to pass through the straw

Name: Nomi Tea
Address: Lower ground floor, Ambience Mall, Main Entrance, Nelson Mandela Marg, Ambience Island, Vasant Kunj II, Vasant Kunj
Author: Royallika Ahuja
Review:
I'm absolutely loving Nomi Tea ! Not only do they serve some of the best bubble teas I've ever had, but their popping boba is top-notch - bursting with flavor and perfectly textured. But what really sets them apart is their delicious food menu! Dim sums, and other Asian-fusion dishes are mouth-watering and expertly prepared. The combination of great drinks and tasty eats makes Nomi Tea my new go-to spot. Highly recommend trying their signature Bubble Teas with popping boba .

Looking forward to visit again soon

Name: Got Tea | Greater Kailash 2
Address: Floor, M, Hand Side Ground, Right, 75, Part 2 Market, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Baldev lal
Review:
I recently visit in Got Tea in Gk-2 M Block Market.I'm absolutely obsessed with this coffee shop! The atmosphere is cozy and inviting, perfect for studying, working, or catching up with friends. The staff are friendly, knowledgeable, and always make sure my drink is made to perfection.

The coffee is top-notch, with a wide selection of specialty drinks and expertly brewed pour-overs. The pastries and snacks are also delicious and freshly baked.

What sets this coffee shop apart is the attention to detail and commitment to quality. From the elegant decor to the consistent flavor profiles, every aspect of this shop is well-thought-out and expertly executed.

Keep up the fantastic work!

*Highlights:*

- Excellent coffee quality
- Friendly and knowledgeable staff
- Cozy atmosphere
- Delicious pastries and snacks

*Suggestions:*
- Add some more snacks and food section.

*Tips for visitors:*

- Try the seasonal specialty drinks
- Ask the baristas for recommendations
- Take advantage of the comfortable seating area"

Overall everything was okey and I loved the cozy atmosphere and friendly service too! Whether you're a coffee connoisseur or just looking for a quick pick-me-up, this place is sure to impress. Highly recommended for anyone seeking a top-notch cup of joe!"

Author: Rahul Sharma
Review: I'm absolutely enchanted by Got Tea—a place that truly feels like a sanctuary for anyone craving a distinct cafe experience. The service here isn't just good; it's exceptional. The staff go out of their way to be not only polite but genuinely engaging, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere for everyone. The Strawberry Blossom they serve is a revelation, soothing from the first sip to the last, and perfectly capturing the essence of relaxation. One of my favorite features has to be their instant printing camera—a delightful, quirky touch that allows guests to capture and take home their moments of fun and friendship.

Good for workaholics too where u can sit in a quiet environment and complete your work with a bottle of their preparations. Author: Sparsh Khanna
Review: "Dark Bean Coffee and Cakery in Janakpuri West is an absolute gem! I stumbled upon this cozy cafe bakery and couldn't be more delighted. Name: Dark Bean Coffee | Cafe | Bakery In Janakpuri
Address: C-4C/389, Block C 4C, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Suraj Verma
Review:
The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf in Janakpuri offers a delightful escape from the hustle and bustle of the city. From the moment you step in, you're greeted by a cozy, inviting atmosphere that’s perfect for unwinding or catching up with friends. The ambiance is enhanced by comfortable seating, warm lighting, and a modern, yet earthy decor that makes you feel right at home.

The menu is diverse, catering to both coffee and tea enthusiasts alike. Their signature coffees are a treat, with the Vanilla Latte standing out as a personal favorite—smooth, rich, and perfectly balanced. If you’re more of a tea lover, their Chai Latte is a must-try, offering a perfect blend of spices that feels like a warm hug in a cup.

What sets this location apart is the quality of service. The staff is friendly, attentive, and knowledgeable about the menu. They’re always ready to offer recommendations based on your preferences, which adds a personalized touch to the experience.

The food menu complements the beverages well, with options ranging from light snacks to more substantial meals. The pastries are fresh and flavorful, particularly the blueberry muffin, which pairs wonderfully with a hot cup of coffee.

However, the prices are on the higher side, which might be a consideration for some. But for the quality of food, drink, and ambiance, it’s a worthwhile indulgence.

Overall, The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf in Janakpuri is a fantastic spot whether you’re looking to relax, work, or simply enjoy a great cup of coffee. It’s a place that invites you to stay just a little bit longer and enjoy the moment.

Name: Dark Bean Coffee | Cafe | Bakery In Janakpuri
Address: C-4C/389, Block C 4C, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Food Date
Review:
Was invited for the opening of this cute cafe in pastels. Nice cafe with pastel shades and nice floral decorations & comfortable seating. 20 odd seater. They have coffee, cookies, chocolates, muffins, pizza, pasta, fries and more.
Had cold coffee frappe and it was nice though it was thick and the beans are a little strong. Truffle chocolates were soft and nice. Tried the choco chip and oat meal cookies. These were nice. Cake was nice. Pizza was average hard around the edges. Fries were good. Red sauce pasta was ok. A little dry.
Ginger tea with small ginger chunks was good. Hot cappuccino was nice.

Review: Wonderful place for a meal. The staff and the owner are very cordial and the food is also great! Tried Peppy Paneer Pizza and Burger Slider which tasted great!

Address: G7PM+X85, Jasola, New Delhi
Author: Varun Sahgal
Review:
A cosy coffee shop at the Pacific Mall, Jasola.  It’s at the entrance of the mall.

Ample sitting inside and also in open.  The menu is good and you have to stand at the counter to decide what you want to buy.

Limited food menu and as a cafe, it’s precooked so basically you get a re-heated item.

We ordered a wicked Oreo Mocha crumble and a java jolt chip cold frappes.

Mocha crumble - 7/10
Java jolt - 7/10

Name: First Coffee
Address: G7PM+X85, Jasola, New Delhi
Author: Aakash Sharma
Review:
I ordered the house blend untamed espresso, and unfortunately, it was the worst coffee I've ever had. It was both bitter and sour, indicating a lack of refinement in their coffee blend. For a true coffee enthusiast, this establishment falls short.

It appears their target audience may be newcomers to coffee, who might accept anything labeled as coffee. The shakes they offer, heavily masked with flavors and sugar, hardly qualify as coffee.

I wouldn't recommend this place to anyone who genuinely appreciates a well-crafted cup.

Review:
I recently visited the First Coffee, Jasola, and I was amazed with the overall experience. The handling doesn't seem rushed, and they gave attention to small details of my beverage. Moreover, the staff appeared interested and welcoming, which pushed the enjoyment of placing an order. Smiles were friendly, and the atmosphere felt warm and welcoming. I was fortunate to experience a welcoming and friendly environment that can enhance the dining experience significantly.

I'm looking forward to visiting soon and wishing the startup luck and success and also requesting to open more outlets in South west Delhi.

Name: Deccan Coffee Club
Address: D-1, D Block, Pocket D, Sector 27, Noida
Author: Tejas Mahadik
Review:
This is one of those authentic South Indian Filter coffee and tiffin place which will make you go back more than once . It’s a family friendly place and staff are also very generous . Neatly maintained and the coffee and food is very tasty .

Indian filter coffee is a coffee drink made by mixing hot milk and sugar with the infusion obtained by percolation brewing of finely ground coffee powder with chicory in a traditional Indian filter. It has been described as "hot, strong, sweet and topped with bubbly froth" and is known as filter kaapi in India.

Address: D14-240, Kadambari Rd, Pocket 14, Sector 8D, Rohini, Delhi

Review: Very good place to visit and nice food you can definitely enjoy the food and coffee is mind blowing it is near to sector 7 and 8 rohini many youtuber have came to this place for reviewing the food

Name: Grotto - Pizzeria|Coffee Shop
Address: SF - 090, First floor, Galleria Market, Sector 28, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Tripta Negi
Review:
I went to Galleria market a few days back, when I saw this pizzeria and cafe called Grotto.

The place is cute, it has a nice sitting and the ambience is also cozy.

They bake fresh pizzas and their Neapolitan pizza was very good. I tried Popeye pizza, which had creamy spinach and cherry tomatoes on top. Loved it so much.

We also tried veg calzone, which was filled with vegetables and some cheese too, tasted super.

We also tried their classic cold coffee and strawberry shake and liked both.

All in all, it is a great place to hand out with your friends and enjoy freshly baked food and finely made coffee and shakes.

Name: Grotto - Pizzeria|Coffee Shop
Address: SF - 090, First floor, Galleria Market, Sector 28, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Deeksha Joshi
Review:
Recently, I had a fantastic dining experience at Grotto. The food was absolutely delicious, with the highlight being their incredible quinoa salad—it was so fresh, flavorful, and the best I’ve ever had..
The wood-fired pizza was also top-notch, with a perfectly crisp crust and a rich, smoky flavor. Though their seating space is limited but it’s cozy ambiance added to the charm of the evening, making it a perfect spot for a pleasant & yummy meal. Highly recommend for anyone looking for great food and a warm, inviting atmosphere !!

Name: Grotto - Pizzeria|Coffee Shop
Address: SF - 090, First floor, Galleria Market, Sector 28, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Shilpi Kayal
Review: Small cozy place they have only sitting for 8 people at once and four chairs outside for waiting. But people usually whoever come there are very quick in service. I liked the place and their pizza. Service was good 😌 I live in sector 28, so I think it’s going to be my go to place for weekends now 😁

Name: Grotto - Pizzeria|Coffee Shop
Address: SF - 090, First floor, Galleria Market, Sector 28, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Priya Gupta
Review:
A cute little place in heart of galleria serving one of the best pizzas in town. Loved their mushroom pizza (fresh wood fired) and coffee.

Tiramisu wasn’t good and could have improved severely but otherwise everything was top notch.

Name: Grotto - Pizzeria|Coffee Shop
Address: SF - 090, First floor, Galleria Market, Sector 28, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Neha Kanagat
Review:
Visited this cozy restaurant located at Galleria. The place has barely seating of 12 covers n a couple of tables out.
The service staff Soni, is warm. She n her colleague,  suggested food items as per r pallet.
We had a very flavourful pepperoni flat bread . It was very crispy.
We  also had half n half Grilled garden vegetable pizza topped with sundried tomatoes n rocket leaves.The flavours just melted in our mouth.
We also ate
We also ate,grilled pesto chicken pizza which again was a combination pf herbs n meat well balanced.
One should definitely visit this place if u enjoy 🍕 🍕 pizzas.

Loved their vanilla latte and iced tea. Garlic bread was okay. Whether you're looking to unwind after a long day or catch up with friends,  this is the ideal spot.

Address: Shop No.6, Street 76, Market, near SILICON CITY, Amarpali Silicon City, Sector 76, Noida

The staff, the vibe and the overall ambiance is so relaxing and inviting. I highly recommend to try their coffees, they’re just amazing. Very varied menu with lot of options for everyone.

Name: The Coffee Leaf
Address: Shop No.6, Street 76, Market, near SILICON CITY, Amarpali Silicon City, Sector 76, Noida
Author: Indian.Travel.Bloggers

One of the finest cafes i visited recently in sector 76 Noida. I was in search of some cafes which serves the best coffee n red velvet cake so i googled n found this place on top. Oh my god the cake n every item i tasted was so yummy n should be tried once.. I would recommend the drooling dessert n food items to every foodie who visits Noida. Will come back soon. Cheers ..

Nominal price,nice ambience,service was also nice.
Nicely maintained,clean and aesthetic place.
Usha is a great staff,she has a lovely smile and great professionalism.
Update : tried garlic bread and iced vanilla and caramel shrappe.
Garlic bread was tasty. 4 pieces nice quick bites
Caramel shrappe was soo good. Iced vanilla would recommend if you like strong coffee.

The ambience is really good.

Suggestion: you can visit here for grabbing a quick coffee at nominal price but food will make you wait

Address: Shop no 2&3, Ground Floor, A55, Old Market, Shivalik Colony, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi, Delhi

I went recently with my friends. Food and coffee were really nice. Very cosy coffee place.
I do have to mention the exceptional service and staff behaviour. I had by mistake left my purse at the cafe and when i called after an hour their staff very politely informed me they have kept it safely. I went back to pickup my purse. The cafe manager had kept it safe and returned me my belongings. I would like to thank their staff for the friendliness and help.
Thankyou so much.  🙏🏻 may god bless you.

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2/5, opp. HDFC Bank, Block F, Krishna Nagar, Delhi
Author: Abhishek sharma
Review: NBC is a new venture that offers great restaurants and aesthetic places. Everything is nice, but NBC could improve the coffee taste. When I ordered the first coffee, I noticed the aroma was lacking, and the taste was too strong. This should be improved in the future. Other than that, everything is good, and the staff is excellent.

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2/5, opp. HDFC Bank, Block F, Krishna Nagar, Delhi
Author: Divyansh Jain
Review:
Amazing taste tried multiple items and all of them are good. Very decently built & Inside the cafe it feels very calm.
Price is a bit costly.
Fast service and staff is very humble ❤️

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2/5, opp. HDFC Bank, Block F, Krishna Nagar, Delhi
Author: Stuti Jain
Review:
Very good experience. I really liked the quality of coffee used.
Ordered Hazelnut frappe and classic cold coffee. Hazelnut was super good and classic was also good.
Ordered butter croissant but they gave us a chocolate croissant 🥐.
Don't know it was a mistake or for the first time visitors. 😅
But really liked this place. A must visit in East Delhi.

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2/5, opp. HDFC Bank, Block F, Krishna Nagar, Delhi
Author: Akanksha Rawat
Review: Loved this place! You'll get coffee matching the level of other costly coffee outlets at a very cheaper price. I tried tiramisu cappuccino and it was just for 120 bucks. Hope they don't increase prices in future🤭

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2/5, opp. HDFC Bank, Block F, Krishna Nagar, Delhi
Author: varsha jindal
Review: Recently visit this outlet. They have a very huge menu. The ambience was so good . Seating also available in this outlet.I tried some shakes and coffee. Everything was so delicious. Worth it highly recommend place.

Name: Ngarum Coffee
Address: R-004, 2nd Floor, DLF Galleria Rd, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Vinay Chand
Review:
A few days ago I decided to give this place a try. With generally good reviews and some hype, also the pictures making it look kind of cool, I thought it'll be a nice place to go for coffee with my wife. So we went , and I ordered their signature blue pea iced latte while my wife ordered a simple cappuccino. Everything seemed going well, but towards the end of my glass,  I found something in the coffee went into my mouth, initially thought it was just a coffee bean not ground enough, but to my horror, it was a fly. Shocked, trying hard not to gag, but did so anyway, we raised a complaint. However, the management seemed unperturbed like it was a usual every day thing, didn't even really apologise and I asked for the managers number. And spoke to her, again being from the restaurant industry I know how restaurants handle such a thing and either way the staff of the said establishment should atleast go out of their way to apologise for the incident. Instead, shockingly they asked me what I want from them. Ummm, a sorry would do ?

In the end, I was offered a replacement or a fresh brew to which I refused and I was handed over a bill for the cappuccino which we didn't even have. And after raising an issue they finally removed the bill.
We left the restaurant with nothing but a bad taste and sick feeling in the gut.
Will definitely never visit again!!

Name: Ngarum Coffee
Address: R-004, 2nd Floor, DLF Galleria Rd, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Mrinal Maheshwari
Review:
Food was good but service was slow. Worth going.

Tried pasta and coffee which was really good.

Name: Ngarum Coffee
Address: R-004, 2nd Floor, DLF Galleria Rd, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Anu Sh
Review: Somewhat hidden but very cute and earthy ambience. Coffees were great. Would definitely return to try the food.

Name: Ngarum Coffee
Address: R-004, 2nd Floor, DLF Galleria Rd, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Priyanka Jaitly
Review: Great coffee and cosy ambience. Loved it.. would like to visit the place during day time. They have healthy options food wise as well.

Name: Ngarum Coffee
Address: R-004, 2nd Floor, DLF Galleria Rd, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram

Excellent service good quality
Amaging food 🙂🍴

Address: 2524 ground floor, Hudson Lane, GTB Nagar, Delhi
Author: Nikhil Kalra
Review: The parking is a little hectic at peak time. We ordered Hazzlenut frappe, the only one that had fine taste. Then we ordered a black current mocktail and was very sweet in taste. Then, after asking to make it less sweet then it tasted weird. The service was too bad and it took 20 min to prepare the food and the drink. But undoubtedly, they all were polite.

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2524 ground floor, Hudson Lane, GTB Nagar, Delhi
Author: bhanuj makkar
Review:
Tried classic signature frappe,
Cappuccino , food combo, Nutella coffee, mojito

Paneer wrap was delicious too

Everything was good

Ambience is also good but there are too many mosquitoes which was killing the vibe

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2524 ground floor, Hudson Lane, GTB Nagar, Delhi
Author: Nakul
Review:
I visited the cafe on Sunday with my friends, basically we just wanted to drink some coffee and we ordered a cold shrappe coffee .
It was too good and creamy.
Must try creamy shrappe.

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2524 ground floor, Hudson Lane, GTB Nagar, Delhi
Author: Vaibhav Mudgal
Review:
Surprisingly they serve good coffee and coolers.
I had a Vanilla Iced Coffee and it was really good and perfect taste.
Must visit and Kavita was helpful with guiding through all discounts available, appreciate her effort.

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2524 ground floor, Hudson Lane, GTB Nagar, Delhi
Author: Mihika Kukreti
Review:
My recent visit to the café left me pleasantly surprised, particularly by their coffee latte, which was simply delightful. While I didn't explore many other menu options, the quality of the coffee alone speaks volumes about the café's commitment to excellence. I am eager to return and sample more of their offerings.
Beyond the food and beverages, I found the café to be an inviting space for various activities. The seating arrangements were comfortable and conducive to both focused work sessions and casual conversations. Whether one desires a productive environment for remote work or a cozy spot for catching up with friends, the café's ambiance caters to diverse needs.
Overall, my experience at the café was positive, and I would recommend it to others seeking a welcoming atmosphere, delicious coffee, and a versatile space for various activities. I look forward to returning soon to explore more of what the café has to offer.

Name: Coffee Bond Noida
Address: Shop No 56 Block 1, Ganga Shopping Complex, Sector 29, Noida
Author: Dr. Preeti Chauhan
Review:
