The cafe itself is located at a very nice location right on the road so it's easy to spot.

🏏 When I visited, they were screening cricket matches on their projector screen/ wall, which made for a nice ambience. They do have both outside and inside seating, with the inside seating being slightly small in space.

Zomato gold is applicable here for a good 10% discount.

Name: Tan Coffee
Address: Shop No 8 & 9, Surya Mansion, 1, Chaudhary Dilip Singh Marg, Kaushalya Park, Padmini Enclave, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Nishant Rao Guvvada
Review:
OVERALL : 4 STARS

We had a Hazelnut Latte and a Bounty Coconut Latte. Both of our orders were delicious.

FOOD : The lattes were great. The menu had a lot of variety. A lot of options for breakfast as well.

SERVICE : The order came up in 5 minutes. The staff were friendly and very well mannered.

LOCATION: We went to the Hauz Khas outlet. It was small but beautiful and cozy.

Name: Tan Coffee
Address: Shop No 8 & 9, Surya Mansion, 1, Chaudhary Dilip Singh Marg, Kaushalya Park, Padmini Enclave, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Mohit Saini
Review:
✨Tan coffee has a huge selection of regular, flavored and seasonal coffees, teas, as well as shakes, smoothies and fresh juices.

✨The menu boasts a variety of coffee options, from velvety lattes to robust espressos.

✨Must try there Burger 🍔 Bubble Tea 🧋 Cheesecake🧀 🍰

❤️Highly recommended place. Must go for it💯❤️

✨With impeccable service, great ambience, warm and comfortable interiors, a welcoming environment and a scrumptious menu, we recommend you to try them out soon💯

😋Taste:- 5/5
📽Presentation:- 5/5
🎶 Music & Ambience 5/5
📔Delivery - 5/5
🛋Seating - 5/5
💸Value for Money: 5/5

✨Follow for more on Instagram @Foodie_HR26

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Flat No 46, First Floor, Khan Market, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Ashesh Bharadwaj
Review:
The food was excellent and the service was great. The staff was courteous and friendly. Chilli cheese garlic toast and Toffee Nut Frappe was delicious.

The stair climb is steep. There are two floors. The upper level has better seating. There is also a washroom.

Overall a wonderful experience.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Flat No 46, First Floor, Khan Market, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Ashley Fattig
Review:
This place has great coffee with so many alternative milk options, and the food is great! I love the paneer bites. So affordable, tasty, and clean. Sarveswari gave amazing service! She is fairly new but is so kind, accommodating and easy to talk to.
The music and vibe is great too—wonderful ambiance for a rainy day. Will be sure to eat here when stopping by the Khan Market!!!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Flat No 46, First Floor, Khan Market, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Randy Roberts
Review:
The ambience is warm and inviting.  It is perfectly designed for both relaxed solo visits and lively conversations with friends. The soft lighting and comfortable seating create a welcoming atmosphere that makes you want to linger over your coffee.
The staff are incredibly attentive and friendly, going out of their way to make sure every guest feels valued.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Flat No 46, First Floor, Khan Market, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Urmi Mukerji
Review: We had an excellent experience at this location. Sarveshwari was especially attentive and went above and beyond to ensure that we were satisfied with our drinks. We also appreciated the availability of alternative milk options, which were able to be used in all our drinks of choice.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Flat No 46, First Floor, Khan Market, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Kudrat Gill
Review: I recently visited Third Wave Coffee on a weekday afternoon for a quick bite. As a die-hard fan of salted mocha, Deepali, the cashier, recommended trying the iced version, and I was pleasantly surprised by how delicious it was. Arman skillfully crafted my drink, and I was thoroughly impressed. The outlet is clean, the service is excellent, making it a perfect pit stop while shopping at Khan Market !

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Block E2, Main, Hauz Khas Market, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: RAHUL KEN SYLVESTER
Review: Mr. Ajeet and other staff really helped us out with the food and beverages. The food was made fresh and warm. The coffee was bold and fresh as well. The atmosphere is very calming, the space is pretty opened up and spacious! Love the Peppery Chicken Sandwich!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Block E2, Main, Hauz Khas Market, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Abhilasha Negi
Review:
It is s a fantastic choice for coffee lovers, known for its high-quality, artisanal brews. The atmosphere is cozy, but the outlet is small with limited seating, so it might be a tight squeeze during peak hours.
Consider visiting at quieter times or opting for takeout if space is an issue.

Cons-
Less seating
No parking

Pros-
Sweet staff
Great service

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Block E2, Main, Hauz Khas Market, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: mutton legs !!
Review:
my first time at this place, the review will be short and quick ☆ !
1. pricing is great honestly for the portions you're getting. order two dishes if you're three or less than three lol :)
2. i really loved the mocha toffee nut frappe. I usually don't have cold drinks at caffes but this was so delicious.
im not sure if this place is underrated ( don't think it is) but make sure to visit and try the drinks! they make it really well.
3. ambience is very nice, it's lively and hearing people talk is actually nice.
overall, my experience is a 9/10. Im not sure why im not giving it a full but maybe there was something lacking. 🤔
Also, went there for dinner on a Saturday night. keeping that in mind, it was still easy to find a seat.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Block E2, Main, Hauz Khas Market, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Aaryaan deveda
Review: The food was great and the staff was very friendly( anand who served me, was extremely sweet.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Block E2, Main, Hauz Khas Market, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: shaktiki sharma
Review: Awesome place! Lovely ambience... Best staff. Kiran made sure i got my fav mocha despite a mistake in my ordering.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: G1, Ground Floor, Suncity Business Tower, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: Amit Varma
Review: Third Wave Coffee in Suncity is a delightful haven for coffee lovers, offering a warm and cozy atmosphere that's perfect for a relaxing coffee break or a casual catch-up with friends. The café boasts a menu with a wide range of coffee options, from classic espresso-based drinks to unique and expertly brewed pour-overs. The baristas are skilled and passionate, ensuring that every cup is crafted to perfection. The ambiance, with its modern yet comfortable design, creates a welcoming space where you can unwind or work peacefully. The food menu is equally impressive, featuring fresh, well-prepared dishes that complement the coffee experience. While it can get a bit busy during peak hours, the quality of coffee and service makes it worth the visit. Overall, Third Wave Coffee in Suncity is a must-visit for anyone looking to enjoy a high-quality coffee experience in a pleasant setting.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: G1, Ground Floor, Suncity Business Tower, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: madhu sudan behera
Review:
Horrible Staff, worst experience because of  unprofessional behaviour from local support and staff.👎👎👎🙏🙏🙏

In one month this service is  decrease too much. Local staff pressurize us  for choices and take away service not for dining. unprofessional behaviour with old-age people.
It was the worst experience at third wave coffee.* BIG NO*

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: G1, Ground Floor, Suncity Business Tower, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: Neelam Rawat
Review:
I used to be a big fan of third wave coffee, ever since they started new outlet on golf course rd, Sec 54, ggn (2023) but lately my multiple experiences have suggested me not to go there again!

1. Fluctuating taste everytime (classic cold coffee). They have zero control on putting sugar, no matter how many times I tell them to put less sugar, they are unable to follow. Recently, they have started adding thick cream to the recipe too which is a big no!

2. Big problem is with thier ambiance! I have many times encountered a fly is sitting on the edge of my drinking cup or getting inside the straw. Such things actually ruin my mind.

3. Price increase: This wasn’t necessary at this point of time, if you increase your price customer expects something better in return but what we are getting is worse! Recent price increase doesn’t justify the premium.

I am writing this, not just to complain but intention is more on pushing 3rd wave coffee back to the original taste they have started with.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: G1, Ground Floor, Suncity Business Tower, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: Parna Roy
Review: The ambience , the quality of coffee and the service is excellent . It is a beautiful place for your evening coffee. Coming here since so long and it is my favourite go to place . The best staff is Mr . Ravinder , he makes sure that we are taken care of . He always greets us with a big smile .

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: G1, Ground Floor, Suncity Business Tower, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: Ashish Jangir
Review: Third Wave Coffee is my go-to coffee shop, open 24/7. Their coffee is incredible, and their bagels are always fresh. I love their classic frappes and shakes, which are perfect treats any time of day. The ambience is cozy and inviting, with a mix of people working, families, and friends hanging out. Highly recommended for great coffee and a welcoming atmosphere!

Name: Starbucks
Address: UA No-25, Block UA, Jawahar Nagar, Malka Ganj, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Khush Gurjar
Review: Had a fantastic time at Starbucks with my frnd pradeep bhai ❣️!! We enjoyed delicious coffee and shared lots of laughs in the cozy atmosphere. A perfect spot for creating great memories together!! ✅

Name: Starbucks
Address: UA No-25, Block UA, Jawahar Nagar, Malka Ganj, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Poppy Haruethaivijitchok
Review: I feel at ease and safe being here at Starbucks Kamla nagar. Such a great place to relax / read or study. The staffs here are very caring☺️

Name: Starbucks
Address: UA No-25, Block UA, Jawahar Nagar, Malka Ganj, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Kanav Desai
Review: Be careful what size you order. I wanted a medium coffee. They have 5 different sizes. The barista Muskan informed me that the medium size is grande (4/5) . Apparently tall is smaller than the medium.

Name: Starbucks
Address: UA No-25, Block UA, Jawahar Nagar, Malka Ganj, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Taniya Pawar
Review:
It was a 10/10 experience for me i took my little sister with me as it was her bday eve the staff was very nice and gave us a pleasant experience the attendant who took my order was also very cooperative as i have seen few first time visitors and they were explaining everything to them calmly without getting annoyed.
I ordered one cold coffee and one java chip and the taste was amazing worth it .
Ambiance was also good , easily accessible location.
Great experience.

Name: Starbucks
Address: UA No-25, Block UA, Jawahar Nagar, Malka Ganj, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Sumit Vashista
Review:
Dono hi kalaiyon mei chaandi hai saji!

It is just for good coffee with some good staff! Other food stuffs like burgers or patties or cookies are just below average.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Phase 1, Spectrum Mall, Unit No 9A, 9C & 9D, Plot C&D, Gardenia Gateway, Sector 75, Noida
Author: J Dehal
Review: Nice small coffee shop. They have good option to choose from. Service level is good. Quality of food and coffee was good. Place is very neat and clean.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Phase 1, Spectrum Mall, Unit No 9A, 9C & 9D, Plot C&D, Gardenia Gateway, Sector 75, Noida
Author: Divyanshu Kumar
Review: Finest place in noida to have a good quality of cafe and snacks.. They also serve a good quality of icecream specially salted caramel... Its Mouthwatering totally.. A cozy cafe with ample amount of space.. Staff are very friendly and guide to the best.. Highly recommended place to go with your friends and family

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Phase 1, Spectrum Mall, Unit No 9A, 9C & 9D, Plot C&D, Gardenia Gateway, Sector 75, Noida
Author: Vikram Chakrabarty
Review: Love the Third Wave coffee shop at Spectrum mall, Noida. The staff is also friendly and courteous! Had a great experience with Anshu!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Phase 1, Spectrum Mall, Unit No 9A, 9C & 9D, Plot C&D, Gardenia Gateway, Sector 75, Noida
Author: Shruti Hans
Review:
Their coffee and mushroom cheese croissant made our day.
Nice ambience, staff and interiors.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Phase 1, Spectrum Mall, Unit No 9A, 9C & 9D, Plot C&D, Gardenia Gateway, Sector 75, Noida
Author: Divyanshu Tyagi
Review:
Stepping into the Third Wave Coffee Outlet was like entering a haven for coffee enthusiasts. From the moment I walked in, the aroma of freshly roasted beans filled the air, setting the stage for a remarkable coffee experience. The minimalist decor, with sleek wooden furniture and soft ambient lighting, created a cozy yet modern atmosphere perfect for indulging in a cup of java.

The menu boasted an impressive selection of single-origin coffees, each meticulously brewed to perfection by skilled baristas. I opted for their Ethiopian Yirgacheffe pour-over, and I was blown away by the depth of flavor and delicate notes of citrus and floral undertones. It was evident that every aspect of the brewing process was carefully curated to bring out the best in each bean.

Aside from their exceptional coffee offerings, the staff's passion and knowledge further elevated the experience. They were eager to share their expertise, offering recommendations based on individual preferences and ensuring that every customer left satisfied.

While the prices were on the higher end, the quality and attention to detail more than justified the cost. Overall, Third Wave Coffee Outlet exceeded my expectations, delivering an unforgettable coffee experience that I would gladly revisit time and time again.

The best part is location is amazing, neat and clean environment. Parking is more than enough.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Saket
Address: Ground Floor, Unit No 1 & 2, Rectangle Building 1, R-1, South, Saket District Centre, District Centre, Sector 6, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Darrell
Review:
As a home brewer who’s picky about coffee, I’ve found it hard to discover good specialty cafes around Delhi, but Blue Tokai delivers. Their selection of Indian beans, especially the light roasted options, impressed me.

Samrip was great at introducing different profiles. Highly recommend for any coffee lover!

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Saket
Address: Ground Floor, Unit No 1 & 2, Rectangle Building 1, R-1, South, Saket District Centre, District Centre, Sector 6, Saket, New Delhi
Author: kartiki paralkar
Review:
A tiny little spot nestled in between the huge commercial complexes in Saket . This is a bookstore and a coffee shop which becomes a paradise for book lovers and coffee enthusiasts.
Absolutely friendly staff and great coffee. Highly recommended.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Saket
Address: Ground Floor, Unit No 1 & 2, Rectangle Building 1, R-1, South, Saket District Centre, District Centre, Sector 6, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Nikhil Kamath
Review:
A beautiful cafe located inside the Bahrisons Bookstore outside DLF Avenue.

One of my favourite places to work from or hang out at. The place inside the bookstore has a small Blue Tokai Coffee Outlet with very limited seating. The service here is quick and since the operation here is small, they have very limited stock of items.

What I love about this place is the ambience. The smell of fresh coffee and books is just wonderful.

One drawback is that there is no washroom in this outlet, so you cannot sit and work from here for long hours. You have to visit the mall to use the washroom.

Overall, if you're looking to grab a coffee and read some books, then this is the place you want to check out!

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Saket
Address: Ground Floor, Unit No 1 & 2, Rectangle Building 1, R-1, South, Saket District Centre, District Centre, Sector 6, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Satvinder Singh
Review: Books, coffee and a silent place to read them, it's heaven for book lovers. The staff members are very welcoming and good i have had the best Vietnamese Coffee in India here and their barista (Monika)  served the best cascara i had in all Blue Tokai Outlet must visit place

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Saket
Address: Ground Floor, Unit No 1 & 2, Rectangle Building 1, R-1, South, Saket District Centre, District Centre, Sector 6, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Samapan - Sam Sarkar
Review:
The Blue Tokai coffee shop shares the space with the Bahari & Sons Bookshop which makes it a wonderful place to enjoy a cup of coffee ☕ or snacks while browsing through the numerous books lining one side of the wall. The collection of books varies from fiction, non-fiction, classics, poetry, travel, business, yoga, life improvement, mental health, etc.

The best thing is that if you do not find a book you have in mind to purchase then you can always place an order for it. No advance payment is required. Once the book is available you will be contacted and likewise you can drop by to pick it up. I have ordered some books that were hard to find and got them from this bookshop.

Note: Please understand that this is not a recommended practice to order educational books for students from this bookshop. However, you will find books here that may assist you with job related stuff which can be used as a reference.

Unfortunately, people think that all bookshops are alike and may end up looking for CBSE, ICSE, higher education (XI, XII, Graduation level) books 📚 in this shop.

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: Building No 13, 57, Block J, Rajouri Garden Extension, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: DroolOverFood# ShutUp&Eat
Review:
Cafe Coffee Day - Go With The Name

Among Few Outlets In West Delhi Region, This Cafe Coffee Day Outlet Is Located In Rajouri Garden, Cambridge Fountain Road.
Good Place To Sit and Relax And Have A Cup Of Coffee ☕️.

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: Building No 13, 57, Block J, Rajouri Garden Extension, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Khushi Aggarwal
Review: The place is has a beautiful ambience. Also, it was not too crowded when I visited.They gave good sitting area. Its a perfect place to have coffee and chit chat with your friends. The staff is very cooperative. Parking is sometimes a problem there because of its location in residential area. Loved the experience there ❤️

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: Building No 13, 57, Block J, Rajouri Garden Extension, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Manav Dhariwal
Review: They keep on asking, Sir order kar lijye, Sir order kar lijye, although I have informed after the meeting I will do that but inbetween my meeting only 3 different people came and say sir order kar lijye, imagine how embarrassing it was, and here I want to mention that that meeting was of only 1hr an imagine three people came in just one hour and asking again and again for the order.

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: Building No 13, 57, Block J, Rajouri Garden Extension, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: tech in
Review: Best cafe coffee day outlet in rajouri garden area... Perfect for meetings.... Best for dates..... Suitable for working too.... Menu is really good.,.. food preparations are hygienic.....coffee is always at its best here past so many years now.... Must visit when in or around rajouri......

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: Building No 13, 57, Block J, Rajouri Garden Extension, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: RITUL TIWARY
Review: Do not eat anything aaanythinggg it's horrible no taste no nothing... and coffee is also okish rather m gonna suggest u  Starbucks

Name: Tan Coffee
Address: Terrace, VSquare Plot, no.104, Hazipur, Sector 104, Noida
Author: Srishti Shukla
Review: Loved the cozy vibe of Tan. The coffee was fantastic, and the food was fresh and flavourful. Lived there Red sauce pasta. The staff was friendly and served was quick. Perfect spot for coffee lovers and to catchup with friends. Highly recommended👍🏻☕️

Name: Tan Coffee
Address: Terrace, VSquare Plot, no.104, Hazipur, Sector 104, Noida
Author: Shaurya Singh
Review: I recently visited Tan Coffee House with my friends. It's indeed a Great place to hangout with friends and have a cup of coffee. It has great ambience with   comfortable seating ,warm lighting and the addition of board games adds a frisky and lively touch.The menu offers a wide range of delicious beverages and snacks, The staff was very friendly, and the overall experience was very pleasant. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for great coffee, good vibes, and excellent customer service.

Name: Tan Coffee
Address: Terrace, VSquare Plot, no.104, Hazipur, Sector 104, Noida
Author: Khushboo Sharma
Review:
I recently visited Tan Coffee House, and I must say it was an absolutely delightful experience. The ambiance is cozy making it the perfect spot to relax and enjoy a cup of coffee. The menu offers a wide range of delicious beverages and snacks, all of which are crafted with care and attention to detail.

What truly stood out during my visit was the exceptional service. Amit, one of the staff members, was incredibly good and helpful. He made sure we felt welcomed from the moment we walked in and went above and beyond to ensure we had a great experience. His knowledge of the menu and recommendations were spot on, and he made our visit all the more enjoyable.

Tan Coffee House is definitely a place I’ll be returning to, and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for great coffee, good vibes, and excellent customer service.

Name: Tan Coffee
Address: Terrace, VSquare Plot, no.104, Hazipur, Sector 104, Noida
Author: Pramod
Review:
Tan Cafe, Noida Sec 104 - A Delightful Experience I rate  4 star
I recently visited Tan Cafe in Noida's Sector 104, and I must say, it was an absolute treat! The moment I stepped in, I was struck by the cozy ambiance and warm decor, making it a perfect spot to relax and unwind.
*Food: Excellent!*

Name: Tan Coffee
Address: Terrace, VSquare Plot, no.104, Hazipur, Sector 104, Noida
Author: Ujjwal Tyagi
Review: Nice, chill, rooftop coffee place that has a great ambience. The addition of board games adds a playful touch. Great for a cozy winter evening. I tried their hot chocolate which was superb. The barbecue paneer pizza and loaded nachos were also good. An overall positive experience.

Name: Counter Culture Coffee
Address: C-205, Jhilmil Rd, near urban punjab restaurant, Block C, Jhilmil Colony, Delhi
Author: delhicious nazare
Review: Visited this outlet recently and tried their viral mini croissant. They were really delicious. Also had their Neapolitan pizza and hazelnut cold coffee. The food here is very good.

Name: Counter Culture Coffee
Address: C-205, Jhilmil Rd, near urban punjab restaurant, Block C, Jhilmil Colony, Delhi
Author: Khushi
Review:
Loved the food, vibe and atmosphere.
I ordered Tiramisu Slice and Cheese loaded fries.
Tiramisu Slice was perfect. The cafe is pretty, and the songs they play are wonderful to listen to.

Name: Counter Culture Coffee
Address: C-205, Jhilmil Rd, near urban punjab restaurant, Block C, Jhilmil Colony, Delhi
Author: ashima kaul
Review: This is a small and cozy cafe in vivek vihar but the vibe is perfect for chilling with friends or bringing your special Ones on a coffee date . The service is literally very quick . All the food items are fresh and their bakery products are heavenly . Food recommendations from my side would be mango shake which comes in such premium packing , blueberry mojito , mini chocolate croissants in a cup of warm chocolate,blueberry cheesecake , veg crowich sandwich , mixed sauce pasta . The vibe of this place is amazing guys…visit it once and you’ll agree with me .

Name: Counter Culture Coffee
Address: C-205, Jhilmil Rd, near urban punjab restaurant, Block C, Jhilmil Colony, Delhi
Author: Chloé R
Review: We came especially for the mini croissants. They were good. Therefore, for the bagel, there is no interest. The sugar free cold coffee was not good, I didn't finish it while I'm use to drink coffee without sugar...

Name: Counter Culture Coffee
Address: C-205, Jhilmil Rd, near urban punjab restaurant, Block C, Jhilmil Colony, Delhi
Author: ashima kaul
Review: This is a small and cozy cafe in vivek vihar but the vibe is perfect for chilling with friends or bringing your special Ones on a coffee date . The service is literally very quick . All the food items are fresh and their bakery products are heavenly . Food recommendations from my side would be mango shake which comes in such premium packing , blueberry mojito , chocolate croissants in a cup of, blueberry cheesecake , veg crowich sandwich , mixed sauce pasta . The vibe of this place is amazing guys…visit it once and you’ll agree with me .

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No E-4, Block E, Lala Lajpat Rai Road, South, Kailash Colony, East of Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Soumya Banerjee
Review: Nice place to hang out with friends or a date. Went there at late night around 01:00 am, it was peaceful and the ambience was really good. They never disappoint at service quality and their coffee is one of the best I have ever tasted in Delhi.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No E-4, Block E, Lala Lajpat Rai Road, South, Kailash Colony, East of Kailash, New Delhi
Author: John L
Review:
The place looks cozy when you get to this shop.

Service can improve a lot. After making the order they would come and say the product is not Available.

Stock and cash point don’t seem to have a connection.  Also no refund for items that become unavailable and asked to order a replacement.

Having said that, try their aero press coffee. This is a good one you don’t want to miss.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No E-4, Block E, Lala Lajpat Rai Road, South, Kailash Colony, East of Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Jashwant Sinha
Review:
Excellent Cafe, neat and clean, professional and prompt staff, Variety in Menu both bakery and  coffee. Tanduri chicken sandwitch,Cappuccino,m Masala chai,Butter Croissant,cheese Bagle was sumptuous..... Nice environment..
A short Visit on 20 May...
Cafe was buzzing at the same time space for us too.
Sandwitch, Cappuccino .....
Nice again...

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No E-4, Block E, Lala Lajpat Rai Road, South, Kailash Colony, East of Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Rachit Malhotra
Review:
As good as always!

If you're someone who wants to have a quiet meeting or an intense work session on your own, you're better visiting in the early morning hours . From 10:30am-11am it starts to get busy and loud.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No E-4, Block E, Lala Lajpat Rai Road, South, Kailash Colony, East of Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Faisal Lari
Review:
So i am a regular customer of third wave coffee
East of kailash
Outlet particularly if they have more than two orders in sitting
They refuse to serve the coffee
Especially a sales person name Abhishek
I would highly ask the sales manager to please look into
This
And this had happened to me and other customers as well
With me it is the.
5th time
Abhishek in personl i ak writing the name
Who has always refused to serve orders to customers and and and the outlet was empty as anthng only two tables were occupied

Name: Starbucks Coffee
Address: 5, Commercial Complex, 48, Malcha Marg, Block C, Diplomatic Enclave, Malcha, New Delhi
Author: Shalini Sharma
Review:
Ambience ✅️
Location ✅️
Views ✅️
Service ✅️
Parking Availability ✅️
Parking Cost ❌️
It is a cosy cafe located in a quite market, it has good views of the plants just outside. The ambience is good and so is the service. It is located right next to Lazeez Affair and there is parking in front and behind the cafe. However the parking fee is quite high at Rs. 40 per hour, which is  more than some of the other markets close by. The variety of food and drinks is same as the other Starbucks in India.

Name: Starbucks Coffee
Address: 5, Commercial Complex, 48, Malcha Marg, Block C, Diplomatic Enclave, Malcha, New Delhi
Author: Giang Le
Review: I was there after lunch. The place is small. On that day it was super crowded and most tables were full. I was lucky to find a table to sit for a short time before getting on the bus to leave. The staff was friendly and helpful. The drink was good as usual. When I was there, a group of Vietnamese got in, stood in the middle of the place and started talking too loudly and it was annoying. So I decided to leave.

Name: Starbucks Coffee
Address: 5, Commercial Complex, 48, Malcha Marg, Block C, Diplomatic Enclave, Malcha, New Delhi
Author: Anshul Patro
Review: Service was very prompt. Good coffee.

Name: Starbucks Coffee
Address: 5, Commercial Complex, 48, Malcha Marg, Block C, Diplomatic Enclave, Malcha, New Delhi
Author: Rahul Gupta
Review: Nice and welcoming staff is the difference you’ll surely feel here. Other than that, it’s basic. The space is limited and the seating is not very comfortable if you want to get some office work done. The Wi-Fi is open and therefore the office laptop security might not allow it to connect to it.

Name: Starbucks Coffee
Address: 5, Commercial Complex, 48, Malcha Marg, Block C, Diplomatic Enclave, Malcha, New Delhi
Author: j kim
Review: I bought for my child a chai tea latte, and mine was roasted nut latte. My child was comfortable staying here. The male staffs were kind, too. Thanks. I'll be back later.

Name: Green Neko (Boba Tea and Poke bowl)
Address: Ground Floor, 94A, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Aditya Austin
Review:
The chicken poke bowl was fresh and flavorful, with tender chicken and a satisfying mix of veggies, Boba Vietnamese coffee was deliciously refreshing and Baked buffalo wings were perfectly balanced blend of spicy and barbecue!
Food: 5/5
Ambience: 4/5
Service 4/5

Name: Green Neko (Boba Tea and Poke bowl)
Address: Ground Floor, 94A, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Lydia Th
Review: Cute ambience, not an ideal place to hangout for large groups as the place has quite a small space, the staffs are polite and their popping bobas are amazing, would love to try their bubble waffles someday

Name: Green Neko (Boba Tea and Poke bowl)
Address: Ground Floor, 94A, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: SMRITI MISHRA
Review:
This restaurant is just opposite to LHA Kitchen, even though the parking problem and bad odour outside restaurant persists but atleast Staff knows to respect their Customer unlike LHA kitchen's Staff.

Must try is Caramel milk bubble tea.
Good food - both veg and non-veg.

Name: Green Neko (Boba Tea and Poke bowl)
Address: Ground Floor, 94A, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: sumeet puri
Review:
‘’Green Nako’’ is small charming cafe with lovely atmosphere & perfect for relaxed afternoon. Their boba tea 🧋 selection is top notch and must visit place for Boba tea enthusiasts.

Follow me for more reviews & Insights of new places.

#KTfoodie #Kakufoodie

Name: Green Neko (Boba Tea and Poke bowl)
Address: Ground Floor, 94A, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Kartik Rautela
Review: Yummy food, good service cafe is very aesthetic, but you might have to reserve your seats prior to coming here bcz its a small cafe that can fit only 9 people

Name: Got Tea | Deer Park
Address: Ground Floor, B-6/2, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Stephy Thomas
Review:
Order :
Mango coconut boba 5/5
Mocha latte boba 4/5
Blueberry cube croissant 3/5
Creamy mushroom sandwich 5/5

The best part is you can customize the sweetness, amount of ice, toppings (boba or jellies) and the choice of milk.
I would really love to see some options in popping boba and a few more additions to the soda base flavours.

Name: Got Tea | Deer Park
Address: Ground Floor, B-6/2, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: isha gupta
Review:
Their bubble tea is absolutely delicious, with a perfect balance of sweetness and flavor. I especially loved the mocha latte . The croissants are flaky and buttery, and they pair perfectly with the tea.
The unique thing about this café is that they have photo kiosk and we can instantly get our pic printed.

Name: Got Tea | Deer Park
Address: Ground Floor, B-6/2, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Ishpreet Thapar
Review: When I had my first bubble tea, it was at this place, and it was a delightful experience. The tea was refreshing, and the staff were incredibly friendly and helpful. It's definitely worth a visit if you're looking for a tasty treat and excellent service.

Name: Got Tea | Deer Park
Address: Ground Floor, B-6/2, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Rose Plays
Review:
Ambience is very cute. Didn't like the bubble tea too much, but the strawberry croffle was great.

Took photos from the photo booth, quite good, and it is free so.

Name: Got Tea | Deer Park
Address: Ground Floor, B-6/2, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Suchi
Review:
Loved my recent visit to GotTea
We ordered a taro bubble tea and a grapefruit one, both were absolutely delicious.
Taro flavour usually gets messed up, but they did it so well, especially the sweetness it was well balanced.
Also ordered the strawberry croffle, and oh man I'm still dreaming about it. It was heavenly. Especially the strawberry cream cheese frosting with glazed strawberries, it was just perfect.
Also they've installed a photo printer, and tho me and my friends ove-used it but we created so many beautiful memories.

Name: Tea Bear ! (Bubble Tea)
Address: 37, PVR Priya Complex, Basant Lok, Vasant Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Yang Chen
Review: I recently visited Tea Bear in Delhi with my sister and some friends, and we all tried different bubble teas. The atmosphere of the café is cozy and inviting, making it a great place to relax and enjoy drinks together. Among all the bubble teas we tried, the Taro Bubble Tea stood out as the best! It had a creamy, rich flavor that perfectly captured the essence of taro, and the sweetness was just right, not too overpowering. The tapioca pearls were wonderfully chewy, adding a delightful texture to the drink. Everyone enjoyed their drinks, but the Taro Bubble Tea was the clear favorite. The staff was friendly and helpful, making our experience even more enjoyable. If you’re in Delhi and looking for a place to satisfy your bubble tea cravings, Tea Bear is a must-visit. The Taro Bubble Tea is definitely a winner and worth trying!

Name: Tea Bear ! (Bubble Tea)
Address: 37, PVR Priya Complex, Basant Lok, Vasant Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Varun Sahgal
Review:
Lovely cafe. So young and bubbly place.

We came for beverages and they have very nice variety of Boba tea.  They do serve snacks, noodles, rice etc for both veg and non veg clients.

They also have bakery products for sale like breads etc.

Ample sitting space spread across two floors. They are pet friendly and they have a little play area on the first floor.

We ordered a peach oolong tea bubble tea and a passion fruit with green apple boba.

Oolang tea - 8/10
Passion fruit - 8/10

Name: Tea Bear ! (Bubble Tea)
Address: 37, PVR Priya Complex, Basant Lok, Vasant Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Amlanjyoti Bora
Review:
This might just be the cutest restaurant in Basant Lok Market! From the moment you step in, the colorful and vibrant interiors immediately boost your happiness levels. The friendly staff adds to the warm and welcoming atmosphere, making you feel right at home.

One of the unique highlights of this place is its pet-friendly policy. If you're lucky, you might even get to see a cute fur baby or two during your visit, adding an extra touch of charm to your dining experience.

I had the pleasure of trying their chocolate cake, and it was absolutely the yummiest I've had in a while. The rich, moist texture and the decadent chocolate flavor made it a true delight. Their Swiss rolls are also exceptional, offering a perfect balance of sweetness and fluffiness. In addition to these treats, the restaurant offers a variety of beverages and food options to cater to different tastes.

This spot is perfect for a cute date. The cozy, colorful ambiance and the delicious food make it an ideal place to spend quality time with someone special. I highly recommend giving this place a try—you won't be disappointed!

Name: Tea Bear ! (Bubble Tea)
Address: 37, PVR Priya Complex, Basant Lok, Vasant Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Renishita
Review: I always have a great time here! The bubble tea is one of the best and the staff is extremely friendly and welcoming which is juuuuust great!! They gave us a complimentary pastry which was unexpected and so cute lol. Thank you for having us

Name: Tea Bear ! (Bubble Tea)
Address: 37, PVR Priya Complex, Basant Lok, Vasant Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Prathama Das
Review: The drinks are yummy and refreshing! A really cool place to hang out! Great service and the staff is realllyyy sweet....it's a must visit! :)

Name: Ququ Cafe
Address: Golf Course Rd, Horizon Colony, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Shankar Rawlley
Review:
The place is wonderful and we've been here a couple of times. Love the cream puff.
The only missing item here is the food. If only the food menu was active, we would be able to sit here for longer and order much more!

Name: Ququ Cafe
Address: Golf Course Rd, Horizon Colony, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Wandering Akriti
Review:
Here's honest rating of the bobas I've tried.

Cheaper than other restaurants

cocoa lover - 5 stars - can never go wrong with this flavour. If this is your first time trying boba, then go with this option.

Orange/matcha/passion fruit tea - 3.5 stars - the tea is good. The after taste is a bit bitter.

Sitting space is cosy. Good place to try out bobas.

Name: Ququ Cafe
Address: Golf Course Rd, Horizon Colony, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Armie Kusela Abdul
Review: The variety of bubble tea flavors at Ququ Cafe is impressive. It's a paradise for tea enthusiasts! I will definitely go back!

Name: Ququ Cafe
Address: Golf Course Rd, Horizon Colony, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Priya Sareen
Review: With this drink i got addicted  when i used to travel abroad a lot. Never found this great taste. If u want to try u can try any one i can bet everything will be very tasty. My personal favourite is Okinawa here roasted brown sugar. The staff are just amazing Priyanka  and Sonia made me introduce this drink and ever since this my go to drink. Staff here is really polite. Cheers to all girl staff here. Kudos.

Name: Ququ Cafe
Address: Golf Course Rd, Horizon Colony, Sector 43, Gurugram
Author: Twinkle Ghangas
Review: Priyanka & Vijay have been dedicated towards their service and hospitality. They make every trip to QuQu worth going back to!

Name: Bobba bobba
Address: shop no. 1, F-115, Rajouri Garden Marg, Main Market, Block F, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: YUMYUM EATERIES
Review:
If you are in search for authentic Korean food & Bobbas in west Delhi then look no further as they are here with their K pop menu which has decent Korean food variety and drinks. From the menu I tried their kimchi burger 🍔 which was loaded with tanginess of kimchi also tried ramen 🍜 in cheesy corn flavour which was wholesome and ended the meal with fulfilling raspberry milk bobba 🧋
Also they have a vibrant interior interiors and comfortable seating area 😍

Name: Bobba bobba
Address: shop no. 1, F-115, Rajouri Garden Marg, Main Market, Block F, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Aarushi Bhalla
Review: Best place for trying bobba tea if you’re in west delhi. You can try their Bobba blast it has 5 diff types of tapioca pearls & their hungroo menu is amazing too. Loved the momos, spring rolls & mini churros. Recently they’ve come up with a Kpop menu which has ramen noodles & kimchi burger which is very spicy & yumm! Ambience is super cute & unique. Must visit

Name: Bobba bobba
Address: shop no. 1, F-115, Rajouri Garden Marg, Main Market, Block F, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Life of Paetoo
Review: Bobba Bobba in Rajouri Garden is your new go-to with over 50+ bubble tea flavors to choose from, including refreshing Tropical Cooler (mango, coconut) and creamy Mrs Blueberry (tapioca boba milkshake). Craving coffee? They have Chocolate Dalgona with tapioca bubbles, and you can even customize them! But Bobba Bobba isn't just drinks - they offer delicious eats too! Think Mexican salsa burgers, in-house chicken patties, and cheesy goodness. Need a sugar fix? Mini churros with chocolate dip await. Feeling savory? Grab a veggie-packed momo combo or a crispy corn and cheese spring roll. Craving chicken? Their shawarma is a must-try.

Name: Bobba bobba
Address: shop no. 1, F-115, Rajouri Garden Marg, Main Market, Block F, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Roop Sharma
Review: Went to this place few days ago such a cute and comfy place . They have best boba teas and ramen noodles . Momos are mouth watering . Now this place become my go to place for spending quality time🥹❤️

Name: Bobba bobba
Address: shop no. 1, F-115, Rajouri Garden Marg, Main Market, Block F, Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: BIG TIME FOOD
Review:
Definitely one of the best bubble tea places in
delhi! I Tried their Boba Korean Raspberry Milk , Boba Mango Mint Cooler  and Smaash Burger, paneer Shawarma Everything Was Super Delicious The Quantity and Quality Both Were Top Notch

Name: Chai Point - B Block, Connaught Place
Address: Shop No - B1, B Block, Middle Cir, Block B, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Jatin Sapra
Review:
We visited to try the Boba tea and found the space to be nice and clean. We got a table on the ground floor and placed our order for two Boba teas. While ordering, we noticed several people inquiring about their order status. As we waited, it became clear that the place was either understaffed or lacked sufficient utensils or tools to prepare orders efficiently. Most orders were taking 15-20 minutes, and we had to call the staff manually to clear our table. One Boba tea arrived in 15 minutes, and the other took 25 minutes (mine was almost finished by the time my wife's arrived).

The taste was average, as we've tried Boba tea in Vietnam, Thailand, and other cafes in India. It wasn't great, but it wasn't bad either. They probably need to hire more staff if they want to retain loyal customers; otherwise, people like me won't be coming back.

Name: Chai Point - B Block, Connaught Place
Address: Shop No - B1, B Block, Middle Cir, Block B, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Bobby Ramakant - CNS
Review:
This is located on a corner of middle circle of Connaught Place Delhi. Great place but no washroom or toilet.

Parking is there as Connaught Place market parking is around and metro access is good too.

Staff is okay, perhaps would do way better with a slight touch of professionalism. Great can always become better.

Prices ahem, on higher side or at least at par w expensive places.

Food is okay, so is coffee (we tried a bunch before this review).

They have few tables (3-4) on ground floor and rest on first floor. No lift so those who don’t prefer steps please be prepared - if you can take a seat on ground floor good!

Name: Chai Point - B Block, Connaught Place
Address: Shop No - B1, B Block, Middle Cir, Block B, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Massimiliano Errico
Review: Bad from the start. I went there to work and despite the wifi availability was advised on the door, it was not working. Cappuccino was on the menu but not available. I had some pastries but they were definitely not fresh and very dry. Never again and not recommended!

Name: Chai Point - B Block, Connaught Place
Address: Shop No - B1, B Block, Middle Cir, Block B, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Melissa Rojas
Review:
OPEN DURING HOLI. Accepts card. No toilets available.
We got the mini samosa 10 pack, and the classic veg maggi. Both very tasty, but the samosas are spicy, so if you don’t like spicy, don’t try.
As a drink I got the lemon ginger iced tea. (The only tea available without sugar) and I’d get it again.

Name: Chai Point - B Block, Connaught Place
Address: Shop No - B1, B Block, Middle Cir, Block B, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: sakthi sathish
Review:
Very very worst shop in such a commercial place.
We ordered Irani Chai.  It was very cold and chitpata chilli Served with spilling.
They have a house fly factory inside.

Name: My Tea Chapel
Address: UG-008, South Point Mall, Golf Course Rd, Gurugram
Author: H G
Review:
The food is quite good because most of the ingredients into being fresh but on the other hand they use toned milk for coffee and tea beverages which is the horrible idea. Additionally being a high end cafe they don't even server water at your table full stop imagine coming with a family of 3 and you have to fetch yourself 3 classes of water when you come from the outside hot weather. Plus I was surprised that we have to order at the kiosk but also take delivery of the food items by ourselves.

Show in nutshell I believe it is entitlement at play. Not a place that I would come here for a good coffee.

Just look at the photos to see how you take water...in small paper cups..So much for the environment.

Name: My Tea Chapel
Address: UG-008, South Point Mall, Golf Course Rd, Gurugram
Author: Monica Jhamnani
Review: Enjoyed an amazing bogo and coffee at My tea chapel sometime back. Carried the second pizza for a dear friend! The deal was absolutely not to be missed. The service was as usual great.

Name: My Tea Chapel
Address: UG-008, South Point Mall, Golf Course Rd, Gurugram
Author: karan kinra
Review: I enjoyed an incredible ginger lemon tea and pesto pizza at this restaurant, which had such a stunning, beautifully designed atmosphere.

Name: My Tea Chapel
Address: UG-008, South Point Mall, Golf Course Rd, Gurugram
Author: R Kumar
Review: Very nice place. They serve very good boba tea and coffee. Important thing they serve complementary water.

Name: My Tea Chapel
Address: UG-008, South Point Mall, Golf Course Rd, Gurugram
Author: Sagnik Biswas
Review:
Went to the My Tea Chapel outlet at South Point Mall a few days ago, and I have to say - what an experience it was! Tried the extensive range of Boba Teas, infact experimented with it in my cold coffee as well (which by the way, is stronger in flavour than quite a few cold coffees I have had). Got introduced to this wonderfully light and delightful snack called Pinsa, and if you have been craving for Pizza recently, try the Pinsa instead! I would recommend the Salmon Pinsa, Pesto Fungi and Mutton Seekh thin crust! We did try some Carbonara as well, with the perfectly done egg in the middle of it (check the pic!) and loved it! We finished the meal off with some sumptuous and delectable Boston Cream Pie, and I ordered my second round of the cold coffee to round off the meal!

The ambience was welcoming for our family and the staff went out of their way to make us feel comfortable and happy! It is a cosy warm place, and the taste is worth many visits! Ask the team for the recommendations, and you wouldn't be disappointed as they suggest the best of the best on their menu, and the ingredients are fresh, crunchy and delightful!

P.S. The Salmon Pinsa was my favourite, definitely going back for that!

Name: Cha Cha Cha
Address: Logix Park, Wave City Center, A Block, Sector 16, Noida
Author: Amit Mittal
Review: After successfully installing coffee bars in our life, now it is time for ubiquitous tea or chai to be part of our out of home life. Tea is getting glamorous and as a result this is new addition to chai bar. Spread out, non intrusive sitting with chai and finger foods. Cheers to chai.... Lets do cha cha cha

Name: Cha Cha Cha
Address: Logix Park, Wave City Center, A Block, Sector 16, Noida
Author: Pradeep Upadhyay
Review: I ordered cutting chai and a cha cha cha special tea, but both were below average in taste, tasted like a super hot water and sugar..

Name: Cha Cha Cha
Address: Logix Park, Wave City Center, A Block, Sector 16, Noida
Author: Kumud Sharma
Review: Probably the worst tea I ever had. Had asked for 2 cutting tea and they billed us ₹120, while the bill board specified this tea to be @₹30. Not at all recommended.

Name: Cha Cha Cha
Address: Logix Park, Wave City Center, A Block, Sector 16, Noida
Author: AMIT KUMAR
Review: Utterly disappointed. Feel sorry we came here. The two people at counter have no clue what they are selling. There tray in which the tea was served was dirty.

Name: Cha Cha Cha
Address: Logix Park, Wave City Center, A Block, Sector 16, Noida
Author: WÈŃĐĪGØ ØFFICIAl
Review: Not good food and service

Name: Chai Point - DLF Cyber City, Gurgaon
Address: Building No. 10B, Cyber Hub, DLF Cyber City, DLF Phase 2, Sector 24, Gurugram
Author: neha pannu
Review: Its a nice and cosy place to catch up with friends. Their tea is delightful. Snacking options are good too. But I did not like the garlic bread. Boba chai is their cold coffee recently introduced and is a nice drink. Prices are decent compared to other places in Cyber Hub.

Name: Chai Point - DLF Cyber City, Gurgaon
Address: Building No. 10B, Cyber Hub, DLF Cyber City, DLF Phase 2, Sector 24, Gurugram
Author: Prakhar Gangrade
Review: This is such a bad chai. I have never had such flavourless or not boiled chai. The masala tea had zero masala and ginger tea tasted odd. Please make one thing that the brand is based on better.

Name: Chai Point - DLF Cyber City, Gurgaon
Address: Building No. 10B, Cyber Hub, DLF Cyber City, DLF Phase 2, Sector 24, Gurugram
Author: Patricia
Review: The Chai Point at cybercity has both indoor and outdoor options. When we visited most of the tables indoor were available. We ordered the butter maggi, the chicken puff and the veg puff, along with ginger tea. The price and quality of chaipoint is always worth it. The chicken and veg puff was very soft and fresh. The only issue was that the service could have been faster.

Name: Chai Point - DLF Cyber City, Gurgaon
Address: Building No. 10B, Cyber Hub, DLF Cyber City, DLF Phase 2, Sector 24, Gurugram
Author: Food Date
Review:
Cyber hub is a very engaging place, lighted, lot of crowd, many food outlets. Sit on the stairs,  enjoy the buzz, listen to some music. Chai point is a small outlet nd have a nice outside seating. We ordered for ginger tea, spinach corn sandwich, maggi nd tea. Tea was good. We requested them to serve in glass cups but they served in paper cups. Puff nd sandwiches were good. Maggi was ok. Not good. But good to sit nd enjoy d weather.
Tea initially was uncooked and no ginger. Had it made again. Then we had maggi but so disappointing that it had a short hair in it. Chai masala cake was average. Sandwich spinach corn was nice. Chilli toast was average.

24 march
Good service smiling staff. Initial tea was quite strong & bitter but they made it again for us. Tea was good.

Name: Chai Point - DLF Cyber City, Gurgaon
Address: Building No. 10B, Cyber Hub, DLF Cyber City, DLF Phase 2, Sector 24, Gurugram
Author: Nisha
Review: Five of us visited Chai Point after Dinner. The Team was very Customer Friendly, Meenakshi served with a smile, took criticism constructively and ensured that ,my Family members accompanying me were happy and satisfied with Masala Chai and Boba Chai. The friendly atmosphere created by the staff will bring me back,

Everyone must try Snack here. New hangout place ❤️

Try it

Address: Plot No 8, Community Center, Anupam market, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Chloé R
Review: I took their "iconic cold coffee" and was disappointed... a huge difference between the picture they show and what they serve. Also, the taste was not here. Won't come in chai point to order a coffee. Maybe I'll let them a chance for the chaï, will see... however, the place is cool to take a break.

Name: Chai Point - Community center, Saket
Address: Plot No 8, Community Center, Anupam market, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Abhishek Kumar
Review: Loved the decor of this place. The ambience is really great. The best thing about any Chai point cafe is the price which is very much affordable. Staff here at this cafe are soft spoken and well behaved. Situated neat PVR anupam, this cafe is a must visit.

Name: Chai Point - Community center, Saket
Address: Plot No 8, Community Center, Anupam market, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Bhagya L Chauhan
Review: We went there to redeem a coupon but the manager denied and said limit has been crossed, even though  there was no customers and this incident happened thrice..the coupons we redeem are already paid and this manager is not paying from his pockets but still he has personal grudges as if he is paying from his own money. Chai point shouldn't keep this kind of staff and managers.

Name: Chai Point - Community center, Saket
Address: Plot No 8, Community Center, Anupam market, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Urban Utopia
Review: What a beautiful coffee I had from this place today. The name is chai point but they serve not only amazing tea but certainly good food and even more amazing coffee. Absolutely loved this place. Extremely clean and efficient staff like Dishant. He not only served us with warmth but also guided about the tea packet options available at the outlet. Much appreciated!

Name: Chai Point - Community center, Saket
Address: Plot No 8, Community Center, Anupam market, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Basant Khandelwal
Review: This is Chai Point's new outlet in pvr anupam complex. The place has quirky interiors and a good seating arrangement. They serve a variety of tea and other beverages along with munchies. The taste is decent but it's kinda variable. Some times the tea is fresh and at other times it tastes odd. The service is good though. Some consistency is needed.

Name: The Tasteland - Bubble Tea & Coffee Bar
Address: Shop no. 12 & 13, PP TOWER, Netaji Subhash Place, Shakurpur, Delhi
Author: Prakhar Sahu
Review: It was simply wonderful, went there with my mom and dad, the staff was very helpful, assisted my mom and dad to decide what tea would they like to order. The bubble tea was so flavourful and the pasta was amazing. They also have jenga and uno on every desk which we enjoyed while we waited for our order

Name: The Tasteland - Bubble Tea & Coffee Bar
Address: Shop no. 12 & 13, PP TOWER, Netaji Subhash Place, Shakurpur, Delhi
Author: Laxmi Dadlani
Review:
Awesome food for dining with family and friends.

Best place to celebrate birthday at midnight
with fresh pasta, pizza, Chinese, classic bubble teas, waffles and more

Fresh dough pizza and freshly made waffles are truly a great treat at 3:00am.

The staff is courteous, the place is vibrant and good veg and non veg food options are available.

The fun part, they have board games, uno, chess and more to double the cafe dining experience.

Must visit if you love the cafe food.

Name: The Tasteland - Bubble Tea & Coffee Bar
Address: Shop no. 12 & 13, PP TOWER, Netaji Subhash Place, Shakurpur, Delhi
Author: Naman Goel
Review: This place used to be a hidden gem in the heart of NSP until the owner decided to change their combos. It used to be value for money earlier but now it is simply overpriced food.

Name: The Tasteland - Bubble Tea & Coffee Bar
Address: Shop no. 12 & 13, PP TOWER, Netaji Subhash Place, Shakurpur, Delhi
Author: Ananya Sharma
Review: Perfect cozy cafe for a day out with friends or a date! Good staff and ambience

Name: The Tasteland - Bubble Tea & Coffee Bar
Address: Shop no. 12 & 13, PP TOWER, Netaji Subhash Place, Shakurpur, Delhi
Author: Sam Kkc
Review: The Food we had enjoyed at the time of brunch. It was really delicious with great quality, everything had a unique taste which we had ordered, nice arrangement and services from the staff while eating. Visit once if you are near Netaji Subhash Palace.

Name: Bubble Mystery
Address: PP Tower, Lala Jagat Narayan Marg, Guru Govind Singh College, Pitampura, Delhi
Author: Gaurav Kumar
Review: If you wanna try the tasty bubble tea you must visit this place I went there recently and had very unique and tasty bubble drinks I really like the taste and the way of serving is really nice they offer the bubble drinks in coconut, watermelon, and Pineapple. Also try their cheesy peri peri fries it's yummmm....

Name: Bubble Mystery
Address: PP Tower, Lala Jagat Narayan Marg, Guru Govind Singh College, Pitampura, Delhi
Author: Varun lall
Review:
Visited this place yesterday
I must say drinks are really good
I tried watermelon & thai bubble Tea
With bubble Waffle sizzling hot
Prices are affordable , ambience and quality also good
Easy to locate
Overall experience 9.5/10

Name: Bubble Mystery
Address: PP Tower, Lala Jagat Narayan Marg, Guru Govind Singh College, Pitampura, Delhi
Author: Rakhi Anand
Review: I loved the place and drinks here. Quick service and kids friends place. Ur kid and you will fall in love with drinks here.

Name: Bubble Mystery
Address: PP Tower, Lala Jagat Narayan Marg, Guru Govind Singh College, Pitampura, Delhi
Author: Suraj
Review: Hey Suraj this side I have visited bubble mystery  yesterday and it was really an awesome experience there..& the .& They are famous for their fruit bubble tea ....I ordered papaya bubble tea , watermelon bubble tea , & cheesy fire fries and believe me guys the taste was unforgettable it was really good and there way of representation was very nice...I just request everyone to visit there and you will never regret....Thankyou

Review: Kajal very pro active at work and very customer friendly. Loved the experience all thanx to kajal. Cost is also very pocket friendly.

Name: Chai Point - Sector 1, Ghaziabad
Address: W 3, Max Hospital, near Radisson BLU, Sector-1, Vaishali, Ghaziabad
Author: Nitin srivastava
Review:
We asked them to make the fresh tea since they serve the tea from container.

They told sure but they just taken the tea from container than boil and serve. It's really frustrating. Tea smell very bed and we throw the tea on garbage.

In container tea smell very bed and if it is in container long time then it will be worst.

Name: Chai Point - Sector 1, Ghaziabad
Address: W 3, Max Hospital, near Radisson BLU, Sector-1, Vaishali, Ghaziabad
Author: Gishnu Karthik Sridharan
Review: Prompt service , very polite and well mannered people. Ms Kajal and Mr Mohit are an asset to the the place. Pls do try their cardamom tea without sugar.

Name: Chai Point - Sector 1, Ghaziabad
Address: W 3, Max Hospital, near Radisson BLU, Sector-1, Vaishali, Ghaziabad
Author: Pratap Kawasaki Ninja Donation
Review: Your staff at Max Hospital Chai Point are all very nice and their behavior is also very good. Whatever service they provide, they do it very well.

Address: Time Centre, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: Arnav Saxena
Review: Filthy unmanaged premises, Cockroaches and Ants roaming around, AC dripping, wall paint coming off, food droppings not cleaned.

Name: Chai Point - Golf Course Road
Address: Time Centre, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: Paul S
Review:
Never eaten a microwaved burger and samosa.
Staff changed for me but I don’t think recipe is normal practice.

Everyone would expect a grilled burger or fried samosa.

Staff was really accommodating to prepare as per my taste.

Mint & orange iced was distasteful.

Name: Chai Point - Golf Course Road
Address: Time Centre, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: siddhartha srivastav
Review:
Good place on golf course road Gurgaon.
Located on the main road and on ground floor makes it easy for access.
There is a good verity of chai(tea), coffee, coolers and food both vegetarian and non vegetarian.
We had ginger tea, bun maskka and stuffed paneer kulcha and Aaloo paratha roll.
The quality and quality of food is good.
The staff is very good, supportive and welcoming.

Name: Chai Point - Golf Course Road
Address: Time Centre, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: Shivangi Singh
Review:
Food: Poha was the one like you get in flight. Ready to eat with warm water. It was still undercooked and tasteless.

Service: Billing machine was not working. The bill which they gave me, amount mentioned on their shop front didn’t match what they charged me. Wi-Fi was not working, even phone 4G wasn’t working.

Name: Chai Point - Golf Course Road
Address: Time Centre, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: Paritosh Anand
Review: Chai Point is a great place to hang out for your regular chai and snacks. This particular outlet can accommodate 30 people appropriately in sitting, and has a wide menu ranging from ready-made snackibles to fresh snacks. A variety of tea and coffee options,  and all that at not so bad price. The location is right besides the Starbucks and just outside Suncity entry. The staff is warm and talks politely. Overall, very highly rated and definitely recommended for your tea and gapshap visits.

Name: Chaayos Cafe at Netaji Subhash Place
Address: Shop number 5, Pearls Best Heights II, Netaji Subhash Place, Pitampura, Delhi
Author: Yuvraj Bangia
Review: The quality of the items in the menu is just amazing, the flavour of tea was so satisfying. The ambience is also so good, and the service is also fast. But the cost is a bit expensive as compared to the quantity.

Name: Chaayos Cafe at Netaji Subhash Place
Address: Shop number 5, Pearls Best Heights II, Netaji Subhash Place, Pitampura, Delhi
Author: mehul batra
Review: Chaayos at NSP is the perfect spot for chai and snacks lovers! Their range of coolers and chai is a must-try—refreshing, flavorful, and made to perfection. I also recommend trying the Chilli Toast with Cheese; it’s absolutely delicious with the right balance of spice and cheesy goodness. The ambiance is cozy, and the service is prompt, making it a great place to hang out with friends or relax with a good cup of chai. Definitely worth a visit!

Name: Chaayos Cafe at Netaji Subhash Place
Address: Shop number 5, Pearls Best Heights II, Netaji Subhash Place, Pitampura, Delhi
Author: PARTH GOYAL
Review: The taste of tea was great but a little overpriced. Personally recommend samosa chaat , Baarish waley pakode and cookies . The staff was friendly and helpful.

Name: Chaayos Cafe at Netaji Subhash Place
Address: Shop number 5, Pearls Best Heights II, Netaji Subhash Place, Pitampura, Delhi
Author: RITESH OFFICIAL
Review:
"I absolutely love Chaos Cafe! This place has quickly become my go-to spot for a delicious meal and a cozy atmosphere. The food is consistently amazing; I especially recommend trying their signature dishes like the Chaos Burger and the Nutella Banana Pancakes — they're to die for! The staff here are always friendly and welcoming, adding to the overall pleasant experience. Whether you're looking for a hearty brunch or a relaxed dinner, Chaos Cafe never disappoints. Highly recommended!"

Name: Chaayos Cafe at Netaji Subhash Place
Address: Shop number 5, Pearls Best Heights II, Netaji Subhash Place, Pitampura, Delhi
Author: Tejinder Pruthi
Review: Chaayos is a tea shop selling different kinds of milk teas, Masala, and other spice combinations. They have here many Indian snacks, famous in different parts of the country. Chai is good, and snacks are good, too. Sulemani  lemon tea is good. Other tea flavors are good as well. Prices are between 100 to 200.

Address: E-25, 1st floor Block E, near Roop sarees, Main Market, part 2, New Delhi
Author: Ricky Khurana (Real Estate Expert)

Address: E-25, 1st floor Block E, near Roop sarees, Main Market, part 2, New Delhi
Author: Utkarsh Upadhyay
Review:
The beverages presented here are mouth watering and pleasure to everyone's testbuds.
The service was top-notch and the owner of the joint coming and taking orders and review was a cherry on the top . The ambiance to is quite warm and relaxing.
They also offer book's for takeaways.

Name: Too Mikkii Tapas - Now Baking Cafe in South Ex | Cafe in South Delhi
Address: E-25, 1st floor Block E, near Roop sarees, Main Market, part 2, New Delhi
Author: Technical Harsh
Review: If you're a chocolate lover, you've got to try their slow-baked chocolate cakes – they're a true indulgence! Pair it with one of their delicious bubble teas for a perfect treat. The cozy ambiance of the cute book cafe makes it an ideal spot to relax with a free book while enjoying your goodies. And the availability of a pool game adds to the fun factor. Definitely deserving of 5 stars!

Name: Too Mikkii Tapas - Now Baking Cafe in South Ex | Cafe in South Delhi
Address: E-25, 1st floor Block E, near Roop sarees, Main Market, part 2, New Delhi

Review:
The beverages presented here are mouth watering and pleasure to everyone's testbuds.
The service was top-notch and the owner of the joint coming and taking orders and review was a cherry on the top . The ambiance to is quite warm and relaxing.
They also offer book's for takeaways.

The only negative was the mixed sauce pasta as it sauce was more like a curry with improper quotient of spices giving it a raw flavour. But they   were quite proactive in accepting all the criticism and mistakes and might improve on them the next time we visit it.

Address: Shop no.93, opposite Sri Venkateswara College Metro Station Durgabai Deshmukh South Campus, Moti Bagh II, Satya Niketan, South Moti Bagh, New Delhi
Author: Pragati Gupta
Review:
I visited this cute outlet and had
1. Oreo shake flavour
2. Peri peri cheesy fries
5. Icecream cold coffee
6. Cheese butter maggi
7. Sweet corn large pizza
8. Maharaja sandwich
9. White sauce pasta
10. Chocolate chai
11. Dairy milk shake
Everything was so amazing! The vibe was so cool! Loved the experience and the food was extremely delicious! A good place to hang out with friends!

Name: The Chai Latte
Address: Shop no.93, opposite Sri Venkateswara College Metro Station Durgabai Deshmukh South Campus, Moti Bagh II, Satya Niketan, South Moti Bagh, New Delhi
Author: Donut Stop Eating
Review:
Recently visited this place to try some quick bites. I ordered white sauce pasta and maharaja sandwich,both were equally good. Along with that I tried their rose tea and brandy cold coffee. In dessert I ordered one brownie with vanilla ice cream.
If I talk about the quality of food,it was amazing specially considering the price at which they are offering it.
The ambience of this place is also very good as they offer both indoor and outdoor sitting.
One should definitely visit this place if you want to enjoy their different varieties of chai and the most unique way of making it.
Overall it was a nice experience ❤️ Would love to visit it again.

Name: The Chai Latte
Address: Shop no.93, opposite Sri Venkateswara College Metro Station Durgabai Deshmukh South Campus, Moti Bagh II, Satya Niketan, South Moti Bagh, New Delhi
Author: gargi banerjee
Review:
Love visiting this place. In love with their tea and coffee both. The kulhad tea tastes too special everytime. Didn't get an opportunity to taste the other snacking options hence a 4 star to them depending upon the taste of the hot liquids, will visit again for sure to try on their other menu options for a rating of 5 star.
About service, they are quick on serving, atmosphere is coolllll.

Name: The Chai Latte
Address: Shop no.93, opposite Sri Venkateswara College Metro Station Durgabai Deshmukh South Campus, Moti Bagh II, Satya Niketan, South Moti Bagh, New Delhi
Author: Rashika Arora
Review: I visited this cute Little cafe recently with my friends. It is located in satyaniketan and serves variety of chai, shakes, mocktails, burgers, pizzas and much more. We tried their veg paneer burger, veggie Maggi, herbal delight pizza, maharaja sandwich and their brownie shake. All the items were really good in taste as well as quantity. A must try place.

Name: The Chai Latte
Address: Shop no.93, opposite Sri Venkateswara College Metro Station Durgabai Deshmukh South Campus, Moti Bagh II, Satya Niketan, South Moti Bagh, New Delhi
Author: Deeksha Chauhan
Review: Went to this place. The experience was really good. The place was clean and the menu was having a lot of varieties with a cute kulhad concept. The price was also reasonable. The steam concept was really unique. The food was delicious with cute ambience. Highly recommend.

Address: Shop Number 133, Club Rd, Narayana Vihar, Pocket 2, Paschim Puri, Punjabi Bagh, Delhi
Author: Jaspreet Sandhu
Review: One of the best place of bubble teas and amazing mouthwatering bites in Delhi. Highly recommended by me. You should try their cheesy fries, Boat pizza and Coconut bubble tea for sure.

Name: CHA ME OUT
Address: Shop Number 133, Club Rd, Narayana Vihar, Pocket 2, Paschim Puri, Punjabi Bagh, Delhi
Author: Rinku Babbar
Review: Good place to try out boba drinks and continental food. Sushi, boat shaped pizza and loaded fries were so delicious. Japanese sushi was nice and signature drink was very refreshing. I’d like to try out more dishes from this outlet.

Name: CHA ME OUT
Address: Shop Number 133, Club Rd, Narayana Vihar, Pocket 2, Paschim Puri, Punjabi Bagh, Delhi
Author: Varun lall
Review: I tried their mix sauce Chicken Pasta and Veg Burger , i must say food is really good and Delicious, chicken pasta is must try

Name: CHA ME OUT
Address: Shop Number 133, Club Rd, Narayana Vihar, Pocket 2, Paschim Puri, Punjabi Bagh, Delhi
Author: FT Abhax
Review: Cha Me Out in Punjabi Bagh truly deserves a 5-star rating! The variety and quality of their bubble teas are outstanding, with the Papaya, Watermelon, and Pineapple options standing out for their refreshing taste and unique flavors. The Momos are a must-try, showcasing a perfect blend of spices and tenderness. Additionally, the Feta Cheese Sandwich exceeded expectations, offering a delightful combination of creamy feta and fresh ingredients. The ambiance and service complement the culinary experience, making it a top-notch spot for tea enthusiasts and food lovers alike. Cha Me Out has certainly mastered the art of blending flavors, making it a highly recommended destination for a memorable dining experience.

Name: CHA ME OUT
Address: Shop Number 133, Club Rd, Narayana Vihar, Pocket 2, Paschim Puri, Punjabi Bagh, Delhi
Author: Palak Maheshwari
Review: Nice staff. Boba tea is amazing. Both chewy and popping boba was really gab.

Name: The Tea Room from Blossom Kochhar
Address: No 1, Hauz Khas Village, Deer Park, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Vikas Singh
Review: The place has clearly lost its sheen. It looks quite run down and rustic. Most of the pictures you see on instagram have been taken long ago. Name: Fat Tiger
Address: Food Court, 2nd Floor, Vasant Kunj II, Vasant Kunj, New Delhi
Author: Vidya
Review:
We discovered a lovely place to get the perfect drinks to go with all your dishes, a place which has come up with great experimental flavour combinations and successfully executed them too. They had set up their stall at the HT palate fest and we are so glad that they did. They had a number of lovely combinations in drinks and served them in quite a durable disposable cups with lids which can be carried around for a drink on the go. The drinks were priced rs. 200 each, but the quantity and quality was worth the price. They have a range of drinks and appetizing snacks too.

Never imagined to ever like a flavoured tea but this twistee Raspberry and Blackcurrant tea changed our thoughts, and now we can't wait to have this drink again. It was a 650ml punch of balanced sweet, tart and zesty flavours which complimented the main course we had it along with. This drink was a next-level berry blast iced tea.

A creme Brule which you can sip into sounds crazy right, well this crazy experimental drink has been successfully executed by the FatTiger. The mug you see consists of 500ml of happiness which tastes like creme Brule soaked in coffee and the Boba bubble adds another lovely dimension to the smoothie texture of the drink. The drink is not too thick or too thin, though milk-based it seems to go well with almost everything you pair your drink with.

Name: Chaayos Cafe at Paschim Vihar
Address: Unit G-04 -05, Block-A, Community Centre, ARSS Mall, Paschim Vihar, New Delhi, New, Delhi
Author: Tahseen khan
Review:
Chaayos Café offers a refreshing twist on traditional Indian chai culture, blending modern ambiance with a nostalgic charm. Located in bustling city centers, including Connaught Place, it attracts a diverse crowd seeking a cozy spot to unwind or catch up with friends over aromatic teas and delectable bites.

The menu at Chaayos is a delightful fusion of classic and innovative tea options. From the robust Desi Chai to unique variations like Aam Papad Chai and Kulhad Matar Kulcha Chai, each blend is crafted with precision and creativity, catering to both adventurous palates and purists alike. The emphasis on quality ingredients and customizable brews ensures that every cup is brewed to perfection.

Beyond tea, Chaayos excels in offering a range of scrumptious accompaniments. Their menu boasts a variety of snacks and bites such as Keema Pav, Bun Maska, and fusion sandwiches that complement the tea experience exceptionally well. The ambiance is casual yet vibrant, with comfortable seating and a laid-back atmosphere conducive to both work meetings and casual hangouts.

Overall, Chaayos Café stands out not only for its innovative approach to chai but also for its inviting ambiance and excellent service. It's a haven for tea enthusiasts and anyone looking to savor a taste of modern Indian cafe culture.

Name: Chai Point - Aerocity, New Delhi
Address: 2, Cental Pavillion, Shop No: 6, World Mark:, GMR Square, Hopitality District, Aerocity, Near, IGI Rd, New Delhi
Author: Vijay Kumar
Review:
I recently had the pleasure of visiting Chai Point and wanted to express my appreciation for the exceptional service provided by Sheetal. My experience with the coffee, both hot and cold, was truly remarkable.

**Coffee Quality:**
The coffee at Chai Point exceeded my expectations. Both the hot and cold coffee were delicious, well-prepared, and perfectly balanced. The hot coffee had a rich, aromatic flavor, while the cold coffee was refreshing with just the right blend of sweetness and strength. It's clear that great care and skill went into making both beverages.

**Service Quality:**
What stood out even more than the excellent coffee was the way Sheetal served it. She was warm, courteous, and highly attentive throughout my visit. Her friendly demeanor made the experience feel personal and inviting. The attention to detail in her service, from the way she presented the coffee to ensuring everything was perfect, was commendable. It added an extra layer of enjoyment to the visit.

**Overall Experience:**
Sheetal’s professionalism and dedication to making sure I had a pleasant experience were truly impressive. She went above and beyond to ensure everything was just right, and her positive attitude made a great impression. Her service, combined with the fantastic quality of the coffee, made my visit to Chai Point memorable.

I look forward to visiting again, and I’m confident that with team members like Sheetal, Chai Point will continue to provide top-notch service and coffee experiences. Keep up the great work!

Author: Dhruva K Aggarwal
Review: Burma Burma offers an incredible dining experience! From the moment we walked in, the ambiance was warm and inviting. The staff was attentive, knowledgeable, and went above and beyond to ensure we had a great time. Each dish was explained in detail, and they were more than happy to accommodate our preferences. Address: Dlf Mall Of India, Pocket L, Sector 18, Noida
Author: Chandramauli Tewari
