Address: Rajiv Chowk, E-15, Block E, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: kid reyansh
Review:
**Disappointing Experience at United Coffee House**

I today visited United Coffee House and was quite disappointed with my experience. The service was average at best, certainly not worth the **service charge ( though govt ask not to charge it ) ** they added to the bill. When I politely raised this issue, I was met with rude behavior from the staff. Instead of addressing my concerns, they challenged me to go to court if I had a problem with the service charge. Is this how a restaurant is supposed to treat its customers?

I was appalled by their complete lack of professionalism and concern for customer satisfaction. Are we supposed to go to court for every minor inconvenience, or should we expect a peaceful dining experience?

I strongly **do not recommend** this place to others. If you have any issues, be prepared for the staff to not only ignore your concerns but also potentially misbehave.

Attaching the bill for reference.

Name: United Coffee House
Address: Rajiv Chowk, E-15, Block E, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Bhaskar V
Review: A pleasant place to have a gud time ur family or friends.  It has old school nostalgic feel since it is around 3 decades old.  Had a gud time there with my hubby.  Loved their coffee n sandwiches 💕

Name: United Coffee House
Address: Rajiv Chowk, E-15, Block E, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Nova Nikolay
Review: The prices for the food are absolutely fair. The portions are large and very tasty! Wishes regarding the food were taken. The service was a bit grumpy and the cleaning took longer but the food was worth it.

Name: United Coffee House
Address: Rajiv Chowk, E-15, Block E, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: SY
Review:
This is a restaurant that I take my friends to and they love it.
My favorite is the arrabbiata.
I recommend visiting with more than one person as there are many items on the menu.

Name: United Coffee House
Address: Rajiv Chowk, E-15, Block E, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Supriya Devasthali
Review: Arguably one of the oldest Cafés in CP, United Coffee House is a place to grab lunch or dinner with friends and family. It has good variety of vegetarian as well as non vegetarian food. A good mix of Indian and continental food options. It has reasonable space and staff is courteous. Location in inner circle of CP is convenient. One can enjoy a lazy Sunday afternoon here or a dinner after shopping at CP. In desserts, chocolate story is strongly recommended

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ambience Mall, Nelson Mandela Marg, Vasant Kunj
Author: Aaron Nyzil D'souza
Review:
Aaron's Final Rating is 3.5

Visited this place for the first time. It is located inside the Ambience Mall Vasanth Kunj. Situated on the last floor. Seatings are limited. The staff was friendly. Since, it's inside the mall, so always expect a crowd.

l would recommend this place.

Full Ratings:-
Location : 3
Ambience : 3
Staff : 4
Food Quality : 4
Food Quantity : 4
Food Options : 4
Price: ₹₹₹₹ (Moderate)

Check out the pictures and videos.

Must Trys :-
- Vanilla Cappuccino
- Cinammon Roll
- Pistachios Croissant

If you liked my review, do like it.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ambience Mall, Nelson Mandela Marg, Vasant Kunj
Author: sikandar khan
Review: This place location is good but it is generally too noisy as it is open cafe. I love its coffee .

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ambience Mall, Nelson Mandela Marg, Vasant Kunj
Author: Puneet Kumar
Review: Today I order cream cheese begal and this what I got it's was worst experience ever. They are teaching me that this is their standard to serve like this. After some time i connect with their manger who answer me that this is correct way to give cream cheese! Worst experience. I have visited other outlet also there behavior was good . But here what I got is very bad  need to improve their behavior.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ambience Mall, Nelson Mandela Marg, Vasant Kunj
Author: Amit Ranjan
Review: I recently visited Third Wave Cafe (Ambience Mall) and had the pleasure of being served by Vikas. His excellent customer service and courteous demeanor truly stood out. He went above and beyond to ensure that my experience was enjoyable. His friendly attitude and professionalism made my visit memorable. Highly recommend this cafe, especially if you get the chance to be served by Vikas!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ambience Mall, Nelson Mandela Marg, Vasant Kunj
Author: Eunice Pashel
Review: Nice cool place to hangout and have coffee. Vishal the barista who served me as well made me a perfect americano as per my liking. Great service, nice environment and great coffee.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Sector 50 Noida
Address: Central Market, B 1/49, next to Lenskart, B Block, Sector 50, Noida
Author: Yatika Kashyap
Review:
This place serve best coffee and pasta. Try their vintage cold coffee and mixed pasta. Also they serve best bakery item for coffee.
You buy different types of coffee beans packet from here.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Sector 50 Noida
Address: Central Market, B 1/49, next to Lenskart, B Block, Sector 50, Noida
Author: Harshita Kashyap
Review:
My go to place for perfect comfort coffee!
It offers a peaceful ambience where you can work or hang out with you friends!
Cookies are a must have with coffee! You can never go wrong with their classic cappuccino and lattes!

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Sector 50 Noida
Address: Central Market, B 1/49, next to Lenskart, B Block, Sector 50, Noida
Author: Madhulika Liddle
Review:
This Blue Tokai store is tucked away in one corner of the Central Market, so can be a little difficult to see from the main road. The store spreads over two stories, with several two-seater tables on the ground floor (where their counter and display is located), and the bulk of the tables upstairs. The washroom is also located upstairs. Note that the staircase is steep, and each step fairly narrow, so be careful going up or coming down.

We ordered a cappuccino and an americano, with a mushroom cream cheese croissant to share. The coffees were topnotch, but the croissant was underwhelming: too greasy, limp and underseasoned.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Sector 50 Noida
Address: Central Market, B 1/49, next to Lenskart, B Block, Sector 50, Noida
Author: Savar Mahajan
Review:
Pretty nice place for a quick date as well as working for office also, it was a really good experience as I had breakfast here. Unique cafe with good options to grab👍🏻
Decent and cooperative staff at service👍🏻
Dont miss to eat cinnamon pancake rolls, I ordered it twice😂😋

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Sector 50 Noida
Address: Central Market, B 1/49, next to Lenskart, B Block, Sector 50, Noida
Author: Vipul Agrawal
Review:
Cozy place in Sector 50. Enough seating on the 1st floor but be careful on the extra steep stairs. Do not forget to order on the ground floor else the extra trip on the stairs.

They keep the place and toilets clean.

Coffee was good and croissant (crumble) was also good (served warm). Quick and efficient service. Staff is courteous.

Name: Starbucks coffee
Address: A Block, Palika Parking, Radial Rd Number 2, next to Hamilton House, Palika Bazar, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Ankit s
Review:
Nice ambiance, upscale crowd, spacious and a great location to top it all. This is a perfect place in the heart of Delhi to have some casual time out and chit chat. You can have meetings as well but expect a noisy atmosphere as it's crowded mostly. The menu is typical of what you get at Starbucks and the interior is vibrant.
Enjoy your sip.

Name: Starbucks coffee
Address: A Block, Palika Parking, Radial Rd Number 2, next to Hamilton House, Palika Bazar, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Nayan Gaur
Review: Starbucks, Connaught Place is a classic hangout spot. The modern, cozy interior with comfy seats is perfect for relaxing or catching up with friends. Their coffee is always good, but be ready for a crowd, especially on weekends. It's a great place to chill and enjoy a good time amidst the busy city.

Name: Starbucks coffee
Address: A Block, Palika Parking, Radial Rd Number 2, next to Hamilton House, Palika Bazar, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Vipul Raghav
Review:
Not close to the blends we receive at home but the coffee smelled and tasted pretty good for the price charged.
The staff was very courteous and cared to explain to me all the coffee options that there are.
The cafe is in a posh location and finding parking during peak hours will be a pain.

Savoury food tasted good but was not warm. So..ethig thag the staff can improve on when taking order. They can check with customer if they want stuff to be heated or not.

Name: Starbucks coffee
Address: A Block, Palika Parking, Radial Rd Number 2, next to Hamilton House, Palika Bazar, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Nurshat Nagimuttulla
Review: The very first day in India that I visited is Starbucks. I was very warmly welcomed from the entrance. I only had a good impression. I swear I want to go back to Delhi for this Starbucks coffee shop. On my next trip to India, I will definitely visit again. Drinks are mega delicious. It’s very different from what we have in Kazakhstan. From the manager of the coffee shop to the baristas, they were very well served. The food was great, tasty you can lick your fingers. At the end, coffee testing was arranged for me. It was very nice. Explained about coffee. Thank you for such a warm welcome.

Name: Starbucks coffee
Address: A Block, Palika Parking, Radial Rd Number 2, next to Hamilton House, Palika Bazar, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: NEERAJ JAISWAL
Review:
Always loved it. But there is much rush in CP's Starbucks.
If you want to get this place for any meeting or chit chats., there is a lot of hustle puff all around.
Though the name itself has a big reputation and the place is also the heart of New Delhi. So what to do.
But recommended for what you know every stuffs of Starbucks.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: E‐4 Upper Ground Floor, Kalkaji New Delhi, South, Delhi
Author: Hitesh- Moving Around
Review: Third Wave Coffee in Kalkaji offers a cozy and compact seating arrangement, perfect for a quick visit or working session. Although the establishment is relatively small, the service is efficient, and the staff is polite and welcoming. With free Wi-Fi, it's a convenient spot for remote work or study without any connectivity issues. Overall, the ambiance and offerings align with the typical Third Wave experience, though this particular location may feel a bit more intimate due to its size.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: E‐4 Upper Ground Floor, Kalkaji New Delhi, South, Delhi
Author: Gaurav k
Review:
I'd be happy to help you write a good review of the cafe you visited recently! Here's an example:

I recently visited third wave cafe Kalkaji branch, and I must say, it was a delightful experience! The cozy atmosphere and friendly staff immediately put me at ease. I ordered the hot chocolate coffee, which was perfectly rich and satisfying, and paired it with the pitta bread hummus platter. The hummus was smooth and flavorful, and the warm pitta bread was a perfect complement.

But what really stood out to me was the overall ambiance of the cafe. The lighting was warm and inviting, and the decor was tasteful and thoughtfully curated. I felt completely at ease and thoroughly enjoyed my time there.

Overall, I would highly recommend [Cafe Name] to anyone looking for a relaxing and enjoyable cafe experience. Whether you're stopping in for a quick coffee or settling in for a leisurely meal, this place is definitely worth a visit!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: E‐4 Upper Ground Floor, Kalkaji New Delhi, South, Delhi
Author: Garv Chadha
Review: Best place to spend time. They have amazing food and ambience. I use it for my work purpose on day to day basis. I am always treated in the best possible way from the employee name Aryan. He is the best and knows what I require. He even remembers my order and make sure it delicious. Also he takes feedback if food and coffee is fine and make sure if I require anything else. Such an amazing dedicated employee.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: E‐4 Upper Ground Floor, Kalkaji New Delhi, South, Delhi
Author: SINDURA N
Review: Third Wave, Kalkaji is one of the best Work-from-Café places I’ve been to. The ambience is lovely and you get to choose from a range of Beverages. The staff is very cordial and knowledgeable. Kudos to the Baristas Aryan, Jyoti, Shubham & Salma. ☕️

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: E‐4 Upper Ground Floor, Kalkaji New Delhi, South, Delhi
Author: Ojaswini Mandhan
Review:
The staff here is quite nice, polite and generally cooperative. Third Wave Coffee - successfully created a good space for work, casual outings and coffee enthusiasts!
Special mention to Aryan - prepares amazing filter coffee!

I've had a good experience every time that I'm here! Grateful to the people there.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Unit No 5B, Route No 63, The Foodies Hub, near Metro Station, H Block, Sector 63, Noida
Author: Baneet Kaur
Review: Third wave in DLF mall of India is my on the go coffee place in Noida, I travel from greater Noida to here ( sadly only 1 brand in Noida). Amazing coffee , amazing staff, they will redo the whole coffee for you as you like, now this cafe might not be as picturesque as some people expect, but if you’re going their for just coffee, it’s a lovely place. The ac could be better, however this is almost an open cafe, hence that makes the temperature hot. Apart from that everything is perfect, please open more branches in Noida & greater Noida west!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Unit No 5B, Route No 63, The Foodies Hub, near Metro Station, H Block, Sector 63, Noida
Author: Sachin Vishwakarma
Review:
The exotic coffee and soothing calm atmosphere with various snacking food options sums up this place.
If you are out to have a coffee with your partner and chit-chat along with a bite of cupcake then this place will not disappoint you at all.
Or you are alone individual out to have time off for yourself and want to treat yourself with luxury coffee and snack this place should be the first choice.
Best service staff
Various in-house coffee options and cake loafs.
The place is luxurious hence it felt expensive, specially when you are eating at the place.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Unit No 5B, Route No 63, The Foodies Hub, near Metro Station, H Block, Sector 63, Noida
Author: Venkatesh M
Review: The coffee was delicious, the service was excellent, and the music was good. One of the employee( Balkishan) even showed me how to make coffee by hand. It was a perfect place to work on my laptop and I got a lot done. I would definitely recommend this coffee shop to anyone who wants to work or relax with a great cup of coffee

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Unit No 5B, Route No 63, The Foodies Hub, near Metro Station, H Block, Sector 63, Noida
Author: Yashna Saxena
Review:
My most favourite place with the most courteous staff! This place is cozy, perfect with the cup of coffee.
Special thanks to Balkrishan✨

Third wave Noida 63 has my ♥️

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Unit No 5B, Route No 63, The Foodies Hub, near Metro Station, H Block, Sector 63, Noida
Author: Sanya Arora
Review: This was my second visit to the place , loved the choco hazelnut frappe , paneer wrap, red velvet pastry and cappuccino. The place is great to have a quick catch up with a friend or even a processional meeting. The staff is polite and the service is great . Highly recommended 😊

Name: Coffee Bond
Address: Shop No. 4 Local Shopping Complex, South Extension II, Uday Park, New Delhi
Author: Megha
Review: Coffee bond  is an absolute gem! Their food is a delight for the taste buds. I'm impressed by the quality and variety they offer.  I tried their sandwich, American platter , cappuccino coffee , brownie with ice cream must try . The staff is friendly, and the service is top-notch. Highly recommended

Name: Coffee Bond
Address: Shop No. 4 Local Shopping Complex, South Extension II, Uday Park, New Delhi
Author: Amlanjyoti Bora
Review:
So I finally tried the Pesto Chicken Sandwich at Coffee Bond in Uday Park, and it totally hit the spot! The chicken was super tender and full of flavor, and that pesto sauce - wow, it was fresh and just the right amount of herby goodness. The sandwich was nicely grilled, with the bread being crispy but not too crunchy, just how I like it.

The amount of chicken was just perfect for gym freaks looking to add some protein to their diet. Plus, it wasn’t overly oily, so it felt pretty healthy too. The portion size is just right - perfect for one person to finish off on their own, or you could share it with someone if you’re not super hungry.

If you’re in the area and looking for a solid sandwich, give this one a shot. Trust me, you won’t regret it!

Name: Coffee Bond
Address: Shop No. 4 Local Shopping Complex, South Extension II, Uday Park, New Delhi
Author: shruti malhotra
Review: A perfect place for coffee lovers. We tried chicken salad, garlic bread, chicken platter with mocha . Everything was so delicious. Highly recommended

Name: Coffee Bond
Address: Shop No. 4 Local Shopping Complex, South Extension II, Uday Park, New Delhi
Author: Bhaskar V
Review: Just an average coffee with average food n service.  Didn’t like the location n vicinity.

Name: Coffee Bond
Address: Shop No. 4 Local Shopping Complex, South Extension II, Uday Park, New Delhi
Author: Dil Se Pakwaan
Review:
No doubt, one of the best coffee shops we have ever been too.
Totally the vibe we love. Staff is so cooperative. When it comes to food and coffee, we absolutely loved everything.

Coffee is authentic and would highly recommend the pasta and pancakes 🤌🏻

Don’t miss this place out.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: B, 6/1, Safdarjung Enclave, opposite Deer Park, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Subhradeep Basak
Review:
Their coffee is absolutely amazing. Pricing can be improved with better offers since they support on app order placement.
Service is non intrusive, just place your order and enjoy your coffee in peace.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: B, 6/1, Safdarjung Enclave, opposite Deer Park, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Anshu Pandit
Review: After trying almost every cooffe shop in Delhi, I have come to this realisation that the best place is Third Wave Coffee Safdarjung Enclave where I was treated very nicely by the whole staff, and the bestest barista is rajini and pipi from this branch

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: B, 6/1, Safdarjung Enclave, opposite Deer Park, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Shivani Karun
Review:
Went there for my first date!! 😊🤩. The ambience was nice. Staff was friendly. Coffee/frappe was delicious and I loved the cinnamon bun. Although everything was on a pricier side but it was nice to try something out other than AMA cafe and Starbucks. 🤣
You might feel that you are in Starbucks as the cafe has very similar vibes to it. From menu to, store design, to the vibes. No complaints other than the pricing.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: B, 6/1, Safdarjung Enclave, opposite Deer Park, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: sheena s
Review: Mr Pawan was really kind and made sure the coffee was prepared according to our needs. Must visit for all coffee lovers! Highly recommended! Ambience is perfect and calm

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: B, 6/1, Safdarjung Enclave, opposite Deer Park, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Aman Jain
Review: My Wife and I visited 3rd wave coffee. I’ve had a lot of coffee and breads of here before (In Bangalore), but it was my wife’s first visit. She loved the coffee here and we ordered a pan cake which had a lot of fruits. The servers and cashiers were really patient, like extremely patient, with us. Do install the Third Wave app and get referrals to get a lot of discount. The music played was also great.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Building No-5, Entire Ground Floor, North west Avenue, Club Rd, Punjabi Bagh, New Delhi
Author: Divyanshu Oberoi
Review: Third Wave Coffee is my top choice for getting work done outside the office. The atmosphere is inviting and perfect for productivity, and the staff is consistently friendly and helpful. My favorite is the Vietnamese iced coffee—it’s rich, refreshing, and the perfect pick-me-up. Highly recommend for anyone looking to enjoy a great coffee while working!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Building No-5, Entire Ground Floor, North west Avenue, Club Rd, Punjabi Bagh, New Delhi
Author: sinmoy
Review: Nice decor,warm ambience and friendly service-The coffee is also good. Recommended for a long chat with friends or colleagues. (Saw some people working too)

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Building No-5, Entire Ground Floor, North west Avenue, Club Rd, Punjabi Bagh, New Delhi
Author: Bhavya Manchanda
Review:
I can choose third wave any day without even a single thought apart from any other big coffee brands!
The quality and taste they offer is just amazing!
My usual order is always orange zest mocha with mushroom and cheese croissant 🥐

Instagram: @poseandplaces

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Building No-5, Entire Ground Floor, North west Avenue, Club Rd, Punjabi Bagh, New Delhi
Author: Neha Walia
Review:
Excellent coffee n croissant , really delicious 😋 worthy spending time in third wave coffee (Punjabi Bagh) , Priyanka is very humble, superb service.
Coffee lovers must visit, highly recommend

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Building No-5, Entire Ground Floor, North west Avenue, Club Rd, Punjabi Bagh, New Delhi
Author: M G
Review: Good place to have decent coffee with ambient lighting. Its open till 12 am. Parking is available for free. Usually empty and silent 🤫 which is good for business meeting .

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No 11, E Block Mezzanine Floor, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Baba Charan
Review: I recently visited Third Wave Coffee in Connaught Place and had a fantastic experience! The cappuccino I ordered was absolutely delightful, with a rich flavor and perfectly crafted foam ¹. The ambiance of the cafe was cozy and inviting, making it a great spot to relax and unwind. The staff was friendly and knowledgeable, and the menu offered a variety of dishes to suit every taste. Whether you're in the mood for a light snack or a hearty meal, Third Wave Coffee has something for everyone ². Overall, I highly recommend Third Wave Coffee for a great cup of coffee and a wonderful experience.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No 11, E Block Mezzanine Floor, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Abhilasha Negi
Review:
This is one of the best outlets of Third wave coffee!
It features a spacious, well-designed interior with ample seating, making it a comfortable spot for both relaxing and working. The ambiance is inviting, with a modern yet cozy vibe that enhances the coffee experience. As always, their coffee is exceptional, with a focus on high-quality, artisanal brews. It's a great place to enjoy a meticulously crafted cup of coffee along with pastries, croissants, sandwiches and more

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No 11, E Block Mezzanine Floor, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Reshad Munim
Review: Great vegan options for drinks. The cafe has a relaxing atmosphere and lovely hospitality. I had the oat milk masala chai and the delicious vegan walnut banana cake. I was served by Nitin who was friendly. Oh and GREAT choice of music, interior design and lighting. Definitely my vibe. Recommend this place highly, will be back when I’m in Delhi!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No 11, E Block Mezzanine Floor, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Fitfoodiie blogs
Review:
Third Wave Coffee in Connaught Place, Delhi, offers a blend of cozy atmosphere and a wide selection of beverages and light bites. Popular among coffee enthusiasts, the café provides high-quality, artisanal brews and some interesting food options like the Sweet & Spiced Breakfast Combo and Sriracha Chicken Croissant. The cost for two people is around ₹700-900, depending on your choices. People appreciate the citrus cold brew for its unique flavor, making it a popular option among cold coffee fans.

It's a good spot for coffee lovers looking for a trendy yet relaxing place to hang out in Central Delhi.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No 11, E Block Mezzanine Floor, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Nayan Majee
Review:
Good place to hangout and chill. Usually it’s almost crowded being in the inner circle of CP so you have to wait a few mins sometimes to get a table.
The food and drinks are actually good. They offer limited options in snacks however you get few more options in coffees. Do try their Vietnamese coffee. It’s worth it.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: M-44, Block M, Greater Kailash II, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Ansh Goel
Review:
I recently visited Third Wave Coffee Cafe and had a delightful experience. The dry hazelnut cappuccino was perfectly balanced, offering a rich flavor without being overpowering. The roasted pesto veggie croissant was a standout, bursting with freshness and a savory kick that complemented the flaky pastry. The mushroom and cheese croissant was equally impressive, with a creamy filling that was both indulgent and satisfying.

We also enjoyed a classic butter croissant, which was buttery and light—an essential for any cafe experience. The pistachio milkshake was a hit with my uncle’s kid, creamy and sweet with a unique nutty flavor that made it a fun treat.

The iced coffee was refreshing and robust, perfect for a warm day, while the hummus pita platter offered a delightful, healthy option with smooth hummus and fresh vegetables.

Overall, Third Wave Coffee Cafe excels in both flavor and ambiance, making it a great spot for coffee lovers and food enthusiasts alike. Highly recommended!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: M-44, Block M, Greater Kailash II, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: sagar gautam
Review: I’ve been coming to this amazing coffee house for over a year now, and it never disappoints! The ambiance is perfect for working, chatting, or just relaxing. The music is always on point, and the coffee—well, it’s simply the best. A special shoutout to Krishna, who not only brews the perfect cup but always delivers it with a warm smile and quick service, making my day a little brighter and helping me escape the hustle of everyday life. Highly recommend this place for anyone who loves great coffee and good vibes!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: M-44, Block M, Greater Kailash II, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Muskan Kumari
Review: "I recently visited this Third Wave Coffee and was impressed by their excellent service! Every staff member was friendly and polite, especially Ajay, who stood out for his exceptional hospitality. The food was delicious, and the coffee was top-notch - it's become one of my favorite coffee houses! I highly recommend Third Wave Coffee for its warm atmosphere and outstanding service."

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: M-44, Block M, Greater Kailash II, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Harry
Review: Nice place for a good cup of coffee with sandwiches and good music. One star less for mandatory Third Wave app to avail any discounts/ combos/  schemes. Good atmosphere and friendly staff.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: M-44, Block M, Greater Kailash II, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Anisha Ahuja
Review: Had pistachio milkshake and it was really good would definitely recommend. Staff is really humble and courteous, special thanks to Ajay and Ravi. Also tried croissants which was okay ish

Name: Dark Bean Coffee | Cafe | Bakery In Janakpuri
Address: C-4C/389, Block C 4C, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Laahiri Rao
Review: I love the cafe and the ambiance, the staff is very professional and friendly. I love the food and coffee specially ❤️

Name: Dark Bean Coffee | Cafe | Bakery In Janakpuri
Address: C-4C/389, Block C 4C, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Sparsh Khanna
Review: "Dark Bean Coffee and Cakery in Janakpuri West is an absolute gem! I stumbled upon this cozy cafe bakery and couldn't be more delighted. Not only is it pocket-friendly, but their combo options are also fantastic, offering a perfect blend of coffee and delectable treats. The ambience is aesthetically pleasing, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere to relax or catch up with friends. What truly sets this place apart is the incredibly friendly staff and owner, who go above and beyond to make you feel welcome. Whether you're a coffee connoisseur or have a sweet tooth, Dark Bean Coffee and Cakery is a must-visit destination for anyone craving a delightful experience."

Name: Dark Bean Coffee | Cafe | Bakery In Janakpuri
Address: C-4C/389, Block C 4C, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Suraj Verma
Review:
The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf in Janakpuri offers a delightful escape from the hustle and bustle of the city. From the moment you step in, you're greeted by a cozy, inviting atmosphere that’s perfect for unwinding or catching up with friends. The ambiance is enhanced by comfortable seating, warm lighting, and a modern, yet earthy decor that makes you feel right at home.

The menu is diverse, catering to both coffee and tea enthusiasts alike. Their signature coffees are a treat, with the Vanilla Latte standing out as a personal favorite—smooth, rich, and perfectly balanced. If you’re more of a tea lover, their Chai Latte is a must-try, offering a perfect blend of spices that feels like a warm hug in a cup.

What sets this location apart is the quality of service. The staff is friendly, attentive, and knowledgeable about the menu. They’re always ready to offer recommendations based on your preferences, which adds a personalized touch to the experience.

The food menu complements the beverages well, with options ranging from light snacks to more substantial meals. The pastries are fresh and flavorful, particularly the blueberry muffin, which pairs wonderfully with a hot cup of coffee.

However, the prices are on the higher side, which might be a consideration for some. But for the quality of food, drink, and ambiance, it’s a worthwhile indulgence.

Overall, The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf in Janakpuri is a fantastic spot whether you’re looking to relax, work, or simply enjoy a great cup of coffee. It’s a place that invites you to stay just a little bit longer and enjoy the moment.

Name: Dark Bean Coffee | Cafe | Bakery In Janakpuri
Address: C-4C/389, Block C 4C, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Food Date
Review:
Was invited for the opening of this cute cafe in pastels. Nice cafe with pastel shades and nice floral decorations & comfortable seating. 20 odd seater. They have coffee, cookies, chocolates, muffins, pizza, pasta, fries and more.
Had cold coffee frappe and it was nice though it was thick and the beans are a little strong. Truffle chocolates were soft and nice. Tried the choco chip and oat meal cookies. These were nice. Cake was nice. Pizza was average hard around the edges. Fries were good. Red sauce pasta was ok. A little dry.
Ginger tea with small ginger chunks was good. Hot cappuccino was nice.

Name: Dark Bean Coffee | Cafe | Bakery In Janakpuri
Address: C-4C/389, Block C 4C, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Rajat Bawaniwal
Review: Wonderful place for a meal. The staff and the owner are very cordial and the food is also great! Tried Peppy Paneer Pizza and Burger Slider which tasted great!

Name: Costa Coffee
Address: J39H+QP9, Lal Sain Mandir Marg, Block C1, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Paras Jhanji
Review:
Amazing experience…

Coffee is very good in taste.

Staff is also very good.

Fresh and vibrant ambience.

Nice wall decorations and murals.

Conducive environment for work or catch up with friends.

Name: Costa Coffee
Address: J39H+QP9, Lal Sain Mandir Marg, Block C1, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Bobby Banerjee
Review:
This place is differently vibing. This mall has less walk-ins as compared Vegas and nearby mall.

You can relax and enjoy your coffee.

I ordered 2 sandwiches as well. Both veg sandwiches as a part of combo with coffee.

The cost is appropriate as per the quality and ambiance. Loved the place.

Name: Costa Coffee
Address: J39H+QP9, Lal Sain Mandir Marg, Block C1, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Foong Yee Loh
Review: Fresh, and vibrant ambience. Nice wall decorations and murals. Conducive environment for work or catch up with friends. Friendly baristas making experience pleasant. Coffee was good, as expected of Costa Coffee.

Name: Costa Coffee
Address: J39H+QP9, Lal Sain Mandir Marg, Block C1, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Sujal Raj
Review:
The atmosphere of the cafe is amazing..
Friendly staff and baristas. Caramel Cappuccino, hazelnut mocha and frappe are one of the most recommended options.....and has a wide range of veg and non veg snack options

Name: Costa Coffee
Address: J39H+QP9, Lal Sain Mandir Marg, Block C1, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Divine Enterprises
Review: Ugly and ill mannered staff at the store.. not at all cordial staff.. no good hospitality .. seats are not clean there was dust on couch and side hand rails.. staff keep gossiping..

Name: Deccan Coffee Club
Address: D-1, D Block, Pocket D, Sector 27, Noida
Author: Inaam Zia
Review: I just had the most incredible coffee and burger experience! The filtered coffee was a game-changer - rich, smooth, and full of flavor. It was clear that the beans were freshly ground and brewed to perfection. And the burger? Absolutely divine! The combination was absolute perfection. The quality of the ingredients shone through in every bite. I'm still dreaming about it! 10/10 would recommend!

Name: Deccan Coffee Club
Address: D-1, D Block, Pocket D, Sector 27, Noida
Author: Tejas Mahadik
Review:
This is one of those authentic South Indian Filter coffee and tiffin place which will make you go back more than once . It’s a family friendly place and staff are also very generous . Neatly maintained and the coffee and food is very tasty .

Indian filter coffee is a coffee drink made by mixing hot milk and sugar with the infusion obtained by percolation brewing of finely ground coffee powder with chicory in a traditional Indian filter. It has been described as "hot, strong, sweet and topped with bubbly froth" and is known as filter kaapi in India.

Name: Deccan Coffee Club
Address: D-1, D Block, Pocket D, Sector 27, Noida
Author: Lavanya Jain
Review:
A hidden gem in the heart of Sector 27, Noida. Amazing Ambience and of course the authentic filter coffee is to die for! Thank you for your Hospitality Mr, Sathish. Looking forward to being a regular customer.
Please do visit guys, if you are a filter coffee lover and otherwise too😜.
Check out their menu on zomato or Swiggy!!!

Name: Deccan Coffee Club
Address: D-1, D Block, Pocket D, Sector 27, Noida
Author: Akshaj Awasthi
Review: Discovered by complete chance on a visit to this part of Noida, to have the nicest vadas and tastiest filter coffee I've ever had in Delhi NCR. Highly recommend!

Name: Deccan Coffee Club
Address: D-1, D Block, Pocket D, Sector 27, Noida
Author: Akash K
Review:
It was a rare find, a South Indian 'cafe'.

The food (Upma, Idli Samnar n Poha) was very good. ✔️

Mr Satish (one of the owner) and the person in the kitchen were very helpful and quick in preparing and magaing the food. 🤩

Small n cute place to relish one of the BEST filter coffee ☕ I've ever had and first time I had COLD filter coffee. Kudos to the owners. 🙌 They give healthy options to sweeten your coffee with honey, jaggery or sugar.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No 11,12,13,14, Ground Floor Salcon Tower, Rasvilas, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Braj Prasad
Review:
I recently had the pleasure of visiting the third wave coffee shop nestled beside a charming bookshop, and it was an experience worth sharing. From the moment I stepped in, I knew I was in for a treat.

The ambiance of the cafe, coupled with the proximity to a bookshop, made it an ideal spot for enjoying both coffee and reading. It felt like a cozy retreat where I could lose myself in a good book while sipping on a delicious brew.

I must commend the staff, especially Sanjay Singh, whose warm and friendly service elevated my experience. The coffee was served with precision and a genuine smile, which added an extra layer of enjoyment to my visit.

While my time at the cafe was delightful, I do have one small suggestion. It would be fantastic if the cafe could also offer bottled water alongside their exquisite coffee selection. This addition would ensure that customers have everything they need for a truly satisfying visit.

Overall, my experience at the third wave coffee shop was nothing short of wonderful. From the inviting atmosphere to the impeccable service, it's a place I'll definitely be returning to. If you're looking for a cozy spot to enjoy great coffee and a good book, look no further than this hidden gem.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No 11,12,13,14, Ground Floor Salcon Tower, Rasvilas, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Omar Ahmed
Review:
If you love books and coffee, this is the place for you !!
This is a hidden gem nestled in the hustle-bustle of Saket. This small cafe boasts a large collection of books as a result of a collaboration with Bahrisons Booksellers. Seating is limited, but it is definitely worth the wait. Once you place your order you can get lost among the many shelves of books.
The staff is extremely helpful and fast with their service. It's THE place for an intimate date with a loved one or a small group of friends.
I'd recommend going in the evening as many WFH people choose to work from here.

P.S. You cannot go wrong with The Classic Cold Coffee with an extra shot of espresso.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No 11,12,13,14, Ground Floor Salcon Tower, Rasvilas, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Humayun Khan ™ (Prince)
Review:
Regretting ordering Cappuccino here.. It was so bad that my throat was bitter and had ashy/charred notes in it. It wasn't enjoyable at all.. You need to check your beans, They are not giving aroma and nutty, bright tasting notes.. Only hard hitting ashy burnt notes..

Only enjoyable thing was cinnamon roll..

Not gonna recommend neither will visit here again.

-an honest coffee connoisseur

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No 11,12,13,14, Ground Floor Salcon Tower, Rasvilas, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Vani Gupta
Review: Amazing staff ( ajeet ji ) services . He so kind and amazing guy. The pancake are so soft and tasty .  Must visit .

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Shop No 11,12,13,14, Ground Floor Salcon Tower, Rasvilas, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Rakhel Kumar Sahoo
Review:
This place is the perfect gateway from the hustle bustle of Delhi, have a sip of coffee and concentrate on your work. The Staffs are polite and best at their service.
I recommend you try their French Vanilla Latte.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: 1st Floor, Main Market, Greater Kailash-1, M Block, Greater Kailash I, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Meron Girma
Review: The food is good, though the variety is somewhat limited. I also wished for bottled water, but they didn't have any, which seems to be a common issue in most cafés around here. However, the environment is perfect for working, reading, or meeting people. Just be mindful of your timing, as it can get quite packed at times. The staff is friendly, the place is clean, and the soft music adds a nice touch. It's definitely one of my favorite spots in New Delhi. Namaste 🙏

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: 1st Floor, Main Market, Greater Kailash-1, M Block, Greater Kailash I, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Rishabh Mehrotra
Review:
Was meeting some friends travelling to Delhi from mumbai and were floating around in the GK market // yep one of the few high street markets left around // sometimes you just don’t want to go inside a mall. Moreover the Bombayites were staying close to GK and didn’t want them to go through the grind of the delhi city traffic. We were heading towards Starbucks when we saw the sign of this cafe and decided to try it. I have never been to this one before // although keep seeing them springing up around.

The place was welcoming enough for us to walk in // I like climbing stairs but this one was really good due to the low levels between the steps // something which needs to be mentioned. Climbing up was a breeze is really friendly for  even those who don’t like climbing stairs.

The coffee was also nice. But the order took a lot of time, we weren’t complaining  though since we were anyways there to have long conversations. Although the seating is a bit haphazard and awkward I must say.

The order counter is also a bit too high is probably the only thing I found a bit odd. The staff was courteous as most cafés. Overall a nice place to visit again.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: 1st Floor, Main Market, Greater Kailash-1, M Block, Greater Kailash I, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Shristi Mapchan
Review: Lots of seating and not too crowded, great for a work day! Fast wifi, outlets, and alternative milks for drinks readily available. Good experience with workers as well. Respectful and good service. Got a french vanilla latte, among the best of the ones I’ve tried in Delhi. Tastes a little mocha-y rather than the taste of vanilla, but still a good drink and of a good portion (I got a medium)! I definitely plan on coming back during my work from home days :)

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: 1st Floor, Main Market, Greater Kailash-1, M Block, Greater Kailash I, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Madhulika Liddle
Review:
There’s no lift to the place, but the stairs are wide and not very steep.

As is usual with Third Wave, they offer a wide range of coffees, teas, and a few non-caffeinated beverages, both hot and cold. There are also various snacks, cakes, cookies and desserts, as well as savouries like sandwiches, all-day breakfast, and puffs. The space is very pleasant, with wonderful coffee-themed murals which are very striking. We came here for coffee after lunch on a weekend, and the space was not too crowded, which was nice.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: 1st Floor, Main Market, Greater Kailash-1, M Block, Greater Kailash I, Greater Kailash, New Delhi
Author: Himanshu Saleria
Review:
Cold brew and mushroom cheese croissant with Hein Cooper Playing in the background on a Saturday morning.
Perfect atmosphere to catch up on some reading. Thanks Rakshita for the food 🙌🏻

Name: Starbucks Coffee
Address: 2nd Floor, 1st FloorA 45, 1st And, near Gopal Mandir, Khan Market, Rabindra Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Alexander Romanov
Review: Starbucks here as every Starbucks in Delhi at its top quality. Try blonde almond flat white! But unfortunately I did not have a chance to wait until the only washroom will be available.

Name: Starbucks Coffee
Address: 2nd Floor, 1st FloorA 45, 1st And, near Gopal Mandir, Khan Market, Rabindra Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Haridas Thakur Das Acbsp
Review:
My wife order two lattes. We received two cappuccino's. I had to take them back for an exchange and it took them more than five minutes to replace them. The coffee is very bitter. The staff (girls) are very friendly.
The seating is rather spartan. The girl who welcomed us in was very nice.
Croissant with butter and jam Rs260 (large letters) but in very small print it states pot of jam R40. However, they are all grouped, together as if they're R260 (and that is expensive for India).
One latte is one shot and the coffee is incredibly bitter, it was horrible (sorry).
Upstairs there is a sign which states: find the roast you love most. How nice, but it isn't downstairs where you order and they don't ask you which one you'd prefer.
Two small coffees a croissant with butter and jam Rs1,040 which is more than England. It's a complete rip-off and I will never come here again. Maybe I should give up coffee :-)
Tata now owns Starbucks in India, say no more.

Name: Starbucks Coffee
Address: 2nd Floor, 1st FloorA 45, 1st And, near Gopal Mandir, Khan Market, Rabindra Nagar, New Delhi
Author: A M
Review: Good location for a Starbucks. Clientele is nearby office goers and lawyers. Cold coffee with oat milk is fantastic. Although it was sweet despite us asking for very little sugar. The masala potato puff and chicken tikka panini tasted good as well. Staff is courteous and polite. Two levels of seating.

Name: Starbucks Coffee
Address: 2nd Floor, 1st FloorA 45, 1st And, near Gopal Mandir, Khan Market, Rabindra Nagar, New Delhi
Author: WT
Review:
Nice clean and friendly location.
As soon as I walked in all staffs greeted me. Even when I was leaving.
The place were very clean organized and well-kept.
Located on the first floor in Khan Market, the stair to go up located in the back alley, a little tricky.

Name: Starbucks Coffee
Address: 2nd Floor, 1st FloorA 45, 1st And, near Gopal Mandir, Khan Market, Rabindra Nagar, New Delhi
Author: Raghav Punj
Review: Excellent atmosphere for working from cafe. Super friendly and helpful staff lets you sit there and work peacefully. Also enjoyed the super serene and aromatic vibe all around the place. Always my go to place for meetings and some good quality coffee. Tried the Red Hat Frappuccino recently.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: PLATINA TOWER, Mehrauli-Gurgaon Rd, opposite Bristol Hotel, A Block, DLF Phase 1, Gurugram
Author: Ashesh Bharadwaj
Review: The coffee was ok. For some reason I couldn't find a positive vibe in there. Maybe because  it was a weekday late afternoon. Overall an average experience.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: PLATINA TOWER, Mehrauli-Gurgaon Rd, opposite Bristol Hotel, A Block, DLF Phase 1, Gurugram
Author: aaratrika
Review: Many words of praise have been written about third wave, so there's nothing new for me to add. They never miss, every single time. I'd even go out of my way to say that third wave might even be better than Starbucks and Blue Tokai, in terms of their diverse selection and just overall taste. As for my favourite order, it's hard to pick one, but if at all, I'd go for the Vietnamese Shakerato anyday

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: PLATINA TOWER, Mehrauli-Gurgaon Rd, opposite Bristol Hotel, A Block, DLF Phase 1, Gurugram
Author: Saurav Chatterjee
Review:
I visited this restaurant a few days back in the morning  morning to celebrate the birthday of one of our colleagues.

I was impressed by the high quality of the food, the quick & friendly service, and the 24*7 availability.

We tried a variety of dishes and enjoyed them all, especially the Hummus and Pita Platter & Paneer Wrap.

Other things we ordered were Smoked Chipotle Paneer Sandwich, Fresh Pesto Sandwich, Chilli Cheese Garlic Toast, Mocha Choco Chip Frappe, and Choco Hazelnut.

I recommend this restaurant to others, especially because of its 24 7 availability.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: PLATINA TOWER, Mehrauli-Gurgaon Rd, opposite Bristol Hotel, A Block, DLF Phase 1, Gurugram
Author: Rach Nida
Review:
We have been trying out the major coffee joints while in Delhi. Ordered the flat white but it’s totally acidic. Couldn’t finish the coffee. Skimmed milk still made me feel bloated so not sure how ‘skimmed’ it is.
Although the staff offered to change it to something else, there’s no point if they are using a single type of beans.
The Achari Paneer puff is good and worth a try.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: PLATINA TOWER, Mehrauli-Gurgaon Rd, opposite Bristol Hotel, A Block, DLF Phase 1, Gurugram
Author: Shiv Sharma
Review: Tried 3rd wave for the first time. The staff was courteous and humble. Had one hot chocolate and cold brew. The drinks were good and the ambient is also good. A good place to sit and relax. Though the place as Starbucks next to it and it was empty. All the crowd was at third wave only.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground floor, D-19, next to Modern Bazaar, Shiniwas Puri, Block D, Defence Colony, New Delhi
Author: Kapil Verma
Review: Third Wave Coffee offers a balanced experience. The cafe has a cozy ambiance, making it a nice spot to relax or catch up on work. I tried the hazelnut cappuccino, which was well-prepared and enjoyable. While it didn’t stand out exceptionally, it was a decent brew. Overall, it’s neither exceptional nor disappointing—worth a visit for a casual coffee experience.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground floor, D-19, next to Modern Bazaar, Shiniwas Puri, Block D, Defence Colony, New Delhi
Author: Suhani Kedare
Review: The food and coffee is good, they have an amazing summer menu too! Incredibly aesthetic place.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground floor, D-19, next to Modern Bazaar, Shiniwas Puri, Block D, Defence Colony, New Delhi
Author: Isha Sharma
Review: Excellent coffee. The staff was very friendly and Arman very kindly showed us the process of aeropress technique. Learned a good bit about coffee. The food is great as well. Really great taste of coffee.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground floor, D-19, next to Modern Bazaar, Shiniwas Puri, Block D, Defence Colony, New Delhi
Author: Vikas Shrotriya
Review: I recently visited Third Wave in Defence Colony, New Delhi, and was delighted by the outstanding service provided by Barista Shabana. Her professionalism and attention to detail were evident throughout my visit. Shabana's friendly demeanor and expertise in crafting beverages made my experience memorable. I highly recommend Third Wave, thanks to Shabana's exceptional conduct and dedication to customer care.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground floor, D-19, next to Modern Bazaar, Shiniwas Puri, Block D, Defence Colony, New Delhi
Author: Surabhi Sharma
Review: Third Wave Coffee never disappoints! Love the coffees here. Food portion is also good. Great service by Kabir

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Hauz Khas
Address: 15A, opposite Old Dr Dangs Clinic, Block A, South West, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Nandini Sharma
Review: I had high expectations from this place as I’ve been to blue tokai Vasant Vihar multiple times and always loved it. However, I was quite disappointed with the Hauz Khas branch. There are multiple flies inside the air conditioned cafe. I found ants in their chocolate sauce. Once I showed them the ants in the chocolate syrup, they just replaced the sauce. I had to specifically ask them to change the coffee in which I’d added the sauce. After from this disappointment, the infrastructure of the place is falling apart, it’s poorly designed and quite cramped. There’s just one washroom and that too isn’t regularly cleaned. The tables are broken, wobbly. All in all, not a good experience and not worth the price. Also, their oat milk was definitely expired.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Hauz Khas
Address: 15A, opposite Old Dr Dangs Clinic, Block A, South West, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Har
Review:
I would love to try their actual food and coffee someday .This review is for their coffee beans.
I ordered their beans during my visit to India to a small town in Punjab.
It was convenient and fast .
The beans were great and roasted to perfection.It was fun to try the Indian coffee beans for the first time. The price is quite low compared to the Canadian market but the quality is great .
I will order more in future for sure.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Hauz Khas
Address: 15A, opposite Old Dr Dangs Clinic, Block A, South West, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: arjun nair
Review: One of the best cafe serving fantastic coffees. They are undoubtedly serving the best coffees compared to other places in Delhi ncr as I have been exploring coffee at different places since the last decade . Their bakery items also is super awesome. Must try include butter croissant, lemon tart and aglio olio pasta

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Hauz Khas
Address: 15A, opposite Old Dr Dangs Clinic, Block A, South West, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Ashita Rukmini
Review:
A small cafe.Which is why the space is an issue.Food’s very good though.Find a parking spot always.But not very easily.Good for a meetcute.Ambience is great.
Food 4/5
Ambience 3/5
Service 3/5
Value for money 3/5

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Hauz Khas
Address: 15A, opposite Old Dr Dangs Clinic, Block A, South West, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Bani - exploretravelallalong
Review: Its a cute, cozy little coffee shop which has some delicious  sandwich, hummus with chicken and coffee. Definitely a  place that you can visit with your friends or for coffee date. I like this place for its sandwiches with coffee. I love Grandma's special, cappuccino and Hummus bowl with pulled chicken

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: DESHBANDHU COLLEGE, E-3, Kalkaji Main Rd, College Road, in front of Bank of Baroda, Kalkaji, New Delhi
Author: Monica Galbardi
Review: A small and welcoming coffee shop, I was captured by the name and what better excuse to try it, given my passion for coffee. I tried their Macchiato and French Fries. It goes without saying that their coffee is of unparalleled quality and taste. They use a blend of only arabica to prepare their coffees and it is perfectly felt in the aroma and taste. The name does not disappoint expectations and I will definitely come back!

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: DESHBANDHU COLLEGE, E-3, Kalkaji Main Rd, College Road, in front of Bank of Baroda, Kalkaji, New Delhi
Author: ATUL ANAND
Review:
The place is quite small.
Total of 10 sitting arrangements.
Small Flies was there.
Accept UPI, CASH AND CARD PAYMENT.

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: DESHBANDHU COLLEGE, E-3, Kalkaji Main Rd, College Road, in front of Bank of Baroda, Kalkaji, New Delhi
Author: rahul chaudhary
Review: We had a great experience in this cafe. It's a must try for coffee and frappe lovers. Price are reasonable & the staff is friendly and helpful when it comes to help you find the right flavour for you. Their biscuit shrappe is worth a try. Quantities are fulfilling. Do visit when in the area!!

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: DESHBANDHU COLLEGE, E-3, Kalkaji Main Rd, College Road, in front of Bank of Baroda, Kalkaji, New Delhi
Author: Pramudit Shukla
Review: Good place for coffee lovers to try out. Just be sure to tell them your preferences, their default option is super strong (from my experience).

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: DESHBANDHU COLLEGE, E-3, Kalkaji Main Rd, College Road, in front of Bank of Baroda, Kalkaji, New Delhi
Author: Manav Manchanda
Review:
If you’re looking for a place that lives up to its name, *Nothing but Coffee* in Kalkaji is a must-visit. This cozy spot offers a truly amazing coffee experience, with flavors that will satisfy even the most discerning coffee lover. The quality of the coffee is consistently top-notch, making it my go-to place whenever I need a caffeine fix.

The ambiance is relaxed and perfect for unwinding or getting some work done. The staff is friendly and knowledgeable, and I have to give a special mention to Priyanka, who was my server. She was attentive, warm, and made sure I had a great experience. Whether you're in the mood for a classic espresso or something more adventurous, they have you covered.

Overall, *Nothing but Coffee* is a gem in Kalkaji. It’s the perfect spot for anyone who appreciates good coffee, and it has definitely earned its spot as my favourite coffee destination.

Name: Josie's Coffee House
Address: Shop No. 3, Ground Floor, Central, beside La Pino's Pizza, Old Rajender Nagar market, Block 55, Rajinder Nagar, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Diksha Chugh
Review: The atmosphere is very cosy with cute ghibli music . The food is phenomenal. This is the only place we had to immediately review because it deserves a five star and more. We love Josies and you should too!

Name: Josie's Coffee House
Address: Shop No. 3, Ground Floor, Central, beside La Pino's Pizza, Old Rajender Nagar market, Block 55, Rajinder Nagar, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Mahak Kothari
Review: Orn's best spot to get a cup of coffee, both open and closed sitting available. My favourites - assam tea, filter coffee, mocha cold coffee, red sauce pasta. but service is very slow as it is always full with people.

Name: Josie's Coffee House
Address: Shop No. 3, Ground Floor, Central, beside La Pino's Pizza, Old Rajender Nagar market, Block 55, Rajinder Nagar, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Fatema Husain
Review:
I am a tea lover and keep hunting for such places where I can get good tea.
This place is really good and cozy, you will like the atmosphere inside as well as outside and they have both sitting available.
Best thing to try there is Assam tea, Ginger tea and coffee, these all are worth it. Assam tea is worth ₹25 and is a plain tea without any masala, with a good taste of tea which is quite difficult to find. Their Ginger tea is also good and is worth ₹50, but its taste and quantity is worth it.
If there is something not to try, that is their cheesecake, it is very plain and not worth it. Rest the place and service is good.

Name: Josie's Coffee House
Address: Shop No. 3, Ground Floor, Central, beside La Pino's Pizza, Old Rajender Nagar market, Block 55, Rajinder Nagar, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: mangesh tawade
Review:
#Non veg rice bowl.. #test was very awesome.. must try ... Quantity is good and price is also affordable... Paisa vasool dish ...

Apart from this all other things are also good to try like coffee, brownie, pancakes etc.

Name: Josie's Coffee House
Address: Shop No. 3, Ground Floor, Central, beside La Pino's Pizza, Old Rajender Nagar market, Block 55, Rajinder Nagar, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: vijendra bhagat
Review: It's good place to have coffee, sandwich 🥪 brownie ,cakes ,pastries. Though it is very crowded in the evening. But if you live near Karol bag then you can explore it. Price are definitely very affordable.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Vasant Vihar
Address: 59, PVR Priya complex, Basant Lok, Vasant Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Mann Kounthoujam
Review: This cafe is a gem and the atmosphere is cozy and welcoming. The coffee is top-notch and the food is fresh and delicious. The staff is friendly and they make you feel right at home. It’s the perfect spot to chill or get some work done. I’ll definitely be coming back for more of their amazing coffee and great vibes.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Vasant Vihar
Address: 59, PVR Priya complex, Basant Lok, Vasant Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Shiv Vashishtha Bhargava
Review: Absolutely outstanding! The best in Delhi NCR by a mile? The team here was superb and I would personally like to thank my barista for the evening, Mr.Kapil. The Vietnamese cold brew was simply superb and I am very sure I will be visiting the outlet more often. Legendary indeed! Blue Tokai has set the bar. Only time will tell if others can compete. 10/10!

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Vasant Vihar
Address: 59, PVR Priya complex, Basant Lok, Vasant Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Food Date
Review: Its a nice outlet..tried  their pan cakes with cream & chocolate sauce. The pan cakes are nicr, decent size & filling. The sourdough pizza was not good. Scanty veggies  & overdone but on complaining they redid  the pizza & gave us a fresh one. This was much better. Vietnamese coffee was real good. This was  the 1st time for me & i liked the coffee. Pasta in white sauce was too creamy. Average taste though. Overall decent outket, slow service.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Vasant Vihar
Address: 59, PVR Priya complex, Basant Lok, Vasant Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Smaranil Guchait
Review: Ordered Chicken salad and coffee. Indoor seating is good here. I did not enjoy the rooftop outdoor seating here though. it felt kind of moldy.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Vasant Vihar
Address: 59, PVR Priya complex, Basant Lok, Vasant Vihar, New Delhi
Author: Madhulika Liddle
Review:
The Blue Tokai outlet in Basant Lok spreads over three floors. The ground floor basically houses a counter and various display cases for their wide range of packaged coffees, as well as the different products of Suchali’s Artisanal bakery (breads, croissants, muffins, etc).  The first and second floor has seating; the second floor is relatively spacious and has a counter, plus there is outdoor seating and washrooms on the same floor.

Very good coffee and snacks (especially Suchali's), good service, and a pleasant ambience, very conducive to work or a quiet conversation.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Deer Park
Address: B6, Commercial Complex, opposite Deer Park, next to the Piano Man and Mother Dairy, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Rhythm KARMANI
Review: Their coffee is truly one of the worst coffees I’ve ever had in my life. The caramel coffee tasted nothing like caramel or coffee. It was so watered down that I could barely taste any coffee. The coffee shake was still better. The mushroom spaghetti was average too but their coffees simply ruined my mood. Their staff and service were excellent. They were very quick and accommodating but the brand really needs to work on their brews

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Deer Park
Address: B6, Commercial Complex, opposite Deer Park, next to the Piano Man and Mother Dairy, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Swati Sud
Review: Simply love their coffees and their new summer cooler additions. They would customise as per your requirements. If you want to grab a bite of healthy guilt free food, this is again your place..my favourite being aglio olio pasta. Must try!

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Deer Park
Address: B6, Commercial Complex, opposite Deer Park, next to the Piano Man and Mother Dairy, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Prachi Kumari
Review: Blue tokai is famous for coffee and i had the worst coffee here. I like my coffee hot so I ordered hot but it was cold hence tasted worst. Pistachio raspberry croissant was good, buttery & tasty. The korean bun is not worth 310 it was complete waste of money.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Deer Park
Address: B6, Commercial Complex, opposite Deer Park, next to the Piano Man and Mother Dairy, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Abhinav Kr. Anguria
Review: Best place to sit and work. Vietnamese coffee is my jam but anything at this location is a good grab. Staff and service is excellent, rather too good, humble, kind and accommodating. Shyam, Shivam, Hari, Raj, Anuj and others are so good at their job and attentive to customer’s needs and wants. Always on their toes. One of best Blue Tokai branches since the first one.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Deer Park
Address: B6, Commercial Complex, opposite Deer Park, next to the Piano Man and Mother Dairy, Block B6, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Suyash Agrawal
Review: Good coffee, and even better avo toast. Opens early in the morning.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Plot No 3, Block M, Mall of India, Sector 18, Noida
Author: Rajat Bansal
Review: Had heard a lot about Third Wave Coffee and tried it for the first time today and overall was a good experience. They have lot of interesting new flavours of coffee, which one should try. The staff is also very nice and helpful. The ambience is simple but cozy. Although the products listed on the app about the store are not in sync with what is actually available at the store, that needs to be looked upon. But overall good experience. Do try their new limited edition coffee flavours.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Plot No 3, Block M, Mall of India, Sector 18, Noida
Author: Pinaakee Bhardwaj
Review:
Nice place with great food options and a nice ambience.

Staff is friendly and the service is quick and very quick.

Food - their hot chocolate, cappuccino are definitely worth it! Also loved their sandwich (good in quantity with nice bread and the filling, also loved the pancake (their whipped cream, maple syrup, pan cakes themselves taste so nice!)

Seating is comfortable, not very noisy either, they also have charging ports.

Orders can be placed via their app too.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Plot No 3, Block M, Mall of India, Sector 18, Noida
Author: Arpit Dubey
Review:
It was my first time trying out coffee at TWC, and I was quite amazed by the taste of it. I tried Hazelnut Mocha Frappe and Vietnamese coffee with Hummus and Pita platter.

The taste and quality was great. Staff were very polite and their service is great as well.

This brand has set its price very conveniently just below Starbucks but the taste is far better than Starbucks. Loved the overall vibe of it.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Plot No 3, Block M, Mall of India, Sector 18, Noida
Author: CPA Vinita
Review:
It's been many times that I have a bad experience of third wave franchise. Following points I found issues with-
1. Garlic cheese bread tastes altogether different if thers is a little rush. They cook it in hurry, keep it on counter, forget to serve it, on reminding , serves it cold.
2. Tables are wobbling, not enough space, floor is always dirty and caution board is always present.
3. Coffee is served like a frustrated house wife serves her husband. If I have to have such coffee, I will make it in a shaker at home.
4. They bring dirty plate then take it back to clean it.
5. Overall, service is not as good as the prices.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Plot No 3, Block M, Mall of India, Sector 18, Noida
Author: Ather Noor
Review: I recently visited Third Wave Coffee in DLF Mall, Noida. The hummus and pita platter was fresh and flavorful, making for a delightful snack. The chocolate coffee was rich and perfectly balanced, offering a great complement to the meal. Overall, a satisfying experience with a cozy atmosphere.

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2/5, opp. HDFC Bank, Block F, Krishna Nagar, Delhi
Author: Abhishek sharma
Review: NBC is a new venture that offers great restaurants and aesthetic places. Everything is nice, but NBC could improve the coffee taste. When I ordered the first coffee, I noticed the aroma was lacking, and the taste was too strong. This should be improved in the future. Other than that, everything is good, and the staff is excellent.

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2/5, opp. HDFC Bank, Block F, Krishna Nagar, Delhi
Author: Divyansh Jain
Review:
Amazing taste tried multiple items and all of them are good. Very decently built & Inside the cafe it feels very calm.
Price is a bit costly.
Fast service and staff is very humble ❤️

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2/5, opp. HDFC Bank, Block F, Krishna Nagar, Delhi
Author: Stuti Jain
Review:
Very good experience. I really liked the quality of coffee used.
Ordered Hazelnut frappe and classic cold coffee. Hazelnut was super good and classic was also good.
Ordered butter croissant but they gave us a chocolate croissant 🥐.
Don't know it was a mistake or for the first time visitors. 😅
But really liked this place. A must visit in East Delhi.

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2/5, opp. HDFC Bank, Block F, Krishna Nagar, Delhi
Author: Akanksha Rawat
Review: Loved this place! You'll get coffee matching the level of other costly coffee outlets at a very cheaper price. I tried tiramisu cappuccino and it was just for 120 bucks. Hope they don't increase prices in future🤭

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2/5, opp. HDFC Bank, Block F, Krishna Nagar, Delhi
Author: varsha jindal
Review: Recently visit this outlet. They have a very huge menu. The ambience was so good . Seating also available in this outlet.I tried some shakes and coffee. Everything was so delicious. Worth it highly recommend place.

Name: Coffee Shop
Address: The Hotel Janpath, Janpath Rd, Janpath, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Abhishek Shukla
Review: Space is well organised indore and outdoor sitting available

Name: Coffee Shop
Address: The Hotel Janpath, Janpath Rd, Janpath, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Shahzeb Saifi
Review: "This café genuinely surpassed every one of my assumptions! From the second I ventured inside, I was welcomed with a warm and welcoming mood that encouraged me at home. The assistance was exceptional, with amicable and learned staff who took care of all my requirements. Furthermore, we should not disregard the espresso - it was totally heavenly! Each cup was skillfully prepared, conveying a rich and tasty experience that outperformed some other espresso I've had. I energetically prescribe this café to anybody searching for an excellent and remarkable espresso venture."

Name: Coffee Shop
Address: The Hotel Janpath, Janpath Rd, Janpath, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Punnya Prasoon Gaur
Review: Coffee Shop is a coffee lover's paradise. With exceptional coffee, cozy ambiance, and friendly staff, it's the perfect spot to indulge in your caffeine cravings. The attention to detail in every cup is impressive, and the baristas' expertise shines through in the rich and aromatic flavors. Whether you're seeking a quick pick-me-up or a place to unwind,Coffee Shop delivers an outstanding coffee experience. It's a five-star destination for coffee enthusiasts seeking perfection in every sip

Name: Coffee Shop
Address: The Hotel Janpath, Janpath Rd, Janpath, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Gilad Danon
Review: Impossible to find . Phone number not working

Name: Coffee Shop
Address: The Hotel Janpath, Janpath Rd, Janpath, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Mahendra Tamhane
Review: I'm thank you so much for your said is very good service. I will thank you staff carefully serv safe work.

Name: Analog Coffee & Kitchen
Address: Ground Floor, Crosspoint Mall, GL - 11, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Kunal Khattar
Review: Amazing cafe with premium coffee options and food. Loved their Avocado specials. They have a book lending club (hence the name Analog) - so bring your kids and reduce their gadget time.

Name: Analog Coffee & Kitchen
Address: Ground Floor, Crosspoint Mall, GL - 11, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: MARIA QAISER
Review:
This cafe has the most soothing vibe ever, the food and coffee combo is a must try!
My personal favourites were Avocado special dishes, those super yummy.

Name: Analog Coffee & Kitchen
Address: Ground Floor, Crosspoint Mall, GL - 11, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Palansh Agarwal
Review: This cafe is a gem! The ambiance is cozy and perfect for relaxing or getting some work done. Their Avocado Specials are absolutely to die for — fresh, flavorful, and perfectly prepared! Whether you're trying their avocado toast, salads, or shakes, you can taste the quality and care in every bite. The staff is friendly, and the service is top-notch. A must-visit for anyone who loves good food and great vibes!

Name: Analog Coffee & Kitchen
Address: Ground Floor, Crosspoint Mall, GL - 11, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Sahibdeep Singh
Review:
OG cafe vibes, relaxed and cozy.

Love their Avacado preps, especially the Avacado Papdi. Great place for a bite and discussions.

Name: Analog Coffee & Kitchen
Address: Ground Floor, Crosspoint Mall, GL - 11, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Sania Sakhuja
Review: A hidden gem and the food and beverages are really nice, the right combination of taste with healthy bites. A must visit!

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Mehrauli 1AQ
Address: 1AQ, near Qutab Minar, Seth Sarai, Mehrauli, New Delhi
Author: Vatsal G
Review:
The place was crowded on our last visit on Sunday evening but we got a table on the rooftop. The ambience of this place is okay.

Food quality was excellent especially pastas and coffee. However the service was extremely slow and we had to keep reminding the waiter to get our ordered food. They seriously need to hire more waiters to improve service.

There is ample Parking space available inside.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Mehrauli 1AQ
Address: 1AQ, near Qutab Minar, Seth Sarai, Mehrauli, New Delhi
Author: Cuisineo By Chef's Kitchen Caterers
Review: It has an excellent location near Mehrauli. We were 7 people for a breakfast meeting. Coffee, smoked chicken ham croissant, litchi drink, pancakes, sourdough open sandwiches all were good.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Mehrauli 1AQ
Address: 1AQ, near Qutab Minar, Seth Sarai, Mehrauli, New Delhi
Author: yuvraj tiwari
Review: Best coffee in the world + great ambience and amazing location( if you’re visiting Qutub Minar)

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Mehrauli 1AQ
Address: 1AQ, near Qutab Minar, Seth Sarai, Mehrauli, New Delhi
Author: Mohit bhagchandani
Review: Good coffee shop situated in a very accessible location. It opens at 7 in the morning and most of the coffee options are available at that time. We tried the medium roast flat white and vietnamese iced coffee and both of them had very vibrant flavours. The croissant and cakes were decent as well.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Mehrauli 1AQ
Address: 1AQ, near Qutab Minar, Seth Sarai, Mehrauli, New Delhi
Author: Ayush Verma
Review:
Our visit to Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters in Delhi left us with mixed feelings. While the food we tried was above average, we were disappointed that several items we wanted to order were not available during our visit around 12-12:30 in the afternoon. This limited our choices, and we ended up settling for pancakes and coffee, which were decent but not exceptional, rating around 3.5/5 at best.

Regarding the ambiance, we found the aesthetics of the cafe to be alright, but the reality fell short of the expectations set by the Google images. The cozy atmosphere was pleasant, and we appreciated the option of both indoor and outdoor seating. However, we preferred the inside seating area over the open terrace.

Despite these shortcomings, we must commend the friendly staff who made our experience more enjoyable. Overall, Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters offers a decent spot for a casual coffee outing, but there is room for improvement in terms of menu availability and maintaining consistency with the ambiance portrayed online.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor Atrium, Near, Fortis Hospital Rd, Sector 44, Gurugram
Author: Charu Arora
Review:
Great service, friendly staff, best coffee and food!!
Cheers to Aniket, Neeraj and entire staff for making our coffee experience exceptional!!

My recommendations: orange zest mocha (hot), mocha chocochip (cold) and chilli cheese garlic toast (food)

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor Atrium, Near, Fortis Hospital Rd, Sector 44, Gurugram
Author: Kushagra Mongre
Review:
So I'm not someone who usually write reviews.
But this one time I couldn't help myself to do so.
Hands down one of the best places to have coffee and I'm talking about this specific store. The one at Fortis.

Being a coffee addict all my life, I've always been very picky about things.

That said I want to give a special shout to Ritika, hands down she's the. After a long time someone was able to nail the coffee I like.

Keep up guys☕☕

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor Atrium, Near, Fortis Hospital Rd, Sector 44, Gurugram
Author: Harmit Singh
Review: Amazing staff, definitely overworked. Since the prices that third wave is charging are way higher than regular locations why is this cafe understaffed ? If you are brand conscious than you should properly staff this location. Its a hospital and everyone has a patient admitted or visiting. Why not grow a bond with them and generate loyalty

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor Atrium, Near, Fortis Hospital Rd, Sector 44, Gurugram
Author: Rohit prasad shah
Review:
If you call this Cappuccino then baristas need training. Your barista doesn't even know how to texture the milk. Pls, Train your Baristas. Even after paying a huge amount for coffee if we Don't get Velvety and a clean cup then that's a SHAME ( Look at those FAT bubbles)

I  was impressed with those Barista's Behaviour and patience but this post is Just about coffee.

Train your baristas and this just didn't happen with me in the Fortis branch but I had a similar experience at Third wave 32nd Avenue Gurgaon.

#Trainyourbaristas

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor Atrium, Near, Fortis Hospital Rd, Sector 44, Gurugram
Author: bittoo lata
Review: Had great coffee cappuccino made by gaurav and well maintained staff neeraj served my order with pleasant smile

Name: The Coffee Leaf
Address: Shop No.6, Street 76, Market, near SILICON CITY, Amarpali Silicon City, Sector 76, Noida
Author: Saurabh Chandra
Review: This is a hidden gem for night owls, open until 2am. The ambiance is warm and inviting with a mix of modern and cozy decor. This place is perfect for late-night catching up with friends. Loved their vanilla latte and iced tea. Garlic bread was okay. Whether you're looking to unwind after a long day or catch up with friends,  this is the ideal spot.

Name: The Coffee Leaf
Address: Shop No.6, Street 76, Market, near SILICON CITY, Amarpali Silicon City, Sector 76, Noida
Author: neha gusain
Review:
Amazing food, cosy vibe and decent price. I have got my place fixed for weekends now.
Their waffles were to die for.. 🫠

Name: The Coffee Leaf
Address: Shop No.6, Street 76, Market, near SILICON CITY, Amarpali Silicon City, Sector 76, Noida
Author: Yatesh Kumar
Review: I’m obsessed with The Coffee Leaf decor and amazing food. I went there for lunch and spent the most wonderful afternoon. The staff, the vibe and the overall ambiance is so relaxing and inviting. I highly recommend to try their coffees, they’re just amazing. Very varied menu with lot of options for everyone.

Name: The Coffee Leaf
Address: Shop No.6, Street 76, Market, near SILICON CITY, Amarpali Silicon City, Sector 76, Noida
Author: Indian.Travel.Bloggers
Review:
One of the finest cafes i visited recently in sector 76 Noida. I was in search of some cafes which serves the best coffee n red velvet cake so i googled n found this place on top. Oh my god the cake n every item i tasted was so yummy n should be tried once.. I would recommend the drooling dessert n food items to every foodie who visits Noida. Will come back soon. Cheers ..

Follow on insta - Indian.travel.blogger
Youtube - NJ FOODIE TRAVELLER

Name: The Coffee Leaf
Address: Shop No.6, Street 76, Market, near SILICON CITY, Amarpali Silicon City, Sector 76, Noida
Author: Vaishnavi Gupta
Review:
The food, the ambience, the service.. everything is top notch 😍❤️
The staff is very polite, and also would genuinely recommend you as per your taste.
The order took a bit time but was so worth it. You will genuinely appreciate and love this place.

I had shakes, pizza and pasta here. And i can’t wait to go back again 😋👍🏻

Name: Hi coffee
Address: Gabha khothi, New Colony, Sector 7, Gurugram
Author: Bajrangi Musham

Name: Hi coffee
