Author: Rajan Kumar
Review: Nice coffee & moktails

Name: Hi coffee
Address: Gabha khothi, New Colony, Sector 7, Gurugram
Author: Shikendar Shikendar
Review: Nice mocktail

Name: Hi coffee
Address: Gabha khothi, New Colony, Sector 7, Gurugram
Author: winod chawan
Review: Well manged cafe, traind staff good service

Name: Hi coffee
Address: Gabha khothi, New Colony, Sector 7, Gurugram
Author: Ranveer Shinde
Review:
Good place to visit.
Must go.

Name: Coffee-Home
Address: 262 BK, Baba Kharak Singh Rd, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: The Guide
Review: This is a very old establishment in cannaught place, and still run by govt resources hence the prices are quite reasonable. They have indoor and outdoor seating. The food is good, south indian Verity is there.

Name: Coffee-Home
Address: 262 BK, Baba Kharak Singh Rd, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Akash Sharma
Review: We recently visited Coffee Home CP and tried the dosa along with tea and coffee. The food was quite average—nothing special or memorable. The sitting arrangements are interesting, with cozy indoor seating and an outdoor option that’s only comfortable during winters. It’s a unique spot for the location, but the food is just okay, without any wow factor.

Name: Coffee-Home
Address: 262 BK, Baba Kharak Singh Rd, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Ravneet Singh
Review:
The place is lively (it's a veg restaurant )
Restaurant is budget friendly
Good space to sit both indoor and outdoor
Food is not that great, we tried cutlet,dosa, noodles (50rs half plate ) and coffee ( they give you machine coffee for 30rs)

Name: Coffee-Home
Address: 262 BK, Baba Kharak Singh Rd, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Ranveer Pratap Singh
Review:
Probably the most affordable and value for money place near CP. Nearest metro is Rajiv chowk. Take the exit at Gate number 7, from there it is at distance of just 10 minutes walk.
1. The place is very neat and clean
2. Uttapam was tasty, dosa was average. Coffee was also good. You will get varieties of coffee here
3. You've to take a coupon for your order, this place is usually very full so you may have to wait in the line
4. The best thing about this place is it's outdoor dining area.
Highly recommend to everyone especially those who are looking for a budget friendly eatery near CP.

Name: Coffee-Home
Address: 262 BK, Baba Kharak Singh Rd, Connaught Place, New Delhi
Author: Tanya Sharma
Review: Awesome place to hang out with friends or family or anyone I would say. Filter coffee is a must try. All food is reasonable. Meal options could not be counted as it's just a cafe for chilling and sipping. Idli, Vada, cutlet or noodles must try.

Name: Tan Coffee
Address: Shop No 8 & 9, Surya Mansion, 1, Chaudhary Dilip Singh Marg, Kaushalya Park, Padmini Enclave, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: karan kukreja
Review:
This is 60% ice. I paid Rs. 305/- for a drink which was 60% ice and could barely feel i had anything. I should have clicked one after i finished the very limited coffee to show the volume of ice but i somehow missed it since i went to the counter to express my concern. I was told that it is how they are asked to prepare and people usually ask for more ice ( not sure who those idiots are) . My caution to you - If you are going , please ask for ice separately so that you dont end up with 2 sips of coffee and 60% of ice in your drink .

Ambience was good , staff was polite , but coffee is a scam ! It wont hurt to give bigger glasses to give some respectable quantities while ensuring you give all the ice you want !

Name: Tan Coffee
Address: Shop No 8 & 9, Surya Mansion, 1, Chaudhary Dilip Singh Marg, Kaushalya Park, Padmini Enclave, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Sanskruti Tiwari
Review:
Scrumptious food! Polite staff.
Would definitely recommend fries (comes with good quantity),  Irish Americano and iced latte, pasta ( white sauce ).

Name: Tan Coffee
Address: Shop No 8 & 9, Surya Mansion, 1, Chaudhary Dilip Singh Marg, Kaushalya Park, Padmini Enclave, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Yashwardhan Singh
Review:
Amazing food, service and atmosphere! 5 stars for their coffee! Another 5 stars for their service!

🙏 The first thing which hits brings you here is the warm and courteous staff, who are friendly enough to exchange smiles every time you interact with them.

☕ The menu is nice - neither too large nor too restrictive - with a few different selections of coffees for you to try. I tried the Kerala Cinnamon coffee and it was really good - neither too strong on the cinnamon but not too light either, so you are left with a nice and light after-taste of the cinnamon.

I also had their rolls/ wrap - the crispy chicken roll is recommended. They serve different sauces/dips with different rolls you order (a more Lebanese style roll may get you the hummus).

The cafe itself is located at a very nice location right on the road so it's easy to spot.

🏏 When I visited, they were screening cricket matches on their projector screen/ wall, which made for a nice ambience. They do have both outside and inside seating, with the inside seating being slightly small in space.

Zomato gold is applicable here for a good 10% discount.

Name: Tan Coffee
Address: Shop No 8 & 9, Surya Mansion, 1, Chaudhary Dilip Singh Marg, Kaushalya Park, Padmini Enclave, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Nishant Rao Guvvada
Review:
OVERALL : 4 STARS

We had a Hazelnut Latte and a Bounty Coconut Latte. Both of our orders were delicious.

FOOD : The lattes were great. The menu had a lot of variety. A lot of options for breakfast as well.

SERVICE : The order came up in 5 minutes. The staff were friendly and very well mannered.

LOCATION: We went to the Hauz Khas outlet. It was small but beautiful and cozy.

Name: Tan Coffee
Address: Shop No 8 & 9, Surya Mansion, 1, Chaudhary Dilip Singh Marg, Kaushalya Park, Padmini Enclave, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Mohit Saini
Review:
✨Tan coffee has a huge selection of regular, flavored and seasonal coffees, teas, as well as shakes, smoothies and fresh juices.

✨The menu boasts a variety of coffee options, from velvety lattes to robust espressos.

✨Must try there Burger 🍔 Bubble Tea 🧋 Cheesecake🧀 🍰

❤️Highly recommended place. Must go for it💯❤️

✨With impeccable service, great ambience, warm and comfortable interiors, a welcoming environment and a scrumptious menu, we recommend you to try them out soon💯

😋Taste:- 5/5
📽Presentation:- 5/5
🎶 Music & Ambience 5/5
📔Delivery - 5/5
🛋Seating - 5/5
💸Value for Money: 5/5

✨Follow for more on Instagram @Foodie_HR26

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Flat No 46, First Floor, Khan Market, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Ashesh Bharadwaj
Review:
The food was excellent and the service was great. The staff was courteous and friendly. Chilli cheese garlic toast and Toffee Nut Frappe was delicious.

The stair climb is steep. There are two floors. The upper level has better seating. There is also a washroom.

Overall a wonderful experience.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Flat No 46, First Floor, Khan Market, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Ashley Fattig
Review:
This place has great coffee with so many alternative milk options, and the food is great! I love the paneer bites. So affordable, tasty, and clean. Sarveswari gave amazing service! She is fairly new but is so kind, accommodating and easy to talk to.
The music and vibe is great too—wonderful ambiance for a rainy day. Will be sure to eat here when stopping by the Khan Market!!!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Flat No 46, First Floor, Khan Market, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Randy Roberts
Review:
The ambience is warm and inviting.  It is perfectly designed for both relaxed solo visits and lively conversations with friends. The soft lighting and comfortable seating create a welcoming atmosphere that makes you want to linger over your coffee.
The staff are incredibly attentive and friendly, going out of their way to make sure every guest feels valued.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Flat No 46, First Floor, Khan Market, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Urmi Mukerji
Review: We had an excellent experience at this location. Sarveshwari was especially attentive and went above and beyond to ensure that we were satisfied with our drinks. We also appreciated the availability of alternative milk options, which were able to be used in all our drinks of choice.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Flat No 46, First Floor, Khan Market, Chanakyapuri, New Delhi
Author: Kudrat Gill
Review: I recently visited Third Wave Coffee on a weekday afternoon for a quick bite. As a die-hard fan of salted mocha, Deepali, the cashier, recommended trying the iced version, and I was pleasantly surprised by how delicious it was. Arman skillfully crafted my drink, and I was thoroughly impressed. The outlet is clean, the service is excellent, making it a perfect pit stop while shopping at Khan Market !

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Block E2, Main, Hauz Khas Market, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: RAHUL KEN SYLVESTER
Review: Mr. Ajeet and other staff really helped us out with the food and beverages. The food was made fresh and warm. The coffee was bold and fresh as well. The atmosphere is very calming, the space is pretty opened up and spacious! Love the Peppery Chicken Sandwich!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Block E2, Main, Hauz Khas Market, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Abhilasha Negi
Review:
It is s a fantastic choice for coffee lovers, known for its high-quality, artisanal brews. The atmosphere is cozy, but the outlet is small with limited seating, so it might be a tight squeeze during peak hours.
Consider visiting at quieter times or opting for takeout if space is an issue.

Cons-
Less seating
No parking

Pros-
Sweet staff
Great service

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Block E2, Main, Hauz Khas Market, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: mutton legs !!
Review:
my first time at this place, the review will be short and quick ☆ !
1. pricing is great honestly for the portions you're getting. order two dishes if you're three or less than three lol :)
2. i really loved the mocha toffee nut frappe. I usually don't have cold drinks at caffes but this was so delicious.
im not sure if this place is underrated ( don't think it is) but make sure to visit and try the drinks! they make it really well.
3. ambience is very nice, it's lively and hearing people talk is actually nice.
overall, my experience is a 9/10. Im not sure why im not giving it a full but maybe there was something lacking. 🤔
Also, went there for dinner on a Saturday night. keeping that in mind, it was still easy to find a seat.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Block E2, Main, Hauz Khas Market, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: Aaryaan deveda
Review: The food was great and the staff was very friendly( anand who served me, was extremely sweet.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Block E2, Main, Hauz Khas Market, Hauz Khas, New Delhi
Author: shaktiki sharma
Review: Awesome place! Lovely ambience... Best staff. Kiran made sure i got my fav mocha despite a mistake in my ordering.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: G1, Ground Floor, Suncity Business Tower, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: Amit Varma
Review: Third Wave Coffee in Suncity is a delightful haven for coffee lovers, offering a warm and cozy atmosphere that's perfect for a relaxing coffee break or a casual catch-up with friends. The café boasts a menu with a wide range of coffee options, from classic espresso-based drinks to unique and expertly brewed pour-overs. The baristas are skilled and passionate, ensuring that every cup is crafted to perfection. The ambiance, with its modern yet comfortable design, creates a welcoming space where you can unwind or work peacefully. The food menu is equally impressive, featuring fresh, well-prepared dishes that complement the coffee experience. While it can get a bit busy during peak hours, the quality of coffee and service makes it worth the visit. Overall, Third Wave Coffee in Suncity is a must-visit for anyone looking to enjoy a high-quality coffee experience in a pleasant setting.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: G1, Ground Floor, Suncity Business Tower, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: madhu sudan behera
Review:
Horrible Staff, worst experience because of  unprofessional behaviour from local support and staff.👎👎👎🙏🙏🙏

In one month this service is  decrease too much. Local staff pressurize us  for choices and take away service not for dining. unprofessional behaviour with old-age people.
It was the worst experience at third wave coffee.* BIG NO*

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: G1, Ground Floor, Suncity Business Tower, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: Neelam Rawat
Review:
I used to be a big fan of third wave coffee, ever since they started new outlet on golf course rd, Sec 54, ggn (2023) but lately my multiple experiences have suggested me not to go there again!

1. Fluctuating taste everytime (classic cold coffee). They have zero control on putting sugar, no matter how many times I tell them to put less sugar, they are unable to follow. Recently, they have started adding thick cream to the recipe too which is a big no!

2. Big problem is with thier ambiance! I have many times encountered a fly is sitting on the edge of my drinking cup or getting inside the straw. Such things actually ruin my mind.

3. Price increase: This wasn’t necessary at this point of time, if you increase your price customer expects something better in return but what we are getting is worse! Recent price increase doesn’t justify the premium.

I am writing this, not just to complain but intention is more on pushing 3rd wave coffee back to the original taste they have started with.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: G1, Ground Floor, Suncity Business Tower, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: Parna Roy
Review: The ambience , the quality of coffee and the service is excellent . It is a beautiful place for your evening coffee. Coming here since so long and it is my favourite go to place . The best staff is Mr . Ravinder , he makes sure that we are taken care of . He always greets us with a big smile .

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: G1, Ground Floor, Suncity Business Tower, Golf Course Rd, Suncity, Sector 54, Gurugram
Author: Ashish Jangir
Review: Third Wave Coffee is my go-to coffee shop, open 24/7. Their coffee is incredible, and their bagels are always fresh. I love their classic frappes and shakes, which are perfect treats any time of day. The ambience is cozy and inviting, with a mix of people working, families, and friends hanging out. Highly recommended for great coffee and a welcoming atmosphere!

Name: Starbucks
Address: UA No-25, Block UA, Jawahar Nagar, Malka Ganj, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Khush Gurjar
Review: Had a fantastic time at Starbucks with my frnd pradeep bhai ❣️!! We enjoyed delicious coffee and shared lots of laughs in the cozy atmosphere. A perfect spot for creating great memories together!! ✅

Name: Starbucks
Address: UA No-25, Block UA, Jawahar Nagar, Malka Ganj, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Poppy Haruethaivijitchok
Review: I feel at ease and safe being here at Starbucks Kamla nagar. Such a great place to relax / read or study. The staffs here are very caring☺️

Name: Starbucks
Address: UA No-25, Block UA, Jawahar Nagar, Malka Ganj, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Kanav Desai
Review: Be careful what size you order. I wanted a medium coffee. They have 5 different sizes. The barista Muskan informed me that the medium size is grande (4/5) . Apparently tall is smaller than the medium.

Name: Starbucks
Address: UA No-25, Block UA, Jawahar Nagar, Malka Ganj, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Taniya Pawar
Review:
It was a 10/10 experience for me i took my little sister with me as it was her bday eve the staff was very nice and gave us a pleasant experience the attendant who took my order was also very cooperative as i have seen few first time visitors and they were explaining everything to them calmly without getting annoyed.
I ordered one cold coffee and one java chip and the taste was amazing worth it .
Ambiance was also good , easily accessible location.
Great experience.

Name: Starbucks
Address: UA No-25, Block UA, Jawahar Nagar, Malka Ganj, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Sumit Vashista
Review:
Dono hi kalaiyon mei chaandi hai saji!

It is just for good coffee with some good staff! Other food stuffs like burgers or patties or cookies are just below average.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Phase 1, Spectrum Mall, Unit No 9A, 9C & 9D, Plot C&D, Gardenia Gateway, Sector 75, Noida
Author: J Dehal
Review: Nice small coffee shop. They have good option to choose from. Service level is good. Quality of food and coffee was good. Place is very neat and clean.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Phase 1, Spectrum Mall, Unit No 9A, 9C & 9D, Plot C&D, Gardenia Gateway, Sector 75, Noida
Author: Divyanshu Kumar
Review: Finest place in noida to have a good quality of cafe and snacks.. They also serve a good quality of icecream specially salted caramel... Its Mouthwatering totally.. A cozy cafe with ample amount of space.. Staff are very friendly and guide to the best.. Highly recommended place to go with your friends and family

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Phase 1, Spectrum Mall, Unit No 9A, 9C & 9D, Plot C&D, Gardenia Gateway, Sector 75, Noida
Author: Vikram Chakrabarty
Review: Love the Third Wave coffee shop at Spectrum mall, Noida. The staff is also friendly and courteous! Had a great experience with Anshu!

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Phase 1, Spectrum Mall, Unit No 9A, 9C & 9D, Plot C&D, Gardenia Gateway, Sector 75, Noida
Author: Shruti Hans
Review:
Their coffee and mushroom cheese croissant made our day.
Nice ambience, staff and interiors.

Name: Third Wave Coffee
Address: Ground Floor, Phase 1, Spectrum Mall, Unit No 9A, 9C & 9D, Plot C&D, Gardenia Gateway, Sector 75, Noida
Author: Divyanshu Tyagi
Review:
Stepping into the Third Wave Coffee Outlet was like entering a haven for coffee enthusiasts. From the moment I walked in, the aroma of freshly roasted beans filled the air, setting the stage for a remarkable coffee experience. The minimalist decor, with sleek wooden furniture and soft ambient lighting, created a cozy yet modern atmosphere perfect for indulging in a cup of java.

The menu boasted an impressive selection of single-origin coffees, each meticulously brewed to perfection by skilled baristas. I opted for their Ethiopian Yirgacheffe pour-over, and I was blown away by the depth of flavor and delicate notes of citrus and floral undertones. It was evident that every aspect of the brewing process was carefully curated to bring out the best in each bean.

Aside from their exceptional coffee offerings, the staff's passion and knowledge further elevated the experience. They were eager to share their expertise, offering recommendations based on individual preferences and ensuring that every customer left satisfied.

While the prices were on the higher end, the quality and attention to detail more than justified the cost. Overall, Third Wave Coffee Outlet exceeded my expectations, delivering an unforgettable coffee experience that I would gladly revisit time and time again.

The best part is location is amazing, neat and clean environment. Parking is more than enough.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Saket
Address: Ground Floor, Unit No 1 & 2, Rectangle Building 1, R-1, South, Saket District Centre, District Centre, Sector 6, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Darrell
Review:
As a home brewer who’s picky about coffee, I’ve found it hard to discover good specialty cafes around Delhi, but Blue Tokai delivers. Their selection of Indian beans, especially the light roasted options, impressed me.

Samrip was great at introducing different profiles. Highly recommend for any coffee lover!

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Saket
Address: Ground Floor, Unit No 1 & 2, Rectangle Building 1, R-1, South, Saket District Centre, District Centre, Sector 6, Saket, New Delhi
Author: kartiki paralkar
Review:
A tiny little spot nestled in between the huge commercial complexes in Saket . This is a bookstore and a coffee shop which becomes a paradise for book lovers and coffee enthusiasts.
Absolutely friendly staff and great coffee. Highly recommended.

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Saket
Address: Ground Floor, Unit No 1 & 2, Rectangle Building 1, R-1, South, Saket District Centre, District Centre, Sector 6, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Nikhil Kamath
Review:
A beautiful cafe located inside the Bahrisons Bookstore outside DLF Avenue.

One of my favourite places to work from or hang out at. The place inside the bookstore has a small Blue Tokai Coffee Outlet with very limited seating. The service here is quick and since the operation here is small, they have very limited stock of items.

What I love about this place is the ambience. The smell of fresh coffee and books is just wonderful.

One drawback is that there is no washroom in this outlet, so you cannot sit and work from here for long hours. You have to visit the mall to use the washroom.

Overall, if you're looking to grab a coffee and read some books, then this is the place you want to check out!

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Saket
Address: Ground Floor, Unit No 1 & 2, Rectangle Building 1, R-1, South, Saket District Centre, District Centre, Sector 6, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Satvinder Singh
Review: Books, coffee and a silent place to read them, it's heaven for book lovers. The staff members are very welcoming and good i have had the best Vietnamese Coffee in India here and their barista (Monika)  served the best cascara i had in all Blue Tokai Outlet must visit place

Name: Blue Tokai Coffee Roasters | Saket
Address: Ground Floor, Unit No 1 & 2, Rectangle Building 1, R-1, South, Saket District Centre, District Centre, Sector 6, Saket, New Delhi
Author: Samapan - Sam Sarkar
Review:
The Blue Tokai coffee shop shares the space with the Bahari & Sons Bookshop which makes it a wonderful place to enjoy a cup of coffee ☕ or snacks while browsing through the numerous books lining one side of the wall. The collection of books varies from fiction, non-fiction, classics, poetry, travel, business, yoga, life improvement, mental health, etc.

The best thing is that if you do not find a book you have in mind to purchase then you can always place an order for it. No advance payment is required. Once the book is available you will be contacted and likewise you can drop by to pick it up. I have ordered some books that were hard to find and got them from this bookshop.

Note: Please understand that this is not a recommended practice to order educational books for students from this bookshop. However, you will find books here that may assist you with job related stuff which can be used as a reference.

Unfortunately, people think that all bookshops are alike and may end up looking for CBSE, ICSE, higher education (XI, XII, Graduation level) books 📚 in this shop.

Name: Nothing Before Coffee
Address: 2524 ground floor, Hudson Lane, GTB Nagar, Delhi
Author: Nikhil Kalra
Review: The parking is a little hectic at peak time. We ordered Hazzlenut frappe, the only one that had fine taste. Then we ordered a black current mocktail and was very sweet in taste. Beyond the food and beverages, I found the café to be an inviting space for various activities. The seating arrangements were comfortable and conducive to both focused work sessions and casual conversations. Whether one desires a productive environment for remote work or a cozy spot for catching up with friends, the café's ambiance caters to diverse needs.
Overall, my experience at the café was positive, and I would recommend it to others seeking a welcoming atmosphere, delicious coffee, and a versatile space for various activities. I look forward to returning soon to explore more of what the café has to offer.

Name: Ngarum Coffee
Address: R-004, 2nd Floor, DLF Galleria Rd, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Vinay Chand
Review:
A few days ago I decided to give this place a try. With generally good reviews and some hype, also the pictures making it look kind of cool, I thought it'll be a nice place to go for coffee with my wife. So we went , and I ordered their signature blue pea iced latte while my wife ordered a simple cappuccino. Everything seemed going well, but towards the end of my glass,  I found something in the coffee went into my mouth, initially thought it was just a coffee bean not ground enough, but to my horror, it was a fly. Shocked, trying hard not to gag, but did so anyway, we raised a complaint. However, the management seemed unperturbed like it was a usual every day thing, didn't even really apologise and I asked for the managers number. And spoke to her, again being from the restaurant industry I know how restaurants handle such a thing and either way the staff of the said establishment should atleast go out of their way to apologise for the incident. Instead, shockingly they asked me what I want from them. Ummm, a sorry would do ?

In the end, I was offered a replacement or a fresh brew to which I refused and I was handed over a bill for the cappuccino which we didn't even have. And after raising an issue they finally removed the bill.
We left the restaurant with nothing but a bad taste and sick feeling in the gut.
Will definitely never visit again!!

Name: Ngarum Coffee
Address: R-004, 2nd Floor, DLF Galleria Rd, DLF Phase IV, Gurugram
Author: Mrinal Maheshwari
Review:

Review: Loved the cozy vibe of Tan. The coffee was fantastic, and the food was fresh and flavourful. Lived there Red sauce pasta. The staff was friendly and served was quick. Perfect spot for coffee lovers and to catchup with friends. Highly recommended👍🏻☕️

Author: Shaurya Singh
Review: I recently visited Tan Coffee House with my friends. It's indeed a Great place to hangout with friends and have a cup of coffee. Author: Khushboo Sharma
Review:

Tan Coffee House is definitely a place I’ll be returning to, and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for great coffee, good vibes, and excellent customer service.

Review: Nice ambience but its self service. So you get the order sir, but you have to go to the counter to order. They don’t collect your order from your table. Shoe rest is good. People are good crowd is good.

Name: Café Coffee Day
Address: 14, opposite CSB Bank ATM, Block B 2B, Janakpuri, New Delhi, Delhi
Author: Bobby Roy
Review:
Extremely slow service, to start with. It took them all of 15-17 minutes to get ONE frappe that we had ordered!

Also, for some reason, they serve coffee in the take away glasses. When asked, their reasoning was, all the glasses had broken or were damaged. I understand, but then, they can raise a request for fresh glasses from CCD, right?

The actual experience of drinking coffee inside the coffee-shop is completely marred by these 2 reasons. Not worth your time, frankly.

On a side note, I did notice a few small cockroaches roaming around on the floor and the walls. It wasn't a pleasant sight. 🤦

Name: Café Coffee Day

i wish they improve their services.

This CCD branch is located on the first floor of a residential building in Janakpuri. It's a cozy cafe with ample sitting space and even an outdoor balcony with seats. Here you can spend time alone and can also come on a date with someone.
I ordered a mojito here and the flavor was good🍹.  Or the staff here is very good and you must visit here once.

Name: The Coffee Shop
Address: Ground Floor, B-106/1, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Subbanshu Jaiin
Review:
I loved the place and Ambience. The owner is too good and he himself take care of customers alongwith his staff. The quality of food is good too. Since i love redbull i tried their "Redbull Brain Freezer" which was fusion of redbull and their secret recipe which resulted in an ultimate drink.

Since i am vegetarian i had their veg sandwich option and the same was cooked well and made with care.

Overall its a very nice cafe with amazing ambience. Currently i am not able to attach any pics since i visited the place solo and didn't click the pics. May be next time i will upload the pics when i will visit with my friends.

Update.on 4th July 2022

Visited the cafe again and this time i tried their black coffee....the aroma and taste of coffee was simply amazing....👍🙂

Update on 5th September 2022
As usual this place is awesome 😎. They are offering some new drinks which are totally worth to try.  I have tried Cold Brew Tonic which was amazing both in terms of taste and presentation.

Update on 28th January 2023

Tried their Hibiscus and Rose Green Tea
It is just amazing. Do try😊👍

Update on 26th May 2023
They have shifted their coffee shop to main road. The area is huge with separate sitting for smokers and non smokers which is quite a new concept.

They have a seating capacity of around 30 people.

The ambience is 😍 amazing.

Their coffee and food is like earlier very amazing.

I have tried their new addition which they called The Coffee Shop Special Espresso, which was amazing.
Also try their Carribbean Espresso

Do visit their new outlet and enjoy their new menu.

If you live near Humayunpur and Safdarjung You can also order online from their app The Coffee Shop. Link you can take it from cafe or by calling the cafe.

Name: The Coffee Shop
Address: Ground Floor, B-106/1, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Madhur Ratawal
Review: Beautiful little cafe, serving cherry blend dark roast coffee at a reasonable price. The food menu is also apt to suit all the meals and they serve a generous quantity. A plate of loaded fries i ordered had to be carried home since me and my friend couldn't finish it then. The owner is quite humble which adds to the good experience as you feel welcome. Will visit again soon.

Name: The Coffee Shop
Address: Ground Floor, B-106/1, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Nicky Lotlai
Review: The Americano here is one of the best Coffee i've tasted, the people working here are warm and friendly. The re-use of plastic packing bowl as ashtray could be improved. This place made my trip a little less boring. Would be a 5 star if the ashtrays are replaced with wooden trays.

Name: The Coffee Shop
Address: Ground Floor, B-106/1, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Mohit Mittal
Review:
They put in a lot of effort but somehow it was below our expectations. We visited this place reading the google reviews of this place and expected a lot. The mocha that we ordered was very light and quite plain in taste despite requesting to make it strong. The blue berry water based beverage was fine. There are so many coffee options but nothing is there that can be called a milk based strong coffee.

Parking is a huge problem. The service is good. Will visit this place sometime again, hopefully they do better next time.

Name: The Coffee Shop
Address: Ground Floor, B-106/1, Humayunpur, Safdarjung Enclave, New Delhi
Author: Anushank Jambhulkar
Review: Great small cafe with great ambient atmospher. A must visit cafe if are going for dates. Food is affordable and serving is also generous but would suggest to look for food quality it's not necessarily bad but is not upto the mark. Besides that had great time here and Coffee brew triple sec was very unique loved it(must try if you are caffeine addict). Oh yah one more thing owner is a really cool guy(The moustache.....Hehe loved it )

Name: Coffee Bond Noida
Address: Shop No 56 Block 1, Ganga Shopping Complex, Sector 29, Noida
Author: Dr. Preeti Chauhan
Review:
I went there on the recommendation of a friend and the ambience was really nice. Lots of greenery open air as well as indoor seating ( limited ) and wrought iron  seating in the open area made for a lovely feel to the place.

The service was very warm and attentive and also helpful in making choices.
We had cappuccinos that came with a complimentary cookie and others ordered hibiscus iced tea and a cold coffee.

The beverages were nice though I cannot say the coffee was premium.

Over all I’d like to visit this place again maybe in the evening , when the lights shimmer through the teas and the the place becomes  even more magical.

Name: Coffee Bond Noida
Address: Shop No 56 Block 1, Ganga Shopping Complex, Sector 29, Noida
Author: Ather Noor
Review: The pita platter at Coffee Bond, Noida is delightful with fresh, soft pita bread and a generous serving of hummus that is creamy and well-seasoned. The cold coffee is refreshing, offering a perfect balance of coffee strength and sweetness. The penne pasta is cooked to perfection with a rich and flavorful sauce that makes it a satisfying dish. Overall, a great place for a casual meal with high-quality offerings.

Name: Coffee Bond Noida
Address: Shop No 56 Block 1, Ganga Shopping Complex, Sector 29, Noida
Author: Mayank Goyal
Review:
Tucked besides Ganga shopping complex in Sector 29, Noida there is this cutesy coffee shop going by name of Coffee Bond. With a lovely and lively ambience the cafe hosts seating both outside and inside. This is one of those places where one can actually hangout with any kind of company, be it with your parents or with your loved ones, maybe siblings or maybe just have some "me time"

Being in awe of the place, we gorged upon mushroom sandwich, grilled chicken steak, along with cold coffee and mocha coffee and ended our meal with chocolate pancakes. The food was top notch in respect of quantity, quality and taste. The steak was lovely and cooked beautifully and the drinks were also perfect. However the highlight of the evening was the mushroom sandwich and definitely a must try for all.

A special thanks to the entire staff who made sure our requests were adhered to and that we had a lovely dining experience.

All in all, its a great coffee shop. Will be visiting again very soon.

Cheers ;)

Name: Coffee Bond Noida
Address: Shop No 56 Block 1, Ganga Shopping Complex, Sector 29, Noida
Author: Nomadious kid
Review: Recently visited the coffee bond in noida sec 29 and it was a great experience 😊. I had loaded fries, barbecue chicken pizza, pan cake, chicken platter and this things was really amazing. Great place for date highly recommend.

Name: Coffee Bond Noida
Address: Shop No 56 Block 1, Ganga Shopping Complex, Sector 29, Noida
Author: jaskaran singh
Review:
Right next to famous bharamputra market the place offers decent coffee experience with good options of food as well.  We had coconut cold brew which is essentially a cold brew with coconut water it was well brewed, the sandwiches are sourdough but the portion size is quite small as comapred to the price range.

White sauce pasta was average, orange marmalade pancakes missed the mark as well. Cold coffee was good .

Overall a decent experience,  with good outdoor seating and great staff.

Name: Jing Fun Veggie Cafe
Address: X79W+49C, Wanquanzhuang Rd, Haidian District
Author: 의지
Review:
[Location] Wanliu Middle Road, a small facade. The signboard is eye-catching enough~ Once you go up to the second floor! Went there at 2:30 in the afternoon and there was no one there... You can choose your seat at will, so happy!

[Dishes] His menu is very interesting. In addition to the names and prices of the dishes, some will also focus on the ingredients and add a few jokes~ In the end, two people ordered: #flaxseed grilled cornflakes#, #Tomato and Perilla Soup# , #老舜肉草#, #狗鱼鱼#, # onionmushroom panini#, #EGEFLESSTIRAMISU#. Let’s talk about them respectively:

#flaxseedgrilledcornflakes# 22 yuan, the baked cornflakes are a bit hard and a bit dry. But when it was first served, I was attracted by its bright color. It is good to eat as a snack. Since the cornflakes themselves have no taste, they are also suitable to be eaten with sauce~

#TomatoPerillaSoup# 22 yuan, I was attracted by the sentence on the menu, "Amateurs should take some warm food to neutralize the cold. Perilla is a good choice." Well, before this, I had no idea what perilla was, and I still don’t. But when the soup was served, it was red and seemed to have more tomatoes. Does it taste like borscht? All in all, it’s sour and spicy (peppery), very appetizing~~

#老舜肉丝草# 30 yuan, ordered by a friend. It is said to be the main product of our store, but I don't like the color... I tasted it, and I don't like it very much... all the ingredients are chopped into super fine pieces... and the lovely texture of the ingredients itself is lost.

#vinegar sauce fish# 39 yuan. When it was served, Weiwei was a little skeptical. Although it is called a fish, it only looks like a 7 or 8-point fish. Can this really satisfy the needs of meat eaters? I took a bite~~~I’m going! ! ! I can’t tell that I’m on a vegetarian diet~~~It’s so delicious~~~ One bite after another while it’s hot, I just can’t stop. The fish skin made of bean skin and seaweed cleverly creates the shape of the fish and the unique taste of the animals that live in the ocean. This idea is simply brilliant! ! Eat it while it's hot, I think all it needs is a bowl of rice.

#OnionMushroomPanini# 35 yuan, looks very cute. Taste...ok! ! I have no idea what that ham-like layer is made of. Not only does it have the flavor of smoked ham, but the texture is so realistic... coupled with the lovely texture of mushrooms... this panini couldn't be more delicious!

# eggless tiramisu# It feels like a very ordinary tiramisu~ I can’t tell the difference from cake shops outside. Well, a little small.

[Service] There is a service button on the seat. It is quite convenient to press it when needed.

To sum up, this store really exceeded my expectations. As a first-time vegetarian, this restaurant left a very good impression on me. After eating, not only the stomach is satisfied, but also the mood is very happy. The most important thing is that my body feels very refreshed the next day ~ I will come back if I have the chance! Try it again~

Name: Mansion Tea House
Address: 1 Chaoyanggongyuan W Rd, Chaoyang
Author: Xin Jiang
Review:
One word to describe the overall experience is, exquisite!
From the environment, service, and dishes, you can feel the merchant's intentions.

--about location--
It is located deep in the community and is a little difficult to find, but it is right on the roadside and can be found easily according to the map in the review.

--About the environment--
There is nothing mysterious about it from the outside. The houses decorated with wooden facades are indeed in the style of a tea house. When entering the inner courtyard, the first thing I saw was various tea art related things, and I didn't think that this was a place to eat. Walking inside, I discovered that there are small cubicles here, which are suitable for tea tasting and food. The most important thing is that they are suitable for small gatherings. The cubicle space is very spacious and comfortable, and the leather chairs are comfortable to sit on. It always feels like a lot of business worth tens of millions of dollars has been negotiated in these rooms.

--About the dishes--
In every dish, you can feel the freshness of the ingredients, the exquisite cooking, and the care in presentation. This cuisine should be classified as creative cuisine, covering various categories. The surprising thing about a restaurant is that it can take common dishes and make them extraordinary, and here they do. for example,
#台式三杯鸡# When I first saw the menu, it was the dish I had the least expectations for. You can eat it anywhere, but the first bite you took here made you marvel at how the taste was just right and ordinary, and the ingredients used were all fresh. Bone-in chicken, you don’t have to worry about the bones, the chicken itself is tender and delicious.
#王fucrispy ears# I don’t know what it is made of, but it should be pig ears. As a cold dish, it tastes crisp and chewy, and it satisfies the appetite.
# nourishing mountain spring soaked winter chrysanthemum # A soup made from radish and cordyceps flowers, which is very suitable for drinking in winter. The soup itself does not have an overly strong taste, and is light and umami in the mouth.
#奇伟牛综合肉# The beef is very soft and tender, which is rare. If you like black pepper, you can try it. From visual inspection and oral evaluation, I think this dish is expensive because the meat quality is very good.
Another porridge is very impressive. It is said to be made from quinoa and paired with millet. The whole grain is healthy and has a strong taste. It is suitable for trying to make it at home.
In addition, people also like the various snacks and staple foods such as yogurt, because the ingredients are really carefully used. Later, after asking the waiter, I found out that they have their own planting base. Regardless of whether they are organic or not, at least the quality control is in their own hands. How much? You will feel much more at ease.

--About service--
There are three drinks upon entering, lemonade, hibiscus drink, and ordinary tea, which are both stomach-warming and heart-warming.
Not to mention the kind, courteous and attentive service provided by the waiters from beginning to end. They will tap the door lightly when entering. These details are bonus points for the quality of service. Putting aside the environment and dishes, the service alone can only be rated as a full score. After all, eating should also be enjoyable.

To sum up, this restaurant is very attentive in all aspects, and it is a place where you don’t have to worry about making mistakes. If you like creative Chinese cuisine or need a quiet environment, this place is definitely worth trying.

Name: Dashanqing Tea House
Address: 79 Nanchizi Ave, Dongcheng
Author: Shekhar Pradhan
Review: I was in Beijing last week at the Forbidden City entrance. Two women approached me and said they wanted to practice their English. Their English names, allegedly, are Sofia and Shirley. They suggested we get a cup of coffee to talk. I was led to the Dashaqing Tea House. Once we entered we were immediately led to a private room. The ladies ordered two pots of tea which cost around $80. It was really crappy tea--no way it could cost that much. Watch out for Sofia and Shirley.

Name: Dashanqing Tea House
Address: 79 Nanchizi Ave, Dongcheng
Author: Eric Harness
Review: I was scammed at this tea house for $253 USD.  We ordered 2 cups of Coffee, 2 glasses of Tea, and 2 Glasses of Wine.  It appears they scam a lot of people with their prices.  I am working with the Credit card company to dispute.  They can understand a lot of the English up until the point the bill comes then they bring out the strong men and We don't know English starts.

Name: Dashanqing Tea House
Address: 79 Nanchizi Ave, Dongcheng
Author: Ben and Sarah B
Review:
My girlfriend and I were scammed here for $250 US in Febuary 2015. An employee at the Hutong Inn hostel introduced the scammer that took us here.

This teahouse's employees are very aggressive. They basically were grabbing at my girlfriend's purse to see how much money she really had in it. We just wanted out of here.

Calling the police is not always an effective solution. The beijing police did nothing for us. They could not recover any of our money. The reason - we signed the credit card reciepts and agreed to pay. This was also the reason our bank was unable to help us recover the money we lost.

An expensive lesson learnt.
We talked to beijing police officers (stationed around Tiananmen square) after this fraud was pulled on us.

They said the people who run the Dashanqing teahouse here "have a lot of friends" and they have a "friends network" apparently streching from China, Henan province all the way to Shanghai.
Which might explain why this scam is not only in beijing, but also in other places.

Avoid this teahouse at all costs. You will lose a lot of money.

Name: Dashanqing Tea House
Address: 79 Nanchizi Ave, Dongcheng
Author: Ashton Giese
Review:
This fake "tea house" is one of 3 in the local area where friendly, smiling girls and guys take unsuspecting tourists to rob them.

They steal credit card information as well as charge ridiculous prices for tea and other drinks and manipulate foreign tourists as well as domestic Chinese into paying for these inflated prices for others.

Do not go here - and don't be tempted inside by all of those friendly faces who are just trying to rob you!!

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Dongcheng
Author: Bernie Macias
Review: Are you a coffee person and by coffee person I mean someone who appreciates very aspect of the experience from the grind to the slow pour. This place is for you.  I've rarely seen someone take such care and handling of coffee.  The cold brew is one of the finest I've every enjoyed.  The atmosphere is lovely and quite.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Dongcheng
Author: ayush maheshwari
Review: great place to be in. 7.5 for cappacino. nice frothing, good beans, but a bit over roasted for my taste.10 on 10 for decor and location. Great place to energise after touristy stuff. post a good cup of coffee you can walk across to the south street.  one of the best places to enjoy culture, food and shopping.  buzzing plane in Beijing.  you should must visit the vicinity of not the cafe.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Dongcheng
Author: Jorge GD
Review: If you are looking for a great coffee experience in the center of Beijing this is your place.  It took me a while to find a good speciality coffee here but this one ticks all the boxes. Wide variety of beans, V60, and nice staff.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Dongcheng
Author: Jonny Fowle
Review: Amazing coffee. Tried a pour-over and the espresso, both of which were excellent. The service was very good as well, the pour-over beans were ground and offered to me to smell before the coffee was made, and served beautifully with an info card about the origin and flavour profile. The best coffee in DongCheng (possibly in Beijing?). Sat at the window and watched people passing through the hutongs. Definitely recommend.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Dongcheng
Author: Luke
Review: Good coffee made in the Australian style - flat white with real milk, latte, long black, etc.. Warm inside in the winter.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Chaoyang, 酒仙桥路4号北京798艺术区内
Author: Mohammed Altamimi T
Review:
Didn't try any food. But had to give it a try .
It's located in ART district a very nice area with lots of stuff to see.Keep in mind it's the only coffee shop that have espresso and piccolo in beijing I guess.as most of them don't have those option.
Good coffee,amazing atmosphere, highly recommended.
If your a fan of bicycle it's also the place to be.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Chaoyang, 酒仙桥路4号北京798艺术区内
Author: Elvis Do
Review: Nice cute spot to rest and energize between all the art pieces and walking. Lots of coffee shops in the area, this is one interesting with an open bike Shop and cool bike stands for the home. Had a hot latte and warmed up pastry, both very good. They had staff that new English and lots of room with wifi to get some work done, if needed. Enjoy !

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Chaoyang, 酒仙桥路4号北京798艺术区内
Author: Elettra Pellanda
Review:
Beautiful post-industrial space with lots of natural light, excellent quality coffee. Some of the staff speak English, all of them are very nice. We had a cappuccino and a "Cherry" brewed coffee (total: 68 yuan) intense flavour and rich perfume, a delight on this freezing December visit. While we were there, an Asian piano-version of European folk and classical music played on a roll.
The same space hosts a (fancy) bike shop too.
Hipster environment but all considered a lovely unusual coffee experience in Beijing.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Chaoyang, 酒仙桥路4号北京798艺术区内
Author: snydroponic
Review: Great service and setting in the bike shop. Had a pour over that was nice but maybe needed a bit more flavor extraction if I'm putting on my coffee snobbery distressed messenger biker hat.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Chaoyang, 酒仙桥路4号北京798艺术区内
Author: Evan Ruan
Review: Wonderful Geisha with tasty tiramisu cake.

Author: Igor Vavilin
Review: „Namoc Coffe“ is located on the territory of National Art Museum of China. Interior is beautiful and atmosphere is very friendly. Here you can buy coffee and have different type of snacks including sweet ones. I found this place amazing especially after visiting museum where I could have a rest. I ordered cappuccino. It was very tasty. The service is very fast. Highly recommend to visit.

Name: Namoc Coffee
Address: 1, Dongcheng, Wusidajie, 1号CN 北京市
Author: Ronron94world
Review: The cafe inside the National Art Museum of China is in the courtyard on the right and is connected to the gift shop. The environment is really good. There are general coffee and specialty coffee to choose from. I ordered a cup of iced latte. It tasted smooth and I really recommend it. It is a very good coffee. If you don't need to make a reservation to enter, it is really suitable to buy a cup every now and then.

Address: 4, Chaoyang, Jiuxianqiao Rd, 4号CN 北京市
Author: Sally Chung
Review: Located at the entrance of the 798 Art District but tucked away in an alley, this cafe is a hidden gem. The ambiance is cool, with quality coffee beans and well-spaced tables that ensure a comfortable experience even when it's busy. The cafe has power outlets and a clean, gender-segregated bathroom. Even the infused lemon drinking water was a nice touch. Though I didn't get to try them, the cakes looked cute and delicious. Highly recommended!

Name: Coffee Bar Restaurant
Address: WCG2+52J, Shatan Back St, Dongcheng
Author: Tim P
Review:
A quirky little cafe with delicious food and kind service, and a perhaps ironically minimalist name. I loved the quirky decor. They even had episodes of Count Duckula - an 80s British children's cartoon - running non stop on one of the screens. It reminded me a little of Budapest ruin bars; a slapdash of furniture and decorations that just seem to work. There's a picture of Napoleon next to a shelf with the Joker and the mask from V for Vendetta.  The food was well prepared, simple staples - of the Western and Chinese kind - nothing special, just well made and tasty.

I think that this is what used to be the Alley Cafe which Google shows as being next door. The pictures looked the same, and when I showed them to the owner they nodded in agreement. There certainly isn't an Alley Cafe there any more that I could find.

Name: Coffee Bar Restaurant
Address: WCG2+52J, Shatan Back St, Dongcheng
Author: Egor Shved
Review: Bombastically atmospheric place! I recommend it to everyone! Tasty and soulful. Relaxation in the center of the metropolis. The closest bar to the Forbidden City!

Address: WCG2+52J, Shatan Back St, Dongcheng

Review:
Very cozy small bar. The staff understands English well.
Cocktails for 88 yuan, delicious snacks: chicken popcorn and nuggets.

Review: After visiting the Forbidden City, I was very hot and tired. Fortunately, I found this cute shop where I could rest, have something to eat to escape the heat, rest and play to regain my energy before going to Jingshan Park to see the scenery.

Review: A hipster coffeeshop feel in the heart of Beijing. The coffee was excellent and locally roasted. Service was fine when I was here. I think people visiting China need to realize service standards are different in Asia. Reasonable prices for a place catering to westerners.

Address: V9WV+96M, Yangmeizhuxie St, Xicheng District

Review: One of my favourite coffee shops of all time. You won’t find high quality coffee like this anywhere in Beijing. Staff are extremely knowledgeable about what they’re actually doing and very accommodating. Man featured here (barista) is superb!

Address: V9WV+96M, Yangmeizhuxie St, Xicheng District
Author: YP
Review: The service here sucks big time. Service staff all seems to have an attitude. Pretentious and obnoxious! Cafe might be good but it is not worth it. I went there with my mum and we ordered coffee. She wanted to just try a chestnut just bought from elsewhere and the staff insisted on taking it away from here and keeping it. Fine, I get that we can't consume outside food there but you just need to tell us nicely and not make my mum uncomfortable. If you read the reviews on Chinese social media sites, you'll see that service is a great issue. Absolutely unprofessional!

Name: Bellagio
Address: 15号R-25 Zhongguancun St, Zhongguancun, Haidian District
Author: Hazem Elhady
Review: In my opinion this is the best place in Beijing to have Taiwanese desert.the quality has been consistent for many years. The food is pretty good as well but I usually come here for the desert and bubble tea. Especially mango desert. The staff is very effecient.prices are not cheap but reasonable.

Name: Bellagio
Address: 15号R-25 Zhongguancun St, Zhongguancun, Haidian District
Author: Forrest Spellman
Review: Bellagio is a China chain and is known for mid-to-high tier quality food at a great price. It was well known for its mango shaved ice and it is absoluelty incredible! We had friendly staff help us order though we did not know any Chinese. Menu has english as well. We ordered Beef Noodle Soup, Kung Pao Chicken, and the shaved ice. Both dishes were savory and delicious, and I feel like this is a great place to go for a good meal.

Name: Bellagio
Address: 15号R-25 Zhongguancun St, Zhongguancun, Haidian District
Author: TZ Cheng
Review: Poached fish with fresh pepper is probably their best dish. When it first opened, it was not in its current location, but a few steps up next door. The decoration style at that time should have been better.

Name: McDonald's
Address: 10 Hongju St, Xicheng District
Author: Phoenix Yew
Review:
Typical Chinese service standard, so don’t expect more.
No international credit card accepted, no English speaking staff.
Food is served half cold, chips is served soft. Because they have problems handle busy hours, so they cook everything in advance and put everything on the side waiting the order to come. I find this is typical for all McDonald’s in China. Since the labor is super cheap in China, why not hire more people to prepare food during the rush hours? What were they thinking?

Name: McDonald's
Address: 10 Hongju St, Xicheng District
Author: Cyriac Edappully
Review: They have self ordering machine where you can place your own orders in English which was nice. Interesting addittions to the is menu.

Name: McDonald's
Address: 10 Hongju St, Xicheng District
Author: Tim Brogan-Shaw (TB-S)
Review: Chinese McDonald’s have some interesting additions to the menu. I tried their bubble tea, not too bad but not as good as on the streets!

Name: McDonald's
Address: 10 Hongju St, Xicheng District
Author: Bruce Fisher
Review: Service was poor.  Went in for breakfast at 10am, only to be told when ordering most of the breakfast menu was unavailable due to them only making so many breakfast meals.  Obviously to hard to cook to order as per any other maccas.  Really disappointing.

Name: McDonald's
Address: 10 Hongju St, Xicheng District
Author: 李亮
Review: It tastes good and the price is very cheap.

Name: KFC
Address: Xicheng District, 前门西大街
Author: Lai Jye Sing
Review: Went to Beijing KFC to see if any different menu from Singapore or Malaysia, but more or less are the same, some special items like bubble tea sundae, and nmod course nice coffee

Name: KFC
Address: Xicheng District, 前门西大街
Author: H Huang
Review: Not only the first KFC, but also the first American fast food in China!

Name: KFC
Address: Xicheng District, 前门西大街
Author: Daniel MAYIT
Review: Why does the food taste like cat and dog ching chong ching chong

Name: KFC
Address: Xicheng District, 前门西大街
Author: Noah King
Review: Does not align with my tastebuds haha. Good show

Name: KFC
Address: Xicheng District, 前门西大街
Author: Quoop Quoop
Review: Weird how this is so close to the Maosoleum

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Dongcheng
Author: Bernie Macias
Review: Are you a coffee person and by coffee person I mean someone who appreciates very aspect of the experience from the grind to the slow pour. This place is for you.  I've rarely seen someone take such care and handling of coffee.  The cold brew is one of the finest I've every enjoyed.  The atmosphere is lovely and quite.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Dongcheng
Author: ayush maheshwari
Review: great place to be in. 7.5 for cappacino. nice frothing, good beans, but a bit over roasted for my taste.10 on 10 for decor and location. Great place to energise after touristy stuff. post a good cup of coffee you can walk across to the south street.  one of the best places to enjoy culture, food and shopping.  buzzing plane in Beijing.  you should must visit the vicinity of not the cafe.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Dongcheng
Author: Jorge GD
Review: If you are looking for a great coffee experience in the center of Beijing this is your place.  It took me a while to find a good speciality coffee here but this one ticks all the boxes. Wide variety of beans, V60, and nice staff.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Dongcheng
Author: Jonny Fowle
Review: Amazing coffee. Tried a pour-over and the espresso, both of which were excellent. The service was very good as well, the pour-over beans were ground and offered to me to smell before the coffee was made, and served beautifully with an info card about the origin and flavour profile. The best coffee in DongCheng (possibly in Beijing?). Sat at the window and watched people passing through the hutongs. Definitely recommend.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Dongcheng
Author: Luke
Review: Good coffee made in the Australian style - flat white with real milk, latte, long black, etc.. Warm inside in the winter.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Chaoyang, 酒仙桥路4号北京798艺术区内
Author: Mohammed Altamimi T
Review:
Didn't try any food. But had to give it a try .
It's located in ART district a very nice area with lots of stuff to see.Keep in mind it's the only coffee shop that have espresso and piccolo in beijing I guess.as most of them don't have those option.
Good coffee,amazing atmosphere, highly recommended.
If your a fan of bicycle it's also the place to be.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Chaoyang, 酒仙桥路4号北京798艺术区内
Author: Elvis Do
Review: Nice cute spot to rest and energize between all the art pieces and walking. Lots of coffee shops in the area, this is one interesting with an open bike Shop and cool bike stands for the home. Had a hot latte and warmed up pastry, both very good. They had staff that new English and lots of room with wifi to get some work done, if needed. Enjoy !

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Chaoyang, 酒仙桥路4号北京798艺术区内
Author: Elettra Pellanda
Review:
Beautiful post-industrial space with lots of natural light, excellent quality coffee. Some of the staff speak English, all of them are very nice. We had a cappuccino and a "Cherry" brewed coffee (total: 68 yuan) intense flavour and rich perfume, a delight on this freezing December visit. While we were there, an Asian piano-version of European folk and classical music played on a roll.
The same space hosts a (fancy) bike shop too.
Hipster environment but all considered a lovely unusual coffee experience in Beijing.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Chaoyang, 酒仙桥路4号北京798艺术区内
Author: snydroponic
Review: Great service and setting in the bike shop. Had a pour over that was nice but maybe needed a bit more flavor extraction if I'm putting on my coffee snobbery distressed messenger biker hat.

Name: Voyage Coffee
Address: Chaoyang, 酒仙桥路4号北京798艺术区内
Author: Evan Ruan
Review: Wonderful Geisha with tasty tiramisu cake.

Name: ESQUIRES COFFEE东方广场店
Address: Beijing, Dongcheng, 东长安街1号德勤大厦1层
Author: Аяна Мункуева

Name: Namoc Coffee
Address: 1, Dongcheng, Wusidajie, 1号CN 北京市
Author: Igor Vavilin
Review: „Namoc Coffe“ is located on the territory of National Art Museum of China. Interior is beautiful and atmosphere is very friendly. Here you can buy coffee and have different type of snacks including sweet ones. I found this place amazing especially after visiting museum where I could have a rest. I ordered cappuccino. It was very tasty. The service is very fast. Highly recommend to visit.

Name: Namoc Coffee
Address: 1, Dongcheng, Wusidajie, 1号CN 北京市
Author: Grzegorz P.
Review:
Nice place to stop after museum visit.
Very good bamboo cake!

Name: Namoc Coffee
Address: 1, Dongcheng, Wusidajie, 1号CN 北京市
Author: Sholpan Makhmudova
Review: Very nice place, good coffee and tasty croissants

Name: Namoc Coffee
Address: 1, Dongcheng, Wusidajie, 1号CN 北京市
Author: Ronron94world
Review: The cafe inside the National Art Museum of China is in the courtyard on the right and is connected to the gift shop. The environment is really good. There are general coffee and specialty coffee to choose from. I ordered a cup of iced latte. It tasted smooth and I really recommend it. It is a very good coffee. If you don't need to make a reservation to enter, it is really suitable to buy a cup every now and then.

Name: Soloist Coffee Co.
Address: V9WV+96M, Yangmeizhuxie St, Xicheng District
Author: Eric Fulton
Review: A hipster coffeeshop feel in the heart of Beijing. The coffee was excellent and locally roasted. Service was fine when I was here. I think people visiting China need to realize service standards are different in Asia. Reasonable prices for a place catering to westerners.

Name: Soloist Coffee Co.
Address: V9WV+96M, Yangmeizhuxie St, Xicheng District
Author: Review Review
Review: One of my favourite coffee shops of all time. You won’t find high quality coffee like this anywhere in Beijing. Staff are extremely knowledgeable about what they’re actually doing and very accommodating. Man featured here (barista) is superb!

Name: Soloist Coffee Co.
Address: V9WV+96M, Yangmeizhuxie St, Xicheng District
Author: robrain
Review: Coffee and space is ok, but all staffs service quality need to be improved.

Name: Soloist Coffee Co.
Address: V9WV+96M, Yangmeizhuxie St, Xicheng District
Author: YP
Review: The service here sucks big time. Service staff all seems to have an attitude. Pretentious and obnoxious! Cafe might be good but it is not worth it. I went there with my mum and we ordered coffee. She wanted to just try a chestnut just bought from elsewhere and the staff insisted on taking it away from here and keeping it. Fine, I get that we can't consume outside food there but you just need to tell us nicely and not make my mum uncomfortable. If you read the reviews on Chinese social media sites, you'll see that service is a great issue. Absolutely unprofessional!

Name: Soloist Coffee Co.
Address: V9WV+96M, Yangmeizhuxie St, Xicheng District
Author: Heru Tirta
Review: Good coffee in Beijing

Review: Fingerprint setting

Address: 4, Chaoyang, Jiuxianqiao Rd, 4号CN 北京市
Author: Sally Chung
Review: Located at the entrance of the 798 Art District but tucked away in an alley, this cafe is a hidden gem. The ambiance is cool, with quality coffee beans and well-spaced tables that ensure a comfortable experience even when it's busy. The cafe has power outlets and a clean, gender-segregated bathroom. Even the infused lemon drinking water was a nice touch. Though I didn't get to try them, the cakes looked cute and delicious. Highly recommended!

Name: Tian Roast Coffee Co.
Address: 4, Chaoyang, Jiuxianqiao Rd, 4号CN 北京市
Author: Seb
Review: Though definately on the pricier side, a very calm, delicate and creative coffeeplace with a lot of blends and homemade specialities to try.

Address: WCMV+8W3, Gongrentiyuchang N Rd, 三里屯 Chaoyang
Author: Paul Sedillo
Review:
Maan Coffee is a solid option for a chain based offering. They do a nice job of delivering a variety of coffee based drinks. The atmosphere is nice with a US based coffee house style. In addition to the coffee they are known for their waffles which is an interesting twist. I actually enjoyed the waffle better than the coffee.

My only challenge was the music being too loud, so take a set of headphones if you plan on being here a while.

Name: Maan Coffee
Address: WCMV+8W3, Gongrentiyuchang N Rd, 三里屯 Chaoyang
Author: Katherine Meng
Review: Food is okay. But when you want somewhere to work or meet friends with coffee and such this is a good spot. Opens late.

Name: Maan Coffee
Address: WCMV+8W3, Gongrentiyuchang N Rd, 三里屯 Chaoyang
Author: Ambrose Kelso
Review: Great place. It has a very nice and relaxing atmosphere. The strawberry waffles are delicious 😋🍓

Name: Maan Coffee
Address: WCMV+8W3, Gongrentiyuchang N Rd, 三里屯 Chaoyang

Review: Nice environment and the place is huge for a coffee shop.

Author: oscar camacho
Review: All the flavor and quality of the company in this great location, just outside of one of the most important places in Beijing. Good service and all the merchandise that you can think from this city.

Address: 1 Qianmen St, Dongcheng
Author: Bruno Schwizer
Review:
Fantastic location.  Crowded on main floor but there are floors 2 and 3 which have lots of room and view.  Coffee expensive but that's a give.

Note:. WiFi requires you to give your mobile number to connect and then you get a text with the password.  No mobile = no wifi.

Address: 1 Qianmen St, Dongcheng

Review: This coffee shop used to be much better before the pandemic, now it is a small dark place, with searting space only on the 2nd and 3rd floor, with no views or atmosphere. Would not recommend.

Name: Starbucks Coffee
Address: 1 Qianmen St, Dongcheng
Author: David Shepherd
Review: Wow! What a Starbucks. Huge and elegant inside. Good tasting coffee. Comfortable seats. Three floors. Friendly and helpful staff. Never seen trays in Starbucks made from wood before with proper cutlery. Definitely an oasis in the centre of Beijing, not far from Tiananmen  square.

Name: Coffee Bar Restaurant
Address: WCG2+52J, Shatan Back St, Dongcheng
Author: Tim P
Review:
A quirky little cafe with delicious food and kind service, and a perhaps ironically minimalist name. I loved the quirky decor. They even had episodes of Count Duckula - an 80s British children's cartoon - running non stop on one of the screens. It reminded me a little of Budapest ruin bars; a slapdash of furniture and decorations that just seem to work. There's a picture of Napoleon next to a shelf with the Joker and the mask from V for Vendetta.  The food was well prepared, simple staples - of the Western and Chinese kind - nothing special, just well made and tasty.

I think that this is what used to be the Alley Cafe which Google shows as being next door. The pictures looked the same, and when I showed them to the owner they nodded in agreement. There certainly isn't an Alley Cafe there any more that I could find.

Name: Coffee Bar Restaurant
Address: WCG2+52J, Shatan Back St, Dongcheng
Author: Egor Shved
Review: Bombastically atmospheric place! I recommend it to everyone! Tasty and soulful. Relaxation in the center of the metropolis. The closest bar to the Forbidden City!

Name: Coffee Bar Restaurant
Address: WCG2+52J, Shatan Back St, Dongcheng
Author: Sergey Petrenko
Review:
Very cozy small bar. The staff understands English well.
Cocktails for 88 yuan, delicious snacks: chicken popcorn and nuggets.

Name: Coffee Bar Restaurant
Address: WCG2+52J, Shatan Back St, Dongcheng
Author: Wendy Wu
Review: After visiting the Forbidden City, I was very hot and tired. Fortunately, I found this cute shop where I could rest, have something to eat to escape the heat, rest and play to regain my energy before going to Jingshan Park to see the scenery.

The coffee shop is in a modern style. There are not too many people in the afternoon on weekdays. It is very comfortable to have a cup of coffee quietly inside. The environment is suitable for office work and gatherings with friends.

The latte is fragrant and delicious, with a mellow and smooth taste. I enjoy every bite, and the latte art is also beautiful.

Author: N/A
Review: N/A

Name: Cafe 6
Address: Cihangir, KILIÇALİ PAŞA MAH. AKARSU CAD, Anahtar Sk. NO:13/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Maxim M
Review: We really liked this place. It seems that it was the most delicious breakfast in Istanbul. Great service, fast service, beautiful location. Thank you, we will come back again!

Name: Cafe 6
Address: Cihangir, KILIÇALİ PAŞA MAH. AKARSU CAD, Anahtar Sk. NO:13/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Grant Stimpson
Review: A walk through the kitchen to the garden and a hello from the chefs started us off well. The garden itself is comfy, lively and we were well looked after by the staff. Menu is varied and lots to choose from. Tasty food, hearty portions and we got ours quick. A very big thumbs up from us.

Name: Cafe 6
Address: Cihangir, KILIÇALİ PAŞA MAH. AKARSU CAD, Anahtar Sk. NO:13/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Pablo Musumeci
Review: Hidden gem! Their garden is a beautiful refuge from noisy Istanbul. Go in and enjoy a delicious breakfast. There are also some tables inside in a cozy living room area. Great place!

Name: Cafe 6
Address: Cihangir, KILIÇALİ PAŞA MAH. AKARSU CAD, Anahtar Sk. NO:13/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Husam Arı
Review: We had a late breakfast at Kahve 6 today and it was fantastic! The menemen was amazing, full of flavor and cooked to perfection. I had poached eggs with avocado paste and added bacon, which truly made my day! It's such a delight to find bacon in Istanbul for breakfast. Everything was delicious and the atmosphere was lovely. Highly recommend this spot for a great breakfast experience!

Name: Cafe 6
Address: Cihangir, KILIÇALİ PAŞA MAH. AKARSU CAD, Anahtar Sk. NO:13/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Serdar Arslan
Review:
This breakfast spot is a true find, offering a peaceful escape right in the neighborhood. The backyard is small but charming, providing a lovely setting to enjoy a meal. The menu might be simple, but each dish is crafted with care, delivering flavors that feel both comforting and satisfying.

While the coffee may not be the standout feature, it’s still perfectly acceptable for a morning pick-me-up. The quality of the food more than makes up for it, and the overall experience remains delightful.

This place is a favorite among locals, and it’s easy to see why. I’m a regular here, and each time I visit, I’m reminded why I give it five stars. It’s not just about the food or the coffee—it’s the entire experience! If you haven’t tried it yet, this is a spot you should definitely add to your list.

Name: The House Cafe Corner
Address: Teşvikiye, Teşvikiye Cd. 2/A, Şişli
Author: Lavei
Review: Overall, I had a wonderful experience at The House Cafe Corner. The ambiance, service, and food quality were all impressive. With a few minor improvements, it could be an even better dining destination.

Name: The House Cafe Corner
Address: Teşvikiye, Teşvikiye Cd. 2/A, Şişli
Author: Nour
Review: I’d always go back to this place. Every time was greater experience than the previous one. Everything was yummy. Tea is wow. Service might be a bit slow but it’s always packed so I kinda understand.

Name: The House Cafe Corner
Address: Teşvikiye, Teşvikiye Cd. 2/A, Şişli
Author: Mohammed Alnaim
Review: Good place for coffee rest. The order was simple and the dessert wasn’t fresh but still tasted good.

Name: The House Cafe Corner
Address: Teşvikiye, Teşvikiye Cd. 2/A, Şişli
Author: Flavia D
Review: Finally some place with good service and polite staff. The food is great and the prices are fair for the quality we get. It also has the best menu I've seen in a while, with pictures and explanations in English. Will definitely come back!

Name: The House Cafe Corner
Address: Teşvikiye, Teşvikiye Cd. 2/A, Şişli
Author: Madina Babayeva
Review:
The food is very nice. The price is reasonable if you ask me.

I didn't understand though why one of the personnel was knocking aggressively on the door when I was in the bathroom. 😬

Name: Cafe da Giovanni
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No: 11/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Sapna Patel
Review: We loved coming here for breakfast! In particular, I loved the quiche and granola bowl. Great location and very close to Istiklal St. The staff and team are very friendly here - always had a smile on their faces. Out of everywhere we had breakfast/coffee in the area, Cafe da Giovanni was my favourite place for coffee! The coffee was super smooth and not overly strong. I really miss coming here and hope we can come again in the future!

Name: Cafe da Giovanni
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No: 11/A, Beyoğlu
Author: espiperlondon
Review:
Nice charming little cafe with good breakfast options.
Scrambled eggs with salad and sourdough toast, fresh orange and cappuccino was £11.80 in pounds.

Name: Cafe da Giovanni
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No: 11/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Hadeel Ghazi
Review:
Delicious breakfast and hot drinks.
Makes you crave their delicious croissants late night.
The espresso is amazing.
Cappuccino and Latte are delicious!

I basically recommend that you try everything.

Absolutely loved it! Visited twice already and will visit again.

Name: Cafe da Giovanni
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No: 11/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Camille B
Review: We had a really nice european style breakfast in that restaurant. The place was cosy and the food was nice. The food was served relatively quickly and everything was good. The granola was nice and so was the croque madame. I would definitely go back to this place to have breakfast one day.

Name: Cafe da Giovanni
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No: 11/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Mohsen Sarakbi
Review:
Wonderful place in downtown. A rare find. Breakfast is so diverse and so delicious!
Coffee as well was great.
Seatings are well placed with an option outside. I loved the place vibes, cozy and perfect for a lovely eat and read time.
Staff are so cool, speak English and super nice.
Recommend if you are in downtown İstanbul!

Name: SOPHIA PITA CAFE
Address: Cankurtaran, Alemdar Cd. No:2, Fatih
Author: Dan
Review: The cafe has a great location, design, wide selections of beverages, cakes and service by the staff. However it is exceptionally expensive for Istanbul.

Name: SOPHIA PITA CAFE
Address: Cankurtaran, Alemdar Cd. No:2, Fatih
Author: Rob Paden
Review: The food and drinks were ok, not good but not bad, but okay. The nice thing about it is the view. It has a little covered outdoor balcony with a view over the street perfect for enjoying a coffee or tea with a view of the blue mosque.

Name: SOPHIA PITA CAFE
Address: Cankurtaran, Alemdar Cd. No:2, Fatih
Author: Sergei Savinskii
Review: Good European-like food, really tasty coffee. Free Wi-Fi. Service a little bit slow.

Name: SOPHIA PITA CAFE
Address: Cankurtaran, Alemdar Cd. No:2, Fatih
Author: Gabriel Garcia
Review:
Went for beers… 9.5€ per beer
seems excessive. I get that it’s close to tourist attractions, but still.

Name: SOPHIA PITA CAFE
Address: Cankurtaran, Alemdar Cd. No:2, Fatih
Author: Eduardo Lazzarotto
Review: This place is amazing and I highly recommend. They have good coffee and food at extremely reasonable prices (particularly compared to the tourist traps down the road), the staff is nice and they have good facilities (including good speed wifi). Overall this is a good spot to scape the hustle and bustle of Istanbul for a quick snack or hours of peace and quiet.

Name: Armağan Cafe هدية مقهى
Address: Kocatepe, Cambazoğlu Sk. No:20, Beyoğlu
Author: Aslam Shah
Review:
This small cafe is run by a nice owner who welcomes you with a nice smile every morning.

The lentil soup is really the best we have tried in Istanbul. The prices are very good and the service is quick.  Would definitely recommend trying the food, especially the Lentil Soup. It's just too good.

It's like a small gem 💎

We had breakfast almost every day on our 10 days of tour and enjoyed every bit of it.

Name: Armağan Cafe هدية مقهى
Address: Kocatepe, Cambazoğlu Sk. No:20, Beyoğlu
Author: Piotr Gatlik
Review: I really recommend. We ate here couple times. Lentil soup was great. Also tea and coffee is very tasty.

Name: Armağan Cafe هدية مقهى
Address: Kocatepe, Cambazoğlu Sk. No:20, Beyoğlu
Author: Faissal Dawood
Review: I live the place, simple but awesome.. the owner serve the costumers with a wide smile, I love his attitude.

Name: Armağan Cafe هدية مقهى
Address: Kocatepe, Cambazoğlu Sk. No:20, Beyoğlu
Author: Angela Benomran
Review: Great, large meatball style sandwiches with spicy sauce. So good!! Go there!!!

Name: Armağan Cafe هدية مقهى
Address: Kocatepe, Cambazoğlu Sk. No:20, Beyoğlu
Author: Кристина Малахова
Review: The cafe is very modest and unsightly, but what fresh baked goods they have here! Delicious food that the owner prepares right in front of you. And big portions. The baked goods are warming up. The choice of dishes is not large, but super tasty. I had breakfast with pleasure and ate for 175 liras.

Name: Cafe Rumist
Address: Sultan Ahmet, Akbıyık Cd. No:5, Fatih
Author: Alexandria
Review: We were recommended this restaurant by our hotel, who said they had cheap prices. For this area, we found the prices to be average. Service was helpful and all the dishes came out at the same time. We ordered the fish soup and the seafood platter for two, which were highlights, and the steak. The fish soup was impressive and the seafood platter was very big and good value for money. Meat was a bit chewy. They also give free tea and baklava for dessert.

Name: Cafe Rumist
Address: Sultan Ahmet, Akbıyık Cd. No:5, Fatih
Author: Muheet Abdullah
Review:
We were welcomed by the owner Ibrahim who is a fine host. He was very hospitable to us.

We ordered based on his recommendation and we were not disappointed! The food tasted amazing and it was cooked fresh!

He also told us a few of his adventures which was quite an addition to the dinner.

I will be going back to his restaurant again 100%.

He also has a boutique on the first floor and it has some beautiful carpets. Quite expensive for my taste.

Name: Cafe Rumist
Address: Sultan Ahmet, Akbıyık Cd. No:5, Fatih
Author: Nourchene
Review: The food was good but the meat was a bit overcooked and dry. They could do better with the portions which are small. The mushrooms filled with cheese was tasty, I‘d recommend trying it. They offer free tea and baklava at the end. The place is nicely decorated. One bad thing is that the service is too slow, athough it was not crowded in the evening.

Name: Cafe Rumist
Address: Sultan Ahmet, Akbıyık Cd. No:5, Fatih
Author: Malik Sarmad Riaz
Review: We had a great experience eating here. We have been here multiple times over the last 2 years and would definitely come here again

Name: Cafe Rumist
Address: Sultan Ahmet, Akbıyık Cd. No:5, Fatih
Author: filippo reggimenti
Review:
Nice café/restaurant close by Ayasofya (but far from the crowd).
The prices are a bit high, but congruent with the location.
We had really tasty Iskander Kebab, that was definitely worth the money.

The staff are really kind, they even offered us some tea and baklava at the end.

There is a second flor with some carpets and a nice view

Name: Cafe London
Address: Sahrayı Cedit, Saadet Apt, Atatürk Cd. No:23, Kadıköy
Author: Mahdi Alishavandi
Review: A place to have a coffee on a rainy day in Istanbul ☕☕☕

Name: Cafe London
Address: Sahrayı Cedit, Saadet Apt, Atatürk Cd. No:23, Kadıköy
Author: Abrek Chc
Review:
Nice staff, good prices, good location in kozyatagi.
Their famous strawberry cake is delicious.

Name: Cafe London
Address: Sahrayı Cedit, Saadet Apt, Atatürk Cd. No:23, Kadıköy
Author: Ahmad Janbein
Review: Nice, calm place, friendly area, and easy to reach

Name: Cafe London
Address: Sahrayı Cedit, Saadet Apt, Atatürk Cd. No:23, Kadıköy
Author: Nwonknu Resu
Review: Food is average and coffee is meh. Still, a quiet place to relax

Name: Cafe London
