Address: Sahrayı Cedit, Saadet Apt, Atatürk Cd. No:23, Kadıköy
Author: Christian Elles
Review: I love their  cake , coffee is as usual .

Name: Maya's Corner Cafe
Address: Alemdar, Yerebatan Cd. No:25, Fatih
Author: Fazal Mahmud Roni
Review:
This is kind of a colourful bliss in a road with number of regular restaurants in one side and some souvenir shops on the other side.

Their colourful chair and tables will grab your eyes first. Sit their and order some of their home made bakeries/pastry to try our and must try is their homemade lemonade. We took one for test and we ordered the 2nd too.  We also tried their cheesecake and salted caramel latte…..superb.

Name: Maya's Corner Cafe
Address: Alemdar, Yerebatan Cd. No:25, Fatih
Author: Babette Stolz
Review:
This was such a lovely place! Really beautiful Café with relaxed music. Very inviting!
Must be the most beautiful coffee I ever got served to this day:)

Name: Maya's Corner Cafe
Address: Alemdar, Yerebatan Cd. No:25, Fatih
Author: Sloane Hutching
Review:
We had such a lovely experience here! Came for coffee multiple times and tried the carrot cake and the vegan cake. Both very tasty. The staff were super lovely.
If you go you must go for a visit next door to the shop they also own! So many beautiful things 😍

Name: Maya's Corner Cafe
Address: Alemdar, Yerebatan Cd. No:25, Fatih
Author: G Ng
Review: A very small cozy cafe shop along a street. Limited outdoor seating. Nice to take a break and have coffee and cakes. Tried their baklava . It was winter and raining, they had this IR heater to warm you up. Almost went to the wrong cafe, there's two more cafe and restaurant next to each other.

Name: Maya's Corner Cafe
Address: Alemdar, Yerebatan Cd. No:25, Fatih
Author: Y. T. Nixon Tan
Review:
A charming and cozy cafe situated in the vibrant neighborhood of Karaköy, a trendy area on the European side of Istanbul known for its artistic and cultural scene.

The ambiance of Maya's Corner Cafe is warm and inviting, with a cozy interior and an outdoor seating area where we enjoyed our meal while soaking in the lively atmosphere of the neighborhood. The cafe's friendly staff and laid-back vibe make it a delightful spot to relax and take a break from exploring the city. It's an ideal stop for a leisurely meal, a quick snack, or a cup of coffee.

Name: Jay's Cafe
Address: Türkali, Türkali Mahallesi Ihlamurdere Caddesi, Mısırlı Bahçe Sk. No:4/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Yaman Masalha
Review:
Nice place the atmosphere is amazing very quiet and clean facility !
The staff is very friendly and professional.
Suitable for working long hours and studying.
Their prices are very affordable and they also have an option for refilling your coffee which is pretty decent !
Totally recommend it give it a try while you are in the area .

Name: Jay's Cafe
Address: Türkali, Türkali Mahallesi Ihlamurdere Caddesi, Mısırlı Bahçe Sk. No:4/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Shaf Bdn
Review: Place looks trendy, like most of the cafes in Besiktas area. The food selection isn't wide and nothing much to mention about. Staff are lovely but there's no drawing factor about the place.

Name: Jay's Cafe
Address: Türkali, Türkali Mahallesi Ihlamurdere Caddesi, Mısırlı Bahçe Sk. No:4/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Axelle Fox
Review: One of my fave cafes in Beşiktaş!! Staff is amazing, vibe also, tasty and affordable food. Lots of space. One of the best places to work from in the area.

Name: Jay's Cafe
Address: Türkali, Türkali Mahallesi Ihlamurdere Caddesi, Mısırlı Bahçe Sk. No:4/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Kaan Kisacik
Review: Fresh and delicious coffee all the time. Perfect place to be productive.  Stuff are very friend and polite. They all speak English. Prices are reasonable. San Sebastián was my favorite desert.

Name: Jay's Cafe
Address: Türkali, Türkali Mahallesi Ihlamurdere Caddesi, Mısırlı Bahçe Sk. No:4/A, Beşiktaş
Author: M.D.Grand Autorin
Review: Best food in Istanbul! Jay's Burger was super delicious, as well as the drinks and the Antepli Soufflee

Name: Cafe Zone
Address: Halaskargazi, Kuyumcu İrfan Sk. 3/B, Şişli
Author: Erkan Can
Review: I was recommended this by my nephew and he was right. Great food and value for money . 👍🏻

Name: Cafe Zone
Address: Halaskargazi, Kuyumcu İrfan Sk. 3/B, Şişli
Author: Jarra Ababiya
Review: Beautiful family owned restaurant and cafe. The menu is extensive and food is spectacular. My family came in for breakfast and the food was spectacular. Best service you will ever find in the city ❤️

Name: Cafe Zone
Address: Halaskargazi, Kuyumcu İrfan Sk. 3/B, Şişli
Author: Kelly Olson
Review: Here again....tried the quinoa salad with turkey leg, the steak and Gorgonzola pizza - both  are on the repeat list! Once again a fantastic meal, tuna salad, chicken with noodles and the Texas steak!  So YUMMY!!!   This is our favorite go-to place in Istanbul!  EXCELLENT service, friendly staff, GREAT food and a nice wine list!  The menu has lots of choices and everyone can find something they like!  It’s a must visit place!  Yet again great food, outstanding service and a great place to be!!!

Name: Cafe Zone
Address: Halaskargazi, Kuyumcu İrfan Sk. 3/B, Şişli
Author: Doaa Hamdy
Review: Best food served among a long list and very well known restaurants in Istanbul…the food was amazing, the atmosphere was cozy, the owner and the staff were very friendly and welcoming…..I highly recommend it and would definitely go back in my coming visits

Name: Cafe Zone
Address: Halaskargazi, Kuyumcu İrfan Sk. 3/B, Şişli
Author: Nouran AlAyoubi
Review:
Let me tell you my story with Cafe Zone .
It is my everyday getaway from my 8 hours work :) . I eat here almost every day and I never got disappointed. Highly recommended environment, food and place ! Very clean & delicious place .

Visit it & let me know what you think 🥰 !!

Name: The House Cafe Atiye
Address: Harbiye, Atiye Sk. No:10, Şişli
Author: ABDullah 3byyd (3byyd)
Review:
“An Enchanting Culinary Oasis”
From the moment I stepped into the restaurant, I was greeted by the most cordial staff, whose warmth and hospitality shone as brightly as the sun-drenched garden. The garden itself was a serene retreat, brimming with vibrant blooms and lush greenery that set the stage for a truly tranquil dining experience.
As for the cuisine, it was nothing short of spectacular. Each dish was a masterpiece of flavors, beautifully presented and crafted with the utmost care. The chefs here are true artists, and their passion for culinary excellence is evident in every bite.
This restaurant is not just a place to eat; it’s a destination where every sense is delighted and every visitor is treated like royalty. A must-visit for anyone seeking a delightful escape from the ordinary.

Name: The House Cafe Atiye
Address: Harbiye, Atiye Sk. No:10, Şişli
Author: Amani Al-Khaldi
Review: Food is like Turkish/Amarican Style. Staff are friendly, kind and polite. Place is very cozy and comfortable place. Highly recommended 👍🏼

Name: The House Cafe Atiye
Address: Harbiye, Atiye Sk. No:10, Şişli
Author: Ahmed Hassan
Review:
Good location for a breakfast in Nisantasi, it has a variety of seating area inside and outside, very close to the main Nisantasi famous street.

I have got a complementary voucher to visit this place as I have rent an apartment on the same building with VNG property.

The only bad thing about it is that the service is very slow, I have waited 25 minutes to get my breakfast meal, I don’t know if they have did it purposely or not, since I have a complementary breakfast meal!!!

Name: The House Cafe Atiye
Address: Harbiye, Atiye Sk. No:10, Şişli
Author: Charaine Poutasi
Review: Great place for a bite to eat. Spacious and friendly staff who moved us away from the smoking area.

Name: The House Cafe Atiye
Address: Harbiye, Atiye Sk. No:10, Şişli
Author: Natalia Puscasu
Review:
This cafe has a nice outside terrace which makes the atmosphere pleasant, but the food isn’t great . 4 people at our table ordered poached eggs and all  were overcooked and hard, the presentation of the food is poor, no salads on the side. The staff doesn’t speak any English . We specifically asked for the food without onion in Turkish, but they  brought it with onion. The service was slow.
I wouldn’t come back.

Name: Cafe Bomonti Kafe &Bistro şişli bomonti
Address: Cumhuriyet, Kazım Orbay Cd. No:3 D:207, Şişli
Author: kimia Sourani Yancheshmeh
Review: This is a cozy place with nice people.

Name: Cafe Bomonti Kafe &Bistro şişli bomonti
Address: Cumhuriyet, Kazım Orbay Cd. No:3 D:207, Şişli
Author: İSMET KEREM GEÇER
Review: Too bad they canceled the order because they were busy

Name: Cafe Bomonti Kafe &Bistro şişli bomonti
Address: Cumhuriyet, Kazım Orbay Cd. No:3 D:207, Şişli
Author: Sultan Polat
Review: It is a very decent and clean business, the attention of both the owner and the staff is very good, it is a perfect family place, one of the best cafes in Bomonti.

Name: Cafe Bomonti Kafe &Bistro şişli bomonti
Address: Cumhuriyet, Kazım Orbay Cd. No:3 D:207, Şişli
Author: Uğur Saçkesen
Review: I think it's a good business, but I think it's expensive because of the location.

Name: Cafe Bomonti Kafe &Bistro şişli bomonti
Address: Cumhuriyet, Kazım Orbay Cd. No:3 D:207, Şişli
Author: Ismail Ahmed

Name: The House Cafe Garden
Address: Harbiye, Atiye Sk. Nilüfer Apt No:6, Şişli
Author: Sarah Hdeib
Review:
We first tried sitting outside but it was really cold.
So we went inside and were immediately drawn to the seating area near the chimney, it's super super cozy, the fire was on and they had Christmas decoration. We sat there but then the manager approached us and said it's reserved so we sat somewhere else then he approached us and said we can sit there until the people that reserved it arrive which was really nice on his side!
We sat there for some time and we enjoyed it until we had to get up.

However the service and the general atmosphere didn't feel very welcoming except the parts I mentioned, and the menu isn't really that interesting

Name: The House Cafe Garden
Address: Harbiye, Atiye Sk. Nilüfer Apt No:6, Şişli
Author: Shawn D
Review:
Nice ambience and a good variety of food for everyone’s taste.
The home made lemonades are also worth trying.

Name: The House Cafe Garden
Address: Harbiye, Atiye Sk. Nilüfer Apt No:6, Şişli
Author: yassin
Review:
If you're in Istanbul and haven't visited 'The House Cafe' yet, you're missing out. The moment you step in, you're welcomed by a homely yet modern ambiance, making you feel right at home.

The menu is a foodie's dream come true. The 'Chicken Schnitzel' is a must-try, perfectly crispy on the outside, tender on the inside. Don't even get me started on the 'Chocolate Soufflé', a dessert that melts in your mouth, leaving you craving for more.

But what really sets 'The House Cafe' apart is the service. The staff is friendly, attentive, and always ready to recommend the best dishes.

In a nutshell, 'The House Cafe' is more than just a cafe, it's an experience. From the cozy atmosphere to the delectable food and top-notch service, it's a place I'll be visiting again and again. I can't recommend 'The House Cafe' enough!

Name: The House Cafe Garden
Address: Harbiye, Atiye Sk. Nilüfer Apt No:6, Şişli
Author: Shaikhah
Review: For those who want to change from the original type of breakfast they serve here in istanbul, come to the house cafe they do have the best avocado egg sandwich, and the pancakes also is so good.

Name: The House Cafe Garden
Address: Harbiye, Atiye Sk. Nilüfer Apt No:6, Şişli
Author: Colin Gagich
Review:
Was here for a catered event. The food spread was amazing and the staff are very friendly. The whole back area is a beautiful wall to wall garden. It does feel like being outside in a forest of tropical plants with the amount of daylight that shines through.

Check this place out!

Name: Cafe Privato Restaurant
Address: Şahkulu, Tımarcı Sk. No:3, Beyoğlu
Author: Evgeniia Tokarchuk
Review: We had a lunch there. Got Manti, it was delicious 😍 price is reasonable too! The best is that it was on the side from the main street, so no crowd. Nice, quiet place, cozy vibe. And it was in the shade (don't underestimate importance of that when it's 30+)😁

Name: Cafe Privato Restaurant
Address: Şahkulu, Tımarcı Sk. No:3, Beyoğlu
Author: Devany Pitsas
Review: This has to be a highlight of our time in Istanbul. We came for the traditional village breakfast, and it was so good that we came back for dinner (which was also some of the best we’ve had). We will absolutely be recommending to our friends :)

Name: Cafe Privato Restaurant
Address: Şahkulu, Tımarcı Sk. No:3, Beyoğlu
Author: Veronika Kuhrner
Review: Had a lovely breakfast here. We were sitting at a table in a relaxed side street opposite the restaurant. They have lots of waiting staff who are all polite and attentive without being intrusive. Our egg breakfasts were great and so was the pomegranate juice. Recommend.

Name: Cafe Privato Restaurant
Address: Şahkulu, Tımarcı Sk. No:3, Beyoğlu
Author: Neli Yankova
Review: Our stay in Istanbul wouldn’t be the same without this cafe. We visited them three times in a row for how good the food was. We became regulars for a short period. Would definitely be back here on our next holiday. Loved it 😍😻

Name: Cafe Privato Restaurant
Address: Şahkulu, Tımarcı Sk. No:3, Beyoğlu
Author: Gita Baratam
Review:
We visited with an intention of having breakfast, but ended up ordering lunch. The cafe has a lot of seating, both right in front of the restaurant, inside and on the opposite side of the road. The placemat gives you a brief history of the Galata Tower, it's a much better read than the information on the pillars near the Galata Tower.
What I'm loving about eating in Istanbul is that they bring you something to to eat while you're waiting for your order to get ready. And in authentic Istanbul style, there was a cute kitty keeping us company.
In Privato, they offered us a very delicious Lentil Soup with bread.
The rest of our order consisted of
1. Spinach and cheese Gozleme - Very Good
2. Manti (Turkish Ravioli in yogurt) - Very Good
3. Mint Tea(Not like Moroccan Tea) - Refreshing
4. Cinnamon Tea -Refreshing
Loved the food, loved the service, but later wished that we had opted to sit in the open space behind the restaurant instead of opposite it.

Name: Faik Pasha cafe, brasserie, patisserie
Address: Firuzağa, Çukur Cuma Cd. 51/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Зиля Узбекова
Review: My husband and I loved this place for breakfast! Starting from the terrace tables with soft French chanson and amazing breakfasts to the service the cafe team provided. With no pathos and smth extraordinary, just soft, fresh, sweet place to start a new day. The food is delicious. The chef and waiters are open to any requests and friendly. Absolutely recommend it visiting 👍

Name: Faik Pasha cafe, brasserie, patisserie
Address: Firuzağa, Çukur Cuma Cd. 51/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Παναγιώτα Λαμπρινάκου
Review: We went only for breakfast! We found it from Google . The food was fantastic!! Turkish traditional food choices! Great service and beautiful neighborhood to walk after! Go there for sure! Very affordable price too!

Name: Faik Pasha cafe, brasserie, patisserie
Address: Firuzağa, Çukur Cuma Cd. 51/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Hasti Roudbari
Review:
A huge fan of breakfast here! 🙋🏽‍♀️
Found this place via Google Maps, in the contrast of all the comments I have read, the breakfast buffet was pretty ordinary. Although the place is beautiful and the staff are kind and welcoming.

Name: Faik Pasha cafe, brasserie, patisserie
Address: Firuzağa, Çukur Cuma Cd. 51/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Matt Morrissey
Review: Absolutely stellar hotel. Clean, affordable,  and run hy wonderful staff who always go the extra mile and make you feel very cared for.  The breakfast is amazing! My wife and I stayed here on our honeymoon and it was like a dream

Name: Faik Pasha cafe, brasserie, patisserie
Address: Firuzağa, Çukur Cuma Cd. 51/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Slavica Ignjatovic
Review: Best hotel in Istanbul ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️🔝🔝🔝The breakfast is so delicious,everything is beautiful,the people who work here is too kind, all recommendations to everyone for this hotel and breakfast♥️

Name: Mitara Cafe & Art
Address: Küçük Ayasofya, Kaleci Sk. No:9 D:101, Fatih
Author: Chattraporn Dhanapunyo
Review:
Highly recommended! It’s our best home-cooked dinner in Turkey.

Usually, we’re not a big fan of vegetarian food but we tried the Imambayildi (the stuffed aubergine) which the owner/chef recommended and it was surprisingly amazing! The slow-cooked beef was sooo tasty as well.

Moreover, we love the vibe a lot! The cafe is very cozy. The earthy tone decorations give the rustic and homey feel. The owner’s cats and dogs even make it more inviting. They were very friendly, it was very nice spending time with them.

Name: Mitara Cafe & Art
Address: Küçük Ayasofya, Kaleci Sk. No:9 D:101, Fatih
Author: Sara Teele
Review: What a unique place! More of a home-dining experience than a restaurant, but that made it even better! We had a great evening chatting with the owner/chef, playing with and petting her sweet animals, and eating delicious vegan food. We tried the artichoke, eggplant, and pam pam (pumpkin). Everything was sooo good, the vegetables really shined in each of her preparations. It is cash only so come prepared, especially because you will want to order a lot!

Name: Mitara Cafe & Art
Address: Küçük Ayasofya, Kaleci Sk. No:9 D:101, Fatih
Author: Aarti Kapoor
Review: Just had the best evening. Nazan is an amazing host, cook and, by the end of the evening, a beautiful friend. The atmosphere was so homey that I also ended making friends with the other guests, both the humans and the cats and dogs. I ate some delicious vegan food, fresh and exquisite. Very special place.

Name: Mitara Cafe & Art
Address: Küçük Ayasofya, Kaleci Sk. No:9 D:101, Fatih
Author: Aubrey Long
Review: I had a lovely dinner here while on vacation. I was the only person in the cafe, which felt a little weird at first, but I ended up talking with the owner for a while and hearing stories about her dogs and cats. The food was amazing, the coffee was delicious, and the animals provided free entertainment. For vegetarians, there are several veggie/vegan entrees on offer (I had the mualla). Definitely give this place a try!

Name: Mitara Cafe & Art
Address: Küçük Ayasofya, Kaleci Sk. No:9 D:101, Fatih
Author: Cameron Smyth
Review:
Amazing place. Will make your trip to Istanbul very special. Nazan who owns the place will give you a very personal experience. She sat and spoke with us, gave us AMAZING food, and provided recommendations and told some wise stories.
Go here or you are missing out!

Name: Smyrna Cihangir
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Mahallesi, Akarsu Ykş. Sok. No:29, Beyoğlu
Author: Elena Nazare
Review: Love this place, it takes you to a New York vibe of good music  under a fresh breeze of summer, but surrounded by green trees in an oriental place, this time. Love Turkey with its great diversity of art, color, music, nature, vibes and love ❤️🌷🌸 the location is in the historic area of Europe, in the artistic Cihangir district

Name: Smyrna Cihangir
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Mahallesi, Akarsu Ykş. Sok. No:29, Beyoğlu
Author: Dato Papashvili
Review: Amazing place, great food and extraordinary awesome staff! Special thanks to Musa, who works there. Beside of being super helpful, he can also communicate in different languages and recommend you the best experiences of Istanbul.

Name: Smyrna Cihangir
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Mahallesi, Akarsu Ykş. Sok. No:29, Beyoğlu
Author: Steven Heath
Review:
We had a very enjoyable afternoon here yesterday. We planned to stay for A cocktail and ended up leaving after a few cocktails.

A pleasant environment with friendly (and attractive) waiters.

Gay friendly - even has a rainbow flag at the entrance.

The cocktails could be served in more appropriate glasses though.

Name: Smyrna Cihangir
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Mahallesi, Akarsu Ykş. Sok. No:29, Beyoğlu
Author: Alex U
Review:
I knew Smyrna as a gay friendly neighborhood café and bar which I enjoyed for years. Very good service, friendly environment without frills, nice guests. I always preferred to take a glass and let go the conversation.
Today, I rediscover Smyrna for breakfast and I am more than fascinated. They apparently started to serve very good Turkish style brunch / breakfast and they really do a good job.
We ordered the scrambled eggs with tomato and paprikas called Menemen (which they wrongly call shaksuka), Turkish sausage, the grilled Antiochian cheese and some black tea. Everything was tasty and the products are of outstanding quality. On top of this, we enjoyed our breakfast with nice classical music on the background. A day dream which I don’t want to wake up from !!!
Anything bad? For me almost nothing, if it is not the lack of Kaymak in the menu.

Name: Smyrna Cihangir
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Mahallesi, Akarsu Ykş. Sok. No:29, Beyoğlu
Author: Sally Willnow
Review: the food was delicious and the waiter was super nice! will definitely come back

Name: EHLİ KEYF CAFE
Address: Hoca Paşa, hocapasa camii sokak no 7, Fatih
Author: Martyna Sz
Review: Found it by accident and I’m very glad I tried it. Fantastic food, fresh, spiced and prices are really great. I loved both the dinner and the breakfast. The staff will make sure you get your tea after the meal :) Super nice and friendly people working there :) I strongly recommend to try :)

Name: EHLİ KEYF CAFE
Address: Hoca Paşa, hocapasa camii sokak no 7, Fatih
Author: Sadia N
Review: Amazing little gem near our hotel. It is absolutely deserving of all these good reviews. The service, the presentation, the staff, the ambience, the interior...everything was 10/10. Would 100% come back here. The apple tea and pomegranate tea were amazing. The fruit platter was very cute (see pictures). Thanks Aydin and team!

Name: EHLİ KEYF CAFE
Address: Hoca Paşa, hocapasa camii sokak no 7, Fatih
Author: Mohammad Dalgamoni
Review:
I recently visited this Cafe and had an absolutely delightful experience! From the moment I walked in, I was greeted with warm smiles and a welcoming atmosphere. The ambiance was cozy and beautifully decorated with authentic Turkish touches.

But what truly set this place apart was the staff. They were not only incredibly friendly but also hilariously funny! Their witty jokes and playful banter kept us laughing throughout our meal. It's rare to find a place where the staff genuinely enjoys making customers happy, and it made the experience unforgettable.

The food was outstanding! We tried a variety of dishes, and each one was bursting with flavor. The kebabs were perfectly cooked, the mezes were fresh and delicious, and the baklava was the perfect sweet ending to our meal. The staff's recommendations were spot-on, and they even threw in a few extra laughs with their suggestions.

If you're looking for a place with great food and a side of humor, Turkish Cafe is the spot for you. I can't wait to go back and see what jokes they'll have next time! Highly recommended for both the cuisine and the incredible, funny staff.

Name: EHLİ KEYF CAFE
Address: Hoca Paşa, hocapasa camii sokak no 7, Fatih
Author: Roy Bachynskyi
Review: I highly recommend you to visit this place. The staff is very welcoming and extremely hospitable! The prices are adequate. If you are near Sultanahmet, just come here and enjoy very delicious dishes!  I will definitely come back once I'm in Istanbul

Name: EHLİ KEYF CAFE
Address: Hoca Paşa, hocapasa camii sokak no 7, Fatih
Author: Adam Redman
Review: Atmosphere was great. The staff is very friendly and helpful. Aydin was amazing. Everyone is beyond professional. I can’t recommend enough. The food is very good and fresh.

Name: Cafe Nairobi
Address: Gültepe, Reyhan Cd. No:34, Küçükçekmece
Author: Ali Tallat
Review: Good Food Spicy😋😋 I just went in for the free Wifi as i was out of data.. but then i order food and really like it.. especially there chicken wrap.. it tastes good and only cost 16 TL

Name: Cafe Nairobi
Address: Gültepe, Reyhan Cd. No:34, Küçükçekmece
Author: Alexandr K
Review: Good. Food is nice, prices are fair. Nobody of the staff speaks English.

Name: Cafe Nairobi
Address: Gültepe, Reyhan Cd. No:34, Küçükçekmece
Author: Bouthayna Derouiche
Review: The wrap was delicious and the service was amazing. Thank you

Name: Cafe Nairobi
Address: Gültepe, Reyhan Cd. No:34, Küçükçekmece
Author: Zubair Alshikhi
Review: A perfect place for studying or just hanging out with friends

Name: Cafe Nairobi
Address: Gültepe, Reyhan Cd. No:34, Küçükçekmece
Author: Asad Ullah
Review: Best

Name: Lusnika Cafe
Address: Osmanağa, Üzerlik Sk No:11, Kadıköy
Author: osamah alzahrani
Review:
The location is hidden which even better 😄. It is an old building with a historical texture. The owner was very welcoming and friendly, the atmosphere is very nice and the price is affordable.

Unfortunately, I forget to order the popular dish (ordered omlette 😅). I really recommend this place, come here if you are visiting Kadioky.

Name: Lusnika Cafe
Address: Osmanağa, Üzerlik Sk No:11, Kadıköy
Author: Marina Mozgovaya
Review: Great food , big portions, cheap . Nice local atmosphere and very friendly service . 100% recommended

Name: Lusnika Cafe
Address: Osmanağa, Üzerlik Sk No:11, Kadıköy
Author: Luka Varsimashvili
Review: Kind of a hidden place and it gives its charm. amazing atmosphere, amazing service, amazing food and overall a very good experience. would love to visit again. 100% recommend. ♥️

Name: Lusnika Cafe
Address: Osmanağa, Üzerlik Sk No:11, Kadıköy
Author: Anahita Moaddab
Review:
The sahanda yumurta (beyaz peynirli) was delicious. Maybe too much oil but delicious 😋
The atmosphere is great, sitting in a tiny square watching people getting by.

Name: Lusnika Cafe
Address: Osmanağa, Üzerlik Sk No:11, Kadıköy
Author: Sreejith Njamelil
Review: This is the place where you would go “finger licking good menemen”

Name: MY TERRACE CAFE & RESTAURANT
Address: Küçük Ayasofya, Şht. Mehmet Paşa Sk. No:9, Fatih
Author: Tiddles
Review: Absolutely sublime place to come for Turkish breakfast. Outstanding staff, so attentive, friendly with exceptional customer service, and the views are stunning too. Find this place day or night. You will not be disappointed. I'd have given it 6 stars if it were possible.

Name: MY TERRACE CAFE & RESTAURANT
Address: Küçük Ayasofya, Şht. Mehmet Paşa Sk. No:9, Fatih
Author: the last cool kid on earth
Review: Fantastic experience at My Terrace Cafe!The views of Istanbul are breathtaking, and the cozy atmosphere makes it the perfect spot to relax. The food was delicious, and the staff were friendly and attentive. Highly recommend for anyone looking to enjoy great food with an amazing view! Prices are amazing!

Name: MY TERRACE CAFE & RESTAURANT
Address: Küçük Ayasofya, Şht. Mehmet Paşa Sk. No:9, Fatih
Author: Benael Kci
Review: Excellent Turkish breakfast, the gentleman that serves and runs upstairs is amazing. Good value and the view is great. Honeycomb and clotted cream and tahini and molasses - divine. Would highly recommend this place. Will definitely go back.

Name: MY TERRACE CAFE & RESTAURANT
Address: Küçük Ayasofya, Şht. Mehmet Paşa Sk. No:9, Fatih
Author: KodieBryant
Review: A beautiful terrace restaurant with stunning views. The food was good but would expect a bit better for the price paid. The service would have been good except for one thing… the game of musical chairs. We sat in the restaurant and were enjoying the view when we were told to move to another table so the staff could accommodate a larger party. After we moved we noticed other diners being moved also (including people who were eating their meals). One of the couples was unhappy and had been asked to move 4 times. I believe the root of this issue is that the owner wants everyone to enjoy the beautiful view (and probably post on their social media for publicity). But in doing that, the service is actually worsened as asking people to move, especially when enjoying a meal. We were told this restaurant was a must do when in Istanbul, But in the future, I will be giving this a miss.

Name: MY TERRACE CAFE & RESTAURANT
Address: Küçük Ayasofya, Şht. Mehmet Paşa Sk. No:9, Fatih
Author: Ella Berishev
Review: Pretty rooftop bar with a view of the the sea of marmara. Food is good, ambiance is also nice but the electricity was out when we visited so the menu was limited.

Name: Cafe Jêle
Address: Osmanağa, Ali Suavi Sk. 22/A, Kadıköy
Author: George Morteanu
Review:
delicious Turkish breakfast 🍳
Everything was fresh and tasty
Definitely recommend

Name: Cafe Jêle
Address: Osmanağa, Ali Suavi Sk. 22/A, Kadıköy
Author: Two Shanes Travels
Review: It's a great place if you like eating your breakfast in the middle of an ashtray! Came all the way over here based on the good reviews only to discover it's filled with cigarette smoke!  I'm guessing Turks like this place because so many smoke, but if you're an expat/foreigner, you're gonna want to give this place a pass. Time to get with the times.

Name: Cafe Jêle
Address: Osmanağa, Ali Suavi Sk. 22/A, Kadıköy
Author: Anuradha Mallya Shukla
Review:
We reached Cafe Jêle based on reviews from other people on Google, and we were glad we chose this place!
This is a small simple looking Cafe, with very good food, really friendly and responsive staff. We chose 3 different breakfast platters, and we were not disappointed! The items in each platter were pretty different, the taste was very good and the quantity was good!
We would love to visit this place again ❤️
We recommend this place certainly, if you are on the Asian side of Istanbul!

Name: Cafe Jêle
Address: Osmanağa, Ali Suavi Sk. 22/A, Kadıköy
Author: Dani Yoon
Review: Pretty space, Mediterranean and Hot breakfast were good, but there are better places in Moda to get a Turkish Breakfast

Name: Cafe Jêle
Address: Osmanağa, Ali Suavi Sk. 22/A, Kadıköy
Author: Aya Ben Rhaim
Review:
English Waiters Speakers are needed.
Also considering providing vegan milk I was shocked when we ordered the 🌱 pasta but there was no oat milk :(.
It’s a nice atmosphere than need some small improvements :) 🩷.

Name: Dervis Cafe & Restaurant
Address: Sultan Ahmet, Kabasakal Cd. No:1 D:2, Fatih
Author: Asim butt Foodies gang
Review: Nice place if u are around sultan ahmet area in Istanbul … atmosphere is nice , music is nice , good sheehsa options , good value for food and beverage

Name: Dervis Cafe & Restaurant
Address: Sultan Ahmet, Kabasakal Cd. No:1 D:2, Fatih
Author: Margaretta Domanska
Review:
I rarely write a negative review but I must warn you!
I was kinda pushed into eating there because  I was with a group of people. Otherwise, I wouldn't choose this place because of their limited menu, comparable to a bad Turkish takeaway anywhere outside of Turkey. The portions were microscopic and the prices extortionate because of the location. Verging on tourist scam. To top it off, it gave me the worst stomach ever. A very unpleasant afternoon at the hotel.
Have a coffee if you dare, find somewhere else to eat. I'm going to show you a picture so you can see what they call Kofte.

Name: Dervis Cafe & Restaurant
Address: Sultan Ahmet, Kabasakal Cd. No:1 D:2, Fatih
Author: Aleksandra Nikaj
Review: Great service. Friendly staff. Delicious food. We ordered different dishes and each of them was delicious and tasty. We came here twice during our stay in Istanbul and they also can help you with tickets to the boat tour into Bosphorus which is worth it. Highly recommend. Keep up the good work guys!

Name: Dervis Cafe & Restaurant
Address: Sultan Ahmet, Kabasakal Cd. No:1 D:2, Fatih
Author: adrian carr
Review: Very nice ambiance with view of the mosques and enjoyable live music. Very nice staff - although they were obliged to (gently) try to sell us a boat trip. Very average, okay food. Surprisingly expensive cheesecake: one piece, 25% of bill! Overall we enjoyed our evening at Dervis Cafe.

Name: Dervis Cafe & Restaurant
Address: Sultan Ahmet, Kabasakal Cd. No:1 D:2, Fatih
Author: Saurav Bandyopadhyay
Review:
Open air restaurant.Very close to Hagia Sophia. It was on 29th of Dec 2023- pick holiday session, so there were huge rush and stuffes were literally running around table to table,They took a little time to serve.After the huge rush also they served and talked very politely. Price are not that high, its modarated.
We had crep with chicken, I did not liked the test, I had better crep in some other places.Juice was fresh.

Name: Arada Cafe
Address: Hacımimi, Lüleci Hendek Cd. 23a, Beyoğlu
Author: Winsome Yuen
Review: Loved this quaint Lebanese restaurant/cafe tucked away on the side street away from the crowds. The decor is very colourful making it a very welcoming place. They have a lot of food options at reasonable prices. We got a free starter too! Food was delicious and a nice break from Turkish food we were eating all holiday.

Name: Arada Cafe
Address: Hacımimi, Lüleci Hendek Cd. 23a, Beyoğlu
Author: Melissa
Review: Fantastic place! The food and service was some of the best we experienced on our  Turkey trip. We got a late night spot on their patio, tried a variety of items and everything was so flavourful and fresh. We were even brought a vegan appetizer on the house (as they noticed most of what we ordered was veg based) 🥰

Name: Arada Cafe
Address: Hacımimi, Lüleci Hendek Cd. 23a, Beyoğlu
Author: Mitali Sharma
Review:
Very nice food, beautiful plating, and friendly staff! Dana provided quick service. She and Yahya are very sweet and helpful. They even gave us some lentil rolls on the house, as we had a few vegetarians in our group. They had plenty of options and enjoyed the food as well!
Bonus: adorable cats to feed leftovers to, very sweet, not pushy at all, but appreciative of little bits and pieces.

Name: Arada Cafe
Address: Hacımimi, Lüleci Hendek Cd. 23a, Beyoğlu
Author: S
Review:
Arada Restaurant is truly a hidden gem! The food was nothing short of excellent – each dish bursting with flavor and beautifully presented. From the creamy hummus to the perfectly cooked falafel, everything tasted fresh and authentic.

The ambiance of the restaurant is absolutely stunning, with lush greenery everywhere, creating a peaceful and refreshing environment that makes you feel like you're dining in a secret garden. The attention to detail in both the decor and the food made the whole experience unforgettable.

Highly recommend for anyone looking for a delicious meal in a gorgeous setting! Will definitely be returning soon! 🌿🍽️

Name: Arada Cafe
Address: Hacımimi, Lüleci Hendek Cd. 23a, Beyoğlu
Author: Malavika Kale
Review: After a long day walking around Istanbul (and only finding cheese/bread options for veg eaters), this gem of a Lebanese restaurant was a tasty vegetarian food haven for us! All the dishes tasted great, had pretty presentation, and were plated in a way that made it easy to share.

Name: Concept Cafe Bistro
Address: Halkalı Merkez, Küçükçekmece
Author: Islamia 27m
Review:
Great experience with food, staff, tea & coffee. Calm and peaceful environment 👍🏼

Perfect place to sit and enjoy coffee
and also WiFi available ✨

Definitely recommend this place! 💥

Çok teşekkür ederim ❤️

Name: Concept Cafe Bistro
Address: Halkalı Merkez, Küçükçekmece
Author: Lulseged Solomon
Review: Nice place lise it tank to turgut

Name: Concept Cafe Bistro
Address: Halkalı Merkez, Küçükçekmece
Author: Tajinder Pal
Review: Very nice place

Name: Concept Cafe Bistro
Address: Halkalı Merkez, Küçükçekmece
Author: L

Name: Concept Cafe Bistro
Address: Halkalı Merkez, Küçükçekmece
Author: Lulseged Solomon
Review: Best place

Name: Galata Frida House Cafe
Address: Şahkulu, İlk Belediye Cd. Çinili Han NO:6/B No: 6/2, Beyoğlu
Author: Hanmo Li
Review:
Turkey/Greece July 2024 Trip: Breakfast at @galatafridahouse - this place serves a huge platter of Turkish breakfast. Lots of different things! You definitely won't leave there hungry 😜. Note that there is a lot of cheese.
.
Turkish village breakfast for 2: Traditional Bread Basket (Bread, Bagel), Van Cheese, Feta Cheese, Cheddar Cheese, Chechil Cheese, Lor Cheese, Acuka, French Fries, Cheese Pastry, Black Olives, Green Olives, Sausage, Honey, Milk Cream, Jam, Grape, Tahini, Molasses, Chocolate, Fried Egg with Sausage, Cucumber, Tomato, Cheese Pancakes Teapot, 2 Turkish Coffees.

Name: Galata Frida House Cafe
Address: Şahkulu, İlk Belediye Cd. Çinili Han NO:6/B No: 6/2, Beyoğlu
Author: 신ᄆᄌ
Review:
Perfect place for Türkiye breakfast 🥰
There are quite various types of plates(sauces and cheese)🥺 actually I couldn't even take picture of all plates!

Name: Galata Frida House Cafe
Address: Şahkulu, İlk Belediye Cd. Çinili Han NO:6/B No: 6/2, Beyoğlu
Author: YEVHENIIA REHUSH
Review: I went to a cafe for a late dinner and chose traditional Gözleme with cheese. I was the only client, maybe the last one was quite late. I liked the interior and atmosphere. The gozleme was cheesy and the dough was light.

Name: Galata Frida House Cafe
Address: Şahkulu, İlk Belediye Cd. Çinili Han NO:6/B No: 6/2, Beyoğlu
Author: Jarod Stos
Review: The place is nice but the food really disappointing. The presentation was awful and the quality of food really low. After seeing 4.8 rating I came here hoping for a real treat. French fries and lettuce for Turkish breakfast really didn’t do the trick. I recommend you go elsewhere

Name: Galata Frida House Cafe
Address: Şahkulu, İlk Belediye Cd. Çinili Han NO:6/B No: 6/2, Beyoğlu
Author: Evgenia Kornienko
Review: Wow, you must hear about this fantastic breakfast spot I discovered with my family! We went there twice and both times were fantastic. The food was just delicious, with a great selection of local and European cuisine. The ambiance was incredible, too, making the experience all the more enjoyable. Trust me, if you're looking for a top-notch breakfast spot, this is the place to be! And don't even get me started on the Gozleme; it was out of this world! Seriously, you don't want to miss out on this gem.

Name: Giriftar Cafe
Address: Demirtaş, Yüksekler Sk. No:4, Fatih
Author: Fasy Ismail
Review: I had a wonderful experience at Giriftar Cafe in Istanbul. We visited at sunset, and the view was absolutely breathtaking, offering a stunning panorama of the city as the sky changed colors. The atmosphere was cozy and relaxing, making it the perfect spot to unwind. The food and drinks were excellent, complementing the beautiful surroundings. The staff were friendly and attentive, ensuring we had a great time. If you're looking for a place with amazing views and a peaceful vibe, Giriftar Cafe is a must-visit in Istanbul.

Name: Giriftar Cafe
Address: Demirtaş, Yüksekler Sk. No:4, Fatih
Author: norman
Review:
A wonderful view on the terrace over the Haliç and the city with Galata Tower and the Yeni Çami.
The staff is so friendly and helpful and the food tastes very good for reasonable prices.
We've had a great time at the Giriftar Cafe!!

Name: Giriftar Cafe
Address: Demirtaş, Yüksekler Sk. No:4, Fatih
Author: Raisa GT
Review:
A beautiful view over the channel and the town.
It was worth going there by night. This conferred more splendor to the place and the sightseeing.

Staff is very friendly, always smiling to you and ready to help

We only went there for a quiet evening after a long walking day. We smoke narghilea, had a cocktail,  tea and excellent coffee.
There's also wi-fi over there.

Name: Giriftar Cafe
Address: Demirtaş, Yüksekler Sk. No:4, Fatih
Author: Sameh Khanfir
Review:
The café boasts a terrific view with a vast and nicely designed area. There are both upstairs and downstairs seating, creating a comfortable and versatile space. The presence of Arabic staff contributes to a friendly atmosphere. Notably, a Moroccan lady named Fatma was particularly friendly and helpful.

However, I rated the service 3/5 because of an extra charge for high-amount orders. We were charged an additional 250 TL for our large order that cost 1680 tl ( * called service fee), which felt like a punishment for ordering more. On a previous visit, they charged my three friends 150 TL, and this time, they claimed the 250 TL charge was already discounted. This policy made me feel unwelcome and reluctant to return. While they do provide service, as expected in any restaurant, this extra charge diminishes the overall experience.

In general, the café offers a delightful atmosphere and is worth visiting if you don't mind the extra service charges for large orders.

Name: Giriftar Cafe
Address: Demirtaş, Yüksekler Sk. No:4, Fatih
Author: Janny Espino
Review:
A restaurant with an excellent view!
We luckily came with a nice weather. We could take unique pictures. The waiter Bilal was very helpful and recommended us the best breakfast! I am sure I will come back with my family. A very nice and pleasant experience!

Name: Palatium Cafe and Restaurant
Address: Cankurtaran, Kutlugün Sk. No: 33, Fatih
Author: Eva Lee
Review: The kebab was very delicious, this cafe has it’s brick Woodfire oven for the peta bread. The peta was warm and fresh. It also offers a wide range of alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks. Especially it offers white, rose, red and sparkling wines, from Turkey wine regions. We also tried Shisha, it’s very lovely and fun.

Name: Palatium Cafe and Restaurant
Address: Cankurtaran, Kutlugün Sk. No: 33, Fatih
Author: Claire L
Review:
The only restaurant that didn’t have someone outside badgering you.

Interesting interior, very chilled service and great food. Highly recommend , much better than any of the surrounding restaurants

Name: Palatium Cafe and Restaurant
Address: Cankurtaran, Kutlugün Sk. No: 33, Fatih
Author: Stephen Burdis
Review: We visited this place twice on our trip to Istanbul. Delicious food, relaxing atmosphere and friendly staff. Highly recommended.

Name: Palatium Cafe and Restaurant
Address: Cankurtaran, Kutlugün Sk. No: 33, Fatih
Author: Tatjana Kovtuna
Review: I have to say, we were here twice for dinner! The first thing you’ll notice is the nice interior, and there’s no annoying staff trying to lure you in. The service is very nice, and the food is good. The only exception was the shish kebab, which was a bit dry for my taste, but all the other meats were perfect! The starters and wine were also very nice. We also tried the hookah, which was good! The prices are reasonable, not just for tourists, but for anyone looking for a good place with nice food and service. And I received special attention! I recommend this place because in Istanbul, it’s not so easy to find a good spot without being overpriced.

Name: Palatium Cafe and Restaurant
Address: Cankurtaran, Kutlugün Sk. No: 33, Fatih
Author: Hamza Hydri Syed
Review:
This was one of the first restaurants in Istanbul where we had dinner during our travel to Turkey this summer. Obviously, our expectations were quite high :)

The food was good, not exceptional. The kebabs were well done. The ambience was good, but very dark, with not enough light. Service was ordinary, with the waiter mixing up our order. They did correct it later. I walked across the place several times during our stay in that area, but we never felt interested to go back again.

Name: ALKENT CAFE RESTORAN
Address: Hillside city clup, Akat Mah. Kaktüs Sk, Alkent Sitesi D:3/1, Beşiktaş
Author: Aylin D
Review: Lots of options and vegan options. The atmosphere feels like you’re on holiday. Staff is per friendly and quick. Food is delicious 10/10

Name: ALKENT CAFE RESTORAN
Address: Hillside city clup, Akat Mah. Kaktüs Sk, Alkent Sitesi D:3/1, Beşiktaş
Author: Юлия Бутенко
Review:
Big portions, we couldn’t finish the fish and the price is pretty cheap compared to other restaurants, we liked it and would return again for sure 👍🏼
Service is super fast and professional.

Name: ALKENT CAFE RESTORAN
Address: Hillside city clup, Akat Mah. Kaktüs Sk, Alkent Sitesi D:3/1, Beşiktaş
Author: C L Yilmaz
Review: Absolutely amazing place. The staff are incredible. Food is delicious. Visit without hesitation you will enjoy the experience.

Name: ALKENT CAFE RESTORAN
Address: Hillside city clup, Akat Mah. Kaktüs Sk, Alkent Sitesi D:3/1, Beşiktaş
Author: Michele Bianchini
Review: Very nice place and very nice food.

Name: ALKENT CAFE RESTORAN
Address: Hillside city clup, Akat Mah. Kaktüs Sk, Alkent Sitesi D:3/1, Beşiktaş
Author: Derya Gun
Review: Excellent food, cozy atmosphere, friendly but perfect service and affordable prices. Advisable for informal lunch or dinner

Name: Sera House Cafe
Address: İcadiye, Cemil Meriç Sk. No:31, Üsküdar
Author: Anja E
Review: I love it here! The food is so good and fresh and you will never leave hungry. The people working here are so nice and you never have to wait long. It’s so nice to sit here in the shadow between the plants and with some nice music. And the best thing are the cats who will be great company 💖

Name: Sera House Cafe
Address: İcadiye, Cemil Meriç Sk. No:31, Üsküdar
Author: Михаил Лабинцев
Review:
Cafe in the courtyard of the house-hotel. It's small but cozy and the food here is very tasty. The staff is polite, and the owners care a lot about the quality of food and service. If you are a foreigner, you won't experience any discomfort either, the cafe has Wifi and the menu is available electronically. And each dish has a picture and description in English.
Be sure to try the desserts.

And don't forget to pet the local cats.

Name: Sera House Cafe
Address: İcadiye, Cemil Meriç Sk. No:31, Üsküdar
Author: Rana Elsawy
Review:
Absolutely one of the hidden gems in Üsküdar region 🤩
The place is very cozy, and staff is friendly.
I tried Manti, it was good but I’m sure they have better dishes.
I can’t wait to visit it when it’s snowing ☃️🩵

Name: Sera House Cafe
Address: İcadiye, Cemil Meriç Sk. No:31, Üsküdar
Author: Yara Yehya
Review:
Very cozy place and they care about the environment  :)
They are friendly and helpful and try to attend to their guests needs. They provide helpful directions about the area and provide istabul cards for the busses.

Name: Sera House Cafe
Address: İcadiye, Cemil Meriç Sk. No:31, Üsküdar
Author: wender wisney moreira
Review: Great cafe to have some Turkish Breakfast, friendly staff and amazing food.

Name: Marasco Cafe
Address: Küçük Çamlıca, mahallesi, Uluçınar Sokağı no:17, Üsküdar
Author: Samah Jamaleddine
Review:
Food is very tasty and the ambience is so nice
Chicken crepe and Tiramsu are marvellous 🤩

Name: Marasco Cafe
Address: Küçük Çamlıca, mahallesi, Uluçınar Sokağı no:17, Üsküdar
Author: Синёва Анна
Review: I'm in looooove with this place! Is so quiet and peaceful, here you could have garden picknick not leaving city ☺️ pide - 10/ 10, you could watch how it's cooking at open kitchen! Waiter was really nice and friendly. Thank you, i definitely will visit Marasco again ☺️

Name: Marasco Cafe
Address: Küçük Çamlıca, mahallesi, Uluçınar Sokağı no:17, Üsküdar
Author: Aysu Yildirim
Review: It is a very cozy place and I highly recommend this place. The food is amazing, you can eat one of the best pizzas and pastas here. I ate Fettuccine which was amazing 🤩. The staff members are so kind and sweet. Thank you for everything. The staff know good English you won’t have a problem communicating.

Name: Marasco Cafe
Address: Küçük Çamlıca, mahallesi, Uluçınar Sokağı no:17, Üsküdar
Author: Anna Petruzova
Review: Extremely good cafe! Extremely friendly staff. We ordered pizza, pide, chicken burger, meatballs and everything was excellent!! We got more than we could wish

Name: Marasco Cafe
Address: Küçük Çamlıca, mahallesi, Uluçınar Sokağı no:17, Üsküdar
Author: Dee Varel
Review: A lovely hidden garden cafe in Üsküdar. They have a wide menu, including a very nice breakfast plate and breakfast varieties, lunch and main meals not to mention a pizza oven. I’m yet to try their pizzas. Also nice coffee. Staff are kind and attentive. Atmosphere is peaceful. I highly recommend this place

Name: The Kent
Address: Cihangir, Sıraselviler Cd. No:71, Beyoğlu
Author: haleh tafreshi
Review: Beşiktaş is a neighborhood full of cafes and restaurants, Kent is one of these cafes, the place is excellent, the service is average, but it is recommended because it is a special pleasure, and the bathroom is clean and tidy.

Name: The Kent
Address: Cihangir, Sıraselviler Cd. No:71, Beyoğlu
Author: Agit21 Rzg

Name: The Kent
Address: Cihangir, Sıraselviler Cd. No:71, Beyoğlu
Author: Serdar Uğuz

Name: Harab'be Cafe
Address: Alemdar, Ticarethane Çk. No:4B, Fatih
Author: Rehana Chui
Review: A cute little find tucked in the corner of a busy hot city! Ramazan provided great service and advice. The food was great. The shisha was smooth and there is Osma…the fluffy loveable cafe cat who loves treats and cuddles. We sat and rested for a good few hours as we liked the atmosphere and music. Definitely recommend visiting here to chill out and will be back when we are next in Istanbul!

Name: Harab'be Cafe
Address: Alemdar, Ticarethane Çk. No:4B, Fatih
Author: YiRu Lin
Review: Love the staffs and the atmosphere here. The staff was so kind who arranged the seat for me to watch the football and lent me the charger. Really had a wonderful time during my last few hours stay here!

Name: Harab'be Cafe
Address: Alemdar, Ticarethane Çk. No:4B, Fatih
Author: Suf
Review:
This is the best shisha café in Istanbul.

The ambience is amazing, you can feel the chill vibes as soon as you walk in. The decor is fantastic. They have good WiFi, and clean toilet facilities. The prices are far below what I would pay in the UK.

I enjoyed shisha every day during my stay, the flavours I tried were Spiced Chai, Pinkman and Kiwi Smoothie, all were super smooth had really good smoke and the flavour lasted long.

The hospitality and service from the guys was exceptionally good and I had a great time watching the football together.

I highly recommend this place.

Name: Harab'be Cafe
Address: Alemdar, Ticarethane Çk. No:4B, Fatih
Author: Ena Ćurić
Review:
We found this place on Google Review. I must say it totally deserve 5.0 star!
Place is in good location, easy reachble with uber or by walk. Once u enter you feel Like home! We Had shisha which was amazing and price was normal comparing to prices in taksim, istiklal… and we Had cocktails. Waiter who was serving us was super nice, friendly and polite. We Had amazing time and after we finished with our drinks, he brought us complimentary tea. In this places alcohol is normal price and they dont charge service like in some other places so definitely they deserve a tip. I also need to highlight atmosphere was so nice and music was perfect.
We re very happy we discovered this place and for sure we ll come back.

Name: Harab'be Cafe
Address: Alemdar, Ticarethane Çk. No:4B, Fatih
Author: House Of Ichigo
Review: Honestly no wonder they got all these amazing reviews! An amazing hidden gem in the middle of a crazy area. Definitely recommend for a nice, cozy and quiet time! Great hookah and great people working there!

Name: Dolmabahçe Cafe
Address: Ömer Avni, Dolmabahçe Gazhane Cd. No:3, Beyoğlu
Author: Andres Robayo Cruz
Review: Dolmabahce Cafe is a delightful spot that deserves a solid four stars for its excellent service and delicious food. The staff is attentive and friendly, ensuring a pleasant dining experience from start to finish. The menu offers a variety of tasty options, all prepared with care and presented beautifully. With its charming ambiance and picturesque views of the Bosphorus, Dolmabahce Cafe is an ideal place to enjoy a meal while soaking in the rich history and beauty of Istanbul.

Name: Dolmabahçe Cafe
Address: Ömer Avni, Dolmabahçe Gazhane Cd. No:3, Beyoğlu
Author: Bana Biri
Review: Good is super delicious. Meat was tender and tasty. The service is great also. Even their tea was perfect and complimentary (this is now). Appetizers were also yummy. The quantity is sufficient and more than enough. So far, This is one of my favourites here.

Name: Dolmabahçe Cafe
Address: Ömer Avni, Dolmabahçe Gazhane Cd. No:3, Beyoğlu
Author: Cool 7adee
Review:
If u like to feel the real İstanbul, between the trees and the sound of the city and If u like to chill and enjoying ur iced coffee u have to come to Dolmabahçe Cafe.
(Efe) Thank u for ur nice smile and great service

Name: Dolmabahçe Cafe
Address: Ömer Avni, Dolmabahçe Gazhane Cd. No:3, Beyoğlu
Author: Alessia Cristini
Review:
Excellent service, very helpful and friendly staff.
special thanks to Efe who treated us very well, there should be more waiters like that.
highly recommend

Name: Dolmabahçe Cafe
Address: Ömer Avni, Dolmabahçe Gazhane Cd. No:3, Beyoğlu
Author: Josep Porres
Review:
I made a stop here for a coffee. I had a good experience with the service, the place was very nice under the shade of trees and a view from that point of the hill. I have to mention the toilet was clean too.
On the other hand, turkish coffee was the worst I have tried in Istanbul. Like sipping mud.
I understand that is a minor con and can be easily improved.
Well, it was a bit pricey.

Address: Akarsu Yokuşu Caddesi, Coşkun Sk. No:2/1, Beyoğlu
Author: Shaf Bdn
Review: This place is an absolute gem because of its quality and mouth watering food. Went there some time this week and I was bowled over by their avocado toast. Service is great, very polite and professional. The place is tiny (not a great thing for big groups) but cozy and charming. I was invited there by friends and were told that everything on the menu is delish and I have to say, I'm not surprised. Will definitely be back.

Address: Akarsu Yokuşu Caddesi, Coşkun Sk. No:2/1, Beyoğlu
Author: Aulon Kuqi
Review: Delicious food, great service, lovely atmosphere, great music! The food came so fast! We tried the chicken soup, burgers and fries, zucchini fritters, tortellini, fruit detox juice. I mean the selection is incredible! I am amazed how they managed to make such delicious food with such variety!

Address: Akarsu Yokuşu Caddesi, Coşkun Sk. No:2/1, Beyoğlu
Author: Jasmine Hassan
Review:
Love this place!! Very friendly, cozy atmosphere
The food was 👌🏻.
Fettuccine Alfredo was spot on!
Cesar salad needs a bit more work on the seasoning.
Other than that perfect! The menu was so tempting i will definitely come back again to try new things!

Address: Akarsu Yokuşu Caddesi, Coşkun Sk. No:2/1, Beyoğlu
Author: Dua Allo
Review:
Perfect service, affordable for a lot of food
Really love it
I ordered a breakfast for one and it’s perfect 👌🏻

Address: Akarsu Yokuşu Caddesi, Coşkun Sk. No:2/1, Beyoğlu
Author: Nadinka Verbitskaya
Review:
It’s my favorite place in Cihangir. Nice atmosphere, interesting people. You can easily meet there some actors and other people of art. Pet friendly place, there is always black and white cat sleeping somewhere inside)) And this time it was big nice dog sleeping near our table.
My favorite dish here is Bonfile manti. Actually it’s very similar to Russian pelmeni but also with beef pieces and yoghurt on it. Served with salad 🥗

Name: RON CAFE
Address: Teşvikiye, Şakayık Sk. No:48/A, Şişli
Author: Elvira
Review: really good taste and healthy options. liked the atmosphere /design too. def recommended !!

Name: RON CAFE
Address: Teşvikiye, Şakayık Sk. No:48/A, Şişli
Author: Alexandre S.
Review: One of the healthiest and at the same time tastiest places I've found in Istanbul. And friendly staff. Highly recommend. Only one question still bothers me. Guests here were allowed to feed their dog with the same damn fork they eat their salad🤮🤮🤮 Please assure me that you clean your dishes thoroughly otherwise it is TOTALLY disgusting. And please, for gosh sake, don't allow anyone use their utensils to feed their ANIMALS

Name: RON CAFE
Address: Teşvikiye, Şakayık Sk. No:48/A, Şişli
Author: Glafira Marcon
Review: I loved my meal at this cafe! The coffee was great, the Menemen was delicious, and the service was fantastic! I’ll definitely be back.

Name: RON CAFE
Address: Teşvikiye, Şakayık Sk. No:48/A, Şişli
Author: Nikita Ravlyuk
Review:
Yes! Finally! The best breakfast place in Istanbul!

Stop choosing and just come here. The food is amazing. The service is really good.

Next time I'm in Istanbul I'll choose the place next to the Ron. It is that good 👍

Name: RON CAFE
Address: Teşvikiye, Şakayık Sk. No:48/A, Şişli
Author: Zachary Golden
Review: Went there for breakfast, came out satisfied. Great atmosphere and really good croissants!

Name: Garden Cafe
Address: Mecidiyeköy, Fulya Mahallesi Ortaklar Caddesi, Bahçeler Sokağı Somay İş Merkezi D:2, 9-B, Şişli
Author: Yiğit Torun
Review: Woaw! Amazing hidden spot with very cool vibes and delicious food. Also not that expensive. It’s a wonderful place for a getaway day 🤓 Also, the music was not loud at all, it is very calm. The staff were lovely too!! ❤️

Name: Garden Cafe
Address: Mecidiyeköy, Fulya Mahallesi Ortaklar Caddesi, Bahçeler Sokağı Somay İş Merkezi D:2, 9-B, Şişli
Author: Mel Meller
Review: My daughter was as excited as I have ever seen her when we discovered this place. She calls it the Harry Potter restaurant. It's all hidden away, with fantastic decor.  We went there several times over the last 2 years.  This time around, we walked past around 3pm, and through, let's go grab a coffee and something to eat quickly before going home.  The place was near empty. We sat down and ordered coffee and chips.  We were a bit perplexed with the response. The waitress told us we must either order food or alcohol drinks.  This was 3pm, on a Thursday.  Who drinks at this time. I can understand that they feel that coffee and chips doesn't make them enough money, but we left feeling very unwelcome.  I didn't mind, but this was literally Disney world for my daughter.. I felt sad for her disappointment. The place lost it's magic for us.

Name: Garden Cafe
Address: Mecidiyeköy, Fulya Mahallesi Ortaklar Caddesi, Bahçeler Sokağı Somay İş Merkezi D:2, 9-B, Şişli
Author: Ali Bueishi
Review: Loved the food and the atmosphere. The vibe and the music was super refreshing, it makes you feel like you are eating in some natural place. The staff were nice and friendly and helped translate the menue :)

Name: Garden Cafe
Address: Mecidiyeköy, Fulya Mahallesi Ortaklar Caddesi, Bahçeler Sokağı Somay İş Merkezi D:2, 9-B, Şişli
Author: Lucille Aires
Review: One of the cutest places in the area! The food is nice, I’ve been here for dinner before. Breakfast however not so good, not many options and the presentation is average. Price is ok, definitely try their fried cheese, it’s great 😋

Name: Garden Cafe
Address: Mecidiyeköy, Fulya Mahallesi Ortaklar Caddesi, Bahçeler Sokağı Somay İş Merkezi D:2, 9-B, Şişli
Author: Mosab Aseel
Review: Marking it as my favorite place in Mecidiyeköy. Relaxing & classy. Wait for the train tho 🚂😍

Name: Cafe Limosa
Address: Topkapı, Turgut Özal Millet Cd No162, Fatih
Author: Mooni A.D
Review: I liked the place very much. The service is nice and fast. The place is also clean and the atmosphere and songs are enjoyable. ✨️I recommend it✨️

Name: Cafe Limosa
Address: Topkapı, Turgut Özal Millet Cd No162, Fatih
Author: Saj N
Review: As tourists, we were treated so nicely by both staff and the owner. Such attentive staff and we were charged exactly the same affordable price on the menu. Enjoyed my time here having shisha and cocktails and hope to be back.

Name: Cafe Limosa
Address: Topkapı, Turgut Özal Millet Cd No162, Fatih
Author: Dante Jensen
Review: Very nice Cafe with relaxing atmosphere to end the day we take shesha. Konafa. Pizza. Tea. And go every night in our trip in Istanbul..

Name: Cafe Limosa
Address: Topkapı, Turgut Özal Millet Cd No162, Fatih
Author: Susan Matthysen
Review: Very authentic experience, not touristy.  The lamb dish was well prepared. Drinks are refreshing.

Name: Cafe Limosa
Address: Topkapı, Turgut Özal Millet Cd No162, Fatih
Author: Mohammed Al-Mukhtar
Review:
Drinks was amazing and so delicious…
Staff very Friendly…and they are speak arabic and english as well …

Highly recommend this place

Name: W.Bi Cafe - Braserrie
Address: Yıldız, W.Bi Brasserie, Çırağan Cd. no:71/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Ari Zingillioglu
Review:
Cozy and nicely decorated lunch break place. While you sip your coffee l, you can enjoy checking out interesting books. I found the Eiffel Tower book. You can find more…

The personnel was okay, the service and treatment was fine. The price of the coffee was a bit higher than other cafés.

The interior design was pretty cool, contemporary and modern.

There is another seating options with partial sea view. It’s located at a nice spot.

Overall rating 4.1/5 for a Café

Name: W.Bi Cafe - Braserrie
Address: Yıldız, W.Bi Brasserie, Çırağan Cd. no:71/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Hugo Pedro-Martins
Review: What a wonderful place for a great coffee and an amazing S. Sebastian cheesecake. You cannot miss this place. The waiters were so nice and so polite. I wish I had this coffee in my country!!!!

Name: W.Bi Cafe - Braserrie
Address: Yıldız, W.Bi Brasserie, Çırağan Cd. no:71/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Kaan Sevenler
Review: Extremely high price per hour for the billiard table (250₺), the drinks and food are overpriced and are subpar in quality. There also is a hidden %10 service fee for every item so you're in for a shock at the register. The only good thing is the design but that doesn't make up lackluster performance in everything else.

Name: W.Bi Cafe - Braserrie
Address: Yıldız, W.Bi Brasserie, Çırağan Cd. no:71/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Yusefturin
Review: amazing place , the design is so pretty and the service was nice , also the food and coffee so delicious

Name: W.Bi Cafe - Braserrie
Address: Yıldız, W.Bi Brasserie, Çırağan Cd. no:71/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Tolgay Polat
Review: It looked cozy and comforting at first, but then a lady who works there told us “not to use any electronic stuff” and claimed it was “against the rules” cause if we use them we would be sitting longer than normal but they dont want customers to sit and enjoy their time there, they want customers to have their drinks, then pay and then leave immediately.. Disappointment, i am sorry for their lack of respect and services. Poor them. I also don’t suggest you to ever go there.

Name: Mivan Restaurant & Cafe
Address: Emin Sinan, Piyer Loti Cd. No:34, Fatih
Author: Anna Surabko
Review:
This restaurant is a real treasure. We found it by accident, but ended up having dinners here every night.
Stuff is super friendly, food is delicious (we tried a lot of stuff), atmosphere is like home.
We love everything about it. We are grateful to creators of this restaurant and to people who work here, you are doing great job. Keep rocking!

Name: Mivan Restaurant & Cafe
Address: Emin Sinan, Piyer Loti Cd. No:34, Fatih
Author: lindsay briglia
Review: Stumbled upon Mivan one night and it looked so inviting! We were seated immediately even though it was almost full!The entire staff was so attentive and everything we had was delicious, I had the Manti and my boyfriend had the lamb skewers. We will definitely be returning!

Name: Mivan Restaurant & Cafe
Address: Emin Sinan, Piyer Loti Cd. No:34, Fatih
Author: Tanya Fernandez
Review:
A restaurant with a lovely atmosphere and aesthetic, the food was fantastic all meat served was very tender. The meal portions are large and very filling especially the excellent crispy chicken salad. We appreciated the complimentary starters and drinks. The service was great!

We also came here for the second time for breakfast which was delicious and very filling.

Name: Mivan Restaurant & Cafe
Address: Emin Sinan, Piyer Loti Cd. No:34, Fatih
Author: Martyna Sz
Review:
One of the best restaurants I tried in Istanbul. Great service, superb location and the food… I’m not so fond of any meat but chicken so I used to order chicken kebab on several places and this one was the best. Big portion, juicy and well seasoned meat, sauce and starters complimentary. It tasted heavenly! The other day I had the big breakfast plate and it was amazing as well.
The restaurant is very nice, has a great decor - definitely recommend :)

Name: Mivan Restaurant & Cafe
Address: Emin Sinan, Piyer Loti Cd. No:34, Fatih
Author: Antonella Monrreal
Review: The food was absolutely delicious, with great quality and flavors that set it apart from other Turkish restaurants. Bige, our waiter, provided outstanding service, ensuring everything arrived quickly and with a smile. The ambiance was also wonderful—clean, comfortable, and inviting. Overall, a fantastic dining experience that I would highly recommend!

Name: ESCAPE CAFE
Address: Şehit Muhtar Mahallesi İstiklal Caddesi, Bekar Sk. No10/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Silvain
Review: Arabic music live. Paid 35eur for simple dinner and two beer. Bit much

Name: ESCAPE CAFE
Address: Şehit Muhtar Mahallesi İstiklal Caddesi, Bekar Sk. No10/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Tarun Kumar Paila (TARS)
Review: Hidden gem just off iskalat street. Excellent service. Great selection off hookah flavors. Decent price. Great ambience.

Name: ESCAPE CAFE
Address: Şehit Muhtar Mahallesi İstiklal Caddesi, Bekar Sk. No10/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Maroua Attaoui
Review:
Sezar is very professional, helpful
He has best shisha ever
The quality of service is perfect
Aboud is one of the best always smiling
Best coffe shop in taksim ever
Keep up the good work ❤️❤️

Name: ESCAPE CAFE
Address: Şehit Muhtar Mahallesi İstiklal Caddesi, Bekar Sk. No10/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Dan S
Review: AVOID!! As other reviews suggest dishonest extortionate pricing! 400 lira (£10) for one beer (50cl) which was from a bottle and warm. Clearly just make up prices to exploit people. I hardly ever review but feel necessary on this occasion to  advise people to avoid this place and not let them spoil your experience of Istanbul!!

Name: ESCAPE CAFE
Address: Şehit Muhtar Mahallesi İstiklal Caddesi, Bekar Sk. No10/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Daisy Cooper
Review: The best place ever, I’ve had the best service from everyone especially Foad and Sezar, great drinks and the music was amazing

Name: Ransserie Cafe House
Address: Cihannüma, Barbaros Blv. No: 77/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Wita Koto
Review: It’s been a year my husband and i can say wr always come to ransserie at least 1 or 2 in a month to try their menu one by one. This time we tried Ramen ; tan tan ramen dan katsu ramen. Such a comfort food in this chilly weather we finish them all. From variant ramen they offer we would definitely recommend you to taste the katsu one because it’s our favorite so far ✨

Name: Ransserie Cafe House
Address: Cihannüma, Barbaros Blv. No: 77/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Ghina Mg
Review:
Such a cute cafe! The coffee was yummy and the staff are so friendly. It was a take-away but the cafe itself was cute and cozy. If I get another chance, I would get boba
Our orders were:
Brown sugar latte
Iced salted caramel latte

Name: Ransserie Cafe House
Address: Cihannüma, Barbaros Blv. No: 77/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Nur Yarşılıkal
Review: Pandan cake was very light. It had salty caramel inside. My friend had green tea bubble tea, she loved it. I had chocolate mint bubble tea. It was a chef's kiss. So delicious. I will definitely come back again for the chocolate mint bubble tea. Looking forward to try other desserts, too.

Name: Ransserie Cafe House
Address: Cihannüma, Barbaros Blv. No: 77/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Mahadiera Artamevia
Review: Going here for the famous pandan cake but unfortunately we run out of it so we had the lotus magnolia & cinnamon roll. The cinnamon roll was great - it was so fluffy & quite big but if only they warmed the cinnamon roll I think it would be better, so the icing would melt😊

Name: Ransserie Cafe House
Address: Cihannüma, Barbaros Blv. No: 77/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Meryem Abayli
Review: Very nice place with good food from different countries. The prices are reasonable and the view is nice. Would recommend

Name: Mono Cafe & Brasserie
Address: Cumhuriyet, Matbaacı Osmanbey Sokagi No:95, Şişli
Author: Chris Barton
Review:
Located on the corner of a busy street, Mono is a fun place to eat. I tried the vegetable soup, which looked like blended green soup until I put my spoon in and found a delightful variety of vegetables and noodles. It was very good.

I was intrigued by the Fried Ice Cream, which is something I'd never tried before. It came out looking like a tennis ball covered in finely crushed corn flakes. When I cut into it, the ice cream was still frozen with only a little bit runny - genius!

It was so good!

The staff were friendly. One thing to note is there is a service charge automatically added to your bill. Check that, and then add whatever you think appropriate.

I saw other food coming out of the kitchen too, and it looked great. Give this restaurant a try. :)

Name: Mono Cafe & Brasserie
Address: Cumhuriyet, Matbaacı Osmanbey Sokagi No:95, Şişli
Author: Dalton White
Review: I had the Sahanda Sucuklu Menemen it was delicious and a mint lemonade.  All excellent!

Name: Mono Cafe & Brasserie
Address: Cumhuriyet, Matbaacı Osmanbey Sokagi No:95, Şişli
Author: Roaa M
Review: Food was good. Excellent customer service.

Name: Mono Cafe & Brasserie
Address: Cumhuriyet, Matbaacı Osmanbey Sokagi No:95, Şişli
Author: Mazen Alghanim
Review: Highly recommended. The food was amazing, and the service was excellent

Name: Mono Cafe & Brasserie
Address: Cumhuriyet, Matbaacı Osmanbey Sokagi No:95, Şişli
Author: Reham Momani
Review: Delicious , I recommend you to try their food ..

Name: The House Cafe
Address: Yıldız, Ortaköy Salhanesi Sk. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Khalid Farrah
Review: Definitely one of my favourite breakfast spots in Istanbul! The view of the Bosporus especially when you take a table close to it was fantastic! The food was actually very good and there were a lot of options especially for egg lovers. Must try the traditional cheese pastry, it was insane! I would definitely recommend it and will surely visit again! Staff were also very nice but English remains a challenge for everyone.

Name: The House Cafe
Address: Yıldız, Ortaköy Salhanesi Sk. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Wael Georgey
Review: we had an amazing experience at this restaurant. We sat by the water and enjoyed the beautiful views, and the food was delicious. The staff were amazing. The prices were great. We highly recommend the spot to anyone that wants to sit on the water and enjoy the beautiful views and the mass of selection of food options. There's a service charge of 12% but prices are reasonable considering the views and quality

Name: The House Cafe
Address: Yıldız, Ortaköy Salhanesi Sk. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Ahmed Al-Akki
Review: We had dinner at this restaurant. It is right at the Bosphorus with beautiful views of the surrounding areas, specially since it was a full moon night. The food was very good and so was the service. I think it is a little bit expensive and the restaurant adds 12% service charge.

Name: The House Cafe
Address: Yıldız, Ortaköy Salhanesi Sk. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: A Sd
Review: I really loved this place they have amazing view next to the sea i tried sujuk with cheese and cay all was tasty and ercan the supervisor was amazing very polite attentive and helpful very recommended

Name: The House Cafe
Address: Yıldız, Ortaköy Salhanesi Sk. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Charlie Bowyer
Review: Sat right at the front on the water , coffee was good and so was the food. Reasonable price. Was empty at 930 when we went which was nice.

Name: Dogaya donus
Address: Teşvikiye, Ahmet Fetgari Sk 18/a, Şişli
Author: Stephanie Khattar
Review: Home made food, located in Teşvikiye. With many options to choose from, by the end of the day nothing is left! Quiet place, very clean and amazing staff.

Name: Dogaya donus
Address: Teşvikiye, Ahmet Fetgari Sk 18/a, Şişli
Author: Andrea Torri
Review:
The waiters are just a huge disaster!
I asked for a coffee, they brought it in the wrong table and when i asked for It 'cause was not arriving they were busy outside just smoking and brought me back what was remaining in the cup of the other table saying It was new and just done when there was still the lipstic on it.
Everyone can make a mistake, no problem absolutely. But don't make fun of a client who just want what he paid for because I am not stupid.

Name: Dogaya donus
Address: Teşvikiye, Ahmet Fetgari Sk 18/a, Şişli
Author: ANAS ABU TAHA
Review: I ordered a Turkish coffee and that’s how I receive it, service is bad, it’s overpriced

Name: Dogaya donus
Address: Teşvikiye, Ahmet Fetgari Sk 18/a, Şişli
Author: Greg Webster
Review: I met my contact and we rehearsed over drinks and the delicate selection of turkish tappas we selected strategically to prepare ourselves for what was about to shadow our day.  After a delighful, and unfettering lapse of palpable bites, I find ourselves ready to leave.  The popcorn is an interesting metaphor of simplicity in an otherwise complex maze of spices left over from my meal.  Maybe this means something.

Name: Dogaya donus
Address: Teşvikiye, Ahmet Fetgari Sk 18/a, Şişli
Author: Arash Etemadi
Review: Great food and service. I loved the salad choices. The price is excellent for the quality.

Name: Bey Kapısı Cafe & Restaurant
Address: Demirtaş, Kepenekçi Sabunhanesi Sk. No:15/B, Fatih
Author: Sujitra Tongta
Review: I accidentally discovered this place from google map for a dinner after a long day visiting Istanbul. It's truly a hidden gem with a very cozy vibe. The owner was so generous and his hospitality is amazing. Although he can't speak english, he was very helpful with the menu recommendations and took a great care of us. We got the bayer wrap, the pomegranate salad and the spring roll. All the food was exceptional!! This place was truly amazing and I would recommend everyone to visit this place! The view was also beautiful despite today's rain. It's surely the best in town❤️❤️

Name: Bey Kapısı Cafe & Restaurant
Address: Demirtaş, Kepenekçi Sabunhanesi Sk. No:15/B, Fatih
Author: Dmitry G.
Review: An absolutely beautiful cafe and Shisha lounge, run by the kind and genuine Pasha. His honesty and openness create a welcoming atmosphere, making the experience feel personal. The food is delicious, and the view is simply breathtaking. It’s a must-visit spot if you’re looking for a tasty lunch with a view that will leave you in awe.

Name: Bey Kapısı Cafe & Restaurant
Address: Demirtaş, Kepenekçi Sabunhanesi Sk. No:15/B, Fatih
Author: Enkhgerel Munkhbat
Review:
I recently had the pleasure of dining at this incredible restaurant in Turkey, and I have to say, the food was absolutely spectacular! The atmosphere was equally amazing, with a stunning view of the city’s attractions, including the Galata Tower and the Bosphorus, right through the window.

What made the experience even more special was the owner. He is incredibly generous and welcoming, and he does everything himself—from cooking to serving. Despite working alone, everything he does is perfect. The food, in particular, was the highlight of my visit—I almost cried because it was so delicious!

Thank you to the owner for creating such an amazing experience. Good luck with everything!

Name: Bey Kapısı Cafe & Restaurant
Address: Demirtaş, Kepenekçi Sabunhanesi Sk. No:15/B, Fatih
Author: Alexandr SKY TRASH
Review:
If you are around and can’t decide where to go, come here, you won’t regret.

It’s a decent restaurant to have a meal!
Interesting fact about the place, there is only one guy working there. He welcomes all guests, takes orders, cooks, makes shishas and clean the table after by himself. Food is fresh as he cooks it just for you! View is beautiful, inside it’s very authentic and creates very good atmosphere! Taking in consideration this fact, you need to be patient with waiting time.
This restaurant also has a terrace. We didn’t go to terrace because of the wind, but i believe it must be very nice on a sunset.

Паша’ спасибо за гостеприимство!

Name: Bey Kapısı Cafe & Restaurant
Address: Demirtaş, Kepenekçi Sabunhanesi Sk. No:15/B, Fatih
Author: Athena Lin
Review:
It is worth going to this place just to meet the man running it. The food was really good although slightly expensive. The service was over the top, 6 stars as well as the atmosphere. The view is 11/10.

Edit: of course I left something at the restaurant and we came back for it a few days later. Instead of just giving it back to us, he sat us both down with tea and fruit. This is THE example of hospitality!

Name: Etiler Bistro 34 Cafe
Address: Nisbetiye, Etiler Adnan Saygun Caddesi, Menekşe Apartmanı Belediye Sitesi No:6 D:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Thomas Zippert
Review: Nice Sheesha bar serving Alcohol. Background music. Simple place nothing special but Sheesha and food is ok

Name: Etiler Bistro 34 Cafe
Address: Nisbetiye, Etiler Adnan Saygun Caddesi, Menekşe Apartmanı Belediye Sitesi No:6 D:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Cayan Cetin
Review: Electronic cigarette is forbidden due to its danger of explosion and bad health habbits. But this is somewhere where you can smoke cigarette and nargile inside! think about it ;)

Name: Etiler Bistro 34 Cafe
Address: Nisbetiye, Etiler Adnan Saygun Caddesi, Menekşe Apartmanı Belediye Sitesi No:6 D:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Osman Kalkavan
Review: Foods nice, the prices are ok, but the service is unfortunately slow.

Name: Etiler Bistro 34 Cafe
Address: Nisbetiye, Etiler Adnan Saygun Caddesi, Menekşe Apartmanı Belediye Sitesi No:6 D:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Alp
Review: Good place to play card games,drink beer and huqqa-nargile

Name: Etiler Bistro 34 Cafe
Address: Nisbetiye, Etiler Adnan Saygun Caddesi, Menekşe Apartmanı Belediye Sitesi No:6 D:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Ada Bakış
Review: Love the shisha and the environment is perfect for a night out with friends

Name: The House Cafe Akaretler
Address: Sinanpaşa, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:16, Beşiktaş
Author: Shaf Bdn
Review: The food isn't bad at all and the atmosphere is great but what a shame the service is terrible. We were seated inside and I wanted to order another drink and I kept trying to get the waiters' attention but they were too busy with other customers or laughing and chatting with each other. When I finally got the attention of one waiter, he ignored me not just once but twice. I felt like I was begging them to have my order placed! I later found out that the waiter was in charge of the outside area, not inside thus why he couldn't be bothered with me. Couldn't he have signalled me to hold on while he got a waiter in charge of the inside area? I would totally understand that but instead, he was just soo rude, ignoring me and looking annoyed that I tried to order from him. In the end, I placed my order with someone else. It just shows me how much the lack of professionalism and training is amongst the staff. I'm all up for tipping and service charge as I think servers should be tipped and paid a token of appreciation for their service and hard work but in this case, the service staff are utterly disappointing and lacking of manners. I also have to add something, we were given dirty glasses and we drank our beverages straight from the bottles instead.

Name: The House Cafe Akaretler
Address: Sinanpaşa, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:16, Beşiktaş
Author: Madalene
Review: The House Cafe is my favorite cafe in all lication in Istanbul. This House cafe in Besiktas district is so sweet modern desighned cafe on a very famous street with pubs. Excellent service, food is so tasteful and nice. The staff is so kind, happy and helpfull. Just addicted to this place 🥰

Name: The House Cafe Akaretler
Address: Sinanpaşa, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:16, Beşiktaş
Author: Nigar Bayram
Review: What an awful and disgusting service! Dirty plates are visible from photos. Moreover waiters should definitely improve or learn some customer services etiquette! Otur 0 aldın!!!
