I find myself always wanting to come back for more and if I had my choice, I would be here every day.

If you're in the area - definitely come check this place out.

Name: Newtown Specialty Coffee Bahçeşehir
Address: Doğaparkı Cad. No:13-15AC Bahçeşehirpark Cadde A Blok No:9, Başakşehir
Author: Yasmin P
Review: Love this place. My to go coffee shop in the city( both bahceshehir and Istanbul). Everyone is super friendly and they brew the most delicious coffees. Especially V16 which honesty the only place I found that make it right. The environment is so good as well. Many plugs if you want to work with laptop as well.

Name: Newtown Specialty Coffee Bahçeşehir
Address: Doğaparkı Cad. No:13-15AC Bahçeşehirpark Cadde A Blok No:9, Başakşehir
Author: Shahin Tasoujian
Review: They have a very lovely second flood dedicated to work. But, unfortunately, their music is super loud and has a disturbing high tempo, it feels more like a disco than a working place or cozy cafe. I asked them kindly multiple times to bring down the volume so that I could work and have my online meetings but they refused.

Name: Newtown Specialty Coffee Bahçeşehir
Address: Doğaparkı Cad. No:13-15AC Bahçeşehirpark Cadde A Blok No:9, Başakşehir
Author: Negar Vahid
Review: The staff is very polite and attentive, I love the cafe’s atmosphere. Their coffee is a little pricy compared to other cafes, yet I believe the free and reliable wifi and great atmosphere of the cafe make up for it! I recommend this place for working and studying.

Name: Malavita Coffee
Address: Osmanağa, Piri Çavuş Sk. No:32, Kadıköy
Author: Jake B
Review: Loved it here, the coffee was outstanding, very full bodied and rich taste. Customer services are very good and the interior has a very interesting movie theme. Lovely part of Kadikoy, this is a good place to go for coffee if you are in the Kadikoy region.

Name: Malavita Coffee
Address: Osmanağa, Piri Çavuş Sk. No:32, Kadıköy
Author: Mark Bedard
Review: Cool air, cool drinks, and cool atmosphere. We stopped into Malavita for a mix of cold brew and lemonade which turned out to be the perfect cheat to the hot Turkish sun. The staff was incredibly helpful and friendly which made the experience all the better. The shop is an interesting mix of “The Godfather” and modern decor that was surprisingly quaint. If you are in Kadikoy, it is well worth the stop.

Name: Malavita Coffee
Address: Osmanağa, Piri Çavuş Sk. No:32, Kadıköy
Author: Patrick Engro
Review: I got the Cardamom Latte and the Brownie and both were wonderful. The shop is located on this cute little umbrella street. The staff is very warm and friendly. Everything about my experience was exceptional. Easily my favorite coffee shop in Istanbul.

Name: Malavita Coffee
Address: Osmanağa, Piri Çavuş Sk. No:32, Kadıköy
Author: Layal Awwad
Review:
A cozy coffee house at the umbrellas street
So relaxing place ant not crowded at all
The workers are very sweet
I had a coffee and piece of chicken pie that was yummy

Name: Malavita Coffee
Address: Osmanağa, Piri Çavuş Sk. No:32, Kadıköy
Author: Xinyi Shu
Review: It was the best coffee experience I have ever had. We tried syphon the first time. Wow, wow, wow, the making of the coffee and the taste of the coffee is completely another level. Keren and Tarik are so knowledgeable and friendly that we had an amazing chat. Malavita has such a warm and relaxed atmosphere. Seeing the syphon coffee being made by Keren is like watching a show. I can not recommend more. They really know coffee and are passionate about it.

Name: Peyk Away Coffee
Address: Binbirdirek, Peykhane Cd. 10/A, Fatih
Author: Ada Lila
Review: I ordered a caramel macchiato and it tastes amazing! the shop ambiance is great and chilling. definitely a good stop for a lil break from the hustle and bustle of the city.

Name: Peyk Away Coffee
Address: Binbirdirek, Peykhane Cd. 10/A, Fatih
Author: Hartmut “habu” Wöhlbier
Review:
It‘s a take away, so the atmosphere isn’t overwhelming. However, there are some nice tables in front of the place.
The don’t serve decaf. No oat milk, but almond milk.

Name: Peyk Away Coffee
Address: Binbirdirek, Peykhane Cd. 10/A, Fatih
Author: Starra Bucks
Review:
Terrible latte with oatmilk.
Scalding hot
Watery
Tasted like filter coffee
Undrinkable

Only takeaway cups with a plastic  lid even if asking to sit inside.

Definitely not recommended.

Barista standing by the door and smoking with all the smoke blowing inside.

Name: Peyk Away Coffee
Address: Binbirdirek, Peykhane Cd. 10/A, Fatih
Author: Kathryn Crossman
Review: Great coffee place to stop at, especially on a rainy day ☺️ The cappuccino was very delicious and they even offered a free water and pastry to me as I sat inside. The cappuccino is very affordable at 32 lira for a medium. They play electronic music in the background. I definitely would recommend coming here! The owners are especially friendly and will strike a nice conversation with you, even if your Turkish is not good ☺️

Name: Peyk Away Coffee
Address: Binbirdirek, Peykhane Cd. 10/A, Fatih
Author: Roula Chreim
Review: Very vibrant location, staff are great and the coffee and sweets are great

Name: New Zealand Coffee Roasters
Address: Balat, Vodina Cd. No:178, Fatih
Author: Krisscoast Travel
Review: Delicious coffee. I ordered a latte on my first day in Balat. The prices are similar to US for a latte. The guy comped my oat milk option because he said there’s usually an upcharge but he forgot to tell me beforehand. I appreciate his honesty.

Name: New Zealand Coffee Roasters
Address: Balat, Vodina Cd. No:178, Fatih
Author: Marc Staples
Review: If you are walking through Balat, then taking a short stop at New Zealand Coffee Roasters will not disappoint you. Small but very competent place to have a break and a nice coffee. The lady knows what she is doing and will give you recommendations. The interior is trendy and artful. The grey cat is cute and I liked the photographer on the shelf! Certainly worth a stop if you want a coffee and the cakes are also ´delicious.

Name: New Zealand Coffee Roasters
Address: Balat, Vodina Cd. No:178, Fatih
Author: Kostiantyn Mazur
Review: Nice calm coffee place with the Cat on board 😎 tasty coffee and cake 🍰 brownie is great 👍

Name: New Zealand Coffee Roasters
Address: Balat, Vodina Cd. No:178, Fatih
Author: senAsei01
Review: Nice little place in Balat, it was not crowded or something. We were practically the only ones, my mom really enjoyed the coffee. I enjoyed the lemon cheesecake too.

Name: New Zealand Coffee Roasters
Address: Balat, Vodina Cd. No:178, Fatih
Author: Adreean Valencia
Review:
Great coffee, great prices, great vibes.

Honestly can’t go wrong with this café. The aura here is fantastic and the people working here are friendly and speak English.

10/10 recommend!

Name: Addis Ababa Coffee
Address: Bereketzade Mahallesi Şişhane Sokak Kumtel İş Merkezi No:1 Şişhane, Beyoğlu
Author: Ba Banana
Review:
Americano small 8oz - 35 lari

Coffee itself has not much flavour but it’s worth it for the price. Nice to visit after a meal.

Some seatings are available.

Would like to try their filter coffee next time.

Name: Addis Ababa Coffee
Address: Bereketzade Mahallesi Şişhane Sokak Kumtel İş Merkezi No:1 Şişhane, Beyoğlu
Author: Richard Smittenaar
Review: Coffee at half the price of the fancy coffee shops, and at most half the quality. My flat white was indistinguishable from a latte in texture, and the bean used was a dark roast verging on tasting burnt. If you're on a budget and want a caffeine fix, maybe, otherwise I'd skip it

Name: Addis Ababa Coffee
Address: Bereketzade Mahallesi Şişhane Sokak Kumtel İş Merkezi No:1 Şişhane, Beyoğlu
Author: Putri Dumadi
Review: Best coffee latte in this area. They’re using really high quality of Addis Ababa coffee beans! They also have choices for dessert. And the staffs are really helpful and kindly serving. They also have WC/ toilet so it’s important haha.

Name: Addis Ababa Coffee
Address: Bereketzade Mahallesi Şişhane Sokak Kumtel İş Merkezi No:1 Şişhane, Beyoğlu
Author: Reyahsab
Review:
I take the offer : sandwich with filtered coffe is about 70 lirah I think
Place : was good and the design is beautiful but the AC is not working and it was hot 🥵 I didnt finish my coffee and sandwich I take it with me to finish it outside .

Coffee: I don’t like filter coffee that much but it was sour.
Sandwich: it doesn't have a taste.
But maybe I’ll give it a second chance to try another coffee and cake

Name: Addis Ababa Coffee
Address: Bereketzade Mahallesi Şişhane Sokak Kumtel İş Merkezi No:1 Şişhane, Beyoğlu
Author: Karim Aly
Review: This place is a hidden gem, they have a very nice coffee and also a very friendly staff. I went there asking for Cappuccino end by inviting me to try also the American and Espresso. I liked the taste so much and my visit ended by buying 6 bags of coffee beans to take it back to my home country. The prices also are very reasonable.

Name: Pianto Coffee & Roasting
Address: Balat, Pianto Cafe, Vodina Cd. No: 111, Fatih
Author: Joshua Radloff
Review: Best cappuccino I've had in Istanbul!! Pleasant atmosphere and high quality coffee.

Name: Pianto Coffee & Roasting
Address: Balat, Pianto Cafe, Vodina Cd. No: 111, Fatih
Author: Frances Ludwig
Review: Amazing spot for coffee and a chilled talk! We had a great time :) Aras and his boss are so openminded and friendly! We enjoyed the time and the coffee. The Iced Chai Tea Latte is my personal recommendation.

Name: Pianto Coffee & Roasting
Address: Balat, Pianto Cafe, Vodina Cd. No: 111, Fatih
Author: Caleb Gibbons
Review: A beautiful space to chill out, have a delicious barista coffee with great roasted beans. Service is great, staff are very friendly. Anyone wanting to stop for a proper coffee, don’t go past these guys!

Name: Pianto Coffee & Roasting
Address: Balat, Pianto Cafe, Vodina Cd. No: 111, Fatih
Author: ilker
Review: Freshly roasted great coffee. I highly recommend this place 👌👌👌

Name: Pianto Coffee & Roasting
Address: Balat, Pianto Cafe, Vodina Cd. No: 111, Fatih
Author: Simon
Review: Great atmosphere, coffee & people. Watch the locals from the perch upstairs. Highly recommended 👌

Name: But First Coffee
Address: Cumhuriyet, Feriköy Fırın Sk 5/9, Şişli
Author: Lukas Beck
Review:
Friends staff and good coffee. Plus is a variety of treats for breakfast (mostly sweet though). Mostly quite area this a nice contrast to the busy areas.
Would come here again.

Name: But First Coffee
Address: Cumhuriyet, Feriköy Fırın Sk 5/9, Şişli
Author: anna skouf
Review: I was not expecring such bad cold brew from this place. I have been living in this neighbourhood for over 8 years (and constantly have coffee here) and for the last year or I have been very disappointed with how dirty the place has become.  It used to be spotless but lately even the chairs are dirty. It is important to mention that other that the cold brew the coffe is very very good but unfortunately it is better to just take it to go.

Name: But First Coffee
Address: Cumhuriyet, Feriköy Fırın Sk 5/9, Şişli
Author: vincent bouvard
Review: But first coffee is not exceptional, but very comfortable and cosy. The service (self service) at the bar is attentive and helpful. The coffee is good and the food is limited in choice but fresh and tasty.

Name: But First Coffee
Address: Cumhuriyet, Feriköy Fırın Sk 5/9, Şişli
Author: Marwa
Review: Nice cafe .. good customer service. There's a quiet area to study, work or read a book. There's also a smoking area. Loved their Turkish coffee.

Name: But First Coffee
Address: Cumhuriyet, Feriköy Fırın Sk 5/9, Şişli
Author: moaz Kaddura
Review:
Good service , quiet place

A suitable place if you need to work at the computer with a cup of coffee and smoke

Name: Havesome Coffee Nişantaşı
Address: Harbiye, Bostan Sk. No: 4/A, Şişli
Author: Zee Khan
Review: Very good cafe. Best drinks in town. Friendly staff. Very charming vibe and kind to customers. They can make you whatever drink you like and they also have traditional Turkish tea. 5 out of 5 stars! Highly recommended. Nisantasi location is super cool.

Name: Havesome Coffee Nişantaşı
Address: Harbiye, Bostan Sk. No: 4/A, Şişli
Author: N N
Review: Verу trendу and hiр coffeе shoр. I enjoyed my iced caramel latte. Only drawback is that it was a bit too warm inside and outside tables were for smokers.

Name: Havesome Coffee Nişantaşı
Address: Harbiye, Bostan Sk. No: 4/A, Şişli
Author: Antoun Boustani
Review: We stopped by this place to take a drink while we were moving. The service was fast and the staff were friendly. The frozen strawberry mango drink was so good and refreshing. I liked it. Keep up the good work.

Name: Havesome Coffee Nişantaşı
Address: Harbiye, Bostan Sk. No: 4/A, Şişli
Author: LII
Review: The atmosphere is amazing, nice vibe and lovely decorations, not to mention the chill staff. But the menu was far from what i expected. I ordered black coffee , salted caramel ice latte , peanut cake , and a cheese bagel. They were all AWFUL. The black wasnt drinkable at all! And the peanut cake tasted like a smushy sponge cake. The cheese bagel was dry and cold. The latte was okay; pretty much the only thing that wasnt abnormal. Overall 6/10 ,, love the furniture.

Name: Havesome Coffee Nişantaşı
Address: Harbiye, Bostan Sk. No: 4/A, Şişli
Author: Noha Yasser
Review: The coffee is nice but bitter, i had a  carrot cake and a muffin they was not bad  but was not soft and fresh. Yet so pricey. Overall rate i give it a 4/10

Name: Noir Pit
Address: Asmalı Mescit, General Yazgan Sk. 109/A, Beyoğlu
Author: M M
Review:
Great place, very reasonably priced considering the area.
Lovely tasting coffee☕️, and buttery flakes pain au chocolat 🥐.
They also have fresh juices and smoothies and a variety of teas.
Highly recommend and will definitely return.

Name: Noir Pit
Address: Asmalı Mescit, General Yazgan Sk. 109/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Vishwa Vijay Singh
Review: Extremely horrible coffee. The milk was so hot the lactose was all burnt. We were given coffee in a chipped cup. Got the coffees replaced, still got coffees that were too hot - easily above 80° C. The coffee we got the second time was also spilt over. One of the cups was still chipped. No latte art as well, if that matters. Not at all worth the money. So sad I still had to give the one star, deserves zero.

Name: Noir Pit
Address: Asmalı Mescit, General Yazgan Sk. 109/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Karim Soliman
Review: This has to be the best and flakiest croissant ever! The butter taste in the croissant is incredible 🤩 and the texture of the croissant was on point 👏 great job! I’ll try the coffee next time 🙌

Name: Noir Pit
Address: Asmalı Mescit, General Yazgan Sk. 109/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Kathleen Ye
Review:
The best cheesecake I've ever tasted, even better than the one in Barcelona. Unbelievable!
My friend came here to enjoy a cup of coffee every day and she introduced the cafe to me. Though I hate coffee I am totally attracted by the cake.

However, tonight I went to the cafe for another one, it was not as good enough as the morning one，hahaha.

Name: Noir Pit
Address: Asmalı Mescit, General Yazgan Sk. 109/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Devvyanii Basnet
Review: Went here a couple of times . Its expensive and the chai latte is a hit or a miss depending on the barista and their mood. The food and snacks are below average

Name: Montag Coffee Kadıköy
Address: Caferağa, Muvakkıthane Cd. No:16/A Kat:1, 34710, Kadıköy
Author: Mevlüt Kalaycı
Review: A new generation coffee shop on the busy street of Kadıköy, which I hadn't noticed for a long time and discovered with the recommendation of a friend.  Since my first experience was in the heat of July, I prefer Affogato. The ice cream was good and the coffee was good. You feel the quality of the espresso. It's a great place to read and take a coffee break.

Name: Montag Coffee Kadıköy
Address: Caferağa, Muvakkıthane Cd. No:16/A Kat:1, 34710, Kadıköy
Author: Trina Stanford
Review: We visit Istanbul frequently and this is the best coffee we've ever had here. Lin was so educational in teaching us about the coffee and the different beans and the roasting process. The vibe was also very cool! Highly recommend this spot!

Name: Montag Coffee Kadıköy
Address: Caferağa, Muvakkıthane Cd. No:16/A Kat:1, 34710, Kadıköy
Author: Sam Azalnach
Review:
Nice little cafe to take a break from the crowds in. There's a balcony overlooking the street. A little pricey, but the drinks are good and the barista was approachable.

The WiFi is accessible. Access the menu via QR.

It shouldn't be too hard to spot. Look for a white sign which is right above the stairs that leads to the cafe.

Name: Montag Coffee Kadıköy
Address: Caferağa, Muvakkıthane Cd. No:16/A Kat:1, 34710, Kadıköy
Author: Yana Chubis
Review:
My favorite since 2018. And favorite not only in Istanbul, but all over the Europe.
You can always choose beans (from light roast to medium), which is not very often idea. Baristas are always very friendly, they are good experts.
Atmosphere is super nice, especially on the balcony. You can seat and observe people from the upstairs. :)
By the way, there is one more Montag in Moda, it’s also very nice.

Name: Montag Coffee Kadıköy
Address: Caferağa, Muvakkıthane Cd. No:16/A Kat:1, 34710, Kadıköy
Author: Check Shi
Review: I must say one of the best coffees we have ever had around the world. The barista is very knowledgeable. Try the funky if you want to have an espresso based coffee. The outdoor sitting is amazing and you will have a nice view. It is a cute apartment on the first floor of an old building. A dog is sleeping outside.

Name: Mocha point coffee by mocha arabica
Address: Aksemsettin,akdeniz cd.102,34080 Fatih, 100
Author: Ghaleb Algamish
Review: Mocha Points is amazing! Their coffee is rich and delicious, and the desserts are absolutely to die for. The atmosphere is cozy, and the staff is always friendly. It’s my go-to spot for a quick pick-me-up or a sweet treat. Highly recommend!

Name: Mocha point coffee by mocha arabica
Address: Aksemsettin,akdeniz cd.102,34080 Fatih, 100
Author: MKA
Review: I tried their signature San Sebastian cake, tiramisu, and latte, and they were all delicious and excellent. The café is quiet with a friendly and welcoming staff. They offer a great variety of high-quality coffee. Highly recommend for coffee lovers!

Name: Mocha point coffee by mocha arabica
Address: Aksemsettin,akdeniz cd.102,34080 Fatih, 100
Author: Abdirahman Osman
Review: mocha point is a cozy gem tucked away in the heart of the city. The ambiance is warm and inviting, with rustic decor and beautiful gardenthat makes it perfect for both solo visits and gatherings. The coffee is exceptional, with a rich, full-bodied flavor that satisfies every time. Their menu offers a variety of fresh  snacks, complementing the coffee perfectly. The staff are friendly and attentive, ensuring a pleasant experience. Whether you’re there to work, relax, or catch up with friends, mocha point coffee is a must-visit for any coffee lover.

Name: Mocha point coffee by mocha arabica
Address: Aksemsettin,akdeniz cd.102,34080 Fatih, 100
Author: Fares Raeebi
Review:
Best Mocha san sebastián  in Town at Mocha point coffee.
If you're a dessert lover, Mocha point coffee is the place to be. Their selection of sweets is nothing short of amazing, making it impossible to pick just one favorite. Every bite feels like a moment of pure indulgence. They have mastered the art of dessert
making.
The atmosphere here is cozy, making it the perfect spot to enjoy your treat with a great cup of coffee.

Name: Mocha point coffee by mocha arabica
Address: Aksemsettin,akdeniz cd.102,34080 Fatih, 100
Author: Abdullah Baboly
Review: I had the San Sebastian cake here, and it's to die for! Rich, creamy, and absolutely delicious. If you're a dessert lover, this is a must-try. I also recommend trying one of my favorite drinks, the Spesiyal frappe. The incredible taste and smooth texture make it a perfect treat. Highly recommend this place for both its desserts and drinks! 👌🏻👌🏻

Name: Fiyeli Coffee co
Address: Hoca Paşa, Ebussuud Cd. No:11, Fatih
Author: Grace Ling
Review: Nice zebra latte from here! It’s chocolate and vanilla with more chocolate syrup on the bottom. Great combination and cafe has good vibes

Name: Fiyeli Coffee co
Address: Hoca Paşa, Ebussuud Cd. No:11, Fatih
Author: Oğuz Trhn
Review:
Its awesome!!
Location, coffee and deserts are perfect.
Thanks to Ms. Sima and Mr. Batuhan for their kindly help!
Recommended :)

Name: Fiyeli Coffee co
Address: Hoca Paşa, Ebussuud Cd. No:11, Fatih
Author: Flavia Bobeica
Review: Awesome food and coffee! They have vegan milk options too❤️🙏🏻good A/C, English speakers

Name: Fiyeli Coffee co
Address: Hoca Paşa, Ebussuud Cd. No:11, Fatih
Author: Valeria Savoldelli
Review:
The croissant was not fresh. Tough and old.
80TL for this is a scam.
Discrete cappuccino and double espresso.

Name: Fiyeli Coffee co
Address: Hoca Paşa, Ebussuud Cd. No:11, Fatih
Author: Paul Sueters
Review:
We visited the coffee shop (self service) on Monday 30 September 2024, 14h20. A great place, delicious coffee & tea as well as the pastries (chocolate cake and pumpkin cheesecake).

A downside was the lady who performed most of the execution actions. She always had a stern face that looked like an approaching storm.

If you are the first point of contact at the coffee shop, it could be a bit friendlier and more relaxed (a smile costs nothing) in the interaction. Put your customers at ease instead of always having a stern look as if the customers are too much for you.

Free wifi.

Name: Hug a Mug Coffee House
Address: Duatepe, Savaş Sk. no:2, Şişli
Author: eylül deniz
Review: For a tasty hot cup of coffee and some chocolate chip cookies or a slice of wallnut cake this is the perfect corner at a very peaceful and quiet street. Really kind owner lady. Cat friendly too!

Name: Hug a Mug Coffee House
Address: Duatepe, Savaş Sk. no:2, Şişli
Author: Sultan ALMUTERY
Review: Nestled in the heart of a bustling residential area, this charming little cafe is a delightful escape. As a visitor, I stumbled upon it purely by chance, and it turned out to be one of the highlights of my trip. The cafe, small and unassuming, is a hive of local activity. It exudes a warm, inviting atmosphere that makes you feel like part of the community. The presence of friendly local cats lounging around adds to the quaint charm, making it a perfect spot for animal lovers and those seeking a peaceful retreat. The young barista is the heart of this cafe. Her kindness and friendly demeanor were immediately noticeable. She greeted every customer with a genuine smile and seemed to have a special knack for remembering regulars' preferences, which added a personal touch to the service. What sets this cafe apart is its authentic local vibe. It's a place where neighbors gather, exchange stories, and enjoy a moment of tranquility. The menu, though simple, offers a delightful range of coffees and snacks, each prepared with care. The coffee was particularly noteworthy, expertly brewed and rich in flavor. The outdoor seating area is a cozy nook, perfect for people-watching or getting lost in a good book. It's fascinating to observe the daily life of the neighborhood from this vantage point, all while enjoying a delicious cup of coffee.

Name: Hug a Mug Coffee House
Address: Duatepe, Savaş Sk. no:2, Şişli
Author: Eleonora Kondrateva
Review: Best cafe in Istanbul for vegan or diabetic persons. I’m inspired! Big thanks for it, lovely please with tasty sweets and coffee ❤️❤️🥰

Name: Hug a Mug Coffee House
Address: Duatepe, Savaş Sk. no:2, Şişli
Author: Maria Serdiuk
Review: Love this place! Tasty coffee, cozy atmosphere  and the owner Nehir is pure love😍

Name: Hug a Mug Coffee House
Address: Duatepe, Savaş Sk. no:2, Şişli
Author: Enis Behar Menda
Review: Cozy caffee shop just at the corner, cat lover place, yummy white chocolate cake and Turkish caffee.

Name: Coffee Gutta
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No:21, Fatih
Author: Rasha Alsaadany
Review: I got a good service there. Nice place to take a rest while you're making a tour in istanbul. When you see it from out side you will think that's a small place but actually they have a big garden inside you can set and take you coffee or tea or whatever you want joining the music and the sun. Very helpful and decent staff. Just when you're deciding to visit the Süleymaniye mosque you can find it in the left hand side on your way to the mosque. Good prices. There is a small library inside. Enjoy your time.

Name: Coffee Gutta
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No:21, Fatih
Author: Ozge
Review: Definitely a place u need to go! Lovely owner's  and the staff is friendly. Service was incredible, The patio is cute and cozy. I had a delicious food experience. And they also have many kinds of coffee. I will come back again. Highly recommended..

Name: Coffee Gutta
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No:21, Fatih
Author: Haya Dr
Review: I came to this place from time to time and I just like the vibe there and the family who is working , they are so kind and helpful . The coffee it's good but the atmosphere and the owners are nice . Last time I was there when a one little girl came she wanted to buy ice cream and she didn't had the money the guy who were selling the ice cream was so kind full of humanity, he was kind to give her ice cream told her pay later if you don't have money come later and pay in this time I was sitting drinking my coffee . This is so kind to be a nice human being . All over all come to this place I recommend highly!

Name: Coffee Gutta
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No:21, Fatih
Author: prash v
Review:
Really good place to take a break from exploring the city. the staff is really friendly.

The coffee is brilliant! We had the Turkish coffee (both the black classical coffee and then variants with pista and spices). We enjoyed all of it. Highly recommended!

Name: Coffee Gutta
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No:21, Fatih
Author: The Wayfarer
Review: We came on a Sunday night when the Istanbul traffic was mellowed and the crowds were nowhere to be seen. The cafe had a nice ambience and the centerpiece was definitely the dark maroon coloured La Marzocco which brewed a delicious cup of Latte for me. Thank you to the Barista too and the waiter for the friendly service! Highly recommended!

Name: Pal Coffee
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No: 7/B, Fatih
Author: Markus Hahn
Review:
The coffee was good and didn't cost much. Good value for money.
Not tried anything else

Name: Pal Coffee
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No: 7/B, Fatih
Author: Human Zacharia
Review: Cute coffee shop with a nice aesthetic and friendly staff. The coffee is unfortunately pretty terrible. I ordered a flat white which tasted like watered down Turkish coffee and steamed milk.

Name: Pal Coffee
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No: 7/B, Fatih
Author: Halit
Review:
A cute little place and delicious coffee!
afiyet olsunn

Name: Pal Coffee
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No: 7/B, Fatih
Author: F AR
Review: Good coffee. Tried  coffee latte with hazelnut pump🤎🤎🤎. The small size itself is quite large. Reasonable price. 55 Tl for most beverages. Friendly service.

Name: Pal Coffee
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No: 7/B, Fatih
Author: Salim Öztürk
Review: They use quality coffee in their products. It has a spacious environment. They are friendly and polite...

Name: Albero Coffee
Address: Fulya, Aytekin Kotil Cd. No.23B, Şişli
Author: R Al
Review:
The guys working there are very nice but seem a bit clueless every now and then. I have tried their cappuccino, their avocado drink with honey and nuts, their Nescafé with Nutella and nuts, the minced meat sandwich, and the pizza bites.

Let’s start with the bad. The pizza was a travesty. I had my sister pick it up for me but if I had seen it with my own eyes I would have sent it back. Look at the picture. 65 TRY

The avocado drink was recommended to me by my friend. It was good if you love avocado but a bit too sweet. I would recommend going for less honey. The downside is that the honey doesn’t taste natural. 150 TRY

The best item was the Nescafé which is essentially a Dalgona coffee. I would recommend that they make an iced version of this with regular milk instead of evaporated.
I also would prefer if they used more milk (maybe increasing the size of the cup to be able to do this) because the amount of Dalgona is disproportionate to the amount of milk making it too sweet. 100 TRY

Atmosphere is ok but it’s full of men so a woman can only wait for the order to be ready or wait outside during the busy evenings as it feels uncomfortable.

We’ve also been there several times and they didn’t have croissants which is a main thing on their menu. 🤔

Edit: I tried the glaya sandwich with added cheese. So good! I also asked for my Nescafé to have extra milk. I think it tastes much better this way.

Name: Albero Coffee
Address: Fulya, Aytekin Kotil Cd. No.23B, Şişli
Author: Asma Kahtani
Review:
I have tried the crepe Nutella and the mini pancakes Nutella, it was legitimately delicious chocolate flavored sweet.

Would definitely recommend it especially when you have a strong craving for Nutella😍💯

Name: Albero Coffee
Address: Fulya, Aytekin Kotil Cd. No.23B, Şişli
Author: Hazem Cj
Review: Very nice place if you want to enjoy an Italian coffee, i advice you to try thier breakfast sweets. Amazing place highly recommended

Name: Albero Coffee
Address: Fulya, Aytekin Kotil Cd. No.23B, Şişli
Author: Ömer Ceylan
Review: One of the best espresso macchiatos I had in Istanbul.

Name: Albero Coffee
Address: Fulya, Aytekin Kotil Cd. No.23B, Şişli
Author: Vyacheslav Pervertskiy
Review: They start working at 9 in Google, you come at 9:30, they are cleaning. Very long waiting, too much sweet dishes. And there are no prices in the menu, it is unacceptable.

Name: Kevoc’s Coffee
Address: Bozkurt, Türkbeyi Sk. 96/B, Şişli
Author: Bonillo Real Estate
Review: I’m visiting Istanbul and found this cozy coffee place by accident and I can really recommend it, nice atmosphere and the cakes really tasty, homemade by the sister’s owner, you have to try the lemon pie!

Name: Kevoc’s Coffee
Address: Bozkurt, Türkbeyi Sk. 96/B, Şişli
Author: Reone water
Review: Mr. Ferit and Ms. Elif are very sweet people and their service is as wonderful as their desserts and coffee. A warm and friendly cafe in the middle of the street is preferred and recommended⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Name: Kevoc’s Coffee
Address: Bozkurt, Türkbeyi Sk. 96/B, Şişli
Author: Gökalp Zenginer
Review: Ice latte was nice. Reasonable prices from most chain coffee shops

Name: Kevoc’s Coffee
Address: Bozkurt, Türkbeyi Sk. 96/B, Şişli
Author: Ertuğrul Kurt
Review: It has a dim, warm environment. The song choices are also very nice. I tried the filter coffee and american coffee and I definitely recommend it, I liked it, they don't say it's good.

Name: Kevoc’s Coffee
Address: Bozkurt, Türkbeyi Sk. 96/B, Şişli
Author: Meryem Meryem
Review: It is a place run by two very sweet brothers, with good coffee, tea and desserts, and very affordable prices compared to its peers. It's also a cute two-story place with books and chess boards for you to read inside.

Name: Sabba Coffee
Address: Bebek, Cevdet Paşa Cd. No:46/C, Beşiktaş
Author: Houman Fathi
Review:
Nice coffee.
I wish they were more kind and had a better place to seat.

Name: Sabba Coffee
Address: Bebek, Cevdet Paşa Cd. No:46/C, Beşiktaş
Author: Bex
Review: Excellent flat white. Perfect Turkish coffee. Extensive coffee menu and you can buy beans to take home. The service is fantastic, only pity there isn't a cafe to sit in.

Name: Sabba Coffee
Address: Bebek, Cevdet Paşa Cd. No:46/C, Beşiktaş
Author: Dan Rowe
Review: Very nice cold brew. Tried 3 other coffee shops but for varied reasons (too crowded, no filters, no cold brew) ended up leaving them - found this place and I’m glad I did.

Name: Sabba Coffee
Address: Bebek, Cevdet Paşa Cd. No:46/C, Beşiktaş
Author: Imane Benjabar
Review: I just wanted to take a moment to thank Seçkin for his amazing customer service. He was so helpful and kind, and he really went above and beyond to make sure I had a great experience. He also made me the most delicious coffee I've ever had! I highly recommend Sabba Coffee, and I'll definitely be back to see Seçkin again  🙏🏻🙏🏻

Name: Sabba Coffee
Address: Bebek, Cevdet Paşa Cd. No:46/C, Beşiktaş
Author: Cory Katuna
Review: Darling spot, super kind owner and proper coffee. Been looking for a spot like this in Istanbul.

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: K Min
Review:
Cozy interior with lots of seating. WiFi and outlets are available so it's great for remote working. But the music is quite loud so not ideal if you have lots of meetings.

Food wise, the Penne with Meatballs is pretty good. However I didn't like how (weirdly) sweet my oat milk flat white was.

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: Rob Reid
Review:
I had a nice breakfast croissant and a cappuccino.  I sat at the outdoor tables but think it's probably nicer indoors.   The mural creates some nice ambiance, but the street is a bit busy, and there are noisy air-conditioning vents blowing warm air out on the street.
That said, my server was very nice, and the food was very good.

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: Steve Migliara
Review:
Nice coffee shop with added breakfast menu. Right next to the Galata Tower.
Decent place and clean.
Like and follow for more amazing places to see and visit around the World

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: Yiğit Torun
Review: Nice place just next to Galata Tower.  Very nice design inside. We sat inside and work for hours. The wifi was a bit slow, I didn’t like the taste of Turkish coffee. However, overall it was nice to chill there a bit. Also, the cheesecake was tasty!

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: Pepe Barajas
Review: Had an omelette and espresso chai late. The food was good and the barista is very talented! Relaxed coffee shop with friendly service. Laptop friendly too.

Name: The Core Coffee Roastery & Eatery Fenerbahçe
Address: Fenerbahçe, Operatör Cemil Topuzlu Cd. No:7, Kadıköy
Author: Richard Smittenaar
Review: Flat white wasn't any good, some of the worst coffee I had in Istanbul, keeping in mind that I made an effort to go by good places. Fine if you're not a picky coffee drinker, but go somewhere else if you are

Name: The Core Coffee Roastery & Eatery Fenerbahçe
Address: Fenerbahçe, Operatör Cemil Topuzlu Cd. No:7, Kadıköy
Author: Susan Moling
Review: Nice little coffee shop with great coffee and fresh, delicious food. I got a cappuccino and simit breakfast with 2 eggs. The blackberry jam, muharmara and herbed suzme yogurt sauces were fresh, flavorful and distinct. The cappuccino was well prepared and yummy. Highly recommend coming here for a light breakfast and coffee! (Photo doesn't show complete portion since I ate half of it before taking the photo🤣)

Name: The Core Coffee Roastery & Eatery Fenerbahçe
Address: Fenerbahçe, Operatör Cemil Topuzlu Cd. No:7, Kadıköy
Author: Nadya Styazhkina
Review:
Best coffee. Best service. Best staff. We have   real pleasure every time we visit this place. I do appreciate the way they deal with all their clients.
Banana roll - best desert ever. Ice tea and cold brew are great. I do believe this place makes our mahalle great, cozy and super friendly part of Istanbul.
And please try their Hindi füme kruvassan. Yummy.

Name: The Core Coffee Roastery & Eatery Fenerbahçe
Address: Fenerbahçe, Operatör Cemil Topuzlu Cd. No:7, Kadıköy
Author: Nadia Khotyanovich
Review: Quite a lovely place. Friendly personal. Coffee is very tasty (even not perfect to my taste). Definitely will pop in again😍

Name: The Core Coffee Roastery & Eatery Fenerbahçe
Address: Fenerbahçe, Operatör Cemil Topuzlu Cd. No:7, Kadıköy
Author: Evgenii Minkov
Review:
Top Tier Cafe. I'd been a customer almost every working day during my stay in Istanbul.

What I enjoyed in particular: 1. Owners and Staff are extremely competent - and charismatic. Most speak fluent english. 2. Coffee is great, every day different beans are served. The V60 I tried here is the best to the day. 3. The sweets they serve (cheesecakes, cookies, croissants, etc) are either prepared on-site or sourced from the co-owned business, which results in stellar quality and delicious taste. 4. The place is very friendly towards IT people working remotely - every table has 2 sockets within reach (including outdoors space), chairs are comfortable, tables are sturdy and of average height. 5. If you sit working long enough (30 minutes or so), you get a giant vessel with water, so that you don't become thirsty

Name: Pop Up Coffee TR
Address: Müeyyedzade, Galip Dede Cd. 105 b, Beyoğlu
Author: Ivan Šarić
Review: We stumbled upon Pop Up Cafe on our way to the Galata Tower, and it turned out to be the perfect spot for a break. The cafe is located just below the tower, and the coffee was fantastic—perfectly prepared and very tasty. The ambiance is lovely, and the staff was extremely friendly and cheerful.

Name: Pop Up Coffee TR
Address: Müeyyedzade, Galip Dede Cd. 105 b, Beyoğlu
Author: Alexa Forero
Review:
It's a great place.
Here they mantein the quality of service and products.
The prices are fair although they are very close to beutiful Galata tower.
The toilet were perfectly clean.

Name: Pop Up Coffee TR
Address: Müeyyedzade, Galip Dede Cd. 105 b, Beyoğlu
Author: Rafhaan Shah
Review: Awesome selection of drinks, including various lattes and chocolate drinks. I opted for the Salted Caramel Mocha, and the Basque Cheesecake which were both great. Also had a banging music playlist playing!

Name: Pop Up Coffee TR
Address: Müeyyedzade, Galip Dede Cd. 105 b, Beyoğlu
Author: Mulham alfarsi
Review: "Great coffee and a variety of delicious sweets. A perfect spot for a delightful treat!"

Name: Pop Up Coffee TR
Address: Müeyyedzade, Galip Dede Cd. 105 b, Beyoğlu
Author: Riad Ghanma
Review:
coffee is good, music is loud, prices are high_ish.
didn't like the staff outfits

Name: Mikel Coffee Akaretler
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Marwa Djebbi
Review:
I really loved the interior design and the decoration in this coffee shop
I got cappuccino and a Nutella cake it was really yummy
The staff are really friendly
The atmosphere is amazing you study or work there or even chat with your friends

Name: Mikel Coffee Akaretler
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: R Al
Review:
They had the best San Sebastián I had of all the places I visited in Istanbul. Maybe it was because I was hungry or it was because it didn’t taste too sweet. The girl in the hijab working there was so friendly and smiley which is so rare in Istanbul. I don’t mind that they usually don’t smile but when they do, I notice and appreciate it.

My phone died on the night of the game and before I had a chance to recharge it using a portable battery which they have available here. This is very useful and from what I know, not many places offer this. You need a Turkish number and the Porty app to use it but unfortunately my phone died and I was too shy to borrow another customer’s charging cable. I ended up getting a taxi. But this coffee shop became a place I kept in mind in case I found myself in a pickle.

San Sebastián cake 180 TL

Name: Mikel Coffee Akaretler
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Dalia Alnajjar
Review: I loved every aspect of it. The decor is amazing. It’s very spacious. It’s a quite place in the middle of all the craziness. Their service is amazing, the staff is very nice. They serve you cold water for free and they give you a vis Ute with your coffee. Their mugs are very unique. The coffee tastes good and the prices are very good as well. It’s my new favorite place in besiktas.

Name: Mikel Coffee Akaretler
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Ongun Güvenç
Review: Mikel Coffee is a coffee chain with branches in Turkey, including one located in the Beşiktaş district of Istanbul. It offers a variety of hot and cold coffee drinks, as well as pastries and sandwiches. Mikel Coffee is known for its high-quality coffee beans, which are sourced from around the world and roasted in-house. If you happen to be in the Beşiktaş area and looking for a coffee spot, you might want to check out Mikel Coffee.

Name: Mikel Coffee Akaretler
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Mohamed F. M. Elzaianey
Review:
One of my favorite coffee shops. Totally cool and worth it.
Different flavors that cause you addiction.

Lovely and friendly staff. Just ask and they would help you with variety of choices.

Try it and you would reconsider about your coffee taste.

Coffee lovers would love and adore this place 💕

A place I can call home for everything, it became my everyday coffee.

Do come and enjoy the coffee community.

Name: Nova Coffee House & Roastery
Address: Zekeriyaköy Mahallesi 4. Cadde N2 Blok No : 6 / D, Sarıyer
Author: Ari Zingillioglu
Review:
Both hot and cold coffee based drinks were pretty good. The interior decoration is very warm and welcoming. Outdoor seating can be improved a little bit in terms of comfort seating.

Easy access, very friendly personnel, reasonable prices.

Overall score 4.2/5 for a Coffee Shop

Name: Nova Coffee House & Roastery
Address: Zekeriyaköy Mahallesi 4. Cadde N2 Blok No : 6 / D, Sarıyer
Author: Mohamad Taleb
Review: Passing by this area & I stopped by Nova Coffee to have a Simit w/cheese, Tea & then Cortado. First, the staff are very friendly & courteous “rare in Istanbul” my cortado was full of coffee flavor to the last drop.

Name: Nova Coffee House & Roastery
Address: Zekeriyaköy Mahallesi 4. Cadde N2 Blok No : 6 / D, Sarıyer
Author: Baris Demir
Review: It’s a great place for properly made coffee and nice environment. Cakes with strawberry are highly recommended. The owner of the shop is a very nice person, talkative and caring. If you’re nearby it worth giving a visit.

Name: Nova Coffee House & Roastery
Address: Zekeriyaköy Mahallesi 4. Cadde N2 Blok No : 6 / D, Sarıyer
Author: Artur
Review: Guys, if you want a decent coffee, this is the place to go. A very good latte to say the least. Coffee is great and staff are very attentive. Highly recommend for some decent brew.

Name: Nova Coffee House & Roastery
Address: Zekeriyaköy Mahallesi 4. Cadde N2 Blok No : 6 / D, Sarıyer
Author: Zuleyha Sevilmis
Review: The atmosphere is lovely and the environment is warm

Name: Coffee Brew Lab
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No:5 D:B, Beyoğlu
Author: Nisreen Hms
Review: The owner of this coffee shop is kind, and respectful! Had a red eye coffee and was so good! had a pretty good time, defo recommended.

Name: Coffee Brew Lab
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No:5 D:B, Beyoğlu
Author: Sarah Rodriguez
Review:
I needed a new coffee place and came here because I saw the review photos of the cat. Coffee was good. Big Americano for 75 TL. WiFi good. Barista was nice.

Cat was there and I asked her to hang out with me. She said yes. 5/5 would go back for her and coffee.

Name: Coffee Brew Lab
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No:5 D:B, Beyoğlu
Author: kristof backx
Review: I really liked the cappuccino, VERY good. The barista was so friendly. I wanted a croissant and he baked me a fresh one, on the spot :)

Name: Coffee Brew Lab
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No:5 D:B, Beyoğlu
Author: Yaman Masalha
Review:
If you are looking for a decent cup of coffee Brew lab is the place for that !
It’s located in a very old beautiful area!
Their coffee is amazing and always fresh !
They have a lot of options and their prices are very convenient! The staff are amazingly friendly and professional.
The facility is so clean and smells really nice .
Usually quiet place so you can study there or have a quick meeting.
I would recommend to try their cold drip coffee it tastes really good !
They have a pretty good internet too !
And they care so much about the hygiene of the place!
Totally recommend it !!

Name: Coffee Brew Lab
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No:5 D:B, Beyoğlu
Author: Dan Manzoor
Review: Family owned local coffee shop. Great pricing, service, and good quality of food/drinks. 100% recommended!

Name: Glane Coffee
Address: Sinanpaşa, Şht. Dursun Bakan Sk. No:18, Beşiktaş
Author: Agnieszka Relkowska
Review:
So kind people working there, amazing quality of coffee.
Aga

Name: Glane Coffee
Address: Sinanpaşa, Şht. Dursun Bakan Sk. No:18, Beşiktaş
Author: Aras Gorkem Akyunak
Review: Cozy little shop with exceptionally good coffee. Pet friendly, you can pick up and go if you order online. Very good attention to detail. You need to let them know how strong you want your coffee.

Name: Glane Coffee
Address: Sinanpaşa, Şht. Dursun Bakan Sk. No:18, Beşiktaş
Author: Kürtős Kalács
Review: Coffee presentation looks nice but it’s watered down coffee, weak stuff

Name: Glane Coffee
Address: Sinanpaşa, Şht. Dursun Bakan Sk. No:18, Beşiktaş
Author: Doğukan Demir
Review: The business was very attentive, their coffee was delicious.

Name: Glane Coffee
Address: Sinanpaşa, Şht. Dursun Bakan Sk. No:18, Beşiktaş
Author: Gözde Karacaoğlu
Review: The coffee varieties are always fresh, they do not serve coffee that is not fresh, so it is always a reliable cafe. Their coffee is very delicious. You should try Cold Brew Lemonade.

Name: Per Noi Coffee Co. Ortakoy
Address: Mecidiye, Eski Bahçe Sk. No:11/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Aylin
Review:
We returned a year after our first visit and were unfortunately disappointed.

I accidentally dropped a glass bottle and when I asked if I could get a new one the young lady said: "then you have to pay, it's not my problem".

I was really shocked by her cheeky attitude. It's a shame that we came all the way from Kadıköy only for that Café.

The coffee still tastes good and they have oat milk.

_________________

Old review

Really good coffee! We enjoyed a cappuccino and a cold brew and both was delicious. The owner is also very kind. You can see the love he puts into his shop and products. We definitely recommend it!

Name: Per Noi Coffee Co. Ortakoy
Address: Mecidiye, Eski Bahçe Sk. No:11/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Gursal Sinik
Review: Impeccable brewing technique and world class beans. Highly doubt you could find better coffee anywhere else in Istanbul. Worth Ortaköy just for this.

Name: Per Noi Coffee Co. Ortakoy
Address: Mecidiye, Eski Bahçe Sk. No:11/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Kassim Rekieh
Review: Best espresso I’ve had in Istanbul. Haşim is an excellent barista and a great guy. Definitely coming back soon.

Name: Per Noi Coffee Co. Ortakoy
Address: Mecidiye, Eski Bahçe Sk. No:11/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Saleem Diab
Review: The best Cafe experience in Istanbul we’ve had during our one week stay. Located in the old streets of eskibahçe, this unique and trendy coffee shop serves the tastiest Mocha’s, coffee’s and definitely what I would rate as the best croissant and cookies. We couldn’t even chose a favorite. But the vanilla lemon cookie is definitely purely a winner. The service was so friendly and the atmosphere was so welcoming.

Name: Per Noi Coffee Co. Ortakoy
Address: Mecidiye, Eski Bahçe Sk. No:11/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Saleh Alwabel
Review:
Coffee was good, I tried the flatwhit, and it was well made.
Recommended for Coffee..

Name: Coffee Beans
Address: Dumlupınar, Bahçem Sk. No:2, Kadıköy
Author: Jamieson McKenzie
Review: As an American living in nearby Concord, I was happy to find this coffee shop right next to a small Migros grocery store, neither of which show up very easily on Google Maps. The neighborhood has many empty high rise buildings and empty store front, so it takes some walking to find quality. Coffee Beans makes an extraordinary cappuccino for 11 TL.  It is larger than you get in most shops and very tasty. I agree with others who mention the warm staff, plus this shop has superb wifi, a must for me as a writer. Nice place to hang out and enjoy life. The owner is very kind and speaks some English.

Name: Coffee Beans
Address: Dumlupınar, Bahçem Sk. No:2, Kadıköy
Author: Osama Alnimer
Review: Nice, cozy, friendly local family cafe serving really nice drinks, snacks and desserts. Always cheerful and warm people :)

Name: Coffee Beans
Address: Dumlupınar, Bahçem Sk. No:2, Kadıköy
Author: Ismail Habib
Review: Great cozy nice place its a must visit

Name: Coffee Beans
Address: Dumlupınar, Bahçem Sk. No:2, Kadıköy
Author: brky mrtz
Review: Incredibly small portions yet so expensive.

Name: Coffee Beans
Address: Dumlupınar, Bahçem Sk. No:2, Kadıköy
Author: Mustafa Yilmaz
Review: The best coffee in fikirtepe

Name: Neruda Coffee
Address: Kuzguncuk, İcadiye Cd. no:28/A, Üsküdar
Author: Emily Davis
Review: We absolutely loved Neruda Coffee! Friendly service and delicious coffee. They even had vegan milk options. Highly recommend!

Name: Neruda Coffee
Address: Kuzguncuk, İcadiye Cd. no:28/A, Üsküdar
Author: عبدالاله
Review:
Really it is very nice speciality coffee and all my orders it is amazing 👌🏻👌🏻
Thank you ( Furqan and Zainb very nice services🙏🏻)

Name: Neruda Coffee
Address: Kuzguncuk, İcadiye Cd. no:28/A, Üsküdar
Author: Asenka Kim
Review:
Very delicious coffee!
after a long walk in Kuzgunchuk area I highly recommend to stay here for a while. Barista will make awesome coffee (i tried V60 and Chemex on Ethiopia beans).
They have terrace outside, like 6 tables inside with very comfortable sofas.
For coffee they are bringing chocolate as a gift .
The interior is amazing, like hipster coffeeshop style.
also they have a store with some souvenirs and coffee beans.

Name: Neruda Coffee
Address: Kuzguncuk, İcadiye Cd. no:28/A, Üsküdar
Author: Amen Mohammed
Review: the cafe has a good atmosphere, vibes and background music, the I tried first time ice V60 Brazilian, the bean that is used is tasty but it is like water with some notes of coffee hhh, I think their preparing method is wrong, I asked the barista she gave me a rude attitude and answer, in the second visit I tried cold brew, it was good

Name: Neruda Coffee
Address: Kuzguncuk, İcadiye Cd. no:28/A, Üsküdar
Author: Angela Bestauti
Review: Honestly, best ice matcha (i get lime one) across countries (make sure you stir it well, as it comes unstirred and might seem too sweet). I've had v60 here - really good. And what i enjoyed as much as my drinks were their deserts - they serve Marlenka here both chocolate and honey and i am super picky with my honey cake as i am coming from a place where they know how to do a proper one.

Name: Poco Coffee & Matcha Bar
Address: Suadiye, Kazım Özalp Sk. 19/A, Kadıköy
Author: Aynaz Ghosi
Review:
Everyone says this place has the best matcha in Istanbul, but I’m not sure if it's really the best. It was good, but I can’t say I loved it. We tried the strawberry matcha, but it didn’t have much strawberry flavor; it was only used for decoration on the edges of the glass. It would have been better as milk foam.

But the guy who is working there was very sweet and treated the customers very kindly.

Name: Poco Coffee & Matcha Bar
Address: Suadiye, Kazım Özalp Sk. 19/A, Kadıköy
Author: Mina
Review: Nice staff and the place tiny but adorable ! , I tried vanilla matcha latte and I didn’t really liked it that much ->tho It’s not that bad so I definitely will try the other drinks

Name: Poco Coffee & Matcha Bar
Address: Suadiye, Kazım Özalp Sk. 19/A, Kadıköy
Author: kindah
Review:
ordered : matcha
rate : 7/10

note : - says “ceremonial grade”
matcha, but doesn’t feel
like one.

- milk more than matcha

- syrup isn’t well mixed

overall nice atmosphere 🤍

Name: Poco Coffee & Matcha Bar
Address: Suadiye, Kazım Özalp Sk. 19/A, Kadıköy
Author: Tabark Mohammed
Review:
Having my drink ready in literally less than a minute in rush hour in a weekend night in Istanbul with the place full of costumers is ABSOLUTELY INCREDIBLE

huge respect to the employees .. you guys are amazingly professional 👏🏻👏🏻

Name: Poco Coffee & Matcha Bar
Address: Suadiye, Kazım Özalp Sk. 19/A, Kadıköy
Author: flan al-flani
Review: The cashier is sweet, but barista is nasty, she got my order wrong and when I told the girl at the cashier she seemed as if she was begging the barista to do another one, the barista grabbed it and slammed it in the sink saying UFFF YAAAA in a loud voice. As if they were the ones paying for it. So sad. Never going there again 👎👎

Name: XYZ Cihangir - the Coffee Guru
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Anahtar Sk. No:3/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Fahad Mizi
Review: One of the best coffees I’ve ever had in a long time. It’s a small shop with a big heart. Shout out to the owner for the cozy vibe aesthetic

Name: XYZ Cihangir - the Coffee Guru
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Anahtar Sk. No:3/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Rolitta .S
Review: Best speciality coffee is the area ☕ do y miss out, they offer nut milk too!

Name: XYZ Cihangir - the Coffee Guru
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Anahtar Sk. No:3/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Anton Antoniuk
Review: Although we only had an iced latte, it’s 5/5 for everything: food, service, atmosphere. The ambiance — cozy homie interior, music, and hospitality — was so inviting that I couldn't resist stopping to relax for a while. A charming spot.

Name: XYZ Cihangir - the Coffee Guru
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Anahtar Sk. No:3/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Muhammad Khan
Review: This coffee shop made a big claim outside, saying it has the best coffee. This perked my curiosity so I ordered an Affagato and it truly was the best I have had in my life.  The vibe in this place is relaxed and friendly. The owner and his partner and staff made me feel truly welcome and we had a great conversation in English.  If you are in this neighbourhood, I highly recommend you check out the "best coffee" at xyz. Bilal

Name: XYZ Cihangir - the Coffee Guru
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Anahtar Sk. No:3/A, Beyoğlu
Author: ZeeZee Khan
Review: Perfect little coffee shop! It’s a beautiful little shop with really incredible coffee! Aykut was so hospitable and is really a master at his craft! We ordered an iced caramel latte and a cortado and they were perfect! Not too bitter or too sweet! I highly recommend checking it out for the coffee and the vibes!

Name: Tea Amo Sirkeci
Address: Hobyar, Mimar Kemalettin Cd. Konyalı Han No: 1A, Fatih
Author: Betül Duman
Review: The best boba tea in İstanbul 🤌 Especially, you should try the caramel tea with boba! Prices are reasonable and not over, especially in İstanbul. You should try this place 👑

Name: Tea Amo Sirkeci
Address: Hobyar, Mimar Kemalettin Cd. Konyalı Han No: 1A, Fatih
Author: Trang Nguyễn
Review:
After several days eating Turkish foods, I was happy to have found Tea Amo. The staffs were friendly and the foods were tasty, I liked the fried rice with shrimp and the bubble tea. The venue seemed a bit small and the arrangement seems to be not very logical.
There were only one table for 2 people, other table are for quite big group from 4 people, which made it a bit difficult to find a place for yourselves if you don’t want to share the table with strangers. I think they could save a lot of spaces and have better arrangement.
Price is quite cheap. I paid around 2,5€ for a cup of bubble tea.
They ran out of bubble peach milk unfortunately.

Name: Tea Amo Sirkeci
Address: Hobyar, Mimar Kemalettin Cd. Konyalı Han No: 1A, Fatih
Author: Grandmaster
Review:
Nice atmosphere, cozy interior.
Variety of choice of tea.
Tea is tasty, but too much ice, I understand the retailer wants use less of ingredients, but drink can’t contain 75-80% of ice. I would never buy again

Name: Tea Amo Sirkeci
Address: Hobyar, Mimar Kemalettin Cd. Konyalı Han No: 1A, Fatih
Author: Asisten Liburan Travel Consultant
Review:
Glad found this hidden gem in Sirkeci area !

Many guests are from South East Asia, because the food & drinks taste like home !

Comfortable seating area with many electric plug, perfect for working or just hang out with friends.

Will be back again next time

Name: Tea Amo Sirkeci
Address: Hobyar, Mimar Kemalettin Cd. Konyalı Han No: 1A, Fatih
Author: Rina M
Review:
last time i went to turkey with my family and my tour guide fudhail bring me to eat here sebab dia kata portion besar and best luckily, yes the portion is big and affordable for students, i love their chicken gumush sebab sedap! Hahahha banyak and kenyang. Also lovees their taufufa bobaa and the best bubble milk tea ever! Would try dekat malaysia branch pulak!

Atmosphere so far so good, love the services and staff were friendly! I would recommend to my friend next time if they visit Istanbul 👍🏻👍🏻

Name: Cafe Kukla & Bubble Tea
Address: Caferağa, Arayıcıbaşı Sk. No:10/C, Kadıköy
Author: Chris
Review: Tastes horrible. Claims to be “real fruit” but in deed low quality syrups. We have to throw them away in the end

Name: Cafe Kukla & Bubble Tea
Address: Caferağa, Arayıcıbaşı Sk. No:10/C, Kadıköy
Author: Kamilla Ali-Ogly
Review: Bubble tea isn’t real bubble tea, and it isn’t delicious, I ordered strawberry bubbles, but I got watermelon. Bubbles are really bad. Waiters were smoking inside and it was absolutely unbearable to be there, I made a comment that they have the sing that says it’s prohibited to smoke inside, and they just replied something unpleasant that they’re bosses and can do everything they want. The kitchen and bathroom are very dirty, don’t eat here. Very disappointing experience 😭

Name: Cafe Kukla & Bubble Tea
Address: Caferağa, Arayıcıbaşı Sk. No:10/C, Kadıköy
Author: nora
Review: all these bad comments r lie. i was working w my friends in this cafe, the owner paid us even he had no money to pay some of his bills. food is amazing and he is serving his food to most of kadıköy’s popular pubs.

Name: Cafe Kukla & Bubble Tea
Address: Caferağa, Arayıcıbaşı Sk. No:10/C, Kadıköy
Author: Kaushal Patel
Review: Come here for breakfast we got here around 9am , they were just opening. We ask for the breakfast and we had to wait a bit but it was worth the wait. The breakfast was awesome

Name: Cafe Kukla & Bubble Tea
Address: Caferağa, Arayıcıbaşı Sk. No:10/C, Kadıköy
Author: Anna Fomina
Review: Never buy bubble tea here. It’s not tea at all. Just water, awful syrup and bubbles with plastic taste. I had allergic reaction after some sips of it.

Name: ASIAN RESTO & BUBBLE TEA (indonesian restaurant)
Address: Turna Sokak No:3A İnönü Mah. Elmadağ, Şişli
Author: nu
Review:
We came here just to buy the asian things, but turn out we’re having our iftar here, and we’ve ordered less than 20 minutes i guess and the food is ready! alsooo we gave 5 stars cause the owner was friendly and kindhearted, anyway their food also delicious!! gonna repeat here again! luvvv the ayam geprek cause it’s sambal wasn’t tooo spicy and tasty!!

-nasi ayam geprek
-nasi padang
-matcha

so anyone from indonesia, malaysia and others want to try indofood you can try this restaurant! kedai restoran melayu that very highly recommended.

thankyou mba devi 🥰

Name: ASIAN RESTO & BUBBLE TEA (indonesian restaurant)
Address: Turna Sokak No:3A İnönü Mah. Elmadağ, Şişli
Author: Mustaeen
Review:
My first time trying Indonesian cuisine but the staff explained the menu quite well that helped me order the food I wanted.

Now, let's talk about the food - an exquisite blend of flavors that left me craving more. The Batagor, a traditional dish of fried fish dumplings with peanut sauce, was a delightful explosion of textures and spices. Each bite was a symphony of crispy exterior and tender, flavorful filling.

Equally impressive was the Nasi Rendang, a classic Indonesian dish of slow-cooked beef in rich, aromatic spices served with boiled rice. The tender meat, infused with layers of complex flavors, melted in my mouth, leaving me completely satisfied yet longing for another serving.

Name: ASIAN RESTO & BUBBLE TEA (indonesian restaurant)
Address: Turna Sokak No:3A İnönü Mah. Elmadağ, Şişli
Author: Bonnie Stevenson
Review: Super tasty Indonesian food and really lovely owners. We stayed nearby so we went back for dinner 3 times during our trip and each time loved our meals! Highly recommend this place! The fried Chicken noodles and the chicken satay were my favourite, but I also had the chicken japchae and chicken fried rice and both were super yummy.

Name: ASIAN RESTO & BUBBLE TEA (indonesian restaurant)
Address: Turna Sokak No:3A İnönü Mah. Elmadağ, Şişli
Author: Russell H
Review:
This place was amazing. We went in not knowing what to expect, and found a homey, friendly, and delicious place! Demi the chef served up some classic Indonesian food like beef rendang, nasi goreng (fried rice), and a side of fried chicken. Because it was rainy I ordered a tummy warming clear beef broth. Also I can’t forget the crispy fried tofu with scallions! Amazing!

All the food was served hot and fresh! I have to make a comment about the “salsa” or sambal.  anything it touched turn into spicy gold! Seriously so much flavor and spice in one teaspoon.

This place also doubles as an Indonesian market with tofu, fish sauce, sweet soy sauce, milk tea packets, pandang, etc…I am sure some of the southeast Asians feel nostalgia vibes walking in there.

Finally, a comment about service: the server and Demi the chef were very friendly and open about their business. We got to chat with them a little afterwards about the local Indonesian community of restos in the area.

The prices were amazingly and surprisingly low given the runaway inflation rates and rising rent. I don’t know how they do it but they manage to keep the home cooked foods at home cooked prices.

We will definitely be back!

Name: ASIAN RESTO & BUBBLE TEA (indonesian restaurant)
Address: Turna Sokak No:3A İnönü Mah. Elmadağ, Şişli
Author: Vladimir Zarodysh
Review: It's very tasty and relatively affordable food considering the fact that the restaurant is located very close to Taksim Metro station. Everything was super fresh and enjoyable. Amazing combinations of flavor. The owner was also very polite and friendly :) Don't hesitate to check out this restaurant.

Name: Cha'ya Galata
Address: Şahkulu, No:, Serdar-ı Ekrem Cd. No:45, Beyoğlu
Author: Cheryl Soh
Review: Decent bubble tea that resembles authentic version from Asia. Staff are very friendly and welcoming and the cafe is pleasantly airy and spacious with a lot of natural light in the morning and comfortable seats. Tried their fruit tea and milk teas and I liked them. Of course I didn’t have high expectations of it but it was surprisingly more than decent.

Name: Cha'ya Galata
Address: Şahkulu, No:, Serdar-ı Ekrem Cd. No:45, Beyoğlu
Author: Alain Delfin
Review: This is a very cozy place, extremely good service! Delicious bubble tea! You should visit, I loved it.

Name: Cha'ya Galata
Address: Şahkulu, No:, Serdar-ı Ekrem Cd. No:45, Beyoğlu
Author: Tasha Reshetnikova
Review:
Really good desserts and the bubble tea was just perfect! The service is friendly, and the place has lovely interior, including a cozy outdoor terrace that overlooks the street from the second floor.
We took a slice of honey cake, and it was delicious! Warm, just the right amount of sweet, full of flavour. I also took matcha bubble tea.

Name: Cha'ya Galata
Address: Şahkulu, No:, Serdar-ı Ekrem Cd. No:45, Beyoğlu
Author: Lana Centore
Review: We enjoyed our visit here very much.  The lady who helped us was very kind, the cafe is adorable, & the teas were delicious, as well as the cheesecake & cookie!  The cute cat was a delightful addition to our time there.  Highly recommend:)

Name: Cha'ya Galata
Address: Şahkulu, No:, Serdar-ı Ekrem Cd. No:45, Beyoğlu
Author: Alexander de la Cour
Review:
Fantastic. The Turkish coffee was excellent and the presentation is super loving and thoughtful. My partners milk oolong was fantastically brewed and the tea quality is great.
I was hesitant because of the places name, and I will return every time I’m in this area.

Name: Luu Bubble Waffle Coffee
Address: Cennet, Zafer Sk. No:12B, Küçükçekmece
Author: Ece Öztürk
Review: It was the most delicious waffle I have ever eaten. The fruits were fresh, the chocolate and waffle dough were very nice 👍🏻 the size of the portions is very good, it can be easily ordered for two people. Many thanks to Mr. Enes and Ms. Nurgül for their smiling faces🙏🏻 🤗

Name: Luu Bubble Waffle Coffee
Address: Cennet, Zafer Sk. No:12B, Küçükçekmece
Author: Buğrahan Barışıcı
Review: As a waffle addict, I say they have great quality chocolates. The fruits are fresh, the coffee is very good. The employees are friendly, the place is the best place to go with your family, loved ones and friends in this area. I highly recommend it ✌

Name: Luu Bubble Waffle Coffee
Address: Cennet, Zafer Sk. No:12B, Küçükçekmece
Author: Emin Gulgonul
Review: It is a warm, 'one of us' place that constantly diversifies its menu and prioritizes customer satisfaction and quality service. Its staff are extremely attentive and attentive. Desserts, coffees and conversations… Each one is delicious in its own way.

Name: Luu Bubble Waffle Coffee
Address: Cennet, Zafer Sk. No:12B, Küçükçekmece
Author: Sevinç Kıvrak
Review: Might be the most delicious waffle I've ever eaten. In one word, you are a legend!!! Also, the operators are very polite, how sweet they are ❤️ my favorite

Name: Luu Bubble Waffle Coffee
Address: Cennet, Zafer Sk. No:12B, Küçükçekmece
Author: Eyüp BİŞKİN
Review: They definitely serve a lot of the best Waffle ingredients I have ever eaten, it is a very sweet place, thank you for your interest, we are very pleased.

Name: Moncai Bubble Tea Bahariye
Address: Caferağa, Gen. Asım Gündüz Cd. 46-48, Kadıköy
Author: Emma Correia
Review: Went for an early afternoon bubble tea. The single staff member seemed unenthused about our arrival. We ordered two simple drinks but they only had 2 of the 4 milks offered on their menu. My brown sugar milk tea made with almond milk ended up incredibly sweet. The tapioca was okay but perhaps slightly undercooked. Flavor was not great. Would not recommend this place to anyone used to high quality bubble tea. It was like iced sweetened milk, which was good enough for a hot day. About 220 lira for the two drinks.

Name: Moncai Bubble Tea Bahariye
Address: Caferağa, Gen. Asım Gündüz Cd. 46-48, Kadıköy
Author: Ruba Khedr
Review: A very good place for boba with many options. The menu is literally so big and full of different options to suit everyone. Very recommend. I tried the coffee boba milk it is good for people who usually drink coffee. And i also recommend the moncai premium taro😋the black sugar boba milk is good for people who like extra sweet drinks

Name: Moncai Bubble Tea Bahariye
Address: Caferağa, Gen. Asım Gündüz Cd. 46-48, Kadıköy
Author: Alexandria
Review: Bubble tea here costs 110 lira for a small, 120 for medium and 130 for a large size. Large is the best value for money. Seating area was spacious and bright and service was efficient. We ordered the crystal matcha bubble tea but it had a slightly artificial taste, as if they did not use real matcha.

Name: Moncai Bubble Tea Bahariye
Address: Caferağa, Gen. Asım Gündüz Cd. 46-48, Kadıköy
Author: Hau Keong Yoong
Review: While savoring the bubble milk tea, I find it to be a tad sweeter than my preference. The delightful medley of flavors, from the velvety milk to the chewy tapioca pearls, is slightly overshadowed by the sweetness. A subtle reduction in sweetness would likely elevate the overall experience, allowing the intricate flavors to unfold more distinctly on the palate. The potential adjustment promises to strike a perfect balance, transforming an already enjoyable beverage into an even more nuanced and satisfying treat.

Name: Moncai Bubble Tea Bahariye
Address: Caferağa, Gen. Asım Gündüz Cd. 46-48, Kadıköy
Author: Shamma S
Review:
I had an iced matcha latte, it was good i should’ve asked for vanilla syrup or some sugar. It was my fault i didn’t ask, i didn’t feel welcomed.

The cafe feels a bit empty yet suffocating, wouldn’t advise sitting in.

However, great location you can walk around outside and explore the area with a good drink in hand.

Name: Hubble Bubble
Address: Yeşilköy, Alişan Yedibaşlar Sk. No:3 D:2, Bakırköy
Author: Jamie Barsoum
Review: Great place to sit down and relax. Staff are helpful and very willing to make sure you have what you need. You can smoke shisha/Nargile here, there are a few TV screens to watch sports and Turkish board games to play like backgammon and okey. Food is nice and a variety of drinks are available.

Name: Hubble Bubble
Address: Yeşilköy, Alişan Yedibaşlar Sk. No:3 D:2, Bakırköy
Author: F. S
Review: If you are spending alot than you will be cared by the servers if you are not than no body will care about you, instead such a nice location perfect place could be focusing on happinies of customers than probably customers will spend more money ,

Name: Hubble Bubble
Address: Yeşilköy, Alişan Yedibaşlar Sk. No:3 D:2, Bakırköy
Author: Shahar Fishler
Review: great food very cheap amazing nargila with icE!! new to me! nice waitresses very friendly atmosphere

Name: Hubble Bubble
Address: Yeşilköy, Alişan Yedibaşlar Sk. No:3 D:2, Bakırköy
Author: David Henderson
Review:
Hookah must be good, because it’s busy.
But food was not great. Sorry.

Name: Hubble Bubble
Address: Yeşilköy, Alişan Yedibaşlar Sk. No:3 D:2, Bakırköy
Author: Elif Esen
Review: I am not a big fan of “nargile” so didn’t enjoy the smokey atmosphere

Name: Bykush Sokak - BURGER , Coffee & Dessert | Kadıköy Moda Kahve & Cafe
Address: Caferağa, Fırıldak Sk. No:14 D:16, Kadıköy
Author: Ayşegül Yönet
Review: Beautiful corner coffee shop smells jasmines during the summer days. Their coffee and teas are high quality and have a good selection of desserts. Their food options are mostly meat and charcuterie.

Name: Bykush Sokak - BURGER , Coffee & Dessert | Kadıköy Moda Kahve & Cafe
Address: Caferağa, Fırıldak Sk. No:14 D:16, Kadıköy
Author: Tanya Hasanniazi
Review:
Mediocre, but saviory
Good for latenight hunger, not so good if you wanna have good meat.
The fries were yummy.

Name: Bykush Sokak - BURGER , Coffee & Dessert | Kadıköy Moda Kahve & Cafe
Address: Caferağa, Fırıldak Sk. No:14 D:16, Kadıköy
Author: Yousef Gamal
Review: The burger was very tasty, but it was very small, I doubled my burger but it wasn't enough. They have a very nice sauce there called "beef sauce", and one bad thing is that they ask you to pay for the sauces (even ketchup and mayo)

Name: Bykush Sokak - BURGER , Coffee & Dessert | Kadıköy Moda Kahve & Cafe
Address: Caferağa, Fırıldak Sk. No:14 D:16, Kadıköy
Author: Anwar lights
Review: I visited the restaurant with my Fiancee the atmosphere is amazing we really enjoyed and food is more than delicious and we got some great suggestions for a dessert and dinner and it was perfectly made with love ❤️🌺and special thanks for Aline she so elegant 🙏

Name: Bykush Sokak - BURGER , Coffee & Dessert | Kadıköy Moda Kahve & Cafe
Address: Caferağa, Fırıldak Sk. No:14 D:16, Kadıköy
Author: Anatoly Volchkov
Review: A big variety of food especially burgers. For such a big selection of dishes the food is quite nice

Name: Dem Moda
Address: Caferağa, Şair Nefi Sk. 9/1, Kadıköy
Author: Tanya Hasanniazi
Review:
I liked my breakfast choice, the beetroot sauce on toasted bread, with avocado and and poached eggs was a great idea, wish i knew the sauce recipe.
My friends didn't like their choice!

Need to mention that we waited for our order for more than an hour which was frustrating.
Their music playlist was also a disaster

Name: Dem Moda
Address: Caferağa, Şair Nefi Sk. 9/1, Kadıköy
Author: Selin Camli
Review: Delicious in every way + the best tea selection of Istanbul is found here. Definitely try the vanilla rooibos!

Name: Dem Moda
Address: Caferağa, Şair Nefi Sk. 9/1, Kadıköy
Author: Göktuğ Özdem
Review: Dem is famous for its desserts and different types od tea 🫖. I a can say it is one of the unique places where you can find many different types of tea to try. The atmosphere is also very nice inside. I have been here for many times before. Today, I wanted to try their breakfast. It was below expectations that is why it is not a 5 star. Recommended for tea but not for breakfast 👌

Name: Dem Moda
Address: Caferağa, Şair Nefi Sk. 9/1, Kadıköy
Author: Deniz Keles
Review:
This is a cute cafe specializing in white, green and black teas, as well as offering good brunch dishes and desserts.

Although not coming here for the first time, we wanted to try some more of those brunch dishes, of which we’ve ordered Spanish Omelette and Avocado Tartine.

Spanish Omelette was quite small to fill a normal person, whereas Tartine was quite adequate. However, we were disappointed by the waiting time, which apparently is caused by the lack of staff. Also, we think that the staff could be a little more helpful.

Name: Dem Moda
Address: Caferağa, Şair Nefi Sk. 9/1, Kadıköy
Author: Leen
Review: The cutest chill cafe vibes great for working remotely. Their ice tea is the best I have ever had. We got the beryl and tropical both were amazing. I’m also looking forward to try their breakfast it looks amazing.

Name: Yummy Donats Bostancı
Address: Altıntepe, Bağdat Cad. No:80, 34840, Maltepe
Author: Arz
Review: They make delicious fresh donuts, I recommend you to try them, especially the Turkish coffee is delicious and they are very attentive.

Name: Yummy Donats Bostancı
Address: Altıntepe, Bağdat Cad. No:80, 34840, Maltepe
Author: burak erol
Review: A very cute place. The concept and decoration are very good. In addition to donuts, the coffee variety and prices are also very good. plenty of customers.

Name: Yummy Donats Bostancı
Address: Altıntepe, Bağdat Cad. No:80, 34840, Maltepe
Author: Melike AKYOL
Review: It was the most delicious donut I have ever eaten 😍 I ordered it as takeaway, thank you very much for the speed of delivery, I will go and experience this taste on site as soon as possible 😊

Name: Yummy Donats Bostancı
Address: Altıntepe, Bağdat Cad. No:80, 34840, Maltepe
Author: Ümit Doğrul
Review: Their coffees are as excellent as their donuts. Their staff is friendly and warm. A place that can be a common point for motorcycle lovers. I recommend.

Name: Yummy Donats Bostancı
Address: Altıntepe, Bağdat Cad. No:80, 34840, Maltepe
Author: Zeynep Berru Taner
Review: It was a very enjoyable place, we had the chance to eat hot sauce donuts for the first time 👌

Name: SunBerry Juice
Address: Duatepe, Ergenekon Cd. No:109C, Şişli
Author: اسماء المقاطي
Review: I am the Arab who was there a while ago. She is very nice, the coffee is delicious, the donuts were very delicious, and your smile too. Thank you, my dear 🤍

Name: SunBerry Juice
Address: Duatepe, Ergenekon Cd. No:109C, Şişli
Author: Yağmur keskin
Review: I loved the astronaut decorations. The juices are fresh, they squeeze them after your order. Smoothies make you feel beautiful and healthy. I liked the service they offered. I recommend you stop by.

Name: SunBerry Juice
Address: Duatepe, Ergenekon Cd. No:109C, Şişli
Author: Ali furkan Çetin
Review: It's a really sweet place with its fresh fruit, squeezed drinks and atmosphere. There's even a game console inside where you can have fun with your friends. I highly recommend it.

Name: SunBerry Juice
Address: Duatepe, Ergenekon Cd. No:109C, Şişli
Author: Metehan Aslan
Review: We came to try the restaurant's famous waffle fondue and special croissant. It really is as much as mentioned. The service, the taste, the atmosphere of the place, everything is perfect.

Name: SunBerry Juice
Address: Duatepe, Ergenekon Cd. No:109C, Şişli
Author: Havin Gözsu
Review: The environment and arrangement are very sweet, the concept is very nice, the desserts are very nice and the employees were also very friendly and sweet people. Ms. Eylül was very interested in it 💗

Name: SİO
Address: Şenlikköy AQUA AVM SAHİL, Yeşilköy Halkalı Cd., Bakırköy
Author: Ferit Firat
Review: A wonderful place with a stunning sea view.  Here you can find nargile (shisha), hot and cold drinks and food.  I liked the Americano, it was great compared to other coffee shops.  The cheeseburger looks delicious and rich, but my son gave it 50 out of 100.  It has a wonderful atmosphere with its green-enriched walls and a really effective external cooling system.

Name: SİO
Address: Şenlikköy AQUA AVM SAHİL, Yeşilköy Halkalı Cd., Bakırköy
Author: Aboozi “Thecurlytalk”
Review: Im just in love with this lounge! If you’re looking for a place to chill , eat or just enjoy a cup of coffee i highly recommend you try them out definitely! The staff are so welcoming and kind 💚💚

Name: SİO
Address: Şenlikköy AQUA AVM SAHİL, Yeşilköy Halkalı Cd., Bakırköy
Author: Djalal Tebib
Review: A fantastic lounge with a great terrace. I had a delicious tiramisu along with some local delights. The atmosphere was very pleasant.

Name: SİO
Address: Şenlikköy AQUA AVM SAHİL, Yeşilköy Halkalı Cd., Bakırköy
Author: L D
Review: Terrible place , don’t come here if you want to be treated with respect , me and couple of friends came to sit here and drink a milkshake ( 3/10) and plays some card games , we sit and take out our stuff and after 5 min a waiter comes and starts hand sign us like dogs to not play . Keep in mind that the place is empty , there’s 5 people here at most . Before that only me and another friend order , the other one didn’t want any, they made him order at least a tea . Terrible customer service, don’t spend money on it .

Name: SİO
Address: Şenlikköy AQUA AVM SAHİL, Yeşilköy Halkalı Cd., Bakırköy
Author: Ahmad Huseynli
Review:
I liked the atmosphere and service, shisha was nice.

But for food: they tried to teach me about the meat explaining why meat is not soft. They got the meat replaced but it was still kind of hard to chew.....I don't recommend stakes of lokum based on my experience. I appreciate they got it replaced but I don't appreciate challenging a client that this is normal.

Name: PUFFY BUBBLE WAFFLE
Address: Osmanağa, Nail Bey Sk. No:12, Kadıköy
Author: Maha
Review: The interior is really beautiful and the staff are very friendly , waffles are so delicious I recommend you go there if you want to try the best waffle in İSTANBUL

Name: PUFFY BUBBLE WAFFLE
Address: Osmanağa, Nail Bey Sk. No:12, Kadıköy
Author: Arda Zeytin
Review: The best waffle I have eaten in Istanbul. Make sure you don't leave Turkey without eating.

Name: PUFFY BUBBLE WAFFLE
Address: Osmanağa, Nail Bey Sk. No:12, Kadıköy
Author: Ayasofia Jouny
Review: The place is very beautiful and instagrammable. Not only was the service amazing but the waffles were very very delicious. 10/10 recommend for friend groups!

Name: PUFFY BUBBLE WAFFLE
Address: Osmanağa, Nail Bey Sk. No:12, Kadıköy
Author: Farah Ahmed
Review: I've always been self-conscious about my smile, but thanks to the cosmetic dentistry services at this clinic, I now have the confidence to show off my pearly whites

Name: PUFFY BUBBLE WAFFLE
Address: Osmanağa, Nail Bey Sk. No:12, Kadıköy
Author: Sina Safari
Review: Excellent food, friendly staff and lively nightlife! Definitely recommend visiting!

Name: DOZZE KARTAL
Address: Esentepe, AND PASTEL, AND Pastel Sitesi Ticari Alan, Anadolu Cd. No:5, Kartal
Author: berna atlanc
Review: I especially love the cortado and quince toast. They offer an extremely hospitable service. The fact that they are pet friendly also makes me very happy. Note: Drinking black mulberry juice with ice goes well in hot weather.

Name: DOZZE KARTAL
