Address: Esentepe, AND PASTEL, AND Pastel Sitesi Ticari Alan, Anadolu Cd. No:5, Kartal
Author: emre yıldırım
Review: I prefer this establishment because of its coffee taste. It has a nice environment. The employees provide caring and friendly service. Thank you dose

Name: DOZZE KARTAL
Address: Esentepe, AND PASTEL, AND Pastel Sitesi Ticari Alan, Anadolu Cd. No:5, Kartal
Author: Duygu Coşkun
Review: The cafe owners are so caring that you feel like you are at home. I definitely recommend you to eat Ayvalık toast. The ingredients are very high quality and very delicious. I have nothing to say about their coffee anyway :) Thank you for everything, Ms. Burcu and Mr. Yavuz. Your energy is great. :))))

Name: DOZZE KARTAL
Address: Esentepe, AND PASTEL, AND Pastel Sitesi Ticari Alan, Anadolu Cd. No:5, Kartal
Author: Aslı A
Review: Their 3 cheese flatbread toast and coffee are excellent. Mr. Yavuz and Ms. Burcu are very friendly and caring. Family run business, dog friendly, doesn't close until the customers leave. It's a good solution even if you're hungry at night. The kitchen is spotless, the ingredients used are very fresh. Be sure to try the orange ice cream

Name: DOZZE KARTAL
Address: Esentepe, AND PASTEL, AND Pastel Sitesi Ticari Alan, Anadolu Cd. No:5, Kartal
Author: Gamze Hamza
Review: The first and only place that made me drink and love black mulberry juice. Ask for black mulberry juice, especially with soda. There's nothing to say about their coffee anyway. But don't leave without eating the quince toast. The place is spotlessly clean, the ingredients used are always fresh, and you feel like you are in a family atmosphere with the sincerity of Ms. Burcu and Mr. Yavuz. Also, many hearts for the appreciation they show for children and their paw friends. Come out come out 🥳

Name: Vintage Coffee
Address: Rasimpaşa, Misakı Milli Sk. No:97, Kadıköy
Author: Kieran Huisman
Review: Great coffee and comfortable feels with vintage decor. I came back for the 3rd time and tried the egg with sausages. It was perfectly cooked with fresh vegetables. It's one of the best egg dishes I've ever had :).  Highly recommend this cafe!

Name: Vintage Coffee
Address: Rasimpaşa, Misakı Milli Sk. No:97, Kadıköy
Author: ileni
Review: i really enjoy this spot to relax and calm down! they have a menu with a lot of different kind of vegan food/drinks. the service is always quick and the staff is so friendly and lovable. a recommendation from me is the the vegan breakfast, the burger menu and the vegan hatay menu!

Name: Vintage Coffee
Address: Rasimpaşa, Misakı Milli Sk. No:97, Kadıköy
Author: Rafaela Oriana Crăciun
Review: Today I went for a vegan breakfast. To me, it didn't seem very clean. I understand it's vegan, but it felt neglected, like an abandoned place. I did like the atmosphere and the cat-friendly environment, but I don't think I would come back. The service was good and the staff was nice, but the food wasn't the best.

Name: Vintage Coffee
Address: Rasimpaşa, Misakı Milli Sk. No:97, Kadıköy
Author: Meli C
Review: We had a great experience at Vintage coffee! Their menu has tons of vegan and vegetarian options. We really appreciated this because I am a vegetarian and my boyfriend is not. We found that most places either are completely vegan, or if they serve meat, the vegetarian options are slim. At vintage coffee both my boyfriend  and I could enjoy excellent meals with no compromise and we were both happy. I ordered a vegan wrap and him a cheese burger for dinner. Both were very good and came with a good amount of fries. We went back the next day for breakfast and we were even more impressed!! I ordered the vegetarian breakfast and it was delicious!! My boyfriend had their regular breakfast that came with sausage and he enjoyed his as well. The price was also amazing! Each of our plates were 84 liras and it came with 2 teas each. We paid 168 liras total for everything you see in the photo. Perfect price for what you get. We will return for more!

Name: Vintage Coffee
Address: Rasimpaşa, Misakı Milli Sk. No:97, Kadıköy
Author: Manon C.
Review: Lovely cafe in Kadıköy, with plenty of vegan options. I tried the vegan salep, sucuk/cheese toasted sandwich and it was delicious. I will definitely go back on my next trip to Istanbul.

Name: COLD NERON
Address: Caferağa, Miralay Nazım Sk. no:5A, Kadıköy
Author: Karim Soliman
Review: This is the best the most different and the most natural ice-cream that I’ve ever tasted in my life. Listen I’ve been to many countries including Italy and I tasted the real gelato but this here is something else. It’s on a higher level. I felt like this ice cream awakened taste buds in my mouth that I didn’t even know existed. Just amazing 🤩 I highly recommend you to try it. If you don’t know what to get, let the owner help you with his recommendations. He knows this job very well 👍🏻👏

Name: COLD NERON
Address: Caferağa, Miralay Nazım Sk. no:5A, Kadıköy
Author: Sandra Vivian Ural
Review:
A small, cute, specialty ice-cream outlet in Kadıköy, Istanbul. Try the Thai rolled ice-cream, it's made in front of you, and is a sufficient portion for sharing. Choose your fruits, biscuits and add sahlep, then let the magic happen right before your eyes. No nasty additives, and 100% fresh. Other desserts are available. It was a very friendly, experience; we got to talk with tourists from South Korea  and Hong Kong to Boot!
So, if you're I'm need of an ice-cream break with  twist, give COOL NERON  a go, you won't be dissapointed. Enjoy

Name: COLD NERON
Address: Caferağa, Miralay Nazım Sk. no:5A, Kadıköy
Author: Kathleen Ooi
Review: I frankly have no idea how this place got all these positive reviews. I can see there are claims that the icecream has no additives but they absolutely taste artificial and some flavours (eg the green apple) is a very unnatural shade of green. We had a few bites of our melon and chocolate scoops prior to throwing it out.

Name: COLD NERON
Address: Caferağa, Miralay Nazım Sk. no:5A, Kadıköy
Author: Arnaud M
Review: I had the vegan Thai roll ice cream and it was excellent! Fresh fruits, not too sweet, just perfect! Great people, very friendly and welcoming. A must try in the area!

Name: COLD NERON
Address: Caferağa, Miralay Nazım Sk. no:5A, Kadıköy
Author: B. B.
Review: A new ice cream shop in town. All the staff are proud of their ice cream flavors and claim that they offer the best ice cream in town, especially since they have no preservatives etc. I found the ice cream flavors to be good but I noticed that the recipe is always the same, no matter what flavor. Therefore the texture is always very similar. I personally also recommended that I would at least offer sorbets instead, as some flavors don't taste good with milk. Long story short, really not bad but can be much better.

Name: Creamchocco Yeşilköy
Address: Yeşilköy, İstasyon Cd. No:32, Bakırköy
Author: Ekrem Demir
Review: The team working there is very bad and disrespectful

Name: Creamchocco Yeşilköy
Address: Yeşilköy, İstasyon Cd. No:32, Bakırköy
Author: Yehya Kamaluden
Review: Very clean, lovely decoration and the pastries’ taste is amazing

Name: Creamchocco Yeşilköy
Address: Yeşilköy, İstasyon Cd. No:32, Bakırköy
Author: Menna Fadlallah
Review: It was a colourful, sweet place, they got a vary of deserts and drinks, the hosts were very friendly 🌹

Name: Creamchocco Yeşilköy
Address: Yeşilköy, İstasyon Cd. No:32, Bakırköy
Author: Hasan Güneş Diridiri
Review: Used to be good, now it's just expensive and unsatisfying. I only recommend the magnolia.

Name: Creamchocco Yeşilköy
Address: Yeşilköy, İstasyon Cd. No:32, Bakırköy
Author: mary maddah
Review: Good waffles ☺️

Name: Das Han Coffee&Breakfast
Address: Şahkulu, Şah Kulu Bostan Sk. 22a, Beyoğlu
Author: Sayaka Kira
Review:
We ordered breakfast here. The salad and the fries were tasty but the croissant with eggs was really heavy for my standard especially for breakfast so I had trouble finishing it.
The staff was very kind and warm. There were just two staff preparing the dish and it took a while for our food to be served, and not at the same time for us so one of us had to start already before it got cold. There were other tables also waiting for what they ordered so I see that when the place has a certain number of guests food takes a while to prepare for everyone to have their food.

Name: Das Han Coffee&Breakfast
Address: Şahkulu, Şah Kulu Bostan Sk. 22a, Beyoğlu
Author: Kai Neo
Review: This charming café, perched on a slope, benefits from its unique layout, giving it a breezy balcony perfect for enjoying a cool morning. Known for their croissant breakfasts, the pastries had potential but could have used a light toasting. Instead, they were heated in a microwave, leaving them overly hot with the butter completely melted. The cappuccino, served in a generous size, had a milk-to-espresso ratio that leaned too milky, losing the balance of flavors. While the café is a pleasant spot for brunch, the food and drinks could benefit from a few tweaks to enhance the overall experience.

Name: Das Han Coffee&Breakfast
Address: Şahkulu, Şah Kulu Bostan Sk. 22a, Beyoğlu
Author: Ping Pond
Review:
The best place in Istanbul.
We’ve had our apartments nearby and came for breakfast couple of times. They were always very tasty and fresh, the owner (I think) of the place was happy to see us every time. From our second visit he started to recognize and greet us which was very nice.
Coffee is very good here. There are several different alternative brewing options to choose from which is a big plus for coffee lovers like me.
Atmosphere is pleasant and cheerful, calm and relaxing. Design is bringing you back to cozy old times.
I cannot recommend this place enough. If you’re in Istanbul, pay the visit for sure.

Name: Das Han Coffee&Breakfast
Address: Şahkulu, Şah Kulu Bostan Sk. 22a, Beyoğlu
Author: Todd Bruschwein
Review: Tasty brunch and coffee at Das Han! I ordered the “Mexican” breakfast, it was delicious and the portions massive. The v60 pour over was very good.

Name: Das Han Coffee&Breakfast
Address: Şahkulu, Şah Kulu Bostan Sk. 22a, Beyoğlu
Author: Ablikim Wali
Review: I cannot explain my great  experience what I got enjoyable breakfast here . The place is very nearby to Istiklal street in Taksim Square. Perfect services and staff , extremely convenient price . Fantastic breakfast by best time .

Name: Midpoint
Address: Tomtom, İstiklal Cd. No: 187, Beyoğlu
Author: Jelu Mari Ureta
Review: I came here alone and had dinner. I ordered korean chicken. The portion is huge. The view is amazing, the variety of food is good, and there's space for everyone inside and outside. The prices are reasonable. Location is perfect too.  I love the vibe of this restaurant. Midpoint restaurant is a highly recommend place to dine with family and friends. A must try!

Name: Midpoint
Address: Tomtom, İstiklal Cd. No: 187, Beyoğlu
Author: Maria Ledesma-Kap
Review: Greeters are nice and accommodating. Great view at the terrace. Wide selection of food- they literally have a book for a menu! I find the male servers cold and unwelcoming. I was on a call when the server decided that it was the perfect time to ask for my order! I asked him to give me 5 more min & he never came back. There’s one female server who was ever so nice & remembered our orders without writing them down! Food is ok. Their selling point is the wide terrace with a view, access to alcohol, they open early and close late.

Name: Midpoint
Address: Tomtom, İstiklal Cd. No: 187, Beyoğlu
Author: Jennifer Donaldson
Review: We love this restaurant for casual dining and for meeting up with friends. The view is amazing, the variety of food is good, and there's space for everyone inside and outside. We probably ate there at least 4 times in the 8 days we were in the city! Pizzas, pastas, warm bowls, salads,truffle fries, sandwiches, and more. Reasonable prices. Wish we had something like this in our hometown. Stop reading reviews and just walk to Midpoint! You won't be disappointed!

Name: Midpoint
Address: Tomtom, İstiklal Cd. No: 187, Beyoğlu
Author: Shirana Mahlooji
Review: Every thing was amazing. The staff were super friendly and helpful. Salads, pizzas and coktails was very delicious. The price is very good for the location and service

Name: Midpoint
Address: Tomtom, İstiklal Cd. No: 187, Beyoğlu
Author: Ali
Review: Today I tried the Jamaican Chicken Fettuccine at Midpoint Istiklal and it was one of the worst fettuccine dishes I've ever had. It didn't even taste like fettuccine. While I've enjoyed many dishes here, I found that Italian cuisine doesn't suit this place. I don't recommend it at all. On the positive side, the restaurant has a good atmosphere, decent customer service, but the prices don't match the quality of the food.

Name: COOKSHOP
Address: Ataköy 1. Mahallesi Fişekhane Cad Capacity Alışveriş Merkezi, Bakırköy
Author: Luis Mejicano
Review: The service was attentive and warm, even with some language barriers, making us feel truly welcomed. We enjoyed coffee and a dessert called Magdalena, which was a delightful pudding. While the coffee wasn't the best, the pudding was flavorful and enjoyable. Overall, it was a pleasant experience.

Name: COOKSHOP
Address: Ataköy 1. Mahallesi Fişekhane Cad Capacity Alışveriş Merkezi, Bakırköy
Author: Mi G
Review:
After I tried the Chocolate restaurant, I wanted to try Cookshop. Very disappointing experience. The waiter never came to see me after he took my order. I wanted to order 2-3 mores drinks but no one came. I wanted the steak medium, it came overcooked and impossible to chew. The mushrooms only taste the soya sauce. The fries were disgusting, clearly put in oil a second time.
The restaurant looks good tho, nice ambiance, nice terrace.

Name: COOKSHOP
Address: Ataköy 1. Mahallesi Fişekhane Cad Capacity Alışveriş Merkezi, Bakırköy
Author: Rayah Abdulrahman
Review:
If I had to just rate the decor and interiors, I would give 5 stars🤩
The service could be better, the mac and cheese portion was so small and the chicken tasted weird. The sliders were very good😋

Name: COOKSHOP
Address: Ataköy 1. Mahallesi Fişekhane Cad Capacity Alışveriş Merkezi, Bakırköy
Author: Moyad J Abu Elayyan
Review:
The cookshop has a decent menu alot of choices that suite most tastes. We ordered mac and cheese a Lasagne, Mac and cheese was good i would suggest to reduce cheddar cheese and add more American cheese but if you like cheddar it’s the perfect dish for you as for the Lasagne it was fantastic.
Staff was slow i have ordered ice but i never got it took them 8 minutes to bring POS machine for payment but i can understand the delay as the restaurant was busy on Saturday noon.

Name: COOKSHOP
Address: Ataköy 1. Mahallesi Fişekhane Cad Capacity Alışveriş Merkezi, Bakırköy
Author: Suliman Benhalim
Review: Food is great, only issue was the chicken finger were very dry

Name: Bubble King Tea Shop
Address: Mecidiye, Müverrih Sadettin Sk. No:2/A, Ortaköy
Author: Shaxos Travel
Review:
Drinks: Banana milk tea, coconut milk tea and Lychee fruit tea. All 3 were deeeelicious

Service: Excellent, the last who served us was warm, friendly and genuine.

Atmosphere: The shop itself is small but looks like its more for drinks to go.

Overall highly recommended and prices reasonable.

Shaxos Travel on IG and YT

Name: Bubble King Tea Shop
Address: Mecidiye, Müverrih Sadettin Sk. No:2/A, Ortaköy
Author: Bartu Hunduroglu
Review: The first time I tried bubble tea, was amazing! I tried the melon one for the first and second time as I remember and that was absolutely tasteful. But third and last time, I tried coconut milk and I can't even describe how delicious it was! You just have to try. The owner lady is always friendly to you. Cheers!🙏

Name: Bubble King Tea Shop
Address: Mecidiye, Müverrih Sadettin Sk. No:2/A, Ortaköy
Author: Turkey Consultants
Review: Arguably the best bubble tea in Istanbul. The bubble balls are made of tapioca flour. The taste of most of their flavors is great.

Name: Bubble King Tea Shop
Address: Mecidiye, Müverrih Sadettin Sk. No:2/A, Ortaköy
Author: C L
Review: I'm from Taiwan 🇹🇼 and this is the first time I taste the real flavor of home here in Istanbul. The owner is Chinese Thai and she's very kind and talkative. Thank you it was a lovely experience. Strongly recommend

Name: Bubble King Tea Shop
Address: Mecidiye, Müverrih Sadettin Sk. No:2/A, Ortaköy
Author: BemyBell _
Review: I would highly recommend both administration and taste from my experience of trying bubble tea in all of istanbul, I rate this shop as the best I really like it and will definitely come back there again and the price is affordable the price is worth with what u get must try!!

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No: 76/B, Beşiktaş
Author: shiva Hemmat
Review: Absolutely love this place ! The team is fantastic—friendly, helpful, and creates a peaceful vibe. The place is spotless, and the diverse range of delicious bubble tea options is a game-changer. A must-visit spot for bubble tea lovers!

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No: 76/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Cheryl Soh
Review: I have to says it’s the best and closest to authentic bubble tea I’ve had in Turkey thus far. Prices are also very reasonable, as of March 2022 basic bubble teas are 20-23TL, and additional 3TL for pearls. But their bubble teas can be a little sweet even though i opted for 30% sugar which is the second lowest option. Their brown sugar bubble tea is good!

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No: 76/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Fatimah Mo
Review:
The place exceeded my expectations
This is the first boba shop i go to in turkey so i cant really compare it to other boba shops here but it does feel like asian boba shop in far east asia

Overall experience:9/10
Drinks: we had two
Brown sugar boba : 8.5/10
The blue drink : 8/10

The Ratings are my personal preference, but they are equally delicious and well-made

Hygiene : 8/10
Hospitality:7/10 friendly in general but one of them was mean when we tried to take some photos .. we understand that they dont prefer having photos taken while they prepare the order but it would’ve been nice if he said it in another way
And therefore i wont post them

Prices: 8/10 very affordable we had the brown sugar boba in tall and the blue one in medium both total around 5$

Ps. They charge more if you take your drink with no ice … because they would have to use more ingredients

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No: 76/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Marsela Qevani
Review:
Best boba in İstanbul and best costumer service.
Please bring avocado as everytime i come i ask for the avocado strawberry drink but its been months and there is no avocado.
The Atmosphere is quiet but no air conditioning, please fix this issue so we can stay more at the place.

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No: 76/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Kazem Ghazaleh
Review: I am surprised at the 4 star rating, the place looks very nice and modern, staff was welcoming and gave good information about the products, and the dirty brown sugar I had was very good, I really liked the place and will be coming back soon

Name: Boble Bubble Tea
Address: İkitelli OSB, Mall of İstanbul, Süleyman Demirel Blv No:7, Başakşehir
Author: mitra Zbl
Review:
You can get all kinds of boba flavors here with a variety of drinks. Quality is good, the staff are really nice and friendly, and it has two stores inside mall of Istanbul. You can the see the boba patches cooking which is fun.
Prices are reasonable as well. Highly recommend.

Name: Boble Bubble Tea
Address: İkitelli OSB, Mall of İstanbul, Süleyman Demirel Blv No:7, Başakşehir
Author: Mina Ryuk
Review: Usually in other branches they give a circle so you can change the drink in case you don’t like it but here they choose and pick who they want to give and I ordered matcha because I’ve had it in a different branch and it tasted good but here it’s straight up grass they didn’t even whisk it im so disappointed

Name: Boble Bubble Tea
Address: İkitelli OSB, Mall of İstanbul, Süleyman Demirel Blv No:7, Başakşehir
Author: Emana A.
Review: Tried couple of things from the menu and the best ones are the milk tea peach and mango with tapioca. Didn’t like the ones that pop in your mouth. The chewy one is better.

Name: Boble Bubble Tea
Address: İkitelli OSB, Mall of İstanbul, Süleyman Demirel Blv No:7, Başakşehir
Author: Rami (RSS)
Review: Try Passion fruit tea with strawberry boba

Name: Boble Bubble Tea
Address: İkitelli OSB, Mall of İstanbul, Süleyman Demirel Blv No:7, Başakşehir
Author: Dream Works
Review: Incredibly strange product that bears no resemblance to bubble tea.  It was filled with powder without dissolving.  I couldn't drink it after just one sip, and then I saw a lot of drinks of this brand that were thrown away after just one sip in the trash can nearby.

Name: Poppin' Bubble Tea & Coffee - Moda
Address: Caferağa, Bademaltı Sk. No:36/B, Kadıköy
Author: Ava Silence
Review: I've tried almost everything in the menu! I absolutely hate the popular pick black milk tea with tapioca toppings though. I simply think it's because I don't like the chewy texture, so I don't think it's a problem with this place. Just my sensory issues. Other than that, I love the drinks! Just a little expensive, but cmon now everything in Istanbul is expensive anyway haha. I love the Mango drink with green apple toppings! My favorite!

Name: Poppin' Bubble Tea & Coffee - Moda
Address: Caferağa, Bademaltı Sk. No:36/B, Kadıköy
Author: Tiya Lee
Review:
The drink is too watery not sweet at all. The boba is not too bad but you can feel it’s been made for long time. I’m a Taiwanese. And I tired many bubble tea shops in Istanbul. Compare to others, this one is abit pricy and the taste is awful🥲there are more better and authentic boba tea in Istanbul.
but the staffs are friendly

Name: Poppin' Bubble Tea & Coffee - Moda
Address: Caferağa, Bademaltı Sk. No:36/B, Kadıköy
Author: Carina Gröhn
Review:
We tried Bob Marley (passion fruit) with mango pearls because it received the most recommendations. They offer 3 different sizes and we chosed medium. The drink with one kind of bubbles cost 27 TL.

The staff was friendly and those we met spoke good English. There are some tables to sit at inside and some outside. My teenage daughter thought the drink was very good and we went back later that day and bought one more. Personally, I thought the drink was good while the pearls were a little too sweet. Fun to try, especially for teenagers. 😍

Name: Poppin' Bubble Tea & Coffee - Moda
Address: Caferağa, Bademaltı Sk. No:36/B, Kadıköy
Author: Evgeniya Bozhko (KoriAndrTheCat)
Review: This was the third boba place that we visited because the first one was closed and the second had an hour long line. This spot had a very long line as well, but the wait time did not pay off. This was the most disgusting tea we have ever tried (in comparison with western US). First of all, it was watered down too much, there was no sugar, and also no tapioca pearls. How can a boba place not have boba? There is an incredibly long line, and everything is really slow. Personnel doesn’t speak English at all, could barely explain anything, even though the menu is in English. It stands in no comparison with what you get in the US.

Name: Poppin' Bubble Tea & Coffee - Moda
Address: Caferağa, Bademaltı Sk. No:36/B, Kadıköy
Author: Jade N.R
Review:
I will comment base on my experiences. So
1. Decorations 4 from 5. ( so creative, lab style, good for take pictures)
2. The taste 2.7 from 5 ( not bad but not that good, i think u mix with too much water. So taste fell watery not that intense taste)
3.location 5/5 (easy to find, and located in popular street)
4.price 3 from 5 (base on taste of tea, taste i would give this score)

But i can understand it might shop’s taste style like this. But for me if mix less water, it might feel as Asian’s original taste.

Name: Moncai Bubble Tea
Address: Caddebostan, Caddebostan İskele Sk. No:12/a, Kadıköy
Author: Rafaël Vera Evertman
Review:
First boba place I have tried in Istanbul. Nevertheless it tasted very good. I got myself a large brown sugar boba tea.

It was really cheap compared to the prices I’m used to paying. Quality wise, fresh milk is being used, no powdered milk. The menu was in Turkish so I saw a bit too late that you could change the ice level. Since for my liking it was too much. Nevertheless the tapioca tastes great, it has a good chewiness and enough flavor.

Price/quality wise very good!! If I’m ever back in Istanbul there is a high chance of me coming back!

Name: Moncai Bubble Tea
Address: Caddebostan, Caddebostan İskele Sk. No:12/a, Kadıköy
Author: Emelda Buaduwah
Review: Good place for a quick bubble tea, very quick service but the place was a bit dirty and could be easily cleaned up

Name: Moncai Bubble Tea
Address: Caddebostan, Caddebostan İskele Sk. No:12/a, Kadıköy
Author: Shawa5y
Review: Tried the ortakoy branch bubble tea brown sugar didnt find the branch on google maps so ill post here 😂 the bubble tea was so. Ice and the sales lady was friendly

Name: Moncai Bubble Tea
Address: Caddebostan, Caddebostan İskele Sk. No:12/a, Kadıköy
Author: M. A. (Manochino)
Review: Bubble Tea is popular again! After many years, we can now see some boba tea shops opening up in different areas. This one is a cute spot near Caddebostan. The menu is nice. The options are great. We had the Thai Tea Bubble tea version and the Mango Pea Tea. Both of them were nice. The prices are normal. I could definitely go there to get some Boba Tea.

Name: Moncai Bubble Tea
Address: Caddebostan, Caddebostan İskele Sk. No:12/a, Kadıköy
Author: Luda B
Review:
Yum 🤤
One of the best boba tea places in Istanbul (and Türkiye!) — I’m so happy we have an authentic bubble tea place near Bagdat!

The place is spacious (lots of space inside and an outdoor terrace), the menu is huge, and the decor is modern.

We ordered the classic Black Sugar boba and immediately after we tried it, we went back and ordered another drink (British Tea with cream foam). Both were delicious, had just the right amount of sweetness, and were so flavorful!

The boba bubbles are perfect - chewy and not too sweet. The boba baristas (?) definitely know what they’re doing!

I highly recommend!! It’s a great place to stop and relax :)

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Cevizlik Mahallesi, Morsümbül Sokak, Morsümbül Apt, No: 1/3A, Bakırköy
Author: Sema Guler
Review:
Disappointing drinks & service.
We ordered the English Milk Tea which basically tasted like milk with no tea & we ordered the strawberry matcha latte which just tasted like strawberry milk. Looks nothing like the pics on the menu.

The cashier lady asked if we had matcha before which we have had numerous times but what they served was not matcha, it was strawberry milk.

The cashier lady was also rude & cold and talks to you like she’s looking down at you.. almost wanted to not order our drinks.

Do not recommend.

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Cevizlik Mahallesi, Morsümbül Sokak, Morsümbül Apt, No: 1/3A, Bakırköy
Author: Rawand
Review: The brown sugar milk tastes like normal milk so bland and ugly. The chai one is good not that good but good. Basically overrated and wont be trying again 🤙🏻

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Cevizlik Mahallesi, Morsümbül Sokak, Morsümbül Apt, No: 1/3A, Bakırköy
Author: Israa AlBargoothy
Review: "Monster" is a fantastic spot for bubble tea enthusiasts. The Brown Sugar Bubble Tea was rich and flavorful, perfectly balanced with just the right amount of sweetness. The Matcha was smooth and authentic, a true delight for matcha lovers. The ambiance was inviting, and the service was friendly. I'll definitely be returning for more of their delightful beverages.

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Cevizlik Mahallesi, Morsümbül Sokak, Morsümbül Apt, No: 1/3A, Bakırköy
Author: Liz Pupa
Review: i always get my boba from here and it always tastes great. my favourite flavors are avocado, taro, brown sugar and banana. (they never have avocado though)  i do not recommend matcha and blue aegean sea.

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Cevizlik Mahallesi, Morsümbül Sokak, Morsümbül Apt, No: 1/3A, Bakırköy
Author: Alaa Dallah
Review: The place decore is simple modern. The service is nice, the staff are friendly and speak english too. The music was loud. Our drink took some time because the boba were still cooking so the employee put double boba for us as an apology.

Name: Poppin' Bubble Tea & Coffee - Suadiye
Address: Bağımsız Bölüm, Suadiye mah. Ülkü sok. No:13-15A 26, Kadıköy
Author: Rafaël Vera Evertman
Review:
It’s a lovely tiny bar to drink good boba at. The atmosphere is nice and the service is amazing!

I got myself a Brown Sugar Boba as usual. The price for a large drink was very reasonable compared to what I’m used to. The taste of it the milk was something I needed to get used to, since it was already sweet instead of fresh milk being used. Also no brown sugar syrup is used as shown in the picture. The tapioca and coffee jelly were nice and flavorful.

Service wise, at one of the competitions I got  way too much ice so my Turkish friend explained that I wanted a bit less than normal. I think the person behind the counter misunderstood since I got no ice. This made the milk a bit lukewarm, which I disliked halfway through my drink. My friend asked to put 2 cubes inside but she also refilled the milk to make it pretty much a new drink! So very good service!!

I wasn’t a big fan of the milk so 4/5 stars, but I’m sure their popping boba will taste good as well.

Name: Poppin' Bubble Tea & Coffee - Suadiye
Address: Bağımsız Bölüm, Suadiye mah. Ülkü sok. No:13-15A 26, Kadıköy
Author: Blueford
Review: Okay off the bat, this store is very cute. There is so many spaces to take pictures, which is a bonus in my book. I really liked how they named the drinks off of celebrities! Like there was Michael Jackson, Bob Marley, and many more. The drink I got was the Beyonce, because the barista told me it was sweet. He was right the bubble tea was very sweet. To me it tasted like cotton candy. The variety of popping tapioca was very good. The only problem was the tapioca pearls where still cooking when i arrived, but I guess i cant blame them for that because i did go at 12:00 the exact time the store opened. If i could do anything differently it would be to go there at around 1:00 so everything would be prepared.

Name: Poppin' Bubble Tea & Coffee - Suadiye
Address: Bağımsız Bölüm, Suadiye mah. Ülkü sok. No:13-15A 26, Kadıköy
Author: G. L.
Review: Celebrity named drinks. Creature comforts. Mochi. Yet another place that feels like home.

Name: Poppin' Bubble Tea & Coffee - Suadiye
Address: Bağımsız Bölüm, Suadiye mah. Ülkü sok. No:13-15A 26, Kadıköy
Author: Elena Erkutay
Review: I've tried bubble tea in Japan, China, Tai, UAE. Was so excited to see a place in Istanbul as well. And it's just not it. Milk tea base is watery. Sometimes they don't have tapioca available. A "hip" place for kids who just want yo hang out on cadde

Name: Poppin' Bubble Tea & Coffee - Suadiye
Address: Bağımsız Bölüm, Suadiye mah. Ülkü sok. No:13-15A 26, Kadıköy
Author: Maureen Jones
Review: It is quite shocking that they never have tapioca. Three visit and its always "being prepared". Real lack of preparation and even worse customer service.

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Osmanağa, Örmen İşhanı, Halitağa Cd. No 37B, Kadıköy
Author: Ridoh Rylands
Review:
Monster Teashop in Kadıköy is a vibrant and trendy spot that brings a unique twist to the traditional tea experience. Nestled in the bustling streets of Kadıköy, this cozy café is a haven for tea enthusiasts and anyone looking to enjoy something a little different.

As soon as you enter, you're greeted by a quirky and playful atmosphere that sets Monster Teashop apart. The décor is modern and fun, with colorful accents and creative touches that make the space feel lively and inviting. It’s the kind of place where you can relax, chat with friends, or even get some work done while sipping on a delicious beverage.

The menu at Monster Teashop is diverse and exciting, offering a wide range of teas that cater to every palate. From classic milk teas and fruity blends to more adventurous options like their signature monster-themed drinks, there’s something here for everyone. Whether you’re a fan of boba or prefer your tea straight up, each drink is crafted with care and bursting with flavor.

One of the highlights of Monster Teashop is their creative presentation. The drinks are as visually appealing as they are tasty, often served with colorful toppings, fresh fruits, or even fun, edible decorations that add a touch of whimsy to your tea time.

The staff at Monster Teashop are friendly and enthusiastic, always ready to recommend a new flavor or customize your drink to suit your taste. Their passion for tea and commitment to quality make every visit enjoyable.

In summary, Monster Teashop in Kadıköy is a must-visit for tea lovers and anyone seeking a fun and unique café experience. With its creative drinks, lively atmosphere, and excellent service, it’s a perfect spot to unwind and enjoy something special.

Rating: 4.7/5 - Monster Teashop offers a delightful blend of creativity, flavor, and fun, making it a standout destination in Kadıköy for tea enthusiasts and café lovers alike.

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Osmanağa, Örmen İşhanı, Halitağa Cd. No 37B, Kadıköy
Author: Minimo
Review:
As a bubble tea lover coming from Tashkent, can safely say that monster teashop is Turkeys best one,

The customization options are spectacular and quite detailed from the sugar and ice levels,to the toppings and till the milk options
,which is something quite nice for people that have struggles digesting whole milk like me.

The drinks are very high quality and you can taste the authentic aromas,
However the only small issue I  personally noticed are the matchas,
As a strong matcha lover I have gave the matcha in monster tea shop several chances,
from bland matcha to more different flavored ones such as mango.
However despite my efforts,
I always manage to get disappointed,
due to the matcha not properly dissolving or tasting very bitter.
Anyways that's my take on the matchas however their other bobas are spectacular,
I can recommend the taro bubble tea the most.

All in all,great boba shop,beautiful culturally accurate environment and drinks and the employes are mostly very friendly and knowledgeable
; ]

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Osmanağa, Örmen İşhanı, Halitağa Cd. No 37B, Kadıköy
Author: Zafira Hilma
Review: the drinks taste amazing, the service is really niceee. if you want to drink some bubble tea in the middle of summer with affordable price, I recommend this place!

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Osmanağa, Örmen İşhanı, Halitağa Cd. No 37B, Kadıköy
Author: Luda B
Review: A very cute and cozy boba tea spot. The best boba tea in Istanbul 😋

Name: Monster Teashop
Address: Osmanağa, Örmen İşhanı, Halitağa Cd. No 37B, Kadıköy
Author: Grace
Review:
Came here today and placed an order.
Took a while to prepare (15-20 minutes). Received the wrong one (we ordered less sugar 30% jasmine tea) and this was very clearly Thai iced milk tea with 100% sugar which was much too sweet - the server didn’t try to resolve the issue when we asked and she claimed it was the right drink without checking with whoever made it. Disappointing as we came here on holiday 3 years ago and were looking forward to coming back.

Reply: she did not look at our receipt even when we asked if it is this is correct. She simply stated that she made the right drink without checking or checking with whoever made the drink. It clearly did not look like what we ordered as well as you can see in the photo

Review: I can say that it is a Cafe that is a perfect combination of delicious drinks and a warm atmosphere. It is quite enjoyable to find my favorite flavor among the various and colorful bubble tea options. My favorite was Beyonce tapioca 🌟

Address: Barbaros, Ataşehir Blv. &, Gelincik Sk No:1, Ataşehir
Author: gigidereske
Review: It was really bad, the tapioca pearls were overcooked and lost their consistency. I bought the one with matcha and 2 small branches (?) came out of it. The service staff is friendly and does their job quickly.

Name: Tea Taste 茶知味
Address: Sinanpaşa mahallesi şehit dursun bakan sokak 14A Sokak, D:14A, Beşiktaş
Author: Carmel Saleh
Review: absolutely terrible experience. i entered and was waiting for about 10 minutes and no one had taken my order. so naturally, i went up to the cashier and asked her to take it and she informed me that she was “busy” with other customers. keep in mind that there were literally only TWO other people together who already had their orders and there was another service provider aside from her. i waited another 10 minutes and when she finally came to take my order she informed me that there were no tapioca pearls and it would be ready after 20 minutes. as a boba store, how do you not have enough of the main thing people come to get? aside from that, had she simply taken my order before i wouldn’t have had to wait 20 minutes only to be told that they had no tapioca pearls. extremely unprofessional and inefficient. wish that there was a zero star option.

Name: Tea Taste 茶知味
Address: Sinanpaşa mahallesi şehit dursun bakan sokak 14A Sokak, D:14A, Beşiktaş
Author: Maya
Review: ive been here a couple times and i want to come here more!! i love the matcha drinks and bubble tea, also the mochi is authentically made (not with icecream). i saw a couple reviews saying the mochi was bad and hard to eat, which i find hard to believe!! the lady who owns the place handmakes every mochi herself and makes it the authentic way. the mochi is stretchy soft and has a really nice texture.

Name: Tea Taste 茶知味
Address: Sinanpaşa mahallesi şehit dursun bakan sokak 14A Sokak, D:14A, Beşiktaş

Review: The milk tea was very good, but the new waiter didn't seem to be very attentive. I ordered red bean milk tea and was given pearl milk tea. Before I finished my drink, the waiter was talking on the phone while trying to take my drink away, and asked me "can I take it away" after putting the trash in the cup. Taste is fine, service is not!

So many drink options and great authentic made mochi, should definitely try matcha here because it’s professionally made.
The owner is the nicest and friendly staff.

Such a comfort food in this chilly weather we finish them all. From variant ramen they offer we would definitely recommend you to taste the katsu one because it’s our favorite so far ✨

Name: Ransserie Cafe House
Address: Cihannüma, Barbaros Blv. No: 77/A, Beşiktaş

Such a cute cafe! The coffee was yummy and the staff are so friendly. It was a take-away but the cafe itself was cute and cozy. If I get another chance, I would get boba
Our orders were:
Brown sugar latte
Iced salted caramel latte

Name: Ransserie Cafe House
Address: Cihannüma, Barbaros Blv. No: 77/A, Beşiktaş

Review: Pandan cake was very light. It had salty caramel inside. My friend had green tea bubble tea, she loved it. I had chocolate mint bubble tea. It was a chef's kiss. So delicious. I will definitely come back again for the chocolate mint bubble tea. Looking forward to try other desserts, too.

Name: Ransserie Cafe House
Address: Cihannüma, Barbaros Blv. No: 77/A, Beşiktaş

Review: Going here for the famous pandan cake but unfortunately we run out of it so we had the lotus magnolia & cinnamon roll. The cinnamon roll was great - it was so fluffy & quite big but if only they warmed the cinnamon roll I think it would be better, so the icing would melt😊

Name: Ransserie Cafe House
Address: Cihannüma, Barbaros Blv. No: 77/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Meryem Abayli
Review: Very nice place with good food from different countries. The prices are reasonable and the view is nice. Would recommend

Author: Hakan Hansonn
Review: Long time Timboo customer here. I’ve just tried this location  and pleasantly found the taste and the service quality outstanding again. Great job Timboo and hats off the onsite manager Huseyin Bey!

Name: Timboo Cafe
Address: Piazza Alışveriş Merkezi, Cevizli Mahallesi, Tugay Yolu Caddesi, No: 69C/25, Maltepe
Author: Josif Doko
Review: In Tibo coffee, be careful here they steal. The prices on the menu are different from what you pay.  Two days in a row we paid almost 2 times more than the normal price.For example menu prices Cafe Late 60L  invoice prices 90L Americano 55L invoice prices 90 L service bedeli 10%.Thief, thief                Part 2 Answer for owner:Hello, I wrote to you above. Cafe Late, the menu price was 60 L, while the invoice prices were 90 L. Americano coffee, the price was 55 L. Invoice prices were 90 L. 10% bribe service.  I have visited Tibo Cafe many times, but the last two times  it was really disappointing, the prices on the bill were about 40% more expensive than on the menu. I wanted to express my displeasure, but unfortunately no one spoke English there. Anyway, there are many other bars in Qenden Plazaa. Of course, next time I will choose one of the bars  the other nearby

Name: Timboo Cafe
Address: Piazza Alışveriş Merkezi, Cevizli Mahallesi, Tugay Yolu Caddesi, No: 69C/25, Maltepe
Author: Dexiana Adnewd
Review: The strawberry milkshake is wow!!! In general the food are big portions and taste well, so it was worth the price

Name: tonino coffee resturant
Address: Veysel Karani, Osmangazi Cd No:158 z50, Sancaktepe
Author: meliha özek
Review: We ordered a bagel breakfast. 110 is written on the menu. I don't think I will ever go back to this business that made one of us pay 200 and the other 250. We didn't like it, it was smaller than a matchbox, the cheese, thin cheddar, only the bagel was good. And they didn't even give us a receipt. When we got home, we found out how much we paid.

Name: tonino coffee resturant
Address: Veysel Karani, Osmangazi Cd No:158 z50, Sancaktepe
Author: Duygu BAL
Review:
We came here with my wife for the first time today, we know a lot of places as cafes, this might be the only establishment we came to and were not satisfied with. We stopped by for iftar and noticed that only one of the employees was running around. To be honest, the 2 female waiters do not care much. A young gentleman waiter is not working much because he is walking around with his hand in his pocket. The lack of discipline in the shop is obvious from the carelessness of the dressing of the person we assume to be the chef. The clothes of the employees are not like employees, they are like customers. The decoration and layout of the place is nice, but unfortunately the service is not only about the decoration, my wife was curious and asked the name of the employee who always served us. Thank you very much to Mr. Caner, he did not bring our order even though we asked the other employees 2-3 times. Mr. Caner delivered whatever we asked him to do without delay. To be honest, we only saw the work discipline in Mr. Caner. Once, we asked the waitress, who was closed, for water, she didn't care, she turned away and didn't bring it.
If we could see the business owner, we would want to say these things face to face. Unfortunately, the salad and the dishes were bad in taste. When I looked at other comments, we saw that the approval rate was high. It is strange that such carelessness is appreciated. Service - discipline - food quality is as low as it gets. I don't think we will come again, and I wish Mr. Caner to work in a better disciplined and fair job. I hope he gets a job where his rights are not violated...

Name: tonino coffee resturant
Address: Veysel Karani, Osmangazi Cd No:158 z50, Sancaktepe
Author: Melih Durmaz
Review: It's a very nice place, service, taste, everything is very good, especially the manager Mahir, thank you.

Name: tonino coffee resturant
Address: Veysel Karani, Osmangazi Cd No:158 z50, Sancaktepe
Author: Kahkaha serüveni
Review: Although the daily menu was written as 190 TL on the door, we paid 210 TL. Rice pudding and tea were not brought on the menu. We had to specifically ask for it. We sat down again, the portions were small, the service was poor, and the attention was poor.

Name: tonino coffee resturant
Address: Veysel Karani, Osmangazi Cd No:158 z50, Sancaktepe
Author: Işılsu
Review: Taste, service, attention, quality, atmosphere, music, staff, it's a disgrace, it's a shame for the money paid, it's expensive and it's arrogant, the staff, the waitress has red lipstick, she's incredibly cleavage, it's not clear whether she's a waitress or an esc.

Name: Mr. Dumpling
Address: Osmanağa, Halitağa Cd. No:25, Kadıköy
Author: Mika Sand
Review: BEST MANTI I’ve ever had! The 3 sauces on the side change up the flavour profile so you can enjoy it many different ways. Will definitely be returning here.

Name: Mr. Dumpling
Address: Osmanağa, Halitağa Cd. No:25, Kadıköy
Author: Emma Correia
Review: A wonderful place to try some Turkish cuisine for us with a variety of vegan, vegetarian, and gluten free options. Our waiter was very attentive, spoke great English, and was generally very nice. A good amount of outdoor seating but indoors is also available. Prices are totally reasonable as we were absolutely FULL after our portions which cost approximately 300 Lira. Perhaps we will be returning! Would recommend.

Name: Mr. Dumpling
Address: Osmanağa, Halitağa Cd. No:25, Kadıköy
Author: Athlos Uk
Review: Best food we had in Istanbul! We traveled from near Galata/ the center by taxi 3 times just to eat here again! Such a highlight, don’t miss it!

Name: Mr. Dumpling
Address: Osmanağa, Halitağa Cd. No:25, Kadıköy
Author: Ahmed Al-Akki
Review: This is a perfect restaurant for Manti. It has a wide variety of Manti dishes among other dishes. It even serves vegan and gluten free Manti.

Name: Mr. Dumpling
Address: Osmanağa, Halitağa Cd. No:25, Kadıköy
Author: Courtney Godden
Review:
Yummy food, lots of variety. Wasn't to expensive compared to other areas in Istanbul. I am celiac and it was nice to have options for my partner who isn't celiac. Had yummy and beautiful looking desserts. Was too full to eat but took some away with us ❤️

If your not sure definitely give it a try !

Name: COOKSHOP. Etiler
Address: Etiler, Nisbetiye Cd 92 2-1 A, Beşiktaş
Author: Noura Hashem
Review: Great place. Breakfast is very good and staff very friendly! Definitely recommend if you are visiting Istanbul! The Bar Chef Metin and Burak were very very friendly and made us feel at home:)

Name: COOKSHOP. Etiler
Address: Etiler, Nisbetiye Cd 92 2-1 A, Beşiktaş
Author: Ibrahim Hamwi
Review: Very nice seating and good service. Great Meals!

Name: COOKSHOP. Etiler
Address: Etiler, Nisbetiye Cd 92 2-1 A, Beşiktaş
Author: Diana Lim
Review:
Great service, tasty wholesome food.
Cosy ambience and spacious seatings with nice deco.
Will return to dine.

Name: COOKSHOP. Etiler
Address: Etiler, Nisbetiye Cd 92 2-1 A, Beşiktaş
Author: Sonia Barzegar
Review: This cafe is really bad, food not tasty and very bad drinks. It was my sister’s birthday and I asked them to bring her a birthday cake with some design on it and they did not make any effort and brought a slice of cheesecake with a candle on it!!!! really disappointed!!

Name: COOKSHOP. Etiler
Address: Etiler, Nisbetiye Cd 92 2-1 A, Beşiktaş
Author: Mustafa Özkök
Review: I usually visit this place for food and also drinks. Here is one of the most cost budget and cozy place around Etiler. The ambiance is also very comforting

Name: Coffee Noche
Address: Zuhuratbaba, Yavuzevler Mektep Sk. No:11, Bakırköy
Author: Tayfun Gül
Review: It's a very good place for drinking coffee and eating some desserts. There are pretty waiters. I want to go there more times. And they have very beautiful tea.

Name: Coffee Noche
Address: Zuhuratbaba, Yavuzevler Mektep Sk. No:11, Bakırköy
Author: Nik Svoronos
Review: Can only say good about this place, service, food and drink!

Name: Coffee Noche
Address: Zuhuratbaba, Yavuzevler Mektep Sk. No:11, Bakırköy
Author: Kadir Bekman
Review: When you order tea, the tea is actually given after the coffee, it's the place where people say things like cafes don't want to sell tea and make me feel like I'm taking up space even though the cafe is full to the brim. I used to go all the time but I won't go again.

Name: Coffee Noche
Address: Zuhuratbaba, Yavuzevler Mektep Sk. No:11, Bakırköy
Author: OKAN KUMBARACI
Review:
Clearly, the most delicious coffee I have had among non-chain coffee shops was the freshest and best tea. A simple, stylish and high-quality place. From the shawls they use to the service sets, care has been taken. They pay extreme attention to cleanliness and hygiene. The owner of the place, Mr. Serkan, is at work. NOCHE is a place where you can spend pleasant moments with your loved ones and make it a permanent meeting point.

If you are looking for a delicious coffee it is worth to try NOCHE. Believe me, it is a very sincere suggestion.

Name: Coffee Noche
Address: Zuhuratbaba, Yavuzevler Mektep Sk. No:11, Bakırköy
Author: Fatih Tuysuz
Review:
A nice place to sit comfortably and drink tea and coffee. There is some noise due to its location close to the main street.
There is an indoor and outdoor seating area. Toilet available.

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: K Min
Review:
Cozy interior with lots of seating. WiFi and outlets are available so it's great for remote working. But the music is quite loud so not ideal if you have lots of meetings.

Food wise, the Penne with Meatballs is pretty good. However I didn't like how (weirdly) sweet my oat milk flat white was.

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: Rob Reid
Review:
I had a nice breakfast croissant and a cappuccino.  I sat at the outdoor tables but think it's probably nicer indoors.   The mural creates some nice ambiance, but the street is a bit busy, and there are noisy air-conditioning vents blowing warm air out on the street.
That said, my server was very nice, and the food was very good.

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: Steve Migliara
Review:
Nice coffee shop with added breakfast menu. Right next to the Galata Tower.
Decent place and clean.
Like and follow for more amazing places to see and visit around the World

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: Yiğit Torun
Review: Nice place just next to Galata Tower.  Very nice design inside. We sat inside and work for hours. The wifi was a bit slow, I didn’t like the taste of Turkish coffee. However, overall it was nice to chill there a bit. Also, the cheesecake was tasty!

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: Pepe Barajas
Review: Had an omelette and espresso chai late. The food was good and the barista is very talented! Relaxed coffee shop with friendly service. Laptop friendly too.

Name: COOKSHOP. Galataport
Address: Kılıçali Paşa Mahallesi, Meclis-i Mebusan Caddesi, Kapı No:8 / 102, Beyoğlu
Author: Talia Kayali
Review:
International cuisine with an extensive menu, you are sure to find something you would like. The portions are large and can be shared or had individually. We shared chicken nachos, kofte, and spaghetti bolognese. They were all good:
- If you are into nachos and this style of food then you will love the chicken nachos
- The kofte was oily in my opinion but that is usual in Turkish food. I liked it a lot especially with the rice which was amazing, you have to try it
- I wasn't a fan of the spaghetti, but it is objectively good. The yogurt on top adds a tang that adds a Turkish flair to the dish.

The service was excellent, the waiter who helped us was very on top of things and smart/strategic into making our orders to offset the wait time (due to crowd) and have a smooth experience. The lady at the front is also very welcoming and kind.
Depending on where you sit the atmosphere could be great or maybe not. I didn't find anything special, but the view of the sea by Galataport from a distance was nice.
You should go and try out your own experience, but as a tourist with limited time maybe try another restaurant in Galataport, too.

Name: COOKSHOP. Galataport
Address: Kılıçali Paşa Mahallesi, Meclis-i Mebusan Caddesi, Kapı No:8 / 102, Beyoğlu
Author: Mimi
Review:
I go there for the fettuccine, the best “real” fettuccine I’ve had in istanbul.
The schnitzel was not edible, no taste nothing so I don’t recommend it.
We also had burger sliders and they were tasty.

Service could be better

Name: COOKSHOP. Galataport
Address: Kılıçali Paşa Mahallesi, Meclis-i Mebusan Caddesi, Kapı No:8 / 102, Beyoğlu
Author: Ellie
Review: Schnitzel is very delicious. steak and truffle fries is ok. I hive 5 star because of the atmosphere and great service

Name: COOKSHOP. Galataport
Address: Kılıçali Paşa Mahallesi, Meclis-i Mebusan Caddesi, Kapı No:8 / 102, Beyoğlu
Author: diana Omayma Souha hanachi
Review: The portion size looks deceptively large in the picture, but in reality, it was extremely small. The flavor was overwhelmingly dominated by tomato paste, making it quite unpleasant. On top of that, the atmosphere was ruined by the waitstaff loudly arguing among themselves. To make matters worse, the price was exorbitant—around 700 for a tiny, poorly prepared dish. Not worth it at all.

Name: COOKSHOP. Galataport
Address: Kılıçali Paşa Mahallesi, Meclis-i Mebusan Caddesi, Kapı No:8 / 102, Beyoğlu
Author: Рамиз Апсалямов
Review: Wonderful establishment, excellent cuisine, very tasty, very polite employees, simply excellent.  We immediately asked for wi-fi, unfortunately they didn’t help us, but we managed it ourselves, with our native SIM card from Russia, we connected without problems, the speed was good, I calmly posted the video on social networks. I recommend it to everyone🤩🤩🤩

Name: Sancaktepe Sosyal Tesisleri Hanımeli Kafe
Address: Eyüp Sultan, Abdülhamit Cd. No:23, Sancaktepe
Author: ergun ergun
Review: Eating out has almost become a luxury these days. I think these municipal social facilities are destroying this. I think eating for this price is a great service, especially in such beautiful places. When we came today (May 2024) we ordered 3 different main dishes. Curry chicken, grilled meatballs and 2 burgers. All 3 are at a good edible level. The only problem was that the chicken and meatballs were salty. It is better if we throw it away if we wish. The employees were diligent, it was a bit busy, but they coped diligently. Thanks

Name: Sancaktepe Sosyal Tesisleri Hanımeli Kafe
Address: Eyüp Sultan, Abdülhamit Cd. No:23, Sancaktepe
Author: Ayşegül Parlak
Review:
This is our second visit with my wife and I don't know if I will go again.
First of all, the service is not sufficient in terms of speed and quality. The number of staff is low, they seem to be trying not to make eye contact with people, they are tired and unhappy. They take the order very late (in fact, they do not take it, we get up and give it) and the orders come very late, and the food is ice cold when it arrives.
We ordered roasted beef with Keşkek and it was ice cold, unsalted and very oily.
We ordered a Sancak burger, they put a tasteless, saltless meatball on dry bread.
We ordered chicken schnitzel, it was hot and delicious, we liked it.
After the meal, we ordered two frozen drinks, the watermelon was not bad, the sugar content of the frozen dessert named Wheel of Fortune numbed our brains, we couldn't drink it.
We paid 935 TL for 3 dishes, 1 salad and 4 drinks. The price was high compared to social facilities and I was saddened by this price because we could not enjoy it.
Also another important issue; People coming from outside (in the park) can use the toilet. If every person coming to the park can use the toilet, from now on I will spread my blanket on the grass and sit down and use the toilet too :)

Name: Sancaktepe Sosyal Tesisleri Hanımeli Kafe
Address: Eyüp Sultan, Abdülhamit Cd. No:23, Sancaktepe
Author: Derya Kendikoğlu
Review: We have been waiting in line for more than an hour at a place we come to with great pleasure. As if that wasn't enough, we waited for more than half an hour for our order to be taken. There is only one waiter. It's a shame, they only employ one employee at this intensity, please hire someone.

Name: Sancaktepe Sosyal Tesisleri Hanımeli Kafe
Address: Eyüp Sultan, Abdülhamit Cd. No:23, Sancaktepe
Author: Murat Engin
Review:
Price: ₺₺ (Regular)
Service: Fast and attentive.
Taste: We had breakfast for 2 people. Cheese, olives, paçanga pastry, mihlama were excellent. The only problem was the annoying flies both inside and outside. Unfortunately, this is why I deduct points for the atmosphere.
Price performance: ☆☆☆☆ (4) / ☆☆☆☆☆

Name: Sancaktepe Sosyal Tesisleri Hanımeli Kafe
Address: Eyüp Sultan, Abdülhamit Cd. No:23, Sancaktepe
Author: selim cu
Review: The prices are very good compared to the quality of the product, the employees are friendly, the variety is sufficient, such services should be provided to the public, thank you to those who contributed, I recommend it,

Name: Happy Moon's
Address: Barbaros, Water Garden AVM, Şebboy Sk. No:2, Ataşehir
Author: Шюкрие Хасан
Review: The food was good. It was a little crowded, loud, hence the 4 stars. The service was good, but a little rushed, they forgot to bring extra plates. Overall it was good

Name: Happy Moon's
Address: Barbaros, Water Garden AVM, Şebboy Sk. No:2, Ataşehir
Author: Merry Mazin
Review:
The best ever 🤍
It was the very first time to try Happy Moon's and it was very tasteful.
We took about 4 different types of dishes and they all were so good with a good combination between the food portions(carbs, protein and fibers) I also tried lemon cheesecake and it was just on point 🥲💞
The atmosphere is so beautiful with a view on the dancing fountain
Absolutely coming again to try more of their yummies
What we ordered:
Chicken schnitzel
Steak mushrooms
Kremali mentarli tavuk(chicken with mushroom sauce)
Meksika bonfile
Lemon cheesecake

Name: Happy Moon's
Address: Barbaros, Water Garden AVM, Şebboy Sk. No:2, Ataşehir
Author: wael shihadeh
Review: Good food items and hot drinks. I don't like staff activity and time of response.  The location is so good in front of the waterfront.

Name: Happy Moon's
Address: Barbaros, Water Garden AVM, Şebboy Sk. No:2, Ataşehir
Author: C C
Review: We came for drinks and a dessert. We ordered a tiramisu which was excellent! It was generous and cheap. The terrace is also very pleasant to enjoy the view.

Name: Happy Moon's
Address: Barbaros, Water Garden AVM, Şebboy Sk. No:2, Ataşehir
Author: Kadir
Review: The food was tasty, with the burger outshining the salad. Service and atmosphere were decent.

Name: My Story Waffle
Address: Kordonboyu, Kartal
Author: Alperen Kahraman
Review: Story waffle is my go to desert place in kartal the service was great and the food is even better

Name: My Story Waffle
Address: Kordonboyu, Kartal
Author: Sajjad Akbar
Review: Their waffle is excellent. They also have variety of Bubble tea and they make good bubble tea. Their service quality is also excellent. A nice place to have desert in the evening!

Name: My Story Waffle
Address: Kordonboyu, Kartal
Author: Ecenur Öztekin
Review: Very delicious, plenty of ingredients, friendly service, the only place that comes to mind when you think of waffles, you are wonderful, we liked it very much, we recommend it 👍🏼

Name: My Story Waffle
Address: Kordonboyu, Kartal
Author: Digital Sanat
Review:
_My Story Waffle is a business that brings a new color to Kartal and stands out with its flavors. The place, which has a unique style with its quality ingredients and friendly service, is very assertive in waffles. As you know, dough is very important in waffles. Making the dough especially light and soft is not an easy task. The business has achieved this. It is very light and soft when eating.
I would like to open a separate parenthesis for waffle ingredients. As you can see from the photos, delicious snacks and their accompaniments; I can say that dark, milk chocolate, raspberry, white chocolate and orange sauce are great. The place, which has many customers from the European side, is a place you can go with your family. Bon appetit to everyone in advance 😋👍

Name: My Story Waffle
Address: Kordonboyu, Kartal
Author: Ozan Kaçmaz
Review: It's a place we go to regularly as a family. I especially recommend the Buble waffle. It's delicious. I recommend you drink bubble tea with it. Thank you to the owner of the business, who is very attentive. We leave with satisfaction every time we go.

Name: Pierre Loti
Address: Eyüp Merkez, Karyağdı Sk. No:20, Eyüpsultan
Author: Daria Zh
Review: The place is beautiful, the view is breathtaking. We ordered Turkish coffee with two Turkish gozleme with cheese and spinach, it was delicious! The service is slow but good in general. We got there on a Friday evening so it was hard to get a good table, maybe other days and time it doesn’t get that full, but the place is super popular and definitely worth visiting.

Name: Pierre Loti
Address: Eyüp Merkez, Karyağdı Sk. No:20, Eyüpsultan
Author: Faly AND
Review:
Pierre Loti Cafe, located at the top of Eyüp in Istanbul, is a true gem for those looking for breathtaking panoramic views of the Golden Horn.
The cable car ride, while quick (barely two minutes), offers just enough time to capture some memorable shots of the city. However, it's important to note that the real attraction of this place lies in its historical location rather than the establishment itself.
The former home of French writer Pierre Loti (1850-1923), gives the cafe a unique charm and attracts many visitors, especially selfie enthusiasts, who come to immortalize the beauty of the landscape. Despite the cafe’s fame, it's best visited for the view and history, rather than for an exceptional culinary experience.

The picturesque setting and connection to the writer add a cultural dimension that makes it a must-visit in Istanbul, especially for those who appreciate literary history.

Name: Pierre Loti
Address: Eyüp Merkez, Karyağdı Sk. No:20, Eyüpsultan
Author: Antoun Boustani
Review: As we were up on the pierre lotion hill, we stopped at the public cafe up there. It was so crowded and all the seats facing the beautiful view were taken. The staff were friendly but the service was a bit slow. The lemon cheesecake was so yummy. I liked it. All in all, it was a good experience.

Name: Pierre Loti
Address: Eyüp Merkez, Karyağdı Sk. No:20, Eyüpsultan
Author: Florian Zimmermann
Review: Very nice place at any time of the year. In winter you can go inside and enjoy a nice cup of cay at the fireplace. In summer the terrace gives a stunning view over golden horn. Together with suçuk Toast it’s perfect to watch the sunset

Name: Pierre Loti
Address: Eyüp Merkez, Karyağdı Sk. No:20, Eyüpsultan
Author: Entessar Daana
Review: Every time I visit Istanbul, I make sure to go to Pierre Loti. The panoramic view of the city is breathtaking, and the apple tea is a must-try. I always recommend it to my friends traveling to Istanbul—don't miss the apple tea there!

Name: Happy Moon's City's Nişantaşı
Address: Teşvikiye, City’s Nişantaşı, Teşvikiye Cd. No:12, Şişli
Author: A Kanjani
Review: Nice restaurant at the food court on the top floor of the city shopping center/

Name: Happy Moon's City's Nişantaşı
Address: Teşvikiye, City’s Nişantaşı, Teşvikiye Cd. No:12, Şişli
Author: Nidhal Saafi
Review: A very veryyyyyy bad experience, it’s not my first time there but for sure the last one , why ?! Because we were waiting for a long time every time we ask the waiter that we are ready to order he say that it’s not he’s section and his colleague will come to take the order , after 30 minutes waiting the waiter finally here 50% what we want to order was not available and he was pushing us to order stuffs that we don’t want .

Name: Happy Moon's City's Nişantaşı
Address: Teşvikiye, City’s Nişantaşı, Teşvikiye Cd. No:12, Şişli
Author: Vladislav Zykin
Review: Although this place comfy and pleasant in terms of design, everything else is lackluster. I guess you don’t expect much from chicken lollipops but even this thing was horrible. Let me keep silence on lasagna… Waiters forget (or, more accurately, “forget”) to return change. You better look for other cafes on this food court.

Name: Happy Moon's City's Nişantaşı
Address: Teşvikiye, City’s Nişantaşı, Teşvikiye Cd. No:12, Şişli
Author: Nika Gurashvili
Review: Really recommend, delicious food, friendly staff.. we try almost everything

Name: Happy Moon's City's Nişantaşı
Address: Teşvikiye, City’s Nişantaşı, Teşvikiye Cd. No:12, Şişli
Author: Atiyeh Sadeghi
Review: Good food nice atmosphere

Name: COOKSHOP
Address: Kocatepe, Paşa Cd No:111 GF - 78, Bayrampaşa
Author: Batuhan
Review: Went in there to dine in and placed our orders soon after we were seated. It took an hour to deliver small plates of Mac ‘n Cheese and some fries. We had to call the waitress over a couple of times to ask about our food. We were told they were about to come out the kitchen in a bit each time. We ended up with cold food and poor service. Overall, wouldn’t recommend.

Name: COOKSHOP
Address: Kocatepe, Paşa Cd No:111 GF - 78, Bayrampaşa
Author: Ahmad Bader
Review: Good environment if it wasn't crowded which it is in the weekends, waitress is very nice. However the coffee there is terrible, they put 1 shot espresso on a large size cup, it tasted like water and cream, and yes they put cream by default on your coffee, so if you don't it, you need to tell them

Name: COOKSHOP
Address: Kocatepe, Paşa Cd No:111 GF - 78, Bayrampaşa
Author: Jorge Hall
Review: We visited from Costa Rica.   Very good service, they helped us choose several things from the menu as we don´t read Turkish and we loved everything.  The food was perfect, all 4 dishes were delicious.  Prices were acceptable. The waiters/service was friendly.

Name: COOKSHOP
Address: Kocatepe, Paşa Cd No:111 GF - 78, Bayrampaşa
Author: Tuza Hasairi
Review:
The food was amazing one of the best steaks i had ever
Everything was delicious
The prices were a bit higher than average but the atmosphere is nice and the waiters are friendly
The service was fast and decent

Definitely coming back again soon

Name: COOKSHOP
Address: Kocatepe, Paşa Cd No:111 GF - 78, Bayrampaşa
Author: Hey Hey
Review: Great place. Ordered omlette and sandwiches for breakfast. Very tasty. Staff is friendly and atmosphere is pleasant. Of course we will return during next trip.

Name: Happy Moon's Piazza Avm
Address: Cevizli, Tugay Yolu Cd. No:69, Maltepe
Author: MERDAN GÜLOĞLU
Review: A service fee of 210 TL was requested for an account of 1700 TL. Even though I knew that this fee was not legal, I had to pay it there, but I will submit my complaint to the consumer arbitration committee.

Name: Happy Moon's Piazza Avm
Address: Cevizli, Tugay Yolu Cd. No:69, Maltepe
Author: Tolga Aytuğ
Review: It was the most tasteless manti I have ever eaten in my life. The service was also quite slow. So, when we come to the piazza, the answer to the question "why should one go here?" and "what is attractive about it" is not well answered by me.

Name: Happy Moon's Piazza Avm
Address: Cevizli, Tugay Yolu Cd. No:69, Maltepe
Author: Murat Bayar
Review: The food was very good, but I didn't like the coffee and other drinks very much. I think the employees are beer amateurs. Orders arrive very late.

Name: Happy Moon's Piazza Avm
Address: Cevizli, Tugay Yolu Cd. No:69, Maltepe
Author: _-CEMAL-_-DEMİR K
Review: We came with 8 friends for dinner and paid almost 7000 lira. But when we saw that we were charged a service fee of 600 lira out of this 7000 lira, we decided not to go again.

Name: Happy Moon's Piazza Avm
Address: Cevizli, Tugay Yolu Cd. No:69, Maltepe
Author: Ozge Oylum
Review: If you see yourself as a place where service fees will be charged, you should always have toilet paper in the toilets. There are two toilets for women. In one of them, there was toilet paper on the floor, the door was not locked, in the other, there was no toilet door, the light was not on, and neither of the papers placed in the toilet bowl was empty, it was not kept track of, which was not nice at all. In summary, you should pay attention to these first until you receive the service fee.

Name: Cookshop at Galleria

The food test is horrible and they bring us hot beers
Never try it again

Author: Ammar Algrafi
Review:
A good place and delicious food
The waiters are so cute and friendly 🫶🏻
Must to try 👌🏻

Name: Aşiyan Çengelköy
Address: Çengelköy, Çengelköy Cd. No 65/A, Üsküdar
Author: Sarah Houri
Review:
Highly recommended . The staff were friendly and welcoming, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. The menu boasted a plethora of options, catering to various tastes and dietary preferences.

As for the food, it was simply exquisite. Each dish was prepared with care and attention to detail, resulting in a burst of flavors with every bite. However, the standout was undoubtedly the San Sebastian cheesecake. Its creamy texture and rich flavor were truly unparalleled, leaving me craving for more.

Overall, this café is a gem worth discovering. Whether you're in the mood for a quick coffee or a leisurely meal, you're guaranteed a delightful experience that will leave you planning your next visit.
They have a place to pray small mosque. The place is good option for work or study or spend a great time alone or with the family or friends.

Name: Aşiyan Çengelköy
Address: Çengelköy, Çengelköy Cd. No 65/A, Üsküdar
Author: Burak ASLAN
Review:
Went there for breakfast with my family and we were four of us. Ordered a Asiyan Serpme Breakfast and it was enough for all of us. Although since it’s for only two people they charge you for extra service fee for additional people. I always find service fees total scam everywhere, so even though the prices are  fine I don’t visit places like this again.

The breakfast includes almost all the essential Turkish breakfast items as you can see in the picture. Everything was really tasty except the omelette. The tea is free and I really appreciate that :)

Name: Aşiyan Çengelköy
Address: Çengelköy, Çengelköy Cd. No 65/A, Üsküdar
Author: Ahmad Shokry
Review: The atmosphere is amazing & the outdoor support with fans.

Name: Aşiyan Çengelköy
Address: Çengelköy, Çengelköy Cd. No 65/A, Üsküdar
Author: Aly
Review:
I visited this restaurant twice, hoping for an improvement in their service and food quality. The first time, I left after 15 minutes waiting for a waiter to come although the restaurant wasn’t busy.

Unfortunately, the second experiences was subpar. The food was poor, and the service was slow and inefficient. We ordered four dishes, but only received two, and decided not to reorder the remaining two to avoid further delays.

The facilities are impressive, with a enjoyable playground and fish tank that kids will love.

However, the food, particularly the pizza, tastes like low-quality frozen pizza. It's a shame that such a well-established restaurant doesn't take their service and food quality more seriously.

While the ambiance is nice, the poor food and service outweigh the positives. Until they improve their culinary offerings and service, I cannot recommend this restaurant.

Name: Aşiyan Çengelköy
Address: Çengelköy, Çengelköy Cd. No 65/A, Üsküdar
Author: Antonia Fališevac
Review: When with some local friends! Highly recommended! Breakfast was amazing, on a whole different level then touristy areas on the European side of Istanbul. Just amazing!

Name: Cinnabon
Address: Acıbadem, Çeçen Sok. No:25, Üsküdar
Author: Maha
Review: Their cinnamon rolls were really delicious but I can’t say the same thing for the coffee because it was baddd ,also they were so slowly

Name: Cinnabon
Address: Acıbadem, Çeçen Sok. No:25, Üsküdar
Author: Lucian Rajah
Review:
Standard Cinnabon fair: you get exactly what you pay for. The cinnamon rolls were fresh and hot and the staff were friendly.

Doesn't get 5 stars because a few items we asked for were out of stock and the cutlery is too flimsy for the rolls.

Name: Cinnabon
Address: Acıbadem, Çeçen Sok. No:25, Üsküdar
Author: Karim Soliman
Review: The best cinnamon rolls in Turkey hands down! My favorite is the Caramel Pecan rolls 🤩 it goes very well witj cappuccino ☕️ friendly staff especially Serkay 🥰

Name: Cinnabon
Address: Acıbadem, Çeçen Sok. No:25, Üsküdar
Author: slimane KERROUCHI
Review: The taste is euuuhhh lakes of cinnamon the staff need to learn to smile not even one smile i felt as if i was begging for them to serve me not even eye contact. The drinks take ages ages to be ready.  When I asked about pecan they said they have no pecan 🤔🤔🤔 I hope management can see this msg and do smngt about it.

Name: Cinnabon
Address: Acıbadem, Çeçen Sok. No:25, Üsküdar
Author: Duaa Al hasan
Review: I love cinnabon,they severe pure sweetness, the place is nice and small the dough  is good it was hot which is great , love the added caramel  and pecans  love their smoothies,cinnabon  in all countries  serve  great stuff and same taste

Name: Ozzy Şef Çekmeköy
Address: Necip Fazıl, Dilektaşı Sk. Evidea Sitesi No:1, Ümraniye
Author: Buse Olgar
Review: It was the worst burger I have ever seen and eaten in my life. I ordered from Trendyol, but when I commented there, they did not publish it. Everyone who will order from here should know this, when you want a burger with mushroom sauce, they put 2-3 raw mushrooms, yes unprocessed mushrooms, and send them. There are no ingredients in the burger, just meat, bread and a few slices of raw mushrooms :) This is definitely a business that does not deserve the money it charges.

Name: Ozzy Şef Çekmeköy
Address: Necip Fazıl, Dilektaşı Sk. Evidea Sitesi No:1, Ümraniye
Author: TALHA UZUN
Review: It was a place we specifically ordered from before, but it got expensive and the quality dropped.

Name: Ozzy Şef Çekmeköy
Address: Necip Fazıl, Dilektaşı Sk. Evidea Sitesi No:1, Ümraniye
Author: Oğuzhan Kaya
Review: The best hamburger you can eat around this area

Name: Ozzy Şef Çekmeköy
Address: Necip Fazıl, Dilektaşı Sk. Evidea Sitesi No:1, Ümraniye
Author: Burcu Sedefoğlu
Review: I love your special burger

Name: Ozzy Şef Çekmeköy
Address: Necip Fazıl, Dilektaşı Sk. Evidea Sitesi No:1, Ümraniye
Author: Gulsah Nomak
Review: The food is delicious. There is a need for improvement in service.

Name: Mado
Address: Bahçeşehir 1. Kısım, Bazaar Alışveriş Merkezi, Süzer Blv. D:26, Başakşehir
Author: John Agricola
Review: Good place for chocolate and ice. Also serve small Turkish dishes.

Name: Mado
Address: Bahçeşehir 1. Kısım, Bazaar Alışveriş Merkezi, Süzer Blv. D:26, Başakşehir
Author: Mike de Coster-Milman
Review: Generally a good meal in all their different restaurants and a consistent menu. Good choice of Turkish dishes at reasonable prices.

Name: Mado
Address: Bahçeşehir 1. Kısım, Bazaar Alışveriş Merkezi, Süzer Blv. D:26, Başakşehir
Author: Nidal Khaja
Review: Great salep and dessert options. I really enjoy sitting in the outside patio when it isn’t filled with cigarette smoke. My kids love the dondurma.

Name: Mado
Address: Bahçeşehir 1. Kısım, Bazaar Alışveriş Merkezi, Süzer Blv. D:26, Başakşehir
Author: Sherrie Y
Review:
I have eaten in different branches of this chain and I can say I am always pleased with the quality and the service.
They serve breakfast, proper meals and desserts. Everything they serve is fresh and delicious. It is not a cheap place. It's not expensive either.
The service is quite nice.
One thing I like about it is they usually have a terrace. You can sit there, have a beautiful view and eat in peace.

Name: Mado
Address: Bahçeşehir 1. Kısım, Bazaar Alışveriş Merkezi, Süzer Blv. D:26, Başakşehir
Author: Rand Anis
Review: I can say this is the best branch of Mado in whole Bahçeşehir.. excellent service 😊😍

Name: O Coffee
Address: Türkali, Yeniyol Sokağı No:12/A, Beşiktaş
Author: kedicik çilek
Review: Beautiful atmosphere, and extremely kind staff. I usually have very specific and complicated coffee orders and Ali made the drinks perfectly. The staff (especially Ali) were all very sweet and respectful. One of the best cafes in Istanbul specifically due to the kindness and friendliness of the staff! Just a thanks to the O coffee team and especially Ali for such a wonderful and friendly experience! Will be returning soon and recommending the place to friends!

Name: O Coffee
Address: Türkali, Yeniyol Sokağı No:12/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Moath G
Review:
It’s a café a little bit far from the main street is not suitable for families
Very bad and slow service, especially if you don't turkey-
I asked them to turn on the air conditioner before I ordered and they agreed
So I sit, after that I told him to turn on the air conditioner he said yes but not turn on

And when he poured the coffee into the cup, he took the rest of it and did not put it on the table!! And I read many reviews about the rudeness of the cafe staff ! And I agree with it, for example, I was taking off my shoes, then he came to me and ask me take on again! How see my shoe and can’t see me waiting for the dessert and the air conditioner!!

Name: O Coffee
Address: Türkali, Yeniyol Sokağı No:12/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Nesa MS
Review: Like their coffee and place at first. Ambiance and coziness. Later their coffee made our stomach go bad. I don’t know exactly why but could be about the milk they’re using. Another problem is that they didn’t give us enough details about their coffee plus dessert campaign. So we were confused while paying the bill. I didn’t like that at all.

Name: O Coffee
Address: Türkali, Yeniyol Sokağı No:12/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Hala Alzeat
Review:
So lovely and tasty sweet!
The service is amazing too💕
Thank for the wonderful experience 🌸

Name: O Coffee
Address: Türkali, Yeniyol Sokağı No:12/A, Beşiktaş
Author: Tamara Czdgb
Review: Nicely decorated coffee shop but that is about it. I went there specifically for an ice latte and that was the worst item there - watery, no flavour, they forgot or they didn't understand I want whipped cream on top, when they brought it to the table it had no ice in it (everything had already melted), they also didn't have sweetener. Strawberry cheesecake was ok but nothing memorable. I drank only half of the coffee and I asked the waiter for a smoothie. Surprise, surprise my smoothie came with whipped cream on top and tasted milky. When I have asked what is going on because I have not ordered a milkshake the waiter said that this is how it's done in Turkeys - with yoghurt. Just shocking! I left it there and left.

Name: Coffee Department
Address: Ayvansaray, Kürkçü Çeşmesi Sk. No:5, Fatih
Author: Yousef Dablin
Review:
Wouldn’t say I was blown away although the coffee options here were relatively safe. I had two pour overs. One I finished the other I left on the table. Count drink it at all. Customer service was very bland and stale  (yes I don’t speak the lingo although, staff do understand English and coffee.)
Would I go out of my way to have a coffee here? No. Although, if I was near by I defiantly would give it a swirl.

Name: Coffee Department
Address: Ayvansaray, Kürkçü Çeşmesi Sk. No:5, Fatih
Author: Richard Smittenaar
Review: Great pour-overs. Went here about six times, and I was really impressed by how their coffee as brewed actually has all the tasting notes from the little cards that go with the beans. I could consistently taste all the elements. Great brewing.

Name: Coffee Department
