She greeted every customer with a genuine smile and seemed to have a special knack for remembering regulars' preferences, which added a personal touch to the service. What sets this cafe apart is its authentic local vibe. It's a place where neighbors gather, exchange stories, and enjoy a moment of tranquility. The menu, though simple, offers a delightful range of coffees and snacks, each prepared with care. The coffee was particularly noteworthy, expertly brewed and rich in flavor. The outdoor seating area is a cozy nook, perfect for people-watching or getting lost in a good book. It's fascinating to observe the daily life of the neighborhood from this vantage point, all while enjoying a delicious cup of coffee.

Name: Hug a Mug Coffee House
Address: Duatepe, Savaş Sk. no:2, Şişli
Author: Eleonora Kondrateva
Review: Best cafe in Istanbul for vegan or diabetic persons. I’m inspired! Big thanks for it, lovely please with tasty sweets and coffee ❤️❤️🥰

Name: Hug a Mug Coffee House
Address: Duatepe, Savaş Sk. no:2, Şişli
Author: Maria Serdiuk
Review: Love this place! Tasty coffee, cozy atmosphere  and the owner Nehir is pure love😍

Name: Hug a Mug Coffee House
Address: Duatepe, Savaş Sk. no:2, Şişli
Author: Enis Behar Menda
Review: Cozy caffee shop just at the corner, cat lover place, yummy white chocolate cake and Turkish caffee.

Name: Coffee Gutta
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No:21, Fatih
Author: Rasha Alsaadany
Review: I got a good service there. Nice place to take a rest while you're making a tour in istanbul. When you see it from out side you will think that's a small place but actually they have a big garden inside you can set and take you coffee or tea or whatever you want joining the music and the sun. Very helpful and decent staff. Just when you're deciding to visit the Süleymaniye mosque you can find it in the left hand side on your way to the mosque. Good prices. There is a small library inside. Enjoy your time.

Name: Coffee Gutta
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No:21, Fatih
Author: Ozge
Review: Definitely a place u need to go! Lovely owner's  and the staff is friendly. Service was incredible, The patio is cute and cozy. I had a delicious food experience. And they also have many kinds of coffee. I will come back again. Highly recommended..

Name: Coffee Gutta
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No:21, Fatih
Author: Haya Dr
Review: I came to this place from time to time and I just like the vibe there and the family who is working , they are so kind and helpful . The coffee it's good but the atmosphere and the owners are nice . Last time I was there when a one little girl came she wanted to buy ice cream and she didn't had the money the guy who were selling the ice cream was so kind full of humanity, he was kind to give her ice cream told her pay later if you don't have money come later and pay in this time I was sitting drinking my coffee . This is so kind to be a nice human being . All over all come to this place I recommend highly!

Name: Coffee Gutta
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No:21, Fatih
Author: prash v
Review:
Really good place to take a break from exploring the city. the staff is really friendly.

The coffee is brilliant! We had the Turkish coffee (both the black classical coffee and then variants with pista and spices). We enjoyed all of it. Highly recommended!

Name: Coffee Gutta
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No:21, Fatih
Author: The Wayfarer
Review: We came on a Sunday night when the Istanbul traffic was mellowed and the crowds were nowhere to be seen. The cafe had a nice ambience and the centerpiece was definitely the dark maroon coloured La Marzocco which brewed a delicious cup of Latte for me. Thank you to the Barista too and the waiter for the friendly service! Highly recommended!

Name: Pal Coffee
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No: 7/B, Fatih
Author: Markus Hahn
Review:
The coffee was good and didn't cost much. Good value for money.
Not tried anything else

Name: Pal Coffee
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No: 7/B, Fatih
Author: Human Zacharia
Review: Cute coffee shop with a nice aesthetic and friendly staff. The coffee is unfortunately pretty terrible. I ordered a flat white which tasted like watered down Turkish coffee and steamed milk.

Name: Pal Coffee
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No: 7/B, Fatih
Author: Halit
Review:
A cute little place and delicious coffee!
afiyet olsunn

Name: Pal Coffee
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No: 7/B, Fatih
Author: F AR
Review: Good coffee. Tried  coffee latte with hazelnut pump🤎🤎🤎. The small size itself is quite large. Reasonable price. 55 Tl for most beverages. Friendly service.

Name: Pal Coffee
Address: Süleymaniye, Süleymaniye Cd. No: 7/B, Fatih
Author: Salim Öztürk
Review: They use quality coffee in their products. It has a spacious environment. They are friendly and polite...

Name: Albero Coffee
Address: Fulya, Aytekin Kotil Cd. No.23B, Şişli
Author: R Al
Review:
The guys working there are very nice but seem a bit clueless every now and then. I have tried their cappuccino, their avocado drink with honey and nuts, their Nescafé with Nutella and nuts, the minced meat sandwich, and the pizza bites.

Let’s start with the bad. The pizza was a travesty. I had my sister pick it up for me but if I had seen it with my own eyes I would have sent it back. Look at the picture. 65 TRY

The avocado drink was recommended to me by my friend. It was good if you love avocado but a bit too sweet. I would recommend going for less honey. The downside is that the honey doesn’t taste natural. 150 TRY

The best item was the Nescafé which is essentially a Dalgona coffee. I would recommend that they make an iced version of this with regular milk instead of evaporated.
I also would prefer if they used more milk (maybe increasing the size of the cup to be able to do this) because the amount of Dalgona is disproportionate to the amount of milk making it too sweet. 100 TRY

Atmosphere is ok but it’s full of men so a woman can only wait for the order to be ready or wait outside during the busy evenings as it feels uncomfortable.

We’ve also been there several times and they didn’t have croissants which is a main thing on their menu. 🤔

Edit: I tried the glaya sandwich with added cheese. So good! I also asked for my Nescafé to have extra milk. I think it tastes much better this way.

Name: Albero Coffee
Address: Fulya, Aytekin Kotil Cd. No.23B, Şişli
Author: Asma Kahtani
Review:
I have tried the crepe Nutella and the mini pancakes Nutella, it was legitimately delicious chocolate flavored sweet.

Would definitely recommend it especially when you have a strong craving for Nutella😍💯

Name: Albero Coffee
Address: Fulya, Aytekin Kotil Cd. No.23B, Şişli
Author: Hazem Cj
Review: Very nice place if you want to enjoy an Italian coffee, i advice you to try thier breakfast sweets. Amazing place highly recommended

Name: Albero Coffee
Address: Fulya, Aytekin Kotil Cd. No.23B, Şişli
Author: Ömer Ceylan
Review: One of the best espresso macchiatos I had in Istanbul.

Name: Albero Coffee
Address: Fulya, Aytekin Kotil Cd. No.23B, Şişli
Author: Vyacheslav Pervertskiy
Review: They start working at 9 in Google, you come at 9:30, they are cleaning. Very long waiting, too much sweet dishes. And there are no prices in the menu, it is unacceptable.

Name: Kevoc’s Coffee
Address: Bozkurt, Türkbeyi Sk. 96/B, Şişli
Author: Bonillo Real Estate
Review: I’m visiting Istanbul and found this cozy coffee place by accident and I can really recommend it, nice atmosphere and the cakes really tasty, homemade by the sister’s owner, you have to try the lemon pie!

Name: Kevoc’s Coffee
Address: Bozkurt, Türkbeyi Sk. 96/B, Şişli
Author: Reone water
Review: Mr. Ferit and Ms. Elif are very sweet people and their service is as wonderful as their desserts and coffee. A warm and friendly cafe in the middle of the street is preferred and recommended⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Name: Kevoc’s Coffee
Address: Bozkurt, Türkbeyi Sk. 96/B, Şişli
Author: Gökalp Zenginer
Review: Ice latte was nice. Reasonable prices from most chain coffee shops

Name: Kevoc’s Coffee
Address: Bozkurt, Türkbeyi Sk. 96/B, Şişli
Author: Ertuğrul Kurt
Review: It has a dim, warm environment. The song choices are also very nice. I tried the filter coffee and american coffee and I definitely recommend it, I liked it, they don't say it's good.

Name: Kevoc’s Coffee
Address: Bozkurt, Türkbeyi Sk. 96/B, Şişli
Author: Meryem Meryem
Review: It is a place run by two very sweet brothers, with good coffee, tea and desserts, and very affordable prices compared to its peers. It's also a cute two-story place with books and chess boards for you to read inside.

Name: Sabba Coffee
Address: Bebek, Cevdet Paşa Cd. No:46/C, Beşiktaş
Author: Houman Fathi
Review:
Nice coffee.
I wish they were more kind and had a better place to seat.

Name: Sabba Coffee
Address: Bebek, Cevdet Paşa Cd. No:46/C, Beşiktaş
Author: Bex
Review: Excellent flat white. Perfect Turkish coffee. Extensive coffee menu and you can buy beans to take home. The service is fantastic, only pity there isn't a cafe to sit in.

Name: Sabba Coffee
Address: Bebek, Cevdet Paşa Cd. No:46/C, Beşiktaş
Author: Dan Rowe
Review: Very nice cold brew. Tried 3 other coffee shops but for varied reasons (too crowded, no filters, no cold brew) ended up leaving them - found this place and I’m glad I did.

Name: Sabba Coffee
Address: Bebek, Cevdet Paşa Cd. No:46/C, Beşiktaş
Author: Imane Benjabar
Review: I just wanted to take a moment to thank Seçkin for his amazing customer service. He was so helpful and kind, and he really went above and beyond to make sure I had a great experience. He also made me the most delicious coffee I've ever had! I highly recommend Sabba Coffee, and I'll definitely be back to see Seçkin again  🙏🏻🙏🏻

Name: Sabba Coffee
Address: Bebek, Cevdet Paşa Cd. No:46/C, Beşiktaş
Author: Cory Katuna
Review: Darling spot, super kind owner and proper coffee. Been looking for a spot like this in Istanbul.

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: K Min
Review:
Cozy interior with lots of seating. WiFi and outlets are available so it's great for remote working. But the music is quite loud so not ideal if you have lots of meetings.

Food wise, the Penne with Meatballs is pretty good. However I didn't like how (weirdly) sweet my oat milk flat white was.

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: Rob Reid
Review:
I had a nice breakfast croissant and a cappuccino.  I sat at the outdoor tables but think it's probably nicer indoors.   The mural creates some nice ambiance, but the street is a bit busy, and there are noisy air-conditioning vents blowing warm air out on the street.
That said, my server was very nice, and the food was very good.

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: Steve Migliara
Review:
Nice coffee shop with added breakfast menu. Right next to the Galata Tower.
Decent place and clean.
Like and follow for more amazing places to see and visit around the World

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: Yiğit Torun
Review: Nice place just next to Galata Tower.  Very nice design inside. We sat inside and work for hours. The wifi was a bit slow, I didn’t like the taste of Turkish coffee. However, overall it was nice to chill there a bit. Also, the cheesecake was tasty!

Name: Federal Galata
Address: Şahkulu, Küçük Hendek Cd. No:7, Beyoğlu
Author: Pepe Barajas
Review: Had an omelette and espresso chai late. The food was good and the barista is very talented! Relaxed coffee shop with friendly service. Laptop friendly too.

Name: The Core Coffee Roastery & Eatery Fenerbahçe
Address: Fenerbahçe, Operatör Cemil Topuzlu Cd. No:7, Kadıköy
Author: Richard Smittenaar
Review: Flat white wasn't any good, some of the worst coffee I had in Istanbul, keeping in mind that I made an effort to go by good places. Fine if you're not a picky coffee drinker, but go somewhere else if you are

Name: The Core Coffee Roastery & Eatery Fenerbahçe
Address: Fenerbahçe, Operatör Cemil Topuzlu Cd. No:7, Kadıköy
Author: Susan Moling
Review: Nice little coffee shop with great coffee and fresh, delicious food. I got a cappuccino and simit breakfast with 2 eggs. The blackberry jam, muharmara and herbed suzme yogurt sauces were fresh, flavorful and distinct. The cappuccino was well prepared and yummy. Highly recommend coming here for a light breakfast and coffee! (Photo doesn't show complete portion since I ate half of it before taking the photo🤣)

Name: The Core Coffee Roastery & Eatery Fenerbahçe
Address: Fenerbahçe, Operatör Cemil Topuzlu Cd. No:7, Kadıköy
Author: Nadya Styazhkina
Review:
Best coffee. Best service. Best staff. We have   real pleasure every time we visit this place. I do appreciate the way they deal with all their clients.
Banana roll - best desert ever. Ice tea and cold brew are great. I do believe this place makes our mahalle great, cozy and super friendly part of Istanbul.
And please try their Hindi füme kruvassan. Yummy.

Name: The Core Coffee Roastery & Eatery Fenerbahçe
Address: Fenerbahçe, Operatör Cemil Topuzlu Cd. No:7, Kadıköy
Author: Nadia Khotyanovich
Review: Quite a lovely place. Friendly personal. Coffee is very tasty (even not perfect to my taste). Definitely will pop in again😍

Name: The Core Coffee Roastery & Eatery Fenerbahçe
Address: Fenerbahçe, Operatör Cemil Topuzlu Cd. No:7, Kadıköy
Author: Evgenii Minkov
Review:
Top Tier Cafe. I'd been a customer almost every working day during my stay in Istanbul.

What I enjoyed in particular: 1. Owners and Staff are extremely competent - and charismatic. Most speak fluent english. 2. Coffee is great, every day different beans are served. The V60 I tried here is the best to the day. 3. The sweets they serve (cheesecakes, cookies, croissants, etc) are either prepared on-site or sourced from the co-owned business, which results in stellar quality and delicious taste. 4. The place is very friendly towards IT people working remotely - every table has 2 sockets within reach (including outdoors space), chairs are comfortable, tables are sturdy and of average height. 5. If you sit working long enough (30 minutes or so), you get a giant vessel with water, so that you don't become thirsty

Name: Pop Up Coffee TR
Address: Müeyyedzade, Galip Dede Cd. 105 b, Beyoğlu
Author: Ivan Šarić
Review: We stumbled upon Pop Up Cafe on our way to the Galata Tower, and it turned out to be the perfect spot for a break. The cafe is located just below the tower, and the coffee was fantastic—perfectly prepared and very tasty. The ambiance is lovely, and the staff was extremely friendly and cheerful.

Name: Pop Up Coffee TR
Address: Müeyyedzade, Galip Dede Cd. 105 b, Beyoğlu
Author: Alexa Forero
Review:
It's a great place.
Here they mantein the quality of service and products.
The prices are fair although they are very close to beutiful Galata tower.
The toilet were perfectly clean.

Name: Pop Up Coffee TR
Address: Müeyyedzade, Galip Dede Cd. 105 b, Beyoğlu
Author: Rafhaan Shah
Review: Awesome selection of drinks, including various lattes and chocolate drinks. I opted for the Salted Caramel Mocha, and the Basque Cheesecake which were both great. Also had a banging music playlist playing!

Name: Pop Up Coffee TR
Address: Müeyyedzade, Galip Dede Cd. 105 b, Beyoğlu
Author: Mulham alfarsi
Review: "Great coffee and a variety of delicious sweets. A perfect spot for a delightful treat!"

Name: Pop Up Coffee TR
Address: Müeyyedzade, Galip Dede Cd. 105 b, Beyoğlu
Author: Riad Ghanma
Review:
coffee is good, music is loud, prices are high_ish.
didn't like the staff outfits

Name: Mikel Coffee Akaretler
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Marwa Djebbi
Review:
I really loved the interior design and the decoration in this coffee shop
I got cappuccino and a Nutella cake it was really yummy
The staff are really friendly
The atmosphere is amazing you study or work there or even chat with your friends

Name: Mikel Coffee Akaretler
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: R Al
Review:
They had the best San Sebastián I had of all the places I visited in Istanbul. Maybe it was because I was hungry or it was because it didn’t taste too sweet. The girl in the hijab working there was so friendly and smiley which is so rare in Istanbul. I don’t mind that they usually don’t smile but when they do, I notice and appreciate it.

My phone died on the night of the game and before I had a chance to recharge it using a portable battery which they have available here. This is very useful and from what I know, not many places offer this. You need a Turkish number and the Porty app to use it but unfortunately my phone died and I was too shy to borrow another customer’s charging cable. I ended up getting a taxi. But this coffee shop became a place I kept in mind in case I found myself in a pickle.

San Sebastián cake 180 TL

Name: Mikel Coffee Akaretler
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Dalia Alnajjar
Review: I loved every aspect of it. The decor is amazing. It’s very spacious. It’s a quite place in the middle of all the craziness. Their service is amazing, the staff is very nice. They serve you cold water for free and they give you a vis Ute with your coffee. Their mugs are very unique. The coffee tastes good and the prices are very good as well. It’s my new favorite place in besiktas.

Name: Mikel Coffee Akaretler
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Ongun Güvenç
Review: Mikel Coffee is a coffee chain with branches in Turkey, including one located in the Beşiktaş district of Istanbul. It offers a variety of hot and cold coffee drinks, as well as pastries and sandwiches. Mikel Coffee is known for its high-quality coffee beans, which are sourced from around the world and roasted in-house. If you happen to be in the Beşiktaş area and looking for a coffee spot, you might want to check out Mikel Coffee.

Name: Mikel Coffee Akaretler
Address: Vişnezade, Süleyman Seba Cd. No:1, Beşiktaş
Author: Mohamed F. M. Elzaianey
Review:
One of my favorite coffee shops. Totally cool and worth it.
Different flavors that cause you addiction.

Lovely and friendly staff. Just ask and they would help you with variety of choices.

Try it and you would reconsider about your coffee taste.

Coffee lovers would love and adore this place 💕

A place I can call home for everything, it became my everyday coffee.

Do come and enjoy the coffee community.

Name: Nova Coffee House & Roastery
Address: Zekeriyaköy Mahallesi 4. Cadde N2 Blok No : 6 / D, Sarıyer
Author: Ari Zingillioglu
Review:
Both hot and cold coffee based drinks were pretty good. The interior decoration is very warm and welcoming. Outdoor seating can be improved a little bit in terms of comfort seating.

Easy access, very friendly personnel, reasonable prices.

Overall score 4.2/5 for a Coffee Shop

Name: Nova Coffee House & Roastery
Address: Zekeriyaköy Mahallesi 4. Cadde N2 Blok No : 6 / D, Sarıyer
Author: Mohamad Taleb
Review: Passing by this area & I stopped by Nova Coffee to have a Simit w/cheese, Tea & then Cortado. First, the staff are very friendly & courteous “rare in Istanbul” my cortado was full of coffee flavor to the last drop.

Name: Nova Coffee House & Roastery
Address: Zekeriyaköy Mahallesi 4. Cadde N2 Blok No : 6 / D, Sarıyer
Author: Baris Demir
Review: It’s a great place for properly made coffee and nice environment. Cakes with strawberry are highly recommended. The owner of the shop is a very nice person, talkative and caring. If you’re nearby it worth giving a visit.

Name: Nova Coffee House & Roastery
Address: Zekeriyaköy Mahallesi 4. Cadde N2 Blok No : 6 / D, Sarıyer
Author: Artur
Review: Guys, if you want a decent coffee, this is the place to go. A very good latte to say the least. Coffee is great and staff are very attentive. Highly recommend for some decent brew.

Name: Nova Coffee House & Roastery
Address: Zekeriyaköy Mahallesi 4. Cadde N2 Blok No : 6 / D, Sarıyer
Author: Zuleyha Sevilmis
Review: The atmosphere is lovely and the environment is warm

Name: Coffee Brew Lab
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No:5 D:B, Beyoğlu
Author: Nisreen Hms
Review: The owner of this coffee shop is kind, and respectful! Had a red eye coffee and was so good! had a pretty good time, defo recommended.

Name: Coffee Brew Lab
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No:5 D:B, Beyoğlu
Author: Sarah Rodriguez
Review:
I needed a new coffee place and came here because I saw the review photos of the cat. Coffee was good. Big Americano for 75 TL. WiFi good. Barista was nice.

Cat was there and I asked her to hang out with me. She said yes. 5/5 would go back for her and coffee.

Name: Coffee Brew Lab
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No:5 D:B, Beyoğlu
Author: kristof backx
Review: I really liked the cappuccino, VERY good. The barista was so friendly. I wanted a croissant and he baked me a fresh one, on the spot :)

Name: Coffee Brew Lab
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No:5 D:B, Beyoğlu
Author: Yaman Masalha
Review:
If you are looking for a decent cup of coffee Brew lab is the place for that !
It’s located in a very old beautiful area!
Their coffee is amazing and always fresh !
They have a lot of options and their prices are very convenient! The staff are amazingly friendly and professional.
The facility is so clean and smells really nice .
Usually quiet place so you can study there or have a quick meeting.
I would recommend to try their cold drip coffee it tastes really good !
They have a pretty good internet too !
And they care so much about the hygiene of the place!
Totally recommend it !!

Name: Coffee Brew Lab
Address: Kuloğlu, Yeni Çarşı Cd. No:5 D:B, Beyoğlu
Author: Dan Manzoor
Review: Family owned local coffee shop. Great pricing, service, and good quality of food/drinks. 100% recommended!

Name: Glane Coffee
Address: Sinanpaşa, Şht. Dursun Bakan Sk. No:18, Beşiktaş
Author: Agnieszka Relkowska
Review:
So kind people working there, amazing quality of coffee.
Aga

Name: Glane Coffee
Address: Sinanpaşa, Şht. Dursun Bakan Sk. No:18, Beşiktaş
Author: Aras Gorkem Akyunak
Review: Cozy little shop with exceptionally good coffee. Pet friendly, you can pick up and go if you order online. Very good attention to detail. You need to let them know how strong you want your coffee.

Name: Glane Coffee
Address: Sinanpaşa, Şht. Dursun Bakan Sk. No:18, Beşiktaş
Author: Kürtős Kalács
Review: Coffee presentation looks nice but it’s watered down coffee, weak stuff

Name: Glane Coffee
Address: Sinanpaşa, Şht. Dursun Bakan Sk. No:18, Beşiktaş
Author: Doğukan Demir
Review: The business was very attentive, their coffee was delicious.

Name: Glane Coffee
Address: Sinanpaşa, Şht. Dursun Bakan Sk. No:18, Beşiktaş
Author: Gözde Karacaoğlu
Review: The coffee varieties are always fresh, they do not serve coffee that is not fresh, so it is always a reliable cafe. Their coffee is very delicious. You should try Cold Brew Lemonade.

Name: Per Noi Coffee Co. Ortakoy
Address: Mecidiye, Eski Bahçe Sk. No:11/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Aylin
Review:
We returned a year after our first visit and were unfortunately disappointed.

I accidentally dropped a glass bottle and when I asked if I could get a new one the young lady said: "then you have to pay, it's not my problem".

I was really shocked by her cheeky attitude. It's a shame that we came all the way from Kadıköy only for that Café.

The coffee still tastes good and they have oat milk.

_________________

Old review

Really good coffee! We enjoyed a cappuccino and a cold brew and both was delicious. The owner is also very kind. You can see the love he puts into his shop and products. We definitely recommend it!

Name: Per Noi Coffee Co. Ortakoy
Address: Mecidiye, Eski Bahçe Sk. No:11/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Gursal Sinik
Review: Impeccable brewing technique and world class beans. Highly doubt you could find better coffee anywhere else in Istanbul. Worth Ortaköy just for this.

Name: Per Noi Coffee Co. Ortakoy
Address: Mecidiye, Eski Bahçe Sk. No:11/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Kassim Rekieh
Review: Best espresso I’ve had in Istanbul. Haşim is an excellent barista and a great guy. Definitely coming back soon.

Name: Per Noi Coffee Co. Ortakoy
Address: Mecidiye, Eski Bahçe Sk. No:11/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Saleem Diab
Review: The best Cafe experience in Istanbul we’ve had during our one week stay. Located in the old streets of eskibahçe, this unique and trendy coffee shop serves the tastiest Mocha’s, coffee’s and definitely what I would rate as the best croissant and cookies. We couldn’t even chose a favorite. But the vanilla lemon cookie is definitely purely a winner. The service was so friendly and the atmosphere was so welcoming.

Name: Per Noi Coffee Co. Ortakoy
Address: Mecidiye, Eski Bahçe Sk. No:11/B, Beşiktaş
Author: Saleh Alwabel
Review:
Coffee was good, I tried the flatwhit, and it was well made.
Recommended for Coffee..

Name: Coffee Beans
Address: Dumlupınar, Bahçem Sk. No:2, Kadıköy
Author: Jamieson McKenzie
Review: As an American living in nearby Concord, I was happy to find this coffee shop right next to a small Migros grocery store, neither of which show up very easily on Google Maps. The neighborhood has many empty high rise buildings and empty store front, so it takes some walking to find quality. Coffee Beans makes an extraordinary cappuccino for 11 TL.  It is larger than you get in most shops and very tasty. I agree with others who mention the warm staff, plus this shop has superb wifi, a must for me as a writer. Nice place to hang out and enjoy life. The owner is very kind and speaks some English.

Name: Coffee Beans
Address: Dumlupınar, Bahçem Sk. No:2, Kadıköy
Author: Osama Alnimer
Review: Nice, cozy, friendly local family cafe serving really nice drinks, snacks and desserts. Always cheerful and warm people :)

Name: Coffee Beans
Address: Dumlupınar, Bahçem Sk. No:2, Kadıköy
Author: Ismail Habib
Review: Great cozy nice place its a must visit

Name: Coffee Beans
Address: Dumlupınar, Bahçem Sk. No:2, Kadıköy
Author: brky mrtz
Review: Incredibly small portions yet so expensive.

Name: Coffee Beans
Address: Dumlupınar, Bahçem Sk. No:2, Kadıköy
Author: Mustafa Yilmaz
Review: The best coffee in fikirtepe

Name: Neruda Coffee
Address: Kuzguncuk, İcadiye Cd. no:28/A, Üsküdar
Author: Emily Davis
Review: We absolutely loved Neruda Coffee! Friendly service and delicious coffee. They even had vegan milk options. Highly recommend!

Name: Neruda Coffee
Address: Kuzguncuk, İcadiye Cd. no:28/A, Üsküdar
Author: عبدالاله
Review:
Really it is very nice speciality coffee and all my orders it is amazing 👌🏻👌🏻
Thank you ( Furqan and Zainb very nice services🙏🏻)

Name: Neruda Coffee
Address: Kuzguncuk, İcadiye Cd. no:28/A, Üsküdar
Author: Asenka Kim
Review:
Very delicious coffee!
after a long walk in Kuzgunchuk area I highly recommend to stay here for a while. Barista will make awesome coffee (i tried V60 and Chemex on Ethiopia beans).
They have terrace outside, like 6 tables inside with very comfortable sofas.
For coffee they are bringing chocolate as a gift .
The interior is amazing, like hipster coffeeshop style.
also they have a store with some souvenirs and coffee beans.

Name: Neruda Coffee
Address: Kuzguncuk, İcadiye Cd. no:28/A, Üsküdar
Author: Amen Mohammed
Review: the cafe has a good atmosphere, vibes and background music, the I tried first time ice V60 Brazilian, the bean that is used is tasty but it is like water with some notes of coffee hhh, I think their preparing method is wrong, I asked the barista she gave me a rude attitude and answer, in the second visit I tried cold brew, it was good

Name: Neruda Coffee
Address: Kuzguncuk, İcadiye Cd. no:28/A, Üsküdar
Author: Angela Bestauti
Review: Honestly, best ice matcha (i get lime one) across countries (make sure you stir it well, as it comes unstirred and might seem too sweet). I've had v60 here - really good. And what i enjoyed as much as my drinks were their deserts - they serve Marlenka here both chocolate and honey and i am super picky with my honey cake as i am coming from a place where they know how to do a proper one.

Name: Poco Coffee & Matcha Bar
Address: Suadiye, Kazım Özalp Sk. 19/A, Kadıköy
Author: Aynaz Ghosi
Review:
Everyone says this place has the best matcha in Istanbul, but I’m not sure if it's really the best. It was good, but I can’t say I loved it. We tried the strawberry matcha, but it didn’t have much strawberry flavor; it was only used for decoration on the edges of the glass. It would have been better as milk foam.

But the guy who is working there was very sweet and treated the customers very kindly.

Name: Poco Coffee & Matcha Bar
Address: Suadiye, Kazım Özalp Sk. 19/A, Kadıköy
Author: Mina
Review: Nice staff and the place tiny but adorable ! , I tried vanilla matcha latte and I didn’t really liked it that much ->tho It’s not that bad so I definitely will try the other drinks

Name: Poco Coffee & Matcha Bar
Address: Suadiye, Kazım Özalp Sk. 19/A, Kadıköy
Author: kindah
Review:
ordered : matcha
rate : 7/10

note : - says “ceremonial grade”
matcha, but doesn’t feel
like one.

- milk more than matcha

- syrup isn’t well mixed

overall nice atmosphere 🤍

Name: Poco Coffee & Matcha Bar
Address: Suadiye, Kazım Özalp Sk. 19/A, Kadıköy
Author: Tabark Mohammed
Review:
Having my drink ready in literally less than a minute in rush hour in a weekend night in Istanbul with the place full of costumers is ABSOLUTELY INCREDIBLE

huge respect to the employees .. you guys are amazingly professional 👏🏻👏🏻

Name: Poco Coffee & Matcha Bar
Address: Suadiye, Kazım Özalp Sk. 19/A, Kadıköy
Author: flan al-flani
Review: The cashier is sweet, but barista is nasty, she got my order wrong and when I told the girl at the cashier she seemed as if she was begging the barista to do another one, the barista grabbed it and slammed it in the sink saying UFFF YAAAA in a loud voice. As if they were the ones paying for it. So sad. Never going there again 👎👎

Name: XYZ Cihangir - the Coffee Guru
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Anahtar Sk. No:3/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Fahad Mizi
Review: One of the best coffees I’ve ever had in a long time. It’s a small shop with a big heart. Shout out to the owner for the cozy vibe aesthetic

Name: XYZ Cihangir - the Coffee Guru
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Anahtar Sk. No:3/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Rolitta .S
Review: Best speciality coffee is the area ☕ do y miss out, they offer nut milk too!

Name: XYZ Cihangir - the Coffee Guru
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Anahtar Sk. No:3/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Anton Antoniuk
Review: Although we only had an iced latte, it’s 5/5 for everything: food, service, atmosphere. The ambiance — cozy homie interior, music, and hospitality — was so inviting that I couldn't resist stopping to relax for a while. A charming spot.

Name: XYZ Cihangir - the Coffee Guru
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Anahtar Sk. No:3/A, Beyoğlu
Author: Muhammad Khan
Review: This coffee shop made a big claim outside, saying it has the best coffee. This perked my curiosity so I ordered an Affagato and it truly was the best I have had in my life.  The vibe in this place is relaxed and friendly. The owner and his partner and staff made me feel truly welcome and we had a great conversation in English.  If you are in this neighbourhood, I highly recommend you check out the "best coffee" at xyz. Bilal

Name: XYZ Cihangir - the Coffee Guru
Address: Kılıçali Paşa, Anahtar Sk. No:3/A, Beyoğlu
Author: ZeeZee Khan
Review: Perfect little coffee shop! It’s a beautiful little shop with really incredible coffee! Aykut was so hospitable and is really a master at his craft! We ordered an iced caramel latte and a cortado and they were perfect! Not too bitter or too sweet! I highly recommend checking it out for the coffee and the vibes!
